那我确认一下哦…确实没搞错。你得付款，我才能把货物给你。当然了，你也可以拒收，我们会把货物退给寄件人。

Okay, I'll check that again for you... And it's no mistake. Please pay first, and then I'll be able to release the item to you. Of course, you're welcome to decline, and I can just return it to the sender.
好的。货款已确认收到，请拿好你的货物～
Okay, payment received. Please take your item~
你打开邮包，看到里面静静地躺着一张星际和平公司的储值卡，面值<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点。
You open up the parcel and see a stored-value card from the IPC just lying there, with a face value of <unbreak>1000</unbreak> credits.
好的。不过退货会产生邮费，需要支付<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点。
Alright, but in that case there's a return fee. It's <unbreak>1000</unbreak> credits.
因为这是到付邮件，所以拒收退件是不能选择到付的…不然如果对方选择赖账，我们就要承担损失了。
This parcel is cash-on-delivery, so returns can't be cash-on-return, I'm afraid... Otherwise, we'd be on the hook for any losses if the debt's reneged on.
这是我们的规章制度，不好意思啊。
I'm sorry, but that's in our rules and regulations.
先别开门！等一下！我现在没穿衣服！
Don't come in! Wait up! I'm naked!
别！我不是什么坏人，我这是有苦衷的！
No! I'm not a bad guy. I've got a lot going on!
虽然说来你未必会信，但我是有苦衷的！
You might not believe me but... I've got a lot going on!
我是学宫的算学教授…可能我把所有精力都分配给算学了吧，所以有时候…在日常生活中会比较粗心……
I'm a math professor at the academy... Perhaps it's because I throw myself into my math research so much, sometimes... I can get careless in my everyday life.
尤其是灵感到来的时候，我更是完全顾不上现实世界中那些远不如数学法则简洁优美的东西……
Especially when I get that hot shot of inspiration, I couldn't give a hoot about any of that real-world stuff which is far less simple and majestic than my beautiful math...
今天也是，我正在研究能否用宇宙际玛姬诺夫理论来论证费尔盖=邵宇猜想，一边思索着就一边出门散步了……
Today's no difference. Right now I'm looking into whether or not the interstellar Maginov theory can demonstrate the Felgay-Shaoyu hypothesis, so I've decided to take a walk and ponder things...
直到听到路上有人尖叫，我才意识到，自己竟然忘记穿衣服了！我一路逃窜，躲到了这个货船里……
It wasn't until I heard a piercing scream that I realized I'd forgotten to put on my clothes! I scurried away in a flash and ended up hiding here in this freight skiff...
路过的好心人，能不能请你帮我取一下衣服…去星槎海找「广云袖」的予衿小姐，和她说是「那位老师」的请托，她就能明白！

O, generous stranger, could you please help me get some clothes to wear... If you could find a Miss Yujin at Cloudbreadth Sleeves over in the Starskiff Haven and tell her "that teacher" needs help, she'll know what I mean!
求求你了！救救我吧！我一定会报答你的大恩大德！
I'm begging you! Help me, please! I'd love to repay your extraordinary kindness!
（嗯？怪了，舱门怎么没打开？是不是哪里卡住了？）
(Huh? That's weird. The hatch won't open? Is it stuck somewhere?)
我来帮「那位老师」取东西。
I'll help "that teacher" with his fetch errand.
啊？「那位老师」啊…又来了…好的，我知道了，请您稍等。
Mmm? "That teacher"... Again... Okay, I know, I know. Give me a minute.
这个包裹里就是「那位老师」需要的东西。他已经付过钱了，您直接拿给他就好。
This parcel here, it's got everything "that teacher" needs. He's already paid for it, so you can just take it over for him.
（前一艘货运星槎还没离港…大概因为「那位老师」还被困在里面。去找予衿帮他要件衣服吧。）
(The last freight starskiff hasn't left the port yet... Probably because "that teacher" is still stuck inside. Go find Yujin and help get his clothes.)
太好了，你回来了！我刚才差一点点就以为你不会回来了！快，顺着快递箱的门缝把衣服递给我吧，我开始觉得冷了……
Excellent, you're back! I almost thought you weren't going to come back for me! Quickly, pass me the clothes through the courier package. It's starting to feel a little chilly...
真是太感谢你的大恩大德了！集装箱里这些东西，是我全身上下最值钱的东西了，请你收下吧。
Thank you so much for your inestimable kindness! These things in the container here are the most valuable possessions I own. You've earned them.
我寻思你也没穿衣服啊？
你误会了，这整艘货运星槎都是我的。当时就算我再慌不择路，也不能闯进别人的货运星槎里吧？我可是很有涵养的！
You're mistaken. This entire freight starskiff is all mine. Even given how panicked I was, there's still no way I could sneak into someone else's freight starskiff, right? I'm a conservative guy!
那我先走了啊…刚闹出了这么丢脸的事，我实在没脸面在市面上晃了……
Well, I'll be going then... Such an embarrassment for me, there's no way I can show my face at the markets again...
你好，我是「枘凿六合」秘密结社的「智囊」。说是「智囊」，这也只是我的代号而已。
Hello there, I'm Think-Tank from the secret society Hexanexus. Think-Tank is just my code name in the club.
毕竟魔方秘社只是一个隐秘的组织，即便是在工造司内，也鲜少有人知道我们的成员结构，成员之间都是用代号称呼彼此的。
After all, it's just a secret society, and not even the rest of our Artisanship Commission colleagues know who our members are. We all call each other by our code names.
抱歉，光顾着自己说话了，你肯定有很多疑惑，你可以随便问我。
Sorry, I've been waffling on. You must have a lot of questions, so ask me whatever you'd like.
你们竟然真的是秘密组织？
Are you really a secret society?
没错，工造司原本就有着一群热爱「枘凿六合」的匠人，但是我们的爱好常常不被世人所理解，总是有人对我们抱有不解和敌意。
That's right. There used to be a group of us craftsmen in the Artisanship Commission who love the Hexanexus. But normies never really got us, so there's always someone trying to hate on us.
后来我们选择成立秘密组织，为的就是办好一件事情——
Later on, we set up this secret society in order to do one thing, and do it well—
让全世界都充满「枘凿六合」！让人们沉浸在「枘凿六合」的幸福里。
To saturate the world with the Hexanexus! To let everyone immerse themselves in the pleasure of the Hexanexus.
你们都是怎样招募新成员的？
How do you guys find new recruits?
主要分为两种形式，一种为「社会招收」，一种为「内部推荐」。
There're two main ways actually: One is called "social recruitment," and the other way is by "internal recommendation."
那些在路边偶然玩到了「枘凿六合」，爱上了「枘凿六合」的，我们称之为「社会招收」，对象广泛但效率不高。
We call it social recruitment when there's someone on the roadside obsessing over the Hexanexus. This casts a wide net, but few candidates are successful.
成员之间相互引荐，由信赖的成员担保新成员加入的，我们称之为「内部推荐」，招收对象值得信赖。
Members also make recommendations among themselves, and if trustworthy members vouch for a new recruit, we call this recruitment an "internal recommendation." These candidates are trustworthy.
无论是哪种加入方式，加入者都必须热爱「枘凿六合」。
No matter which way you come to us, everyone MUST be passionate about the Hexanexus.
你们秘社里还有些什么代号？
What other code names have you got in your secret society?
你对我们的代号感兴趣啊……
So you wanna know about our code names, huh...
大家取代号都挺随意的，有自己取的，比如「说书人」、「丹青师」、「机巧士」……
Everyone's code name is pretty random. Some pick names themselves, like Storyteller, Danqing Artist, the Ingeniator...
也有人直接沿用别人用过的代号，比如我这「智囊」，很多人都当过「智囊」。
And some just adopt a nickname that's been picked out by someone else, like me — Think-Tank. Lots of people have been "Think-Tanks" before.
为什么选在这么偏僻的地方？
Why did you choose such an out-of-the-way place like this?
我们毕竟是个秘密组织嘛。
Well, we're a secret society, after all.
再说了，这附近就有「枘凿六合」，我们一会儿交流起来更加方便。
Besides, there's the Hexanexus nearby, so it's easier for us to link up over here.
Let's get down to business then.
很好，闲聊就到此为止，首先，我要授予你「秘社终身社员」的称号，恭喜你。
Great, that's enough chit-chat. First off, I'd like to confer the title of Lifetime Hex Club Membership onto you. Congratulations.
接下来想问你的是，在你看来，我们要怎样才能「吸量」，我们要怎样才能提高「次日留存」，我们要怎样才能成为「爆款」？
Next, I'd like to ask you — in your opinion — how can we attract more recruits? How can we improve our next-day retention? How can we go viral?
Isn't the Hexanexus a marvelous invention?
可是你也看到了，这么久以来，根本没有多少人愿意关注「枘凿六合」。所以，秘社才会想办法骗更多的人来玩。
However, as you can see, this whole time we've struggled to get anyone to play the Hexanexus. So this whole "secret society" is a way of tricking more people into playing it.
这就是你们「创造一切的初心」吗？
Is that what you mean by "Aspiring to Create Everything"?
抱歉，没想到你是个这么感性的人，我问错问题了。
Sorry, I didn't expect you to be such a perceptive person. I asked the wrong question.
你不应该问我，而是问分析师。
Don't ask me. Ask an analyst.
…你说的有道理，这不应该询问你。
...You have a point. I shouldn't be asking you about this.
你问的这些东西我都不知道。
I don't have any answers to these questions of yours.
看来，是我有些急于求成了。
Seems like I'm a little impatient for results here.
这些问题一直困扰着我们，但我好像问错人了。
These issues have been plaguing us forever, but I think I'm seeking answers from the wrong guy.
The Hexanexus gameplay is no good.
...I have a hard time agreeing with your point of view.
那么，我换个问题吧，我们应该如何让「枘凿六合」变得更好玩一些呢？
Then let me change the question. How can we make the Hexanexus even more fun?
其他维度？现在已经有「虚」和「实」了，除此之外…还能再增加花纹。
Extra dimensions? We already have Virtual and Real. And... We could also put in some more decorative patterns.
现在的难度还是太低了。
难度太低？要是在方块上增加「花纹对应」的要求，也许还能更难。
It's too easy!? If we added a pattern-matching element to the game, it should be even more difficult.
The device shape is too plain.
造型单调？要是在方块上增加「花纹」，说不定就能打破这种单调感……
The shape is too plain? If we add in some decorative patterning, that would maybe shake up things...
这样吧，你稍等一下，我去给「枘凿六合」加上「花纹」。
Okay, wait a second. I'm going to add some decorative patterns to this Hexanexus.
「智囊」不愧是工造司出身的工匠，「枘凿六合」经过他的改造，已经改头换面。
No wonder Think-Tank is such an accomplished craftsman at the Artisanship Commission. The Hexanexus is completely modified as per his specifications.
Why don't you give it a try now?
怎么样，怎么样，「枘凿六合」变得更好玩了吗？
How about it, then? Is the Hexanexus even more fun now?
It really is more fun now.
那可真是太好了啊，新版本的「枘凿六合」肯定大受欢迎。
That's great. This new Hexanexus model is gonna be a hit.
不清楚的话，多试几次肯定就明白了。
Give it a few more tries and you'll definitely come around to it.
Just the opposite — it's less fun now.
我不信，你让我再多去做几个你试试。
I don't believe it. Let me make a few more custom changes for you.
不愧是「枘凿六合」的深度测试用户，你的建议简直是醍醐灌顶。
You really are a Hexanexus power tester! These suggestions of yours are simply illuminating.
魔方秘社很快就会将所有的「枘凿六合」升级改造，位置就在你之前玩过的地方。
We'll soon have all of our Hexanexus games upgraded. You can find one where you were playing it before.
这可是个大版本更新啊，干脆就叫「枘凿六合<unbreak>2.0</unbreak>」吧。
This is a major update, so we may as well call this the Hexanexus <unbreak>2.0</unbreak>.
新版本肯定会吸引新人的。
This new version is sure to be a hit.
再说了，我们希望你也要继续玩啊。
Besides, we hope that you can keep playing as well.
Aren't you going to post a preview?
我会考虑一下的，如果这样做有宣传效果的话。
I'll think about it when we come to promotions.
除此之外，这次新的「枘凿六合」里面，我们也会放置宝箱，你放心，只要你玩「枘凿六合」，我们就是异父异母的好{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，这些宝箱都归你。
Oh yeah, we'll place chests inside our new Hexanexus this time. Don't worry about it. Just play the Hexanexus and you'll get your chests — now that you're my good {F#Sister}{M#Brother}.
再见了…啊，差点儿忘了，给。这是我承诺给你的「秘社终身社员」奖励。
Goodbye then... Ah, I almost forget: Here you go. This is your gift as our latest Lifetime Hex Club Membership.
请一定要多玩啊，「枘凿六合」天下第一！
Play lots and play often. Hexanexus is the bestest!
你看看你看看，这地方都是些什么人啊。
Just look! Look at the kinds of people that come here.
有逃避现实醉生梦死的，有满嘴谎言虚情假意的，还有又哭又闹求安慰的…也对，哪个靠谱的人会到梦里来？
There are daydreamers escaping from reality, liars and hypocrites, and tantrums from squabblers desperate for comfort... That's right. What kind of dependable person would ever venture into a dream?
依我看，匹诺康尼就是个大垃圾桶，装满了来自全宇宙的失败者——遇到一点小挫折就狂刷弱保软。
By my reckoning, Penacony is a huge trashcan filled with losers from all over the universe — who turn into babies the second they come across the slightest setback.
在这种地方待久了，你会不自觉地堕落下去——你懂吗？你的思维、情感，都会在纵欲中被磨钝，到最后整个人就废了！

Spend too long in a place like this, and you'll start to degenerate without realizing... Do you understand? Your thoughts, your emotions — everything is blunted by over-indulgence and in the end you'll become useless!
So what should we do, then?
不要以为我看不出你暗戳戳的讽刺。你已经打心眼里开始认同这种生活方式了，是不是？
Don't think I can't tell that's biting sarcasm. You've already started to endorse this kind of lifestyle from the bottom of your heart, haven't you?
娱乐就是对宇宙资源的浪费、对普通人努力的亵渎！匹诺康尼这种地方，早该关停了！
Entertainment is a grand waste of the universe's resources, and disrespectful to the hard work of everyday people! Places like Penacony should've been shut down a long time ago!
试想一下吧，这片宇宙孕育了多少文明种族，其中有能力离开母星的占多少？真正迈出那关键一步，选择踏上星际旅途的又有多少？
Think about it: How many civilizations has this universe spawned? And how many have star-faring capabilities? How many actually make the pivotal choice to set out on an intergalactic journey?
有机会走出家乡、探索星空的人，要么是亿中挑一的幸运儿，要么付出了常人难以想象的代价——我就是后者之一。
Anyone with the chance to leave their homeworld behind and explore the universe has either one-in-a-billion luck, or has paid a price unfathomable to ordinary people. I am one of the latter.
为了离开母星，我寒窗苦读数十载，终于敲开了博识学会的大门——再看看这里的人，他们把这来之不易的机会用来干什么了？花天酒地！

I studied painstakingly for decades to leave my home system before finally entering the hallowed realm of the Intelligentsia Guild — and just look at the people here. What have they done with this hard-earned opportunity of theirs? Live out a life of debauchery!
母星费尽心思养育你，是希望你能够建设它，不是为了让你放肆享乐！
Your home planet puts all these efforts into raising you out of hope that you can build it up — not for your wanton pleasure!
…这么简单的道理，这些人怎么就不明白呢？！
...How can these people not understand such simple truths!?
我就不一样了，我没有母星。
I'm different. I don't have a home planet.
男人先是沉默，随后用复杂的眼神看向你，很难判断那眼神中传达的是怜悯还是惊奇。
The man falls silent before shooting you a complicated look with his eyes. It is impossible to tell whether it is a look of pity, or wonder.
既然如此…那咱们也别再计较了。去做你想做的事情吧。
Notwithstanding that being the case... Let's stop bickering about it. Go, do whatever you want to do.
说罢，他又换上那副脸谱般的愤懑表情，重新投入到对路人的批判中。
He placed his indignant expression back on his face before throwing himself back into his people-watching and criticism.
你的生活想必很不如意吧。
Your life must be very unhappy indeed.
You, I... that's a personal attack!
他的头发和眉毛因愤怒拧成一团，好一会儿之后才舒展开来。
His hair and brow knitted together in a rage, taking quite some time before they unfurl.
…哼，我才不跟你一般见识！我好歹也是博识学会的成员，必须保持涵养……
...Hmm, I'm not stooping to your level! I'm a member of the Intelligentsia Guild and ought to maintain self-discipline...
年轻人，回头是岸——这是我唯一能对你说的了。
Youngster, there's always a pathway back... That's all I can say to you.
男人陷入了长久的沉默，只能用眼神向你投以回答。
The man sank into a long silence and could only reply to you with a look.
那眼神仿佛在说：你怕不是把脑子玩坏了。
That look seemed to be saying: I'm afraid you've lost your mind.
哎，整天这样醉生梦死，能取得成功就怪了！
Ah, it'd be a miracle to see any success through fuddling about in a drunken stupor like this all day.
Lots of guests have already succeeded.
如、如果没有玩物丧志的话，他们本可以变得更成功，取得更大的成就——每在玩乐上浪费一秒，你能给这个宇宙做贡献的时间就减少了一分。

I—If they weren't obsessed with minutiae, then they could be even greater successes making even greater achievements — every second wasted on leisure is another minute lost that you could have devoted to saving the universe.
只能说懂的人都懂，不懂的…那是朽木不可雕也！
All I can say is, those who get it REALLY get it, and those who don't... Well, it's no use carving rotten wood, is it?
年轻人，回头是岸——这是我唯一能对你说的了。
Youngster, there's always a pathway back... That's all I can say to you.
男人突然不再聒噪，仿佛一台播音器被突然拔掉了电源；他的表情和肢体也陷入僵直。
The man suddenly clams up, like a pair of headphones that just had its cable ripped out. His expression and body both stiffens up.
…奇怪，我感觉…突然冷静了下来。
…仔细想想，取乐有什么不好的呢？追求乐趣本来就该是生命的一部分才对。
...Thinking carefully about it — what's wrong with having fun? The pursuit of leisure SHOULD be a part of our lives.
You're finally starting to sound normal.
的确，之前我一看到别人开心的样子就不冷静，好像浑身上下有虚卒在爬——这是不正常的。
Indeed, I used to lose my cool whenever I saw someone looking happy, as though voidrangers were crawling all over me — and that is not normal behavior.
Have you got everything figured out now?
No, I can't quite say that...
但必须承认，之前我一看到别人开心的样子就不冷静，好像浑身上下有虚卒在爬——这是不正常的。
But, I have to admit I used to lose my cool whenever I saw someone looking happy, as though voidrangers were crawling all over me — and that is not normal behavior.
不过必须承认，之前我一看到别人开心的样子就不冷静，好像浑身上下有虚卒在爬——这是不正常的。
But I do have to admit I used to lose my cool whenever I saw someone looking happy, as though voidrangers were crawling all over me — and that is not normal behavior.
我想，我的愤怒…大概只是出于妒忌而已。
I think that this rage of mine... probably stems from envy.
我的家乡是一个被公司并入宇宙市场，却始终不怎么发达的星球。自出生起，我就活在巨大的落差之中……
My home planet was brought into the universal market by IPC, but was never really very developed. Ever since I was born, I've grown up among a great disparity of wealth...
星球本地的工作除了采矿就是种田，根本没什么高级就业岗位。所以年轻人都渴望着走出去，到广阔宇宙里寻找机遇。
The only local work available on-planet is mining or farming, with no hope whatsoever of any career advancement. So the youth all hunger to break out and search for opportunity in this vast universe.
可离开的路无非就那么几条：要么成为公司员工，要么加入博识学会——后者的待遇比前者更高，竞争自然也激烈许多。
But the pathways out are few and far between: Either become an IPC worker or join the Intelligentsia Guild. As the latter's salary is higher, competition is naturally more intense.
所以你成为了公司员工？
And so you became an IPC worker?
呵，怎么可能？公司员工虽然能穿越星海，待遇却跟留在母星上没什么两样。那些怀着一腔热血的年轻人，最终达成愿望的少之又少。

Er, no? IPC workers might have access to space travel but the pay is hardly better than staying on-planet. Very few of those youths brimming with enthusiasm ever get to achieve their dreams in the end.
所以你加入了博识学会？
And so you joined the Intelligentsia Guild?
没错，因此我必须为十几轮测试和答辩做准备。这远比想象中困难许多，几乎耗尽了我全部的精力。
Correct. I had to pass a dozen rounds of testing and an oral defense. It was far more difficult than I anticipated, and almost completely exhausted me.
哈，有些星球或许存在这个选择，但我的母星不包括在内——在我们那儿，不干活，就没饭吃。
Ha, that might be an option on some planets, but my home planet isn't one of them — where I'm from, if you don't work, then you don't eat.
当时我还年轻，也有自己喜欢的东西，比如从奥布瓦尔传入的夸克棋，比如无名客带来的开拓牌，再比如星际互联网络的电子游戏…数不胜数。
Back then I was still young, and had my hobbies such as Auberval's quark chess, trailblaze cards from the Nameless, and video games from the Interastral Network... So, so many games.
但我知道，如果我真接触并沉迷这些东西，就是因一时的快乐葬送了未来。
But I knew that if I ever got addicted to those things, I'd be consigning my future to ruin for the sake of temporary pleasure.
为了进入博识学会，我死死把控着玩乐的欲望，用全部脑力来学习、记忆…真是一段充实又压抑的时光。
To join the Intelligentsia Guild, I had to rein in tightly any desire to have fun, and devote all of my brain to study and rote learning... It was an enriching time, but also a stifling time.
我原以为只要成功当上了学者，对娱乐的强烈需求自然就会消失…现在看来，堵不如疏啊。

I thought that as long as I became an academic, this powerful desire of mine for entertainment would naturally subside... But now it looks like it's better to clear it away rather than bottle it all up.
冷静下来之后，我感觉自己体内的某个结解开了。但不知为什么，我似乎还是对一切提不起兴趣……
After I calmed down, I felt as though this almighty knot was untying inside me. And I'm not sure why, but I can't seem to arouse any interest in anything...
You bottled everything up for too long.
每天玩8小时游戏就好了。
Just game for eight hours a day and you'll be fine.
的确， 原本我来匹诺康尼也是为了放松。但我对游戏…根本就一窍不通啊。
Indeed, I first came to Penacony to relax. But when it comes to gaming... I'm completely clueless.
你瞧，我积攒了这么多艾迪恩代币，却压根没有用的机会……
Just look — I've saved up this many Aideen Tokens but haven't had any chance whatsoever to use them...
什么？！我是说，真的可以吗？
What!? I mean, are you sure?
毕竟，我打小就没接触过这些东西，作为玩伴来说肯定不够格吧……
After all, I haven't touched those things since I was little. I'm not sure if I'm good enough to be your playmate...
不过既然你都这样说了，我就尽力试试看。
But if you say so, then I'll give it my best.
哦对，也分你一些代币吧…光凭我自己的话，想要用光它们还是太难了。
Oh yes, here are some of those tokens for you... It'd be too hard for me to use them all by myself.
哟，是你，我的朋友！瞅瞅，我这新形象如何？
Oh, it's you. My friend! Check it out. What do you think about my new look?
哈，那当然！这可是我问了好几个朋友以后才凑出来的搭配。
Ha, of course it is! I only put this outfit together after asking several friends about it first.
真、真的吗？我觉得还好啊，几个懂搭配的朋友也都觉得不错……
R—Really? I think it's fine, and a few fashionable friends all thought it was fine, too...
是吧？我特意请教了几个懂搭配的朋友。
Really? I made a point to ask a few friends who understand fashion.
既然我已经下定决心玩转匹诺康尼，穿着肯定也要符合这里的风格才行。
Seeing as I've decided to stay here in Penacony, my style has to be in line with those here.
之后有机会的话，你说不定能看见我的更多行头呢~
If you get the chance later on, you might just get to see a few more of my fits~
在梦里就该开心一点——我也该学着享受生活了。
It's a dream, so why not be happy — I should learn how to enjoy life a little more.
嘶…刚才可真是失态，没想到我也有喜怒无常的一天。
Tsk... I was really out of character just then. I'm not usually moody like this at all.
这倒是让我想起了很早以前遇见的一位艺术家，他也是这样时哭时笑、行为奇特，还时不时把周边人当作捉弄的对象……
This reminds me though of an artist who I met a long time ago. He also cried and laughed a lot, behaving strangely and sometimes poking fun of the people around him...
Sounds like a really funny guy.
是啊，直到现在我也记忆犹新。
He sure was. I can still remember him vividly to this day.
Does he still wear a mask?
对！戴着面具，做工很精致的面具。
Yes! He wears a mask, one with exquisite craftsmanship.
他来到我游学的星球，用表演和趣闻引发了全队的欢笑——说实话，我从来没笑得那么夸张过。
He came to the planet where I was matriculating and made the whole team laugh with his skits and anecdotes — to be honest, I had never laughed so hard before.
当时我觉得这种活法真不错，潇洒、快乐…于是我找到他，恳求他能带我一同旅行。
Back then I thought this kind of lifestyle was really cool, carefree, and happy... So I found him and begged him to take me traveling with him.
但我却吃了个闭门羹…他说我太过无趣，脑海已经被无用的知识占据，一张口就会把笑话冲淡。
But I got the cold shoulder... He said I was too boring. My mind was filled with useless trivia and I'd ruined jokes all the time.
或许那次经历激发了我的叛逆心，让我一听见笑声就浑身难受…谁知道呢？
Maybe that experience is what inspired my rebellious spirit, and what left me feeling uncomfortable whenever I heard others laugh... Who knows?
后来我在博识学会查阅了一些资料，才知道这种人被称作「假面愚者」…也许他们看见匹诺康尼这般景象，会创造出不一样的笑话？

Later on, I pulled some data at the Intelligentsia Guild only to discover that this kind of person is called a "Masked Fool"... Maybe they'll come up with some different jokes if they ever see Penacony.
救救孩子们！救救宇宙的未来吧！
Save the children! Save the future of the universe!
唉，游戏…游戏的乐趣总有尽头。到最后，宇宙只剩一片灰暗……
*sigh* Gaming... The fun of gaming must always come to an end. In the end, only darkness remains in the universe...
人们总是试图用快乐填满生活，好让自己活得不那么难受，我也是其中之一。我原以为游戏能帮助我重拾快乐……
People always try to fill their lives with pleasure so they can live life more comfortably, and I am one of them. At first, I thought gaming could maybe help me regain my sense of joy...
我已经失去了感受快乐的能力——只要失去过一次，它就永远回不来了！
I've lost the capacity to feel joy — I lost it once, and it's never going to come back!
在如此悲惨的宇宙中，谁也不能摆脱失去快乐的必然结局，因为谁都会有无可奈何的时候！财富和假期总是不够多，麻烦和账单总是不够少。

In a universe as tragic as this, nobody gets to escape the inevitable conclusion of happiness lost — because everyone has always felt that helpless feeling before! There's never too much when it comes to riches and vacation, and never too few when it comes to troubles and bills.
除非…对，孩子！孩子可以无忧无虑地玩耍，只要从没被那些东西浸染过…这样的孩子还剩下多少？
Unless... Yes, children! Children get to play without a care in the world, so long as they're never infected by those things... How many such children are there left out there?
救救孩子们，救救宇宙的未来吧！
Save the children, and save the future of the universe!
要不你去加入悲悼伶人吧…
Have you ever considered signing up with the Mourning Actors...?
或许是个主意，也不知道他们会不会收留我这样的废物……
That's an idea, but I don't know if they'd ever want to take in anyone as useless me...
乐观？在快乐重新占领宇宙之前，恐怕没有人能乐观起来……
Cheer up? I'm afraid nobody will ever be able to cheer up until happiness recaptures the universe...
干脆永远别醒来算了…永远都别醒来……
I'd be better off never waking up at all... Never waking at all...
呜呼！这里的生活果然像糖浆一样甜美！
*Sob* Life here really is sweeter than syrup!
没有该死的考核，没有逼得人掉头发的论文，也没有整天用鼻子看人的上司……
No cursed examinations, no more pulling my hair out writing theses, no more arrogant higher-ups looking down their noses all day long...
美梦，这就是货真价实的美梦！我过去几十年人生里没有一次做出过这样的美梦！
Sweet dreams — well, this really is the sweetest of dreams! I haven't dreamed anything like this for dozens of years!
据说最近新出了一款彩虹芥末味的苏乐达，之后买一瓶尝尝看…哦，听说飞碟堡的味道也不错，得去尝尝。
I heard SoulGlad is putting out a new Rainbow Mustard flavor. I'll have to buy one and give it a try... Oh, I heard the Floatdisc Burger flavor is great too. Gotta try that.
啊…要体验的东西太多了！干脆永远别醒来算了…永远都别醒来……
Ah... There's just too much to experience! I'd be better off never waking up at all... Never waking at all...
拿出来啊！把更好玩的东西给我拿出来！
Give it to me! Give me something more fun!
我抽了整整四十发，没有一次出现过像样的奖励——没、有、一、次！
I pulled forty times all up, and not once did a decent prize appear — Not. One. Single. Time.
一定有什么地方出错了——对，是游戏，一定是游戏本身的问题！
Something must have gone wrong — yeah, the game. Something must be wrong with the game itself!
不能给人带来快乐的游戏，存在有什么意义？设计这些游艺项目的家伙脑子里都是浆糊吗？
What point is there in a game that doesn't bring joy to its players? Do the designers of these entertainment titles have jam for brains?
为什么没有我最喜欢的歼星舰大战？为什么不把更有趣的玩法拿出来？你们在害怕什么？！
Why isn't my favorite, Starnought Wars, here? Why not make the gameplay more fun? What are you cowards afraid of!?
哦，我懂了——是我充的钱还不够？拿去，都拿去吧！都是身外之物，我才不需要这些钞票！
Oh, I understand... I didn't top up enough credit? Then take it! Take it all! It's all just mere worldly possessions. I don't need any of this cash!
愚致思把口袋里的钞票扔向空中——他大概只有在梦里才能如此尽兴地挥霍。
Poseman throws all the bills from his pockets into the air — no doubt he only squanders money so crazily when he's in a dream.
我抽了整整四十发，没有一次出现过像样的奖励——没、有、一、次！
I pulled forty times all up, and not once did a decent prize appear — Not. One. Single. Time.
一定有什么地方出错了——对，是游戏，一定是游戏本身的问题！
Something must have gone wrong — yeah, the game. Something must be wrong with the game itself!
不能给人带来快乐的游戏，存在有什么意义？设计这些游艺项目的家伙脑子里都是浆糊吗？
What point is there in a game that doesn't bring joy to its players? Do the designers of these entertainment titles have jam for brains?
我小时候做的习题都比这好玩一千倍！
The schoolwork I did as a kid was a thousand times more fun than this!
哦，我在学会那边还有工作要做。为了来匹诺康尼这趟，我把攒了好久的年假全请完了——也就二十多天吧。
Oh, I've still got some work to do over at the guild. I put all the annual leave that I'd been saving up into this trip to Penacony — just twenty days or so.
原本以为用这段时间游遍梦境绰绰有余，结果玩起来才发现…真是时光似箭，日月如梭啊。
I thought it'd be plenty of time in which to see the dreamscape, but after playing here for a while I've realized... time really is like an arrow — oh, how fast it flies.
不过，假如我还是像之前那样满腹怨气的话，估计只会度过一段扫兴的时光吧……
However, if I were still as sulky as before, I'm guessing that I'd probably have had a disappointing time...
只剩这么几天了…得赶紧抓住假期的尾巴才行。
Only a few days left... Gotta really seize the tail end of this vacation.
Quick, go and fetch The Family guard!
呼——得、得救了…我这小身板，差点就塞了怪物的牙缝了，哈哈！
Whew... S—Safe and sound... I'm so small that I almost got stuck between its fangs, haha!
明知道不过是在做梦，但被那群家伙盯上还是挺刺激的…您说是吧？
Even though I know it's just a dream, it's still thrilling to have those things staring at me... Don't you think so?
这个嘛…说来惭愧，我近来身体抱恙，一时睡得太沉，结果睁开眼……
Oh, that... I'm ashamed to say that I'd been sick lately and I fell into too deep a sleep. So when I opened my eyes...
我感觉酒店的氛围似乎有些奇怪，本打算先去大堂那边看看情况，可惜还没到半路就被这群家伙围住了。

The atmosphere of the hotel felt a little bit strange to me. I'd been meaning to go to the lobby and check out everything there first, but unfortunately these things surrounded me before I could get halfway.
多亏您及时赶到，才让我免去一场无妄之灾。还请允许我向您致以最诚挚的感谢。
Thanks to your timely arrival, I've been spared from unexpected calamity. Please allow me to express my sincerest of gratitude to you.
感谢您的体贴，我亲爱的朋友。虽然很想说一切安好，但…不怕您笑话，我现在多少还是有些腿软的。
Thanks for your concern, my dear friend. Even though I'd love to say everything's fine, it's just... you can laugh, but I'm feeling a little weak in the legs.
即便深知这不过是一场梦，人在遭遇突发事件时，本能的反应也往往要快过理性。凑巧，我不是个胆大的人……
Despite knowing full well that it's a dreamscape, people's instinctual reactions are quicker than logical thought when it comes to emergencies. And as luck would have it, I'm not a brave person...
Your complexion looks a little off.
抱歉…被您看见这副狼狈的模样着实有失体面。
Sorry... It's really awkward for me to be caught showing you this side of me.
不瞒您说，除去方才受到的惊吓，我近来还时常被某种难以言说的疲惫感困扰……
Honestly — apart from the shock I just got — I've been having this indescribable feeling of fatigue lately...
生病？嗯…大概是吧——如果精神不稳定能被称之为「病」的话……
Sick? Hmm... Probably — if mental health falls under the category of being "sick"...
Are you having trouble with something?
嗯…姑且算是吧，我也不知道该从何说起……
Hmm... Let's just say that I have no idea where to begin...
这里——我的脑子、我的记忆…似乎出了问题。我好像忘记了什么，但又不是那么确定。
Here... my brain and my memory... something seems to be wrong with them. I seem to have forgotten something, but then again I'm not entirely sure.
我最近总觉得心里空荡荡的，就像…就像胸口被凭空挖走了一块肉似的。
I just feel this emptiness in my chest all the time these days, like... just like someone's ripped this chunk of flesh out of thin air from my chest.
我觉得自己好像弄丢了什么东西…我本该非常讨厌它才对，可现在却只觉得怅然若失……
I feel like I've lost something... I should really hate it, but now I feel frustrated and lost...
啊，很抱歉自顾自说了这么多，希望没有教您感到厌烦。
Ah, I'm really sorry for blabbing on so much. Hope I didn't bore you.
Do you know what's up with the hotel?
这个嘛…酒店的空间似乎变得异常混乱，还出现了不少看起来不那么友好的…生物？
Oh, that... The hotel space seems to be unusually chaotic, and there are a few not very friendly-looking... creatures?
但说实话我倒不觉得有多奇怪，毕竟这可是梦境。又或者说，这才应该是一个梦应有的样子——混沌、奇异、不可捉摸。
But to be honest, I don't think it's strange. After all, this is a dreamscape. Or to put it another way, this is how a dream should be — chaotic, bizarre, and unfathomable.
当然，这仅是些个人拙见罢了，很抱歉没能为您提供更多有用的信息。
Of course, this is just my humble opinion. Sorry, I can't provide you with any more useful information.
虽然与您的交谈令人愉悦，但您说得对，我们还是先离开这里比较好。
While it's been a real pleasure chatting with you, what you said is right — we should get out of here soon if we know what's good.
唔…虽然很抱歉，但我可能暂时还没恢复过来……
Hmm... I'm really sorry about this, but I don't think I've recovered just yet...
虽说此地不宜久留，但抱歉…请容我先缓缓。
Even though it's not good to stay here for long, I'm sorry but... please allow me to take my own time.
皮皮西原本柔和的神色于一瞬间变得尖锐，眼角蓦地燃起一抹薄红。
The Pepeshi's once-gentle expression immediately grows intense, and a dim red line suddenly lights up his eyes.
不知为何，你觉得在他这副皮囊之下浮现出了一个迥然不同的灵魂。
You don't know why, but somehow it feels as though a completely different soul has emerged beneath its skin.
哈…不过是几只小垃圾，就被吓成这副怂样，果然是个没了我就不行的废物……
Ha... It's just a few pieces of trash, but enough to get scared stiff. So it turns out they really are useless without me around...
怎么，平时嫌弃我嫌弃得要死，现在才几天不见就跟丢了魂一样。
What's up? You usually shun me badly, but now after just a few days of not seeing each other, you seem distracted.
哼，当初我说什么来着——让你小心谨慎、让你不要和人聊了几回就迫不及待地倒贴上去，现在好了吧？
Hmph, what did I say at the start — be careful, don't be clingy after chatting with someone a few times. Are you okay now?
虽然不知道他们究竟用了什么手段，但肯定和那女…哦，差点忘了你。
I don't know what methods they used, but they must have involved that girl... Oh, I nearly forgot about you.
皮皮西突然转头，落在你脸上的目光仿佛属于某种掠食性动物。
The Pepeshi suddenly turns around and the light that fell upon your face felt like it belonged to some kind of apex predator.
这么说来，我还得多谢你把我叫醒——你可以叫我W。
Speaking of which, I have you to thank for waking me up — you can call me W.
哈哈哈，挺敏锐的嘛！见过「我」的人都觉得我们是疯子…我是搞不懂，这有什么好大惊小怪的？每次看到他们惊慌失措的白痴样子，我都忍不住想笑！
Haha, very perceptive! Everyone who's met "me" thinks that we're nuts... I just don't get what all the fuss is about though? Every time I see those panicked idiots, I lose it and start laughing!
你的眼神倒是很…平静，我喜欢！我W就喜欢脑子利索，办事靠谱的家伙！所以…要不干脆好人当到底，再顺便帮我个忙吧？
Your eyes are very... peaceful. I like that! I like quick thinkers and reliable people! So... why don't you be a good person, and do me a solid?
在黄金的时刻有个叫阿然的梦境鼓励师，她对我来说…非常重要。
In Golden Hour, there's a Dreamscape Motivator called Ran. She is... very important to me.
她往常一般都在钟表小子广场附近转悠。换做平时我肯定亲自去找她，但是现在情况稍微有点…呃…*微妙*。
She's usually hanging out near Clockie Plaza. If things were normal, I'd definitely go over myself, but as it stands, things are a little... "delicate" right now.
怎么说，能帮哥们一把吗？我在<color=#f29e38ff>艾迪恩公园</color>等你好消息，你回来之后咱们可以一起喝杯好的！
How about it? Can you do me a solid? I'll be at the <color=#f29e38ff>Aideen Park</color> waiting for the good news. And once you're back, we can grab a drink together!
怎么说，你见到阿然了吗？她平时一般都在钟表小子广场附近转悠。
How's it going? Did you see Ran yet? She's usually hanging out near Clockie Plaza.
有个叫姆利斯的人在找你…
Someone called Mullich is looking for you...
Hang on, who... Who did you say was looking for me!?
眼前这位女士闻言瞳孔骤缩、脸色惨白，彻底失去了原本的优雅从容。
When the woman heard this name, her pupils suddenly shrank and the blood drained from her face as she lost all previous sense of grace and bearing.
你、你跟那家伙是一伙的？别过来，不然我要叫人了！
A—Are you in cahoots with that guy? Stay away, or I'll call out for someone!
你…你们应该知道，那种事如果再次发生，家族绝对不会坐视不管！
You... you oughta know that if that kind of thing ever happens again, The Family won't just sit by idly and watch!
不要装傻，你会不知道我在说什…等等，你…你真没骗我？
Don't play dumb. As if you don't know what I'm talking abo... Hang on, do you... Do you really not know?
阿然女士反复扫视着你脸上每一寸表情，半晌才如释重负般长舒了口气。
Miss Ran scanned your every expression again and again before letting out a sigh of relief after what seemed like an age — and what seemed like a heavy burden to bear.
呼——吓死我了…我还以为他又多了个帮手呢，本来就已经够吓人的了……
Whew — you freaked me out... I thought he'd roped in yet another accomplice. Things were already getting scary enough...
所以可以请您告诉我您究竟是为了什么而来的吗？
So can you please tell me what exactly it is you're doing here?
你将遇到姆利斯和*W*的事一五一十告知了阿然……
You spill the beans about Mullich and "W," and tell Ran the whole story...
「她对我来说非常重要」——他想说的怕不是「非常重要的报复对象」吧？
"She's very important to me" — I'm afraid what he meant to say was, "Taking vengeance against her is very important to me."
您听我说，那个人虽然看起来温和无害，但实际上是个极端的偏执狂！至于那个所谓的W，我还没真正见过他，但……
Listen to me: That guy may sound friendly and harmless, but he's actually an extremist bigot! And as for that W, I've never really met him but...
总之，为了您的安全，请千万不要再跟他有接触了！
In a nutshell, for your own safety, please don't have any contact with him again!
…那是因为您还没有和他深入接触过！我认识很多精神异常者，他们中大部分都是好人，只是在不断遭受病痛的折磨…但是那家伙，完全不一样！

...That's just because you haven't come into close contact with him yet! I know plenty of people with mental health issues and most of them are great people — they're just suffering from torturous pain... but this guy, he's completely different!
他就是…他就是个浓缩身高的禽兽！我恳请您不要再和他来往了……
He's just... He's just a shrunken little beast! I'm begging you, please don't have any further contact with him...
我？我能怎么办…我之前已经向家族申请过庇护了，也因此过了几天安稳日子。
Me? I'm doing what I can... I applied to be put under protection before with The Family, so at least I've had a few days of relative calmness.
家族在处理这类问题时一向十分周到，可偏偏这次就…怪不得，怪不得那家伙会躲到白日梦酒店里去！他是害怕被猎犬家系的人给揪出来吧？

The Family is always very considerate when handling this kind of thing, but unfortunately this time... No wonder that guy went and hid in The Reverie! He's afraid of getting busted by the Bloodhound Family!
请、请您一定要对我的状况守口如瓶！我不想再和那家伙扯上任何关系了！
Please, you absolutely have to keep this under wraps! I don't want to ever have anything do with that guy again!
我、我也必须采取行动…得赶快再申请一次梦境人身保护才行……
I—I have to take my own precautions here... and apply for another round of personal dreamscape protection...
呀？！呼…是、是您啊，吓我一跳。抱歉，我现在稍微有点…紧张。
Ah!? Whew... i—it's you. You freaked me out there. I'm sorry. It's just that I'm a little... anxious right now.
或许您会觉得我过于小题大做了，但那个姆利斯…唉，实话告诉您吧，他之前跟踪过我的其他客人，还对他们进行人身威胁……
You might think I'm making a mountain out of a molehill, but that guy Mullich... Well, to be honest, he stalked one of my clients before, and physically threatened them...
这也是为什么我不希望您和他接触…不过放心吧，家族这次又加派了人手，我们绝不会再给他伤害别人的机会。
This is why I don't want you to have any further contact with him... But don't worry. The Family has sent additional security. There's no way we're giving him any more chances to hurt someone.
Any signs of activity over there?
那个闹事的，之前不是早就处理过了吗？这回怎么又……
Didn't that troublemaker get taken care of? Again...
我也觉得奇怪…该不会有什么人在暗中捣鬼吧？
Something's going on... Could it be there's someone else behind the scenes causing trouble?
光他一个就够让人头疼了。听说之前有个受害者从他那收到一整箱活虫子，大大小小几十种、一共上百只。那个倒霉蛋，打开箱子后直接就厥过去了。

He's enough of a handful himself. I heard one victim got an entire crate of live bugs from him — dozens of different species big and small, hundreds of them. That poor soul opened up the crate and just fainted on the spot.
真够缺德的。不说闲话了，接着巡逻吧。不能再让他祸害别人了。
It's just wicked. Okay, enough chit-chat. Keep up with patrols. We cannot let him harm others.
呦——总算来了！怎么样，有消息了吗？
Yo — finally made it back! What's up, any news?
W的目光在你脸上来回逡巡，寻找欺骗的痕迹。他歪歪头，笑了起来——
W's eyes comb back and forth across your face, scouting it for signs of deception. Tilting his head, he laughs...
原来如此…可惜！不过没关系，我们早晚会找、到、她、的！
Is that so... What a pity! But not to worry, because we're going to find. Her. Soon!
你看到W眼中有怒气划过…仿佛下一秒他就要跳起来狠敲你的脑袋了。
You see a flash of anger in W's eyes... as though he is about to jump up and knock you on the head.
这样啊…看来她是真的很讨厌「我们」啊。
I see... Looks like she really hates "us" then.
说起来，「梦境鼓励师」还真是个神奇的职业！大概也只有在匹诺康尼才能找到这个工种了吧？
Speaking of which, "Dreamscape Motivator" — what a miraculous job! I bet this line of work is only gonna be available in Penacony, right?
我听说，家族为了避免负面情绪污染他们「纯洁无瑕」的梦境，特聘了不少「心地善良」、「细腻敏锐」、「认真负责」的人来担任梦境鼓励师。

I heard that The Family hired a whole bunch of Dreamscape Motivators — "kind-hearted," "meticulous and perceptive," "responsible" people — to help protect that "pure and flawless" dreamscape of theirs from being contaminated by any negative mindsets.
至于具体怎么鼓励嘛——「鼓励师会主动发现并找到出现异常情绪波动的人群，通过沟通疗法缓解其负面情绪」——起码他们是这么宣传的。

As for how exactly they encourage people — "Motivators actively seek out people experiencing abnormal mood swings, and alleviate any negative emotions using communication therapy" — at least, that's what they say themselves.
可实际上呢？与其说是心地善良，倒不如说是自私伪善；与其说是细腻敏锐，倒不如说是胆小怕事。至于认真负责？
But in practice? When they say "kind-hearted," they actually mean selfish and hypocritical. When they say "meticulous and perceptive," they actually mean cowardly and timid. And as for "responsible"?
哈哈，看看我们可怜的M吧——就是因为盲目轻信了那位阿然女士，才会被人不知用什么手段，险些弄成精神残废——这就是那所谓的鼓励师带给我们的「安慰与治愈」！

Ha, just look at poor old M — he was gullible and ended up nearly mentally damaged by that Miss Ran and some unknown tricks of hers. That's all the "comfort and healing" that so-called Motivators brought us!
W望着你，笑意盈盈，却仿佛下一秒就会跳起来咬断谁的脖子。
W looks at you with a beaming smile on his face, but he still seems as though he's about to jump up and bite someone right in the neck.
嗯？还有什么事吗？想和我这个「疯子」把酒言欢？
Well? Anything else? Would you like to drink, chat, and be merry with a "madman" like me?
唔…我倒是不介意。你真是个怪胎，哈哈哈！不过，我喜欢你——要是M能有你一半有趣就好了！
Oh... I don't mind. You really are a freak, y'know? Haha! But I like you — if only M were half as fun as you!
「砰」——W跳上了桌台，居高临下地看着你。
*thud* W jumps up onto the table and, having taken the high ground, looks down his nose at you.
你知道吗，别看那家伙平时装得一本正经、人畜无害，实际上可比我糟糕多了，他只是喜欢扮演受害者罢了——
You know what? Even though that guy pretends to be all serious like he wouldn't harm a fly, in actuality he's far worse than me. He just likes to play the victim...
摆出一副软弱可怜的样子，然后在你渐渐放下戒心后，不遗余力地从你身上榨取关怀与关注，简直比缠在树上的藤还要麻烦。

Wearing this weak, pathetic mask and then — once you've let down your guard — doing everything possible to squeeze all the attention and care from you. It's worse than a thorny ivy coiling around a tree.
即便M是真心想要个朋友…可就他那种烂到骨子里的性格，除了我还有谁受得了他呢？
Even if M really does just want a friend... who out there besides me is going to put up with that trash personality of his?
不过你也用不着可怜他。他早该明白，像我们这种怪胎，怎么可能会讨人喜欢？都这样了还不远万里跑来玩什么找朋友游戏，真不知道是倔还是傻……

But anyway, you don't need to feel sorry for him. He should've figured out a long time ago that freaks like us... we can never be lovable. It's just the way it is, so what's the point in journeying all this way to play at making friends? I honestly can't tell if it's stubbornness or foolishness...
说起来，你看起来也是M会喜欢的类型。可千万小心别被那家伙缠上，哈哈。
Speaking of which, you seem just like M's type. Just be careful not to get tangled up with that guy, haha.
看着就吓人，我们离他远点…
He looks freaky. Let's get away from him...
我倒是还挺喜欢你的，不过…你看起来也是M会喜欢的类型。
I actually quite like you, but... you also seem to be just like M's type.
可千万小心别被那家伙缠上，哈哈。
Be careful not to get tangled up with that guy, haha.
皮皮西安静地望向你，神色柔和——你知道那是M。
The Pepeshi watches you quietly, with a gentle look — you know that is M.
…我…但愿我…之前的某些…言行，并没有为您带来太多麻烦……
I... I hope my... words before... didn't cause you any trouble...
抱歉！我已经很努力地在控制自己了…但……
Sorry! I've been trying very hard to control myself... but...
总、总之，希望我能对此做出一些微不足道的补偿。若是不嫌弃，这个还请您收下吧。
A—Anyway, I hope I can make up for this in a small way. If you don't mind, please, take this.
…我…但愿我…之前的某些…言行，并没有为您带来太多麻烦……
I... I hope my... words before... didn't cause you any trouble...
抱歉！我已经很努力地在控制自己了…但……
Sorry! I've been trying very hard to control myself... but...
总、总之，希望我能对此做出一些微不足道的补偿。
A—Anyway, I hope I can make up for this in a small way.
眼前的皮皮西看起来像是一只带着裂痕的陶瓷茶杯，轻触即碎。
The Pepeshi looks like a cracked porcelain teacup that would shatter at the faintest touch.
您曾感到孤独吗？不瞒您说，这种情绪就像是一道固执的影子，自童年起便终日在我身边萦绕不去。
Have you ever felt lonely? To be honest, this feeling has been like a shadow lingering over me since childhood that has refused to go away.
亲情、友情、爱情，这些我统统没有。生活像个大泥潭，时刻也不忘将我拖进深处。
Family, friends, and lovers — I don't have any of those. Life is like living in quicksand, always being dragged down into those depths.
那个…W…他是我的梦魇，但也是我的稻草。他既极端又强势，但也是我唯一的陪伴与救赎。我讨厌他，又离不开他…我们相互支撑，又相互伤害。

And W... He's my nightmare, but also my last hope. He is extreme and strong, but also my only companion and salvation. I hate him, but could never leave him... We support each other, but we also hurt each other.
我也曾挣扎过，一次又一次，希望能与他人建立亲密关系…可到头来，最后还是只剩我们俩。
I've struggled time and again before, hoping to build an intimate connection with someone... but in the end, it's still just us two.
我以为所谓的「梦想之城」能够令人梦想成真，以为在梦里肯定有人能包容我的缺陷，可结果……
I thought the so-called "City of Dreams" could make people's dreams come true, and that there'd be someone in a dream who could put up with all my flaws. But alas...
我好像…陷得更深了，稍微有点透不过气。真希望有谁能来拉我一把……
It seems like... my flaws are getting worse. I feel like I'm suffocating. I really hope someone can give me a hand...
皮皮西专注地望着你，好似你就是他整个世界的中心。
The Pepeshi stares intently at you, as if you were at the very center of his universe.
无论如何，我都该好好感谢您才行…不单单是因为您救了我，更因为您对我…对我们的包容和理解。
In any case, I should be thanking you... Not just for saving me, but also... because of your understanding and putting up with me.
这里是一点微不足道的谢礼，聊表心意，请您务必收下。
This is a tiny gift just to say thanks and show my appreciation. Please, take it.
无论如何，我都该好好感谢您才行…不单单是因为您救了我，更因为您对我…对我们的包容和理解。
In any case, I should be thanking you... Not just for saving me, but also... because of your understanding and putting up with me.
有件事我犹豫很久了…恕我冒昧，但我是否有幸与您成为朋友呢？
There's something I've been thinking about for a long time... Pardon me for being so forward, but would I be able to consider you a friend?
说来可能有些奇怪，但面对您时，我竟生出一种能够被倾听、被理解的幸福感。这种感觉就像苏乐达糖浆一样让人欲罢不能。
It might sound strange, but when I converse with you, I feel a happiness that comes from being listened to and being understood. This happiness is as addicting as SoulGlad.
抱歉，我知道这种唐突的请求有多么失礼，但…请您考虑考虑吧，W也非常喜欢您呢。
My apologies. I know it is very forward to make such an abrupt request, but... please think about it. W really likes you, too.
您好，请问有什么是我可以为您效劳的吗？
Hello, is there anything I can help you with?
无论您有怎样的烦恼，都可以向我倾诉。
Whatever worries you might have, you can tell me all about it.
我会倾听您的心声与诉求，并力所能及地为您提供帮助。
I will listen to your thoughts and wishes, and provide as much help as I possibly can.
可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?
哈？就算我对你这家伙印象还不错，再敢乱开这样的玩笑，小心挨揍哦？
What? Sure, we've been getting on well, but if you dare to joke around like that again, I'll give you a hiding, okay?
不过嘛…你要是实在想自找麻烦，倒是可以问问M——当然，如果你不怕之后被他像狗皮膏药一样缠上的话！
But... if you really want to get yourself in a pickle, you can always ask M — of course, only if you don't mind him sticking to you like a piece of chewing gum in the future!
您好，请问有什么是我可以为您效劳的吗？
Hello, is there anything I can help you with?
我是梦境鼓励师阿然，无论您有怎样的烦恼，都可以向我倾诉。
I am Ran, a Dreamscape Motivator. Whatever worries you might have, you can tell me all about it.
我会倾听您的心声与诉求，并力所能及地为您提供帮助。
I will listen to your thoughts and wishes, and provide as much help as I possibly can.
梦境鼓励师是一种匹诺康尼本地特有的职业——用通俗一点的话来解释，我们的职责和心理医生有些类似。
It's a special kind of job unique to Penacony — in layman's terms, our duties are similar to a psychologist's.
我们致力于「倾听」和「疏导」，帮助宾客们排除有可能危害到「美梦」稳定性的负面情绪。
We are committed to "listening" and "guiding" guests to help them expunge any negative emotions that might endanger the stability of their sweet dreams.
在匹诺康尼，筑梦师们负责铸造梦境世界的基建，为宾客们提供满意的游玩体验；而我们鼓励师则负责保障宾客的精神稳定，确保「美梦」的繁荣能够延续。

In Penacony, the Dreamweavers are responsible for crafting out the foundations of the Dreamscape and providing guests with a satisfactory entertainment experience. Meanwhile, we Dreamscape Motivators are responsible for maintaining the guests' mental stability, ensuring that the prosperity of the sweet dream can continue to flourish.
在梦境世界里，人们的情绪会被无止境地放大。一些危险的负面情绪如果没有及时得到处理，很可能就会像瘟疫一样扩散，带来巨大的危害。
In the Dreamscape, people's emotions are amplified endlessly. Dangerous negative emotions can spread like a plague if left untreated, and cause massive harm.
我们的职责就是及时摘除这些祸种，避免它们在宾客间蔓延开来。
Our job is to remove these blights in a timely manner and prevent them spreading between guests.
那么，您有什么想要咨询的吗？
So, would you like to consult me about anything?
是啊…确实很辛苦，但同时也很快乐。
Yeah... It really is hard work, but it's also lots of fun.
当看到别人因自己的帮助而重新振作起来时，那种满足感是难以言喻的。
That feeling of satisfaction you get when you see someone pick themselves up again because of your help... it's beyond words.
这也是我选择成为梦境鼓励师的原因。
That's also why I chose to become a Dreamscape Motivator in the first place.
遇到处理不了的怎么办？
What if you run into a problem that you can't handle?
的确，我们偶尔会遇上一些比较…极端的求助者。他们可能会表现出明显的偏执或暴力倾向。
Indeed, we sometimes encounter some more... extreme clients. They might display overt tendencies for obsession or violence.
如果是在现实中，这些人将会是危险的代名词。但这里是匹诺康尼——家族会在保证我们与宾客共同利益的前提下，对事态进行妥善处理。

In the realm of reality, these people would be the very personification of danger. But we are in Penacony — The Family will handle things appropriately while ensuring the best interests of us and the guests.
好的，愿您在匹诺康尼度过一段愉快的时光。
Alright. I hope you have an enjoyable time in Penacony.
我平时就在这里当班，如果有需要，您可以随时来找我。
I'm normally on shift here. Come find me anytime you need something.
阿然专注地望着你，目光沉静、满含鼓励的意味。
Ran gazes at you intently, her eyes serene and filled with overtones of encouragement.
无论您有怎样的烦恼，都可以向我倾诉。我会倾听您的心声与诉求，并力所能及地为您提供帮助。
No matter what troubles befall you, you can always tell it to me. I will listen to your thoughts and wishes, and provide as much help as I possibly can.
So, would you like to talk...?
做我们这一行的，一向很少向人抱怨……
In this line of work, we rarely ever complain to anyone...
我…我已经受够了！有病吃药很难吗？很难吗？！
I... I've had enough! Is it really so hard to take medicine when you're sick? Is it???
动不动就摆出一副受害者的嘴脸，到处索求关注、博取同情——简直是一群精神蠹虫！
Always playing the victim at the drop of a hat, milking sympathy and attention all over the place... they're positively a swarm of mental lepisma!
对，鼓励师的确是该心怀善意，为宾客排忧解难…但我们也是人！不是用来盛装情绪垃圾的垃圾桶！
Yes, Motivators should be kind-hearted and solve the guests' concerns... but we're also people! We're not receptacles for emotional trash!
那些负面情绪飘散在空气里，就像传播瘟病的孢子…而我们既要想尽办法把那些污染源从火坑里拉出来，还要时刻警惕不被他们扯进去。
Those negative emotions float in the air like spores spreading a plague... We have to both pull those sources of contamination out of the fire, while staying vigilant not to be pulled in by them.
可总有些人…不但自己不愿付出任何努力，还在喋喋不休地埋怨我们不够负责、不够体贴……
But there are always people... Not only do they refuse to make any effort, they also jabber on complaining about how we aren't responsible or considerate enough...
这种无可救药的家伙…根本连做梦的资格都不配拥有！
These incorrigible filths... they don't even deserve to dream!
阿然的仪态依旧优雅得体，但你分明窥见了她神情中的麻木与空洞。
Ran's demeanor is still graceful and elegant, but you can clearly see apathy and emptiness behind those eyes.
嘘…您听到了吗？广场对面有人在哭…有人在笑。哭是因为心有渴望，笑是自嘲潦倒……
Shh... did you hear that? Someone is crying across the plaza... and someone's laughing. They cry because they still have desires, and they laugh out of ironic satire to their own despondency...
听不到吗？那…您能看到吗？那个人是黛紫色的…这份…嫉妒，因身旁的玫红与明黄而生……
You can't hear that? Then... do you see that? That person is lilac... This... jealousy... stems from the rose-red and the bright yellow next to them...
啊…您也看不到吗？那您可…真幸福。
Ah... You can't see these, either? Then you are... truly happy.
那些声音、那些颜色、甚至…我每天都能听到、都能看到。不是此刻这般远远倾听或观望，它们是如此强烈、如此鲜明，气势汹汹地逼近，像洪水一样近乎将我淹没。

Those voices, those colors, and even... I hear and see them every day. Instead of listening or observing from a distance like we are now, they are intense and brilliant as they aggressively approach, almost drowning me like a torrential flood.
他们的灵魂摊开在我面前…不断拉扯着我的…我因他们的喜怒而喜怒，为他们的哀惧而哀惧。
Their souls are spread out before me... ceaselessly pulling at me... I am happy because of their joy, and I dread because of their fear.
但我渐渐开始感到…迷惑…就像被巨浪来回拨弄的小船…它们实在太吵闹、太晃眼了…我渐渐开始感受不到自己了……
But I'm gradually beginning to feel... confused... like a tiny boat being tossed around on gigantic waves... they are simply too noisy, too blinding... I'm starting to lose any sense of self...
我已经快要找不到方向了…已经快要找不到「我」了，我不想再做梦了……
I'm almost completely lost and disoriented... I can barely find "me" anymore. I don't want to dream anymore...
…糖浆呢，我的糖浆呢？哈…哈哈…你需要糖浆吗？
...Syrup, where's my syrup? Ha... Haha... Do you need syrup?
快呀——快喝呀！还在等什么呢，快喝呀！
Quick — drink up! What are you waiting for? Drink up quick!
嘘…您听到了吗？广场对面有人在哭…有人在笑。哭是因为心有渴望，笑是自嘲潦倒……
Shh... did you hear that? Someone is crying across the plaza... and someone's laughing. They cry because they still have desires, and they laugh out of ironic satire to their own despondency...
听不到吗？那…您能看到吗？那个人是黛紫色的…这份…嫉妒，因身旁的玫红与明黄而生……
You can't hear that? Then... do you see that? That person is lilac... This... jealousy... stems from the rose-red and the bright yellow next to them...
啊…您也看不到吗？那您可…真幸福。
Ah... You can't see these, either? Then you are... truly happy.
那些声音、那些颜色、甚至…我每天都能听到、都能看到。不是此刻这般远远倾听或观望，它们是如此强烈、如此鲜明，气势汹汹地逼近，像洪水一样近乎将我淹没。

Those voices, those colors, and even... I hear and see them every day. Instead of listening or observing from a distance like we are now, they are intense and brilliant as they aggressively approach, almost drowning me like a torrential flood.
他们的灵魂摊开在我面前…不断拉扯着我的…我因他们的喜怒而喜怒，为他们的哀惧而哀惧。
Their souls are spread out before me... ceaselessly pulling at me... I am happy because of their joy, and I dread because of their fear.
但我渐渐开始感到…迷惑…就像被巨浪来回拨弄的小船…它们实在太吵闹、太晃眼了…我渐渐开始感受不到自己了……
But I'm gradually beginning to feel... confused... like a tiny boat being tossed around on gigantic waves... they are simply too noisy, too blinding... I'm starting to lose any sense of self...
我已经快要找不到方向了…已经快要找不到「我」了，我不想再做梦了……
I'm almost completely lost and disoriented... I can barely find "me" anymore. I don't want to dream anymore...
阿然女士身上的沉稳气质稍稍褪去，流露出了些许属于少女的活泼。
Miss Ran's calm demeanor fades ever-so-slightly, revealing a glimpse of the lively spirit of a young girl.
这「梦想之城」…可真是个好地方啊！它能让人感到自由自在，感到自己充满了…力量。
This City of Dreams... it really is a wonderful place! It lets you feel completely free, lets you feel like you're full of... power.
该怎么形容呢？哈…在真实的世界中，您若是想要干涉、影响他人，就得小心翼翼地交流、潜移默化地引导。那可是个漫长且枯燥的活计。

How should I describe it? Ha... If you want to meddle with or influence someone else in the real world, you have to communicate with them ever so carefully, guiding them over time in imperceptible ways. That would a long and arduous job.
但「梦」放大了一切、美化了一切！在这里，我可以更加清晰地「看到」、「听到」、「感知到」，更加轻易地去塑造、去引导那些…迷途的心灵。
But "dreams" magnify and embellish everything! I can more clearly "see," "hear," and "perceive" in here. I can more easily shape and guide those... lost souls.
它们有的太吵闹、有的很泥泞，有些烈得像火、有些冷得像冰…可只要找对方法，就能让它们变做「理想的样式」、成为「正确的模板」……

Some are too noisy, while some are muddy. Some are hot as flames, while some are cold as ice... But so long as you can find the right method, you can turn them into "idealized styles" and "correct templates"...
所以…有谁能拒绝呢？谁能拒绝这种难以言喻的…快乐呢？
So... who can say no to this? Who can resist this inexplicable... joy?
这种感受，像您这样的人…一定可以明白的，对吧？
People like you can definitely understand this kind of feeling, right?
总感觉怪怪的…有谁在看着我吗？
Something's off... Is someone watching me?
这应该就是科琳要的东西了…回去找她看看吧。
This must be what Colleen wanted... Let's head back and see her.
那是…科琳的房间？怎么会有公司员工堵在门口？
Is that... Colleen's room? Why are there IPC workers blocking the door?
…现在的电影业已经堕落成这样了吗？什么滥竽都敢拿来充数——它配吗！
...Is this what the movie industry has degraded to? They'll use any old token to fill in the gaps — is that deserved?
你什么你！歌舞片就不要逻辑吗、就不用演技吗？找群小白脸在那乱喊乱叫、蹦蹦跳跳，你管这叫电影？
"I" what!? Don't musicals need to have logic to them, or acting skills? This is just a bunch of pretty boys yelling and jumping around. You call that a movie?
不是什么不是！我告诉你，这样的垃圾放出来就是在污染环境！你知道一部烂片能对人的身心造成多么严重的危害吗？
"No" WHAT!? Let me tell you, this kind of trash actually pollutes the environment! Do you know how much harm a bad movie can do to a person's mind and body?
您、您说得有道理…可、可我只是个广告牌啊……
Y—You make a good point... B—But I'm just a billboard...
广告牌怎么了？广告牌就能随随便便荼毒他人了吗——我告诉你，现在这个破广告给我造成了严重的心理创伤，你打算怎么补偿？

So what if you're a billboard? Billboards can still deliver wanton suffering to people — let me tell you, this evil ad has brought me severe psychological trauma. How do you plan on making compensation?
我…我不知道…哎呦！好心人帮帮我！
I—I don't know... Ouch! Please, someone help me!
怎么有人欺负广告牌啊？
Hey... How could you bully a billboard?
欺负？这年头连说实话都违法了吗？既然它敢放出这样的广告，就早该做好被骂的准备！
Bullying? Is merely telling the truth enough to get you canceled nowadays? Since it dared to display these ads to the world, it should also be prepared to get chewed out!
再说了，就算真欺负它又如何——怎么着，一个广告牌还能举报我？
And what's more, even if it really was bullying — so what? Is a billboard capable of reporting me?
等等、你等等，现在的年轻人怎么这么开不起玩笑！
Hang on, wait up. Kids these days don't know how to take a joke!
等等，你要做什么？玩笑都听不懂吗！
Hang on, what are you going to do with that? Don't you get the joke?
年纪轻轻这么急躁可不好…来来来，先喝瓶苏乐达冷静一下。
It's no good being so brash at such a young age... Come on, let's drink a bottle of SoulGlad to calm the nerves a little, huh?
所以你欺负广告牌干嘛？
So why are you bullying the billboard, then?
锐评不能算欺负…锐评！影评人的事，怎么能算欺负？
Strident criticism does not constitute bullying! Strident criticism, I say! How can a film critic ever be accused of bullying?
我好歹也算个有头有脸的电影评论家，对烂片零容忍怎么了？
After all, I'm a respected film critic with zero tolerance for bad movies. And what of it?
什么电影把你气成这样？
What movie made you so angry?
你没看到广告牌上的海报吗？《汽水人生》——最近新上的一部青春歌舞片。
Didn't you see the poster on the billboard? "Life's a Soda" — the latest hot young musical.
不过我并不推荐你观看。毕竟比起电影，这片子更像是苏乐达公司用钱砸出来的、一部长达两小时的无聊广告。
But I can't recommend it to you. After all, it's more like a boring two-hour-long commercial that SoulGlad threw money advertising rather than an actual movie.
还什么「梦境匹诺康尼，真正的繁星所在」…呸！要我看啊，这个希米亚影业，根本就是个财大气粗却毫无内涵的罐头工厂。
And what about "The Penacony Dreamscape, where the real stars orbit"... Ptooey! This Himemia Films is nothing more than a packing house for big budget blockbusters devoid of any real meaning.
你看看他们最近新上的片子，都是个什么玩意——
Just look at their latest crop of movies. What are they all about...
《重返梦境》？哼，宣发倒是做足了架子，可惜从头到尾都是花架子！
Return to Dreamscape? Hmph, marketing did a great job trying to stand this up, but it's all vacuous from beginning to end!
《审判之日》？就这叙事、这运镜，还百亿级知名导演，我看是知名现眼！
Judgment Day? With this description, this camerawork, and the ten-billion-dollar director attached, I'm sure it will be a famous source of embarrassment!
还有这个《迷因危机》！多少年前的故事了，还敢拿出来炒冷饭？
And this one, Meme Crisis! How stale is that old story? Yet they're still trying to warm it up like leftovers?
哼，粗糙干瘪、难以下咽，还有一股铜臭味……
Hmph, rough cuts and bone dry, very hard to digest. Smells just like a cash grab to me...
没错！匹诺康尼著名影评杂志——《银幕冲击波》，听过吗？没听过就是你孤陋寡闻。
That's right! Ever heard of the famous Penacony film mag, Silver Screen Shockwave? If not, you must be ill-read.
杂志每期都会评论匹诺康尼的当红电影，用语犀利、视角独特，从不向主流市场献媚。
Every issue has a review of the latest popular movies in Penacony, with sharp critiques and insightful perspectives that never pander to a mainstream audience.
你以为，如此优秀的期刊会请谁来当主笔？
Who do you think such an outstanding periodical would hire as its chief editor?
…又是这种态度、就是这种态度！你、你们…就因为大部分观众都是你这种水准……
...There it is, this old attitude again! Y—You... because most of the audience are on the same level as you...
俗不可耐！艺术的事，能用销量这种东西来衡量吗？！
How vulgar! Art cannot be measured by something as trivial as sales!
I have nothing else to ask.
Hmph, some peace and quiet at last...
I have other matters to attend to.
那还不快去！和老头子我在这耗什么呢！
Then hurry off! What are you doing with a doddering old fool like me!
*sigh*... The world's not what it used to be. Kids these days...
…什、什么…怎么回事…呃…呜啊啊啊——
...Wh—What... What is going on? Er... wahhh...
眼前的男子突然开始嚎啕大哭起来——成年人的崩溃往往只在一瞬间。
The man suddenly starts to shriek out loud — the adult's entire collapse is in mere seconds.
…不对（抽噎声）…不是这样的…我没有……
…快去、去找家族…找梦境…鼓励师……
...Go quickly, find The Family... Find the Dreamscape... Motivator...
…找梦境…鼓励师……（持续的哽咽与抽泣声）
<color=#f29e38ff>艾迪恩公园</color>那边好像有梦境鼓励师当班……
Pretty sure there's a Dreamscape Motivator on duty over by <color=#f29e38ff>Aideen Park</color>...
…我们的友谊已经走到尽头啦！我受够了，这次一定要和他绝交！
...Our friendship has run its course! I've had enough of this. It's time to break off relations with him!
我能明白您的感受，一直以来真是辛苦您……
I can understand how you feel. It's been so hard on you this whole time...
你将夏布罗的情况简单概括了一下，讲给安娜。
You briefly outline Chabro's situation for Anna.
如您所言，那位先生的状态确实有些糟糕…但我现在……
As you say, that gentleman's indeed in a bit of a pickle... But right now I...
哦…哦，我没关系，你先去吧。
Oh... Oh, that's fine. You go on.
感谢您的体谅，卡尔先生。那我先去确认一下情况，回来再联系您。
Thank you for your understanding, Mr. Carl. I'll double-check everything then and call you once I get back.
你知道吗…他曾经对我而言是最重要的人——是他毫不吝啬地将自己的研究成果与我分享，将我引向「智识」的正途。
You know what... He used to be the most important person in my life — he shared his research results with me without hesitation and led me along the correct Path of Erudition.
可就是这样一个人，怎么如今变得如此固执己见、如此故步自封了呢？
But how could someone like that somehow become so stubborn now?
你知道吗？他评判我的研究成果时那副态度，简直就像在教育一个不成器的孩子！
You know what? The attitude he showed when judging my research results was like lecturing an underperforming child!
抱歉，我只是忍不住牢骚几句…您快去吧，他们还在等您呢。
Sorry, I just can't help but complain... Go on. They're still waiting for you.
…我透不过气来…全都是惨叫…太吵了！
...I can't breathe... everything's screaming... it's too loud!
您先冷静一下，再这样下去很危险……
Please calm down. It's dangerous if you go on like this...
...Fire... the fire... It still burns... It never stopped burning...
随着夏布罗歇斯底里的惨叫，你们面前竟真出现了*一团火*。
As Chabro screams hysterically, a "ball of fire" actually appears in front of you.
…咳…总、总之，这次给你添麻烦了。要是之后遇到什么困扰，可以来找我。
...*Ahem*... A—Anyway, sorry for any trouble caused this time around. If you have any problems later on, you can come and find me.
老头子我好歹也算个有头有脸的人物，应该多少能帮上些忙。
I'm more or less a respectable enough old chap, and should be able to help you out with a few things still.
...Phew... That scared me half to death...
这老先生可真不得了，竟然直接将*意识*投射成*实体*了……
That old guy is really something. I can't believe he has projected his "consciousness" into an "entity"...
不过也好，现在负面情绪都被*物理*消灭了，老先生也就没有什么问题啦。
But that's fine. Now that the negative emotions have all been "physically" cleared away, the old chap won't have any more problems.
我先走了，卡尔先生还在等我呢。哦对了，刚刚谢谢你哦，有机会请你大餐！
I'll be off then. Mr. Carl is still waiting for me. Oh yes, thanks very much for that just then. I'll have to treat you to a good meal next time!
梦想是伟大的，艺术是永恒的……
Dreams are great, but art is eternal...
有时候我真庆幸自己来到了匹诺康尼…因为在梦里就可以不用再做梦了。
Sometimes I'm really glad that I came here to Penacony... Because I don't have to worry about having any dreams when I'm inside my dream.
你知道吗，孩子，在成为影评家之前，我也曾是一名导演…一名有梦想的导演。
You know what, kid? Before I became a critic, I was once a director... A director with his own dreams.
我也曾试图将自己对艺术的热爱、对生活的憧憬通过作品传达给人们、传达给整个世界，可……
I once tried, too, to pass on my love for art and lust for life to the people — to the whole world — through my films, but...
如今我已许久不曾做梦了，它们在我停止创作的那一天便离我而去了。
These days I don't really dream anymore. They more or less left me the day that I stopped creating.
至于那些我曾因自己的激情与梦想所取得的「荣耀」…那令我不得不远走他乡、隐姓埋名的「荣耀」…曾有太多人为它奉献、为它牺牲——

And as for the "glory" that I've achieved with all my passion and dreams... That same "glory" forced me to travel far away, keeping anonymous the whole time... too many people have devoted themselves for that — sacrificed themselves for that...
即便我至今仍无法直面它们，却始终都背负着它们，直到生命的尽头……
Even though I'm unable to face them, I will always carry them with me for the rest of my days...
夏布罗此刻看起来分外平和，就连脸上的褶子都仿佛不那么锋利了。
Chabro looks extremely at peace right then. Even the wrinkles cracked across his face seemed to be less sharp.
咳，之前让你见笑了…我是说那个广告牌的事——我那会儿正在气头上，你别介意。
*Ahem* Well, I made you laugh before... I mean, about the billboard... But I was just furious at the time. Please don't take it to heart.
但实话实话，匹诺康尼的影视圈现在简直一团乌烟瘴气！看看现在的那些后辈，简直一蟹不如一蟹！
But honestly, Penacony's movie industry is simply in tatters at the moment! Just look at the younger generation now. They're getting ever worse by the year!
一个个本事没多少，脾气大得不得了；鼻子翘上天，不懂得尊师重道。那些人能拍出什么好片子才怪！

None of them have any talent, and they're all extremely short-tempered. Yet they look down on everyone and don't know how to respect their teachers. What kind of film is someone like that going to shoot, I ask you!
你看着倒是个好苗子…怎么样，有兴趣进军影视圈吗？老头子我保证能把你培养成知名导演。
You seem like a good prospect... How about it, are you interested in joining the ranks of the cinema circle? I guarantee to train you up to become a famous director.
先别急着拒绝，来，看看这个——新鲜出炉的《银幕冲击波》！来好好见识一下老头子我的能耐吧！
Don't be so quick to shoot me down. Take a look at this freshly released Silver Screen Shockwave! Come see what this old man can do!
匹诺康尼的影视圈现在简直一团乌烟瘴气！看看现在的那些后辈，简直一蟹不如一蟹！
Penacony's movie industry is simply in tatters at the moment! Just look at the younger generation now. They're getting ever worse by the year!
一个个本事没多少，脾气大得不得了；鼻子翘上天，不懂得尊师重道。那些人能拍出什么好片子才怪！

None of them have any talent, and they're all extremely short-tempered. Yet they look down on everyone and don't know how to respect their teachers. What kind of film is someone like that going to shoot, I ask you!
你看着倒是个好苗子…怎么样，有兴趣进军影视圈吗？老头子我保证能把你培养成知名导演。
You seem like a good prospect... How about it, are you interested in joining the ranks of the cinema circle? I guarantee to train you up to become a famous director.
人这一生啊，可真是兜兜转转……
*sigh* Life... We just go round and round in circles...
哈哈，你知道吗，我虽然是个导演，这一生最辉煌的时刻却并不在颁奖台上。
Haha, you know what? I may be a director, but the most glorious moment in all my life was never up there on that awards stage.
我曾与星夜大奖擦肩而过——彼时我还以为那是会是我人生中最难忘的记忆。
I once rubbed shoulders with the stars at the Starcademy Awards... Back then, I thought it would be the most unforgettable memory I ever had.
但后来我却反倒因此幡然醒悟，明白了镜头能够传达的东西总归有限，有些东西需要亲自让人们体验才行。
But later on, I suddenly woke up one day and realized that the camera lens is always going to be limited in what it can depict, and some things have to be experienced by people for themselves.
…我曾听说某些星球上，人们会在秋冬之际烧毁荒芜的杂草，只为来年能在这片土地上培养出优质的粮食。
...I once heard of some planets where the people would burn up their dried weeds during the winter months, just to nourish high-quality crops on the land in the year ahead.
于是三年后，我又来到了奖台上——带着智慧的火种，用灵魂的热度点燃了会场、点燃了人群！
And so three years later, I arrived at the award podium once more — with the fire of wisdom and using the heat of my soul, I ignited the whole arena and set off the whole audience!
我始终坚信在灰烬之中，将会诞生更高尚的萌芽…而果然无论是那一届星夜奖，还是我自己，都因此红透了半边天……
I'm a firm believer that out of the ashes can sprout an even more exalted future... and sure enough, both the Starcademy Awards and I spread our fame like wildfire...
你知道吗，孩子——时至今日，星际间依旧传扬着我的大名！
You know what, kid? To this day, my name is still passed around among the stars!
陈腐、愚钝、俗不可耐！我不明白，为什么市场会变成这样。
So clichéd, stupid, and vulgar! I don't get it. How did the market ever get like this?
制片人？嗬，额头下长的眼是钱眼，脑子里灌的浆是泥浆！
A producer? Wow — someone who's got cash for eyes, and sludge for brains!
观众？哈，与其说他们有审美，不如说有种神经坏死的美。
The audience? Ha, it's not so much that they have aesthetic taste, insofar as it's a kind of nervous necrotic beauty.
镜头单调故事平庸毫无个性就为能让观众看懂，这种人拍什么电影！
The shots are mundane. The story is average, with no personality for ease of understanding. What kind of movie is this person trying to shoot!?
一个隐喻一个伏笔还得创作者下场解释八百遍，这种人看什么电影！
Every metaphor or foreshadowing has to be explained eight hundred times by the creator. What kind of movies does this type of person watch!?
说什么要我去迎合什么主流市场、什么大众审美…就是因为…就因为全都是这种水准，我才……
Asking me to pander to the mainstream market, and pop culture... It's exactly because... because they're all of this kind of standard that I...
哼，如今就连这所谓的「梦想之城」也不过如此。何其可悲啊——在这无药可救的庸俗之中，艺术又该如何立足！
Hmph, even this so-called City of Dreams is like that nowadays. How sad — how could art ever hope to stand up among the hopeless vulgarity of this world!
哎——不用一天到晚挂着个假笑、对宾客点头哈腰的感觉可真好！
Hey — it feels great not having to wear this fake smile and grovel for guests all day!
就是看不到领导们的滑稽嘴脸、不能怼人稍微有点无聊……
It's just, things are kind of boring if I can't see the funny faces of the bosses, and I can't diss people...
Tell me more about this dissing.
哎哟你谁啊！突然冒出来吓我一跳…多大的人了，家里没教过你不要在街上乱搭话吗？
Ack, who are you!? Suddenly popping up out of nowhere... You nearly gave me a heart attack! How old are you? Didn't your parents ever teach you not to talk to strangers on the streets?
那你这孩子…个头可真不小。算了，看在我今儿心情好的份上，和你聊聊也不是不行。
Then you're... pretty big for a kid. Whatever, seeing as I'm in such a good mood today, I can chat a little while with you.
哎，我和你说啊，以后要是找工作，可千万别干酒店前台。
Hey, I tell you what — if you're ever looking for a job, never work as a hotel receptionist.
为什么？听我给你讲讲做前台的「好处」就知道了——
Why? Just let me tell you about the "benefits" of working as a hotel receptionist...
闲暇太少、规矩太多；客人太吵闹，领导太啰嗦。
No leisure, too many rules, noisy guests, and bossy bosses.
还有家族的同事，上班正事不干，下班喝酒团建；不参与等于不合群，他们所谓的「同谐」也就这点水平了。

Plus some staff members are from The Family and do zero work, then drink all night after work. If you don't go, they boot you out of their group, which doesn't seem to uphold "Harmony," if you ask me.
嗨，我倒是想——但多亏了我那「亲爱的」姐姐，自己在现实酒店当前台就算了，还非得买一赠一，把我也安排上。

Ha, I'd love to — but thanks to my "darling" sister, I've been signed up to work at the hotel in reality as a receptionist alongside her. It's not enough for her to be working there. She had to make it a two-for-one deal.
嘿…你知道吗，那家伙其实做梦都想在梦境酒店工作。不过——可惜啊，她连梦都做不了。
Ha... Do you know what? She actually dreams of working at the hotel in the dreamscape. But how pathetic — she can't even dream properly.
我就喜欢看她明明嫉妒我、却又不得不装出一幅关心我的嘴脸，嘻嘻…真是我的好姐姐。
I just like the look of her being so obviously jealous of me yet still having to pretend to care, teehee... That's my big sis.
行啊，反正我这会儿也闲着没事。你想聊什么？
Sure, in any case, there's nothing going on right now. What do you want to chat about?
So, are you here on vacation?
对啊，毕竟梦境酒店已经被封锁了嘛…你应该拿到梦境护照了吧？宾客须知上应该有写才对。
Yeah, after all, the hotel in the Dreamscape is under lockdown now... You've got a Dreamscape Pass, right? It should be in the Guest Notice.
这次封锁发生得还真突然，而且还是一刀切，没有任何回旋余地。据说是家主直接下的命令，不论家族的人还是逐梦客都一股脑被赶了出来，一概不准进入酒店了。

The lockdown happened so fast and caught everyone up in the same net, with no wiggle room for anybody. I heard it was a direct order coming down from the family head. Both The Family and all Dreamchasers — everyone was booted out with nobody allowed back into the hotel.
我还挺好奇那里面究竟发生了什么的。不过好奇归好奇，我可不想被卷进奇怪的麻烦里…所以还是不瞎打听了吧。
I'm pretty curious about what happened in there. That's one thing, but I don't want to get caught up in any weird trouble... so I'd better stop asking around so much I guess.
那当然——别的不说，家族在这方面还是很贴心的。
Of course — If anything, The Family treats us pretty well when it comes to that.
这种天上掉下来的假期，可得好好享受才不算浪费啊。
A vacation out of nowhere like this should not be wasted and should be fully taken advantage of.
You even hear yourself? Don't you look down on me!
不是自夸，我可是这一届的风云人物。你知道匹诺康尼本地有多少人觊觎我这个岗位吗？不夸张地说，每次扩招都争得头破血流！

Not to brag, but I'm the woman of the moment right now. Do you know how many people there are in Penacony who eye this job of mine? I'm not kidding when I say there's a raucous riot every time this position is hiring!
悄悄告诉你，鸢尾花家的家主特别器重我——我也知道自己脾气冲、说话直，但在那位大人眼里，这些可都是优点！
And let me tell you on the down low, the head of the Iris Family holds me in high regard. I know I can be brash and blunt, but to the head, these are all pluses!
About your relationship with your sister...
我们的关系，最好就是没关系。
The best relationship we could have is no relationship.
别看她平时装得多正经，内心其实不知道有多阴暗。
Never you mind how proper and serious she goes about looking. You have no idea how dark her innermost thoughts can get.
她这种人啊，永远都不会知道「美梦」究竟是什么滋味…活该！
People like her will never know the feeling of "sweet dreams"... and it's all her fault!
Let's end it here for now.
Oh? But I'm still not done...
这就要走了？行吧，有空再聊。和你闲聊还挺有意思的。
Going so soon? Fine, let's chat again next time you're free. You're fun to talk to.
哎——不用一天到晚挂着个假笑、对宾客点头哈腰的感觉可真好！
Hey — it feels great not having to wear this fake smile and grovel for guests all day!
你知道吗，我这个姐姐啊，从小就视我为眼中钉、肉中刺。
You know what? Since we were young, my older sister always saw me as this thorn in her side.
年纪不大的时候就抢我的零食、弄坏我的玩具，还骗走了我所有的朋友……
When we were still small, she'd steal snacks off me, break my toys, and steal away all of my friends...
等年纪大了呢，因为亏心事做得太多，被自己折磨得夜不能寐，就干脆变卖了所有积蓄，跑到这个所谓的「梦想之城」来。

Once we got a little bit older, the evil deeds racked up day after day to the point where she couldn't sleep at night. She decided to sell off everything she owned, and come to this so-called City of Dreams.
可即便如此又能怎样呢？到头来她还是「不敢做梦」，啧啧，真是自作自受啊。
Yeah — but so what? In the end, she still "dared not dream." Tsk tsk, she really can only blame herself.
只可怜我被她牵连，不得不留在这个吵闹的梦里。哎，做梦有什么好呢？我一点都不喜欢什么美梦，我只想踏踏实实地睡上一觉。
It's just a pity that I got roped in by her and had to stay here in this noisy dream. *sigh* What good are dreams? I don't care in the slightest for sweet dreams. I just want a solid night's sleep.
自私自利的恶毒女人…我宁愿跟一块顽石当姐妹，也不想和她多相处一秒。
What a vicious, calculating woman... I'd rather be sister to a stubborn donkey than spend another second with her.
哦，你没法理解，我不怪你。这种感受…有些事不曾亲身经历过的话，确实很难理解。
Oh, you have no way of understanding, and I don't blame you. This feeling... Some things are impossible to get unless you experience them for yourself.
如果真的想知道我的感受，那就回现实和她聊聊吧。这样你就知道她究竟有多虚伪了。
If you really want to know how I feel, then go back out to reality and talk to her. That way you'll know for yourself what a hypocrite she is.
她在现实中的「白日梦」酒店当<color=#f29e38ff>前台接待</color>。面对那种无聊的工作，我猜她每天肯定都过得愁眉苦脸的吧？嘻嘻……
She works <color=#f29e38ff>as a receptionist</color> out in The Reverie in reality. Such boring work should leave her feeling utterly miserable each day, right? Tee-hee...
如果真的想知道我的感受，那就回现实和她聊聊吧。这样你就知道她究竟有多虚伪了。
If you really want to know how I feel, then go back out to reality and talk to her. That way you'll know for yourself what a hypocrite she is.
她在现实中的「白日梦」酒店当<color=#f29e38ff>前台接待</color>。面对那种无聊的工作，我猜她每天肯定都过得愁眉苦脸的吧？嘻嘻……
She works <color=#f29e38ff>as a receptionist</color> out in The Reverie in reality. Such boring work should leave her feeling utterly miserable each day, right? Tee-hee...
您好，请问有什么需要吗？
Greetings. Is there something you need?
I'm here about your little sister...
哎呀，那孩子给您添了什么麻烦吗？
*sigh* Did that kid cause any trouble for you?
实在是抱歉，我妹妹性格比较直率，心智也不够成熟。如果她不小心冒犯了您，请允许我这个做姐姐的代她向您赔礼……
I'm really sorry. My sister can be blunt and isn't always the most mature. If she has accidentally offended you, then please allow me — as her sister — to make it up to on her behalf...
真的吗？太好了…唉，您不知道，奎茵那孩子，之前就没少因为口无遮拦得罪别人。
Really? That's great... *sigh* You have no idea how many people Quinn has offended because she doesn't know how to keep her mouth shut.
她呀，多大的人了，还一直表现得像个小孩子似的…整天让我为她操心。
At her age, she's still behaving as though she's still a little kid... Always making me worry about her all day long.
I heard your relationship isn't the best?
是奎茵和您说的吧？也不奇怪，她从小就是这个性格…还时不时就喜欢给我找点麻烦。
Is that what Quinn said? I'm not surprised, as she's had this kind of personality since she was small... She likes causing trouble for me every now and again.
但即便如此，我们也是爱着彼此的…我们姐妹之间的联系牢不可破。她<color=#f29e38ff>永远都是我最重要的妹妹</color>。
But even so, we also love each other... Our sisterly bond is unbreakable. She will <color=#f29e38ff>always be my sister and the most important person to me</color>.
听上去，您似乎和奎茵相处得不错。那么，您可以听听我的不情之请吗？
Sounds like you and Quinn are getting along like a house on fire. So, if I may be so bold as to ask you a favor?
那孩子因为性格的原因没什么朋友，我工作又太忙，很难和她见上一面。
That kid has no real friends due to her personality issues, and I'm too busy with my work, so I never get a chance to see her.
要是不嫌弃的话，您若什么时候得了空闲，可以替我陪陪她吗？
If you don't mind and if you have any free time, would you please keep her company for me?
眼前的奎茵看起来分外平静，你却莫名能够感受到她心中的愤怒。
Quinn may look extremely calm, but you can feel a kind of rage deep in her heart.
就像是煤灰堆下隐约透出的暗火。
Just like a smolder of flame burning dimly beneath a pile of soot.
让我猜猜她是怎么和你说的——
Let me guess what she told you...
「那孩子给你添麻烦了吧？她还小不懂事，我替她道歉」——虚伪！
"Did that kid cause any trouble for you? She's young and still doesn't know squat. Please let me apologize on behalf of her"... Hypocrite!
「我们姐妹的关系其实很好，我们超~爱~彼此的」——做作！
"Our sisterly relationship is actually really great, and we LOVE each other SO much~" ...Liar!
「哎呀我太忙了没时间，有空你替我陪陪她吧」——令人作呕！
"Shucks. I'm so busy and don't have any time. Could you please keep her company" ...Gross!
她还说了其它什么吗？没有了吧…每次都是这一套，呵，也不嫌腻歪。
Did she say anything else? Nothing, right... It's always the same old trick each time, ha. Doesn't she ever get bored?
Has there been some kind of misunderstanding here...
等等，你该不会…真的信了她的鬼话吧？饶了我吧还是。
Hang on, you don't actually... believe her lies? Spare me, please!
我恨她，她也恨我——这是无可改变的事实。
I hate her, and she hates me... That's the incontrovertible truth.
我*这辈子*都在想方设法摆脱她造就的阴影，而她则是这个世界上…最希望我这个负担彻底消失的人。
I've spent my *entire life* trying to get out from under her shadow. She's the one person in this world... who hopes that this burden — me — one day disappears forever.
...Why don't you guys sit down for a nice chat?
聊聊？还真是轻描淡写…不，我们永远都没法好好聊，以前不可能，现在更不可能！
A nice chat!? You're really downplaying things... No, we can never have a nice chat — it was impossible before, and it's even more so now!
你觉得我是在耍小脾气，是吧？你觉得我这是任性、蛮横、无理取闹，是吧？
You just think I'm sulking here, don't you? You think I'm headstrong, rude, and causing a scene — right?
但我告诉你，我告诉你——我说我们*永远*也没法<color=#f29e38ff>面对面</color>聊，而她就是那个原因！
But I'm telling you — we will *never* be able to chat <color=#f29e38ff>face-to-face</color>, and it's all her fault!
你以为我不想回现实看看吗？不巧，我早就是个幽灵了——我根本离不开这该死的梦境，我的人生已经结束了，没戏唱了——你懂吗？

Do you think I don't want to go back to reality? Unfortunately I've already been a spirit for a long time — I can't leave this cursed dreamscape. My life is over, totally over — do you understand what I'm saying here?
你以为她敢到梦境里来找我吗？不…艾丽，那家伙，她根本没有胆量直视我的眼睛。直到今天，她也还是在逃避！
Do you think she dares come into the dreamscape to pay me a visit? No... Alley doesn't have the guts to look me straight in the eye. To this day, she's still been avoiding it!
我这双眼啊…就是在她眼前彻底失去了光亮。我敢发誓，她这辈子都忘不了——
These eyes of mine... they've completely lost their brightness due to her. I swear, she is going to never forget...
——忘不了当年她是怎么把自己的亲生妹妹推下楼梯的。嘻嘻……
...never forget how she pushed her own sister down the stairs. Heehee...
奎茵看起来分外平静，你却莫名能够感受到她心中的怒气——就像是煤灰堆下隐约透出的暗火。
Quinn may look extremely calm, but you can feel a kind of rage deep in her heart — just like a smolder of flame burning dimly beneath a pile of soot.
怎么，还有什么想知道的？这个够了吗？
Why, is there anything else you'd like to know? Is that enough?
你知道吗？我时不时就能回忆起当时的情景。
You know what? Sometimes I think about what happened back then.
…很疼…非常非常疼…「我」的心跳很得快，却喘不上气来……
...It hurt... so much... "My" heart was beating so fast, yet I couldn't breathe...
那时候我们才刚刚大吵了一架，她眼里的怒火还没烧干净，就被暴风雨似的惊恐浇灭了，湿淋淋的。
We'd just had this big fight, and before the anger in her eyes had burnt out, it was doused in a storm-like panic, utterly drenched.
我一动也动不了，连喊疼的力气都没有，只能紧紧盯着那双眼睛。视线随之变得模糊…不知不觉间，「我」就睡着了。
I couldn't move. I didn't even have the strength to cry out in pain — I just stared at those eyes. My vision grew blurry... Before I knew it, "I" was asleep.
再次睁开眼睛，「我」已经身处黄金的时刻，当起梦境中的酒店前台啦。
The next time I opened my eyes, "I" was already in the golden hour as a receptionist at the hotel in the dreamscape.
故事是不是还挺精彩的？可惜啊，都是*假的*——我的记忆、我的痛苦、甚至我的存在本身，全都是那个女人自欺欺人的谎言！
Isn't this story really something? It's a pity everything is *fake* — my memory, my pain, and even my remaining existence. It's all lies that she tells us and herself!
多可笑，多可悲啊…你说是吧？
How ridiculous! How tragic... Don't you think?
此刻的奎茵面无表情，一双眼睛仿佛初冬清晨泛着苍白雾气的湖面。
Right then, Quinn's face wore no emotion. Here eyes were like cool morning mist on a wintry lake.
I've had enough... Really, I've had enough...
为什么早已死去的人不能安息，还活着的又非得扮作一个虚假的影子，佯装对方还在梦中苟延残喘呢？
Why can't the dead rest in peace? And why do the living have to pretend to be this fake shadow, pretending that we're struggling on in this dreamscape here?
愧疚有那么重要吗？悔恨有那么持久吗？
Is guilt really that important? Is remorse really that permanent?
一切都为了她荒唐可笑的自我满足！都为了她毫无意义的自我折磨！
And all for her ridiculous ego! All because of her meaningless self-torture!
我太累了…真的…太累了，她什么时候才能放过自己、放过「我」呢……
I'm tired... Really, I'm tired. When is she going to let go of herself? When is she going to let go of "me"...
奎茵的神色有一瞬恍惚，但随即又变回最初那种生动活泼。
Quinn's face looks stunned for a second, but soon returns to as lively as it was before.
嗯…我们刚刚说到哪来着…哎呦，怎么这么累啊？
Well... What were we just talking about... *sigh* Why am I so tired?
肯定是平时工作被压榨得太狠，才和你聊了多大会儿啊，就好像一晚上没睡觉似的。
It must be because I'm getting ruthlessly put through the wringer at work, and that's why I've blabbed on so much. It's kinda like when you stay up all night.
好在我刚买的钟表披萨还没吃完，赶紧补充一下碳水…哈，我猜也是白费力气，梦境里哪有什么营养学的说法
Luckily I've still got some of this Clockie Pizza left, so I can stock up on carbs... Ha, I guess it's all waste of time actually, as there's no such thing as nutrition inside the Dreamscape.
嗯？看我干嘛，你也想吃？好吧，看在我们聊得还算开心的份上…分你一块也不是不行。
Well, what are you looking at? Hungry, too? Alright, seeing as we've been chatting nicely... it's not like I can't share some of this with you.
嗯…我们刚刚说到哪来着…哎呦，怎么这么累啊？
Well... What were we just talking about... *sigh* Why am I so tired?
肯定是平时工作被压榨得太狠，才和你聊了多大会儿啊，就好像一晚上没睡觉似的。
It must be because I'm getting ruthlessly put through the wringer at work, and that's why I've blabbed on so much. It's kinda like when you stay up all night.
难得的假期，就该好好放松一下——不然连我自己的良心都会谴责我的。
It's your own hard-earned vacation, so relax a little... Otherwise, even my own conscience is going to condemn me.
奎茵目视虚空，神色宁静，略带笑容，仿佛陷入某种难以言喻的喜悦之中。
Quinn stares off into space in serenity with a slight smile, as if experiencing some kind of indescribable joy.
这喜悦似冬至草木凋敝，似日落天光为影，似久经漂泊的疲惫灵魂将在终途驻停。
This joy is like the withered crops of winter solstice; like the sky turning to shade as the sun sets; like the tired soul coming to a stop after a lifetime of wandering.
It's wonderful. I can finally rest...
真不容易，难得有那么一刻，我觉得自己的内心没有那么沉重了。
It's not easy to meet a moment like this where my heart doesn't feel as though it's so heavy.
让我休息吧…我太累了。如果可以，我真的不想再醒来了……
Let me rest a while... I'm tired. And if I might, I really don't feel like ever waking up again...
哟，你好啊。我是科琳，筑梦师中的点子王，脑袋里的梦境素材能堆满整个匹诺康尼——还不重样！
Yo, how is it going? It's me, Colleen — the idea hamster for the Dreamweavers. I've got enough Dreamscape material in my head to fill all of Penacony — you want it, I got it!
我的本职是个宇宙行商，经常开着飞船到处鬼混。你也可以叫我「科琳船长」。
I'm a traveling merchant by trade, and fly my ship anywhere I please. You can call me "Captain Colleen."
哈，看我的装扮不像，是吧？
Ha, can't tell judging by my outfit, can you?
我承认，这一身确实贵气了些。不过来这种地方要想不被人看扁，多少还是得注意些扮相的…要是我把平时那身行头穿来，估计要吓坏不少人。

I admit, this look is indeed a little more bling. But if you don't want to be looked down upon in a place like this, you should pay attention to dressing up... It would freak out the lot of you if I were to wear my usual get-up here.
你先接受这个设定就行——要是咱俩处得来，你自然能见识到我「专业」的一面。
Just accept this for now — and if we get along well, you'll naturally catch my "professional" side.
梦境嘛，本质上是人们现实经历的糅合重组。一辈子不出门的家伙，能梦见的也无非自己那一亩三分地上发生的无聊事。

The Dreamscape: Basically a remix and reshuffle of people's real life experiences. Someone who never goes outside to touch grass can only dream of whatever boredom that happens around their own little patch of turf.
想让梦境有趣但不至于扯淡，家族就必须找一位走过南闯过北的顾问才行。
To make the Dreamscape interesting without being nonsense, The Family had to find a consultant — someone who was very well-traveled.
原本最适合做这活的是无名客，谁料到阿基维利那倒霉蛋死得早，那帮人紧跟着销声匿迹了…少了这个第一选择，宇宙行商无疑是最靠谱的次选——所以他们邀请了我。
