在这场比赛上，出现了一群穿着简陋、行为粗野的星际流浪汉，他们来自某个被毁灭的原始星球，唱着难听无比的歌声，像是忆域迷因的鬼叫。

A group of shabbily dressed and boorish interstellar wanderers showed up from a destroyed primitive planet. Their singing voice was so terrible that it sounded like the haunting cries from the Memory Zone Meme.
但星际和平娱乐当时的营销部长却突发奇想，给了他们做了一个包装——说他们是某个已逝星神的传人，唱的是失传的艺术瑰宝。

However, the marketing director of Interastral Peace Entertainment at the time had a whimsical idea. He packaged the wanderers as the descendants of a deceased Aeon and claimed that they were singing an artistic piece that was long lost.

呼——所以无论艺者们想做多么标新立异的事，只要我的商业方案够精妙，都能把他们包装成明星！

虽说我要让这些年轻人实现梦想，但不知道他们能否背负起梦想的重量。

虽说我要让这些年轻人实现梦想，但不知道他们能否背负起梦想的重量。

他们有人想要传承过去的艺术，有人想要尝试更前卫的表达…但无论如何，他们的作品还是要摆在观众面前，供市场评判。

Some of them want to carry on traditional arts, while some are experimenting with a more avant-garde performance style... Anyhow, their work has to be presented to the public and evaluated by the market.

它们有的是宇宙中古老的艺术遗产，有的是银河中前卫的探索表达…但这些事物都无法让市场认可，难以收获追捧，还会面临非议与偏见。

Some of them are ancient artistic heritage lost in the universe, while others are avant-garde expressions on a cosmic scale... but none of them are recognized by the market. Not only do they get zero attention from the public, but they also face criticism and prejudice.
希望他们能做好心理准备——选择一条崎岖的路，就要面临更多的挫折与苦难。
I hope they have mentally prepared themselves. They're bound to face more setbacks and hardship when they choose a path less traveled.
哈哈哈…我猜这些年轻人听到我的想法一定会很开心的！
Hahaha... I can imagine how thrilled those youngsters would be when they find out what I think!
我会把之前给他们制定的方向全都丢掉，然后告诉他们——去成为你们所憧憬的样子吧，我会帮助你们的！
I'll set aside all the plans I've previously made for them. I'll encourage them to be whatever they want to be and reassure them that they'll have my help!
芙尔拉放下了自己端着的架子，开怀大笑起来，像个天真可爱的孩子。
Forla lets go of her pretensions and laughs heartily like a carefree kid.

I'll set aside all the plans I've previously made for them. I'll encourage them to be whatever they want to be and reassure them that they'll have my help!
等他们得到了自由，就能充满干劲地去追逐梦想…也许还能开辟鸢尾花从来没有发现过的娱乐业蓝海——我说不定也能沾点光，在家族里混个一官半职！

Once they have freedom, they'll be able to chase their dreams with enthusiasm... They might even stumble upon a blue ocean of the entertainment industry for the Iris Family! I might even benefit a little from it and secure a nice position in The Family because of them!
到时候，我就有权力去改变鸢尾花家系了…然后我会从匹诺康尼开始，慢慢改变娱乐行业的状况，让所有人的梦想都有展示的舞台……我会成为偶像们的偶像，被宇宙铭记……

When the time comes, I'll have the authority to bring changes to the Iris Family... Then, starting from Penacony, I'll slowly change the entertainment industry and provide a platform for everyone to realize their dreams... I'll be idolized by idols and etch my name in the history of the universe...
芙尔拉自说自话地描绘着未来的图景，忘记了你的存在。
Forla gets carried away while talking to herself and envisioning her future, becoming oblivious to your presence.
原来这一切在他眼里都不重要…我，做出的所有努力，都变成了他逃离我的原因。
It turns out that none of these things actually mattered to him... Everything I've done became the reason he ran away from me.
或许比起管理能力和市场知识，我更该学习的是如何了解艺者们的心吧……
Perhaps I should learn how to understand the hearts of my talents instead of management skills and market knowledge...
芙尔拉微微颤抖，你看到她的眼角闪烁泪光——她完全抛下了自己的面子，哇哇大哭起来。
As Forla trembles slightly, you notice tears glistening in her eyes. She then bursts into tears and lets go of all her pretences.
呜、呜呜呜！波波特，这个傻孩子，就不能再给我一次机会嘛——
Waaaa! Popott, you foolish boy! Can't you give me another chance...

芙尔拉女士，我也有话要对您说……

Why don't you hear me out first? Listen, you can perform the real "Song of Beauty" at your future concerts!
我已经想通了，咱们把那些骗人的歌忘了吧，我要让你成为宇宙中独一无二的音乐艺术家，让你能自由地唱出自己喜欢的歌曲！
I've thought it all through! Let's forget about all those bogus songs! I'm going to make you the most unique musician in the universe, and you'll be free to sing the songs you like!
拉洛丝，怎么了？你难道不想唱你最喜欢的歌曲吗？
What's the matter, Larose? Don't you want to perform the songs you like?
What? Did I hear you wrong!?
芙尔拉女士，我现在正在事业上升期，应该抓住势头，走上更大的舞台——这是您告诉我的，现在突然让我唱这种音乐，会引起观众的反感吧。

Madam Forla, my career is heading upward now. I should seize the momentum to get on bigger platforms — that's what you taught me. If I start to sing this kind of music now... It won't sit well with the audience.
这…拉洛丝，你怎么突然害怕起这种事情了。你之前想唱「纯美之歌」的时候，不是说自己不怕争议吗？为了实现梦想，你可不能这么胆小啊……

But... Larose, since when did you start to let those things hold you back? Didn't you say you weren't worried about controversies when you asked to perform the "Song of Beauty"? You can't be so timid if you want to realize your dream...
芙尔拉女士，就是您让我变成这样的！在我想要自由歌唱的时候，您说我是痴心妄想。如今我选择脚踏实地，您却又说我胆小，让我大胆追逐理想。

Madam Forla, it was you who made me this way! Back when I yearned to sing freely, you said I was being unrealistic. Now that I've chosen to become more grounded, you're telling me I'm too timid and should instead chase my dream bravely.
我是人，不是只会听从您命令的自动乐团，请不要再这样折磨我了。我也不会让「纯美之歌」被世人肆意诋毁，这是对「纯美」女神的不敬。

I'm human, not an automated orchestra that only obeys your commands. Please stop torturing me this way. I won't allow the "Song of Beauty" to be disparaged by the world, as it would be disrespectful to the Goddess of Beauty.
今后我会好好听您的话，不会再想这些幼稚的事情了——也请您努力让拉洛丝成为一名「盛会巨星」，而不是那种孤芳自赏的小艺术家。

From today onward, I'll follow your arrangements and stop dwelling on those childish thoughts. So, please do your part and make me a superstar, not a small-time artist whose music is admired by no one.
我、我知道了，但是，我们要不要再聊聊你的未来……
I—I've got it. Still, should we spend more time discussing your future...
抱歉，我得去继续宣传演唱会了，这可是您给我的工作，再见——
Sorry, I've got to attend a promotional activity for my concert — a job you scheduled for me. See you...
拉洛丝…如果我能早点做出改变，你是不是就不会放弃原本的理想了呢……
Larose... Would you have continued chasing your dream if I had come around earlier?
It isn't necessarily a bad thing.
…确实，凭她的资质，只要延续之前的风格演出下去，一定就能获得成功——但这真的是她想要的吗？
...Indeed, with her talent, I'm sure she'll rise to the top as long as she carries on with her current performance style. Yet, is it really what she desires?
She has a new dream now.
…是啊，她说自己想成为「盛会巨星」——如果这真的是她现在想要的东西，我也会尽力帮她得到。
...Yes, she said she wanted to become a superstar... If that's truly what she wants, I'll do my best to help her.
唉，想法可以轻易转变，但对艺者们造成的影响没法轻易消除…看来我的过错不能洗刷，只能慢慢补赎。
Alas, it's easy to change my mindset, but the impact of my actions on my talents is hard to erase... Looks like my mistakes can't be erased overnight, and must be slowly made up for my mistake.
宾客，请你之后也多支持一下拉洛丝吧，希望你能给她的梦想一份力量…祝你有一天也能实现自己的梦想！
Dear guest, please show your support to Larose in the future and give her the strength to pursue her dream. I wish you could realize yours one day too!
（大家似乎对拉洛丝的音乐不太满意……）
(People don't seem impressed by Larose's music...)
亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，您准备好欣赏声乐之星的「纯美之歌」了吗？
Are you ready for the Song of Beauty from the planet of canticles, dear {M#sir}{F#lady}?
啊，看来您并不了解我的音乐呀。让我来介绍一下吧——不知您是否听说过「门达希亚」这个名字？
I see, you are not familiar with my music. Let me introduce it to you: Have you ever heard of the name "Mendasia"?
Is that the name of the planet of canticles?
是的，它曾经是一个宇宙中的艺术天堂，但如今已不复存在。
Yes, it was once an artistic paradise in the universe, but it no longer exists.
人名…如果把它比喻为一个人，那一定是位仙姿玉貌的女神，但它其实是声乐之星的名字。
Someone's name... Well, if you compare it to "someone," then she must be a goddess of immortal beauty. It's actually the name of the planet of canticles.
Is it some sort of food?
吃的…呵呵，这其实是声乐之星的名字，不过您的玩笑道出了它最后的命运。
Some sort of food... Hehe, it's actually the name of the planet of canticles, but your joke relates to its ultimate fate.
门达希亚自文明诞生以来便信奉「纯美」，伊德莉拉女神赠予了我们隔绝灾厄的镜壁，这个世界便隐藏了自己在星海中的痕迹，因此鲜有人知晓它的存在。

Since the dawn of civilization, Mendasia has believed in the Beauty. Idrila bestowed upon us the Wall of Mirrors that shielded us from plagues. Henceforth, the world concealed its traces in the star ocean, and only a few knew of its existence.
那里逐渐变为了一个安宁祥和的仙境，人们在花林中饭蔬饮水，潜心探究用音律赞颂纯美，终日弦歌不绝，自诩「声乐之星」。

Gradually, it became a peaceful wonderland where people indulged in feasts and drinks in the forest of flowers, explored and sang in praise of the Beauty, referring to their homeland as the planet of canticles.
但女神退隐世间后，祂留下的赐福也逐渐碎裂…就在两个琥珀纪前，镜壁彻底坍塌。门达希亚如同刚羽化的蝴蝶卷入风暴，不久便被一只可怕的星际巨兽吞噬。

However, as the Beauty disappeared, the blessings she left behind gradually crumbled... Approximately two Amber Eras ago, the Wall of Mirrors collapsed entirely, and soon after, like a vulnerable butterfly, Mendasia was swallowed by a terrifying interstellar beast.
幸存的门达希亚人自此开始流浪，无人相信星际难民口中的世外桃源，声乐之星存在过的证据只有几首叫做「纯美之歌」的音乐……

The surviving Mendasians have been wandering ever since, and no one believes in the paradise spoken of by those refugees. Only a few musical pieces, known as the "Song of Beauty," serve as evidence of the existence of the planet of canticles...
纯美的仙境已逝，如果它残存的艺术也随之凋亡，宇宙艺术的冠冕上定会失去一颗耀眼的明珠。每多一位听众，它存续的火光便会亮上一分——所以希望您能支持我的演出。

The enchanting realm of the Beauty has faded, and if its remaining art withers away, the crown of cosmic art will lose one of its brightest jewels. With each additional listener, the enduring flame of art will shine brighter. So, I hope you can support my performance.
谢谢您的支持，代表纯美女神向您致敬。
Thank you for your support. I salute you on behalf of the Beauty.
我对音乐演出不感兴趣。
I'm not interested in musical performances.
是吗…那太遗憾了，这可是纯美女神遗留在宇宙中为数不多的遗产。
Oh, what a shame... It's one of the few legacies that the Beauty has left behind in the universe.
我会继续努力传唱「纯美之歌」，为了声乐之星，也为了传承宇宙中珍贵的美好。
I will continue to preserve the "Song of Beauty," for the sake of the planet of canticles and the precious beauty of the universe.
为了让「纯美之歌」继续在银河中传唱，还请您多多支持我的演出。
Please support my performances so that the "Song of Beauty" will continue resonating in the cosmos.
I'd like to chat with you...
好啊，我也很想让听众多了解我与我的音乐。
Sure thing. I am delighted to provide my audience with more information about myself and my music.
你为什么在街头发传单？
Why are you handing out flyers on the streets?
其实我的演出以前在匹诺康尼一直很受欢迎，不过最近音乐会的门票销量很不理想，所以经纪人让我来街头亲自推广演出。
Actually, my concerts used to be quite popular in Penacony, but ticket sales have been poor lately, so my manager suggested that I personally promote the show on the streets.
我想是因为「谐乐大典」快开始了，所有的宾客都在期盼知更鸟前辈登台，对其他演出却不屑一顾……
I believe it's because the Charmony Festival is approaching, and all the visitors are eager for Robin's performance, but not so much for the other acts...
梦境中追逐音乐梦想的人多如繁星，听众却只凝望最耀眼的明月…一直这样下去，微小的辰星就只能攀附月光，或在孤独落寞中走向黯淡，艺术的星空迟早会变得单调无味……

Countless individuals are pursuing their musical aspirations in the dreamscape, yet the audience fixates only on the brightest moon... If this trend continues, the lesser stars will only shine clinging to the moonlight or fade away in solitude. Sooner or later, the sky will become insipid...
亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，也请您在游览之余多关注一下其他演出吧。虽然不能与谐乐大典的隆盛相比，但肯定也有自己独特的魅力。
Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, while you are here, please pay attention to some other performances. Although they may not match the grandeur of the Charmony Festival, each has its own unique charm.
I just want to enjoy the finest shows.
我理解您的追求，但每个人应该都对艺术都有不一样的评判标准。如果您只相信外界的评价，可能反而会错失「最好的演出」。
I understand your desire, but everyone has their own criteria for the "finest" shows. By relying solely on external judgments, you might overlook the truly finest shows.
您可以试着从我的演出开始，接触一些不一样的音乐形式。或许…「纯美之歌」在您耳中不会逊色于知更鸟前辈的歌声。
Perhaps you could start with my performance and expose yourself to different musical forms. Who knows... the Song of Beauty might resonate with you as much as Robin's songs.
有什么能推荐的演出吗？
Are there any performances that you would recommend?
那可太多了，绿洲的时刻中，自动乐团的演奏永不落幕；蓝调的时刻中，漫游乐手布罗娜举办了游轮演出；太阳的时刻中，巨星爱卡琳主演的歌剧《梦之王》正在辉煌剧场热演……

There are numerous options... the automated orchestra at the Moment of Oasis, the wandering musician Brona's cruise show during the Blue Hour, and Ekarin's famous opera, the King of Dreams, at the Moment of Sol...
而在黄金的时刻，一位来自「声乐之星」的遗民也将献唱她家乡的歌谣——请{M#先生}{F#小姐}不要忘记我的音乐会哦。

And in the Golden Hour, a talented songstress from the planet of canticles will be performing songs from her lost hometown. Please, don't forget about my concert. Please, dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, don't forget about my concert!
你是怎么成为匹诺康尼的歌手的？
How did you become a singer in Penacony?
打我记事起，我就随长辈一起四处卖唱。从边星小国到佣兵船舰，我们走到哪里就唱到哪里，演出的报酬只能勉强满足生存。

Well, for as long as I can remember, I have been traveling and singing with my relatives. We performed in various places, from small countries on border stars to mercenary ships, but the pay we received was barely enough to make ends meet.
有次我在萨兰陨石带的一颗彗星酒馆中驻唱，一位皮皮西女士突然打断了我的表演，说我的歌喉不应该浪费在这种地方，应该走向更大的舞台。

Once, while I was singing at The Comet tavern in the Saran Meteorite Belt, a Pepeshi lady interrupted my performance, saying that my talent should not be wasted in a place like that, and that I should move on to a bigger stage.
我本以为她只是位醉酒的客人，但后来我才知道，她是鸢尾花家系最著名的明星经纪人——芙尔拉女士。我接受了她的邀请来到匹诺康尼，成了梦境中小有名气的歌星。

At first, I thought she was just some random drunken customer, but I later discovered that she was Forla, the most respected celebrity manager from the Iris Family. So I accepted her invitation to Penacony and became a songstress with a smidgen of fame in the Dreamscape.
她真的是一位非常严格的经纪人，我的饮食起居、日程安排、人际关系以及演出内容都必须听从她的安排，像这样能和您闲聊的机会其实非常难得……
She's a very strict manager who oversees my diet, schedule, relationships, and performance. It's rare for me to have a chance to chat with you like this...
What are your thoughts on Robin?
知更鸟前辈？「百年一遇的音乐天才」、「希佩亲吻过她的歌喉」、「谐乐的公主」…您肯定也听过这些盛名，应该不用我多加赘述了。
Robin? You mean the "once-in-a-century musical genius," the "voice kissed by Xipe themselves," and the "Princess of Harmony?" I don't think I need to elaborate on her reputation.
她的作品确实非常优秀，不过…自从我来到匹诺康尼后，就发现每面墙壁都张贴着她的海报、每个店面都在播放她的音乐、每个擦肩而过的路人都在哼唱她的歌曲……
Her songs are undoubtedly excellent, but since I arrived in Penacony, I noticed her posters adorning every wall, her music playing in every store, and her songs hummed by everyone passing by...
打个比方——苏乐达是公认的美味，但如果您每天的饮品都只有苏乐达，甚至连洗漱用水都变成了苏乐达，日复一日、年复一年…如此一来，您还会喜爱它吗？

For example, SoulGlad is widely recognized as a delicacy, but if you had to drink SoulGlad every single day, even use it for washing... day after day, year after year... would you still love it in the same way?
是啊。无论是多么美好的事物，它的魅力都会在一次次的重复体验中流失。
Yeah, no matter how good something is, its charm diminishes with repeated exposure.
当然会，我不会背叛美味。
Of course I'd love it. I'll never betray good flavor.
呃…怪我例子举得不恰当。您还真喜欢苏乐达，怪不得会来到黄金的时刻。
Um... looks like I cited an inappropriate example. Now I see you truly enjoy SoulGlad. No wonder you are here, at the Golden Hour.
我很敬重她，但匹诺康尼的音乐不应该一直活在她的阴影下，梦境应该拥抱更多样的音乐风格。
I have great respect for her, but the music in Penacony should not be overshadowed by her all the time. Dreamscape should embrace a more diverse range of musical styles.
嗯，我随时愿意跟宾客交流。
Sure, I'm always up for chatting with guests.
回头见，期待能在观众席上看到您的身影。
See you later. I look forward to seeing you in the audience.
拉洛丝恬静的面孔忽然洋溢出欢快的神色，她启口而歌，用你从未听过的声调唱出无法理解的语言——
All of a sudden, Larose's serene face lights up with joy as she opens her mouth and sings in an unfamiliar language, in a tone you have never heard before.
"Mendasia~ Mendasia~ Tuven arztis liberan sanam~ Nururisha Idrila bfularun..."
歌曲的每个音节都像是在模仿自然的声音，树叶摩挲、虫鸟啼鸣、野兽低吼、雨水坠地…杂乱无章的声音组成了一种奇妙的韵律。

Each syllable of the song seems to imitate the sounds of nature: Rustling of leaves, buzzing of insects, chirping of birds, low growls of beasts, raindrops hitting the ground... The amalgamation of sounds creates a marvelous rhythm.
歌声时而尖锐，时而粗野，你甚至不知道灵长目的声带能发出这样的声响，也无法评价这样的音乐是否能称得上动听，但你能感受到歌声中狂野的活力。

The song is sometimes shrill, sometimes raw, and you didn't even know these are sounds producible by a human's vocal cords. It's hard to tell if the music can be called "melodious," but the wild vigor within the song is palpable.
呼——这是我小时候学会的第一首歌，不知道为什么就唱出口了…真是奇怪。
Phew... That was the first song I learned as a child, and I don't know why I sang it out loud... How peculiar.
你准备拿这首歌来演出？
Will you perform this song at your concert?
不，如果您真的光临了我的音乐会，其实是听不到这首歌的。
No, if you attend my concert, you won't actually hear this song.
Is this the Song of Beauty?
是的，这是门达希亚最具有代表性的民谣，但其实我从未在匹诺康尼唱响过它。
Yes, it's the most iconic ballad of Mendasia, but I have never performed it in Penacony.
这首歌的语言已经无人使用，但每句歌词的含义都传承了下来：「门达希亚，门达希亚，你用艺术的泥沙，滋养伊德莉拉的繁花。」——这就是刚刚那句歌词的意思。

Although the language of this song is no longer spoken, the meaning of each lyric has been passed down: "Mendasia, Mendasia. You nourish Idrila's flourishing flowers with the sands of art." That is the meaning of the lyrics I just sang.
门达希亚——在我出生之前就已毁灭的声乐之星，我从未亲眼见过它的样子，宇宙中也没有有任何关于它的影像，但只要唱起这首歌，那个能在曦光下自由放歌的天堂就会浮现在眼前。

Mendasia, the planet of canticles that perished even before I was born... I have never witnessed her or seen any images of her, but by singing that song, I can imagine a paradise where one can freely sing under the sunlight.
…{M#先生}{F#小姐}，您觉得这首歌听起来如何呢？
...Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, how do you think of this song?
谢谢您，不过我的经纪人完全不认同这种音乐。
Thank you, but my manager doesn't approve of it at all.
呵…您的评价还真是直接，和我的经纪人一样。
Heh heh... Your review is quite direct, just like my manager's.
经纪人告诉我，这种音乐风格根本就没办法吸引受众，只会把追求风雅的宾客吓跑…要想成名，就必须先唱市场认可的歌曲。

My manager told me that this style of music doesn't appeal to the audience at all and will only deter guests seeking elegance... To achieve fame, I must first sing songs that are recognized by the market.
于是我开始模仿流行的风格，创作虚假的「纯美之歌」。结果这居然真的骗过了听众，我的演出在乐迷圈好评如潮，我登上了《梦境艺术》的封面，虚构的歌曲也屡屡获奖……

So, I started imitating popular styles and composed the fabricated Song of Beauty. Surprisingly, that ruse managed to deceive the audience. My performances were well-received within the music fan community, I got on the cover of Art of Dreamscape, and that song even won numerous awards.
真是太荒唐了，最俗套的曲调配上几种冷门乐器，套上一个故事作为包装，居然就成了他们口中的艺术瑰宝。
It's absurd how the most banal melodies, coupled with some obscure instruments and a contrived narrative, can be hailed as artistic masterpieces.
我每天都在演唱违心的谎言，要不是刚刚一时兴起，可能都快把真正的「纯美之歌」忘掉了！
Every day, I reluctantly sing lies. If it were not for a spur-of-the-moment decision just now, I would have forgotten about the real Song of Beauty!
但「纯美之歌」真的一无是处吗…不，我觉得风格、受众、人气，都是掩盖成见的托词！我要向经纪人证明，门达希亚的音乐一定能大受欢迎！

However, is the Song of Beauty truly insignificant?... No, style, audience, and popularity are merely pretexts to conceal prejudices! I am determined to prove to my manager that Mendasian music will become a hit!
谢谢您的支持，但是要将这首歌带上舞台，首先要说服那位顽固的经纪人，让她相信我的音乐不会把演出搞砸。
I appreciate your support, but before I bring this song to the stage, I must first convince my stubborn manager that my music will not blow the show.
至于说服她的方式…可以先进行一场路演，看看宾客们的反应。只要听众们能给出认可，那经纪人就没办法拿市场评价来当做打压我的借口了。

As for how to persuade her... I can start with a roadshow and assess the audience's reaction. If the audience approves my performance, she won't be able to use "market reviews" as an excuse to dissuade me.
You don't need to prove anything. Just sing what you desire.
不，没那么简单…那位经纪人把控着整个匹诺康尼的娱乐圈命脉，我必须想办法说服她，而不是反抗她。
No, it's not that simple... She holds significant sway over the entertainment industry in Penacony. I must find a way to convince her, instead of defying her.
至于说服她的方式…可以先进行一场路演，看看宾客们的反应。只要听众们能给出认可，那经纪人就没办法拿市场评价作为打压我的借口了。

As for how to persuade her... I can start with a roadshow and assess the audience's reaction. If the audience approves my performance, she won't be able to use "market reviews" as an excuse to dissuade me.
How are you planning to prove it?
我觉得可以先进行一场路演，看看宾客们的反应。只要听众们能给出认可，那经纪人就没办法拿市场评价来当做打压我的借口了。
I can start with a roadshow and assess the audience's reaction. If the audience approves my performance, she won't be able to use "market reviews" as an excuse to dissuade me.
路演的地点就放在艾迪恩公园吧，那里都是逐新求异的宾客，肯定能接受与众不同的音乐风格。
I can organize the roadshow at Aideen Park, as it attracts visitors who seek novelty and individuality. They'll undoubtedly be more receptive to a different style of music.
{M#先生}{F#小姐}，我要去准备演出了。请您也来见证门达希亚的音乐在舞台上的表现吧，我的歌声一定不会让您失望的！
I'll be preparing for the show, dear {M#sir}{F#lady}. I kindly request your presence to witness my performance on stage. I'm confident that you won't be disappointed with my performance!
这里为啥聚着这么多人？这谁啊？
Why are so many people gathered here? Who's that woman?
这你都不认识？这可是来自声乐之星的拉洛丝小姐！
You don't know her? That's Larose, a renowned songstress from the planet of canticles!
原来是拉洛丝…不买票就能听到她的「纯美之歌」，真是赚到了！
So, it's Larose... What a treat to hear her Song of Beauty for free!
感谢各位宾客的捧场，这次我带来了一些特别的音乐…这些歌曲与我过去的风格不同，但我希望诸位能耐心感受一下其中的「纯美」——

Thank you all for attending, my dear audience. This time, I've brought some special music... This song is different from my usual style, but I implore your patience as you experience the Beauty within it.
拉洛丝献唱了真正的「纯美之歌」…
Larose sings the real Song of Beauty...
这…真的是拉洛丝的声音吗？
不懂别乱说，拉洛丝小姐的音乐中一定别有用意……
Please stop making vulgar remarks. There must be more to Larose's music...
没想到我真的在大家面前唱出了「纯美之歌」，但是……
I never imagined I would perform the Song of Beauty in front of everyone, but...
啊，过了这么久，经纪人应该要来找我了！
Ah, it's been such a long time! My manager should be coming for me!
抱歉，我必须得回奥帝购物中心继续发宣传册了…亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，能麻烦您帮我问问听众的感想吗？拜托了！
I'm sorry, but I must go back to Oti Mall to distribute brochures... Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, could you please ask about the audience's thoughts on my new song? I would greatly appreciate it!
{M#先生}{F#小姐}，请您调查一下听众们的感想吧，这对我来说很重要……
Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, could you please ask the audience for their thoughts? It holds great importance to me...
嘁，本来听说匹诺康尼有位会唱「纯美之歌」的歌手，我就毫不犹豫买了演出的门票…这下可亏大了。
Tsk... I heard that there's someone at Penacony who could sing "the Song of Beauty," so I didn't even blink when I bought the ticket for the performance... What a disappointment.
这种营销套路我见过太多了，先挂个虚名引来关注，再用这种离谱的行为来哗众取宠，骗取热度。如果这真是「纯美之歌」，那我洗澡时哼的曲子早就把伊德莉拉复活了！

I know all about this marketing gimmick. They create the buzz and then pull off this ridiculous act to cash in on the hype. If this so-called Song of Beauty actually worked, the tune I hum in the shower would have resurrected Idrila ages ago!
我得赶快想办法把票转卖出去，与其浪费时间听这种东西，不如在酒店里听知更鸟小姐的CD。
I must find a way to resell my ticket. Rather than wasting time listening to this nonsense, I'd prefer to enjoy Robin's songs at the hotel.
唉，变了，拉洛丝变了！这是对我们这些老乐迷的冒犯！侮辱！背叛！
What a shame... Larose has changed! It's an offense to us, her greatest fans! It's an insult! A betrayal!
大家喜欢的是高贵优雅的拉洛丝，用甜美的嗓音唱出柔和的歌曲…那才是纯美之歌，而不是这种恶心的杂音！
We adore the noble and elegant Larose, who sings soft songs with her sweet voice... That is the true Song of Beauty, not this repugnant mishmash!
真希望她快点回到之前的样子，不要再拿这些奇怪的音乐戏弄粉丝了，不然我们在乐迷圈怎么抬得起头啊……
I really wish she could return to her previous self and stop teasing her fans with such weird noises. Otherwise, how will we face our fellow music fans...
多么前卫的音乐…不愧是我的偶像，成名后还能潜心开拓音乐艺术的边疆，拉洛丝小姐真是位名副其实的艺术家！
What an avant-garde style of music... worthy of admiration. Larose is truly an artist in her own right, managing to be famous while pushing the boundaries of music and art!
这也能夸？她要不告诉我这是首歌，我就要跟猎犬家系汇报说有人在大街上发病了。
Come on! If she hadn't told me that she would sing a song, I might have reported to the Bloodhound Family that someone was making a scene on the street.
呵，庸俗，这叫…叫实验音乐！要的就是激进、纯粹、极端自我的表达，不懂了吧？
How putrid. This is called... experimental music! It's radical, pure, and an extreme form of self-expression, but you can't grasp it at all, can you?
行，我不懂，那你给我分析分析这歌好在哪？
No, I don't understand it a bit. Why don't you explain what makes this song so remarkable?
呃…你想啊，拉洛丝小姐为什么要在台上怪叫呢？像不像失败者们在噩梦中的哀嚎？她正是在通过声音来塑造这种情景，表达的正是逐梦客们对梦想求而不得的痛苦！

Um... Think about it... Why did Larose scream on stage? Doesn't it resemble the wailing of losers trapped in a nightmare? Through her voice, she captures that very scenario, expressing the pain felt by Dreamchasers who are unable to fulfill their dreams!
没听出来她唱的是不是痛苦，作为听众是挺痛苦的。
I'm not sure if she's trying to express pure pain, but it can definitely be a real pain for the audience to endure.
这就是艺术，让你这种俗人听出来了就不是艺术了！我看她唱的就是你这种生活不如意的人！
That's art, surpassing your mundane grasp! In my humble opinion, she was singing about people like you, whose lives aren't as fulfilling as they wish them to be.
亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，谢谢您刚刚的支持。请问您问到听众们的感受了吗？
Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, thank you for your support earlier. Have you asked the audience about their thoughts?
果然如此…看来我还是太天真了，经纪人说的果然没错，风格如此特别的音乐没办法轻易让大家认可。
That's understandable... I suppose I was too naive. My manager was right: Music with such a unique style is unlikely to be appreciated by everyone.
Most of the reviews are negative.
唉，这也是没办法的事情，对于这些欣赏流行红歌与高雅正乐的宾客来说，门达希亚的音乐无疑是主流审美的叛徒。
Unfortunately, it can't be helped. For those who appreciate popular songs, Mendasian music is undoubtedly a departure from the conventional aesthetic.
M—Most of the reviews... are positive!
呵呵，您真是位好人，但不必如此照顾我的心情，我其实已经听到很多批评的声音了。
You are very kind, but there is no need to be overly concerned about my feelings. Actually, I have received my fair share of criticism.
是我太久没唱过自己喜欢的音乐了，以至于我再次唱起它的时候被快乐冲昏了头脑…其实当我站在台上的时候，就已经开始后悔了。

It's just that I haven't performed my favorite music in so long that I was overwhelmed with joy when I finally sang it again... However, I already began to regret it as soon as I stepped onto the stage.
我已经在匹诺康尼当了这么久的歌星，怎么会不知道市场喜欢什么样的音乐呢？开口的瞬间，我就已经猜到了结果。
I've been a famous songstress in Penacony for a long time. How could I not know what kind of music the market prefers? The moment I opened my mouth, I already foresaw the outcome.
我以为凭着我的名誉与粉丝，可以让人们接受真正的「纯美之歌」…但我却忘记了，这一切都是靠谎言得到的——放弃谎言，也就放弃了拥有的一切。

I thought that with my reputation and fans, I could make people appreciate the true essence of the Song of Beauty... but I forgot that I achieved everything through deception. By abandoning the falsehoods, I gave up everything I had.
你可以从头开始做喜欢的音乐。
You can perform your favorite music from scratch.
不…我做不到，也不会去做。
No... I can't, and I won't do that.
放弃一切没什么可怕的。
There's nothing to fear in letting go of everything.
亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，对我来说，没有什么事情比这更加可怕了。
But to me, dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, there are no things more terrifying than that.
当我在演唱结束后看到那些否定的眼神，耳边听不到一点欢呼与掌声时，我感觉自己仿佛被噩梦撕碎了一样——
At the end of my performance, when I saw those disapproving glances and heard no cheers or applause in my ears, it felt as though I was being torn apart by the most terrible nightmare...
——压在我身上的是无与伦比的痛苦，比母星的毁灭与纯美女神的消殒还要恐怖。
...I experienced unimaginable pain, more agonizing than the destruction of my home planet or the demise of the Beauty.
那时我彻底明白了，我想要的原来不是让大家喜欢上「纯美之歌」，而是要大家喜欢上「拉洛丝」——比起门达希亚与「纯美」女神，我更爱我自己。

It was then that I fully realized that my desire was not for everyone to appreciate the Song of Beauty, but for everyone to appreciate Larose. It turns out that I love myself more than Mendasia and the Goddess of Beauty.
"...Mendasia! Mendasia! Tuven arztis liberan sanam! Nururisha Idrila bfularun!"
拉洛丝再次唱起「纯美之歌」，她的歌声像之前一样低沉嘶哑、野蛮粗糙，但不再饱含活力与喜悦，而像是一种放肆的宣泄，宣泄压抑已久的痛苦。

Larose sings the Song of Beauty once again, her voice as low, hoarse, savage, and rough as before, but no longer filled with vigor and joy. Instead, it became an unbridled catharsis of long-suppressed pain.
{M#先生}{F#小姐}，您或许就是「纯美之歌」的最后一位听众了。以后，我会把它封藏进无人问津的角落…然后继续歌唱庸俗的谎言，在掌声与欢呼中得到满足。

Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, I'm afraid you will be the last listener of the Song of Beauty. I will tuck it away and never perform it again... and continue singing those vulgar lies, deriving satisfaction from the applause and cheers.
是的，这就是真正的拉洛丝。亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，您还会愿意支持这样的我吗？
Yes, this is the real Larose. Will you continue supporting me like this, dear {M#sir}{F#lady}?
我还是会继续支持你的。
呵呵，您还真是位好心的听众。
Thank you for your unwavering support. You are truly a kind listener.
我不会辜负您的，即便是虚假的谎言，我也会让它们更加动听。
I won't let you down. Even if it's a fabricated lie, I will make it more melodious.
我不会再支持你这样的歌手了。
嗯…我能理解，毕竟要用纯美女神与声乐之星的名声行骗，还要利用爱戴我的听众，这种事在您眼中很过分吧？

Well... I can understand that. After all, I'm using the reputation of the Beauty and the planet of canticles to deceive my adoring audience and take advantage of them. It's excessive in your eyes, isn't it?
但我已经决定了要走这样的路，如果您讨厌我，还请做好心理准备——因为我将会更加努力地出现在公众视野中，成为一名尽人皆知的歌手。
But I have made my decision. So, if you despise me, be prepared. I will work even harder to gain public attention and become a singer known by everyone.
无论如何，感谢您帮我从虚伪的梦中醒来…我现在找到了内心真正的渴望，并愿意为之付出一切。
Anyway, thank you for awakening me from my false dreams... Now, I have discovered my true aspirations, and I'm willing to go to any lengths to pursue them.
我并没有忘记初心，只是找到了自己真正想要的东西。
I haven't forgotten my true self. I've simply discovered my true passion.
从一开始，我想要的就是功成名就，而不是什么传承艺术的使命。
From the start, my goal was to achieve success and fame, rather than the calling of passing on the art.
拉洛丝的表情逐渐平和下来，笑容凝固在了嘴角，低声呢喃了起来。
Larose's expression calms down, her smile fading at the corners of her mouth as she murmurs in a low voice.
还记得小时候跟长辈卖唱的日子，那时我们的演出大都是为了满足人们的好奇心，让听众发现人的喉咙还能发出这么特别的声音。说是歌手，但其实和飞碟马戏团里钻火圈的扑满没什么区别。

I can still vividly recall my childhood days, singing songs with my relatives. Most of our performances were meant to satisfy people's curiosity and showcase that humans could create such unique sounds. While we called ourselves singers, we weren't much different from those Trotters who entertain with daring acts in the Cirque du Soucoupe.
我认为「纯美之歌」真的很美，但在无人欣赏的处境中，我也开始想要放弃歌唱…直到一场意外的星际交通事故，我和族人们被困在了一个「原始博士」残害的世界中。

At first, I genuinely believed the Song of Beauty was truly beautiful. However, when nobody appreciated it, I started contemplating giving up singing... until an interstellar traffic accident left us stranded on a world maimed by Dr. Primitive.
那里的居民都因为恶徒的实验变成了低智的猿猴，它们无法理解复杂的音乐，却会被我们原始而古老的歌谣吸引。
The inhabitants of that world had been transformed into apes through malicious experiments. Though they couldn't grasp complex music, they were naturally drawn to our primitive and ancient songs.
我在营地练歌时，这些原住民居然用残存的人智为我欢呼鼓舞，我在一群猴子的掌声中找到了继续歌唱的理由——他人的认可。
As I practiced my songs in the camp, these natives cheered me on with their remaining intelligence, and I found a reason to continue singing through their applause — validation from others.
是啊，艺术的追求、家乡的遗产、纯美的信仰…这都是我用来哄骗自己的空话，从一开始，我歌唱的理由便是为了听众们的追捧。

Yes, the pursuit of art, the legacy of my homeland, and the faith for the Beauty... They were all mere empty words I used to deceive myself. In truth, I sang solely for the admiration of the audience right from the start.
没错…我一定会成为家喻户晓的巨星，让众人跪拜在我的裙下！
Indeed... I will become a household name, a superstar, with crowds bowing at my feet!
到了那个时候，听众与经纪人都不能再禁锢我的歌喉，我将自由地唱出我想唱的歌曲！
When the time comes, neither my audience nor my manager will be able to confine my voice. I will have the freedom to express myself through the songs I truly desire to sing!
拉洛丝露出了更加自信的笑容，仿佛正站在万众瞩目的舞台上。
Larose's smile grows more confident, as if she were standing on a stage in the spotlight.
呼——解开了那些让我痛苦多年的心结，我终于可以为事业全力以赴了。
Phew... Now that I've untangled the knots that plagued me for years, I can finally dedicate myself completely to my career.
我将来会成为巨星，超越知更鸟前辈，成为宇宙中无人不爱的歌手，哪怕是一个饱嗝都能让粉丝狂热欢呼！
I will become a superstar even greater than Robin, a universally adored singer! Even a simple burp of mine will send fans into a frenzy!
等到那个时候…我或许就能再次唱起门达希亚的音乐，没人有资格阻拦我。而所有人都会对他们曾唾弃的艺术赞叹不已，用各种艺术理论为我辩护，奉上无数赞誉！

And when that time comes... I might just be able to sing Mendasian music again, with nobody having the right to stop me. Everyone will marvel at the art they once despised, defending me with various artistic theories and showering me with countless accolades!
不用肩负责任，不用顾忌市场，唱什么都能靠声名收获成功——我一定要成为这样的歌手。
Unshackled by responsibilities, unconcerned with market trends, and able to sing anything while reaping success solely based on reputation — I must become a singer like this.
命运真是不公，让我生在夜鹰的草窝，又让我向往阳光下的高空。
Fate has dealt me an unfair hand. I was born in the humble nest of a night hawk, only to make me yearn for the sunlit heights.
乘风的鸟儿随心扇动翅膀就能轻松高飞，而我想要去往同一片天空，就必须违心逆风而行……
While an eagle effortlessly soars high by riding the wind, I must defy the wind and my own desires to reach the sky...
拉洛丝坚定的神情褪色，你听到一声叹息，她眼眸中映出的街角霓虹闪烁了起来。
Larose's resolute expression fades, and you catch a sigh as the flickering neon lights on the street corner reflect in her eyes.
亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}…您觉得知更鸟前辈这样的歌手会有和我一样的痛苦吗？
Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}... Do you think Robin has experienced the same pain as I do?
我想她一定不会吧，她应该是家族中的明珠，从小就在学习高雅的谐乐，她的喜好就是家族的喜好，她的审美就是世人的审美。
I am certain she has not. She is the pride of her family, immersed in the study of elegant harmonies since childhood. Her tastes align with her family's, and her aesthetics align with the world's.
而我是已殒星神的卑贱遗民，从小喜爱的是古怪偏门的音乐，养成的审美是不入时宜的审美。我们和我的世界是时间的弃子，注定不能理解世人，世人也不会接纳我们。

On the other hand, I am the humble remnant of a fallen Aeon, raised with a passion for unconventional music, nurturing a sense of aesthetics that doesn't conform. My world and I are outcasts of time. We will never truly comprehend the world, and the world will never fully embrace us.
我爱素未谋面的故乡，爱那故事中的乌托邦…但我有时也会怨恨自己的出身，如果我不是声乐之星的孩子，而是出生在匹诺康尼，是不是唱出心声就能换来功名呢？

I love my homeland I have never seen, and I cherish the utopia found only in stories... Yet at times, I resent my origins. If I had not been born as a child of the planet of canticles but instead in Penacony, would my heartfelt singing have garnered recognition?
唉…我生在夜鹰的草窝，却又向往阳光下的高空。乘风的鸟儿随心扇动翅膀就能轻松高飞，而我想要去往同一片天空，就必须违心逆风而行……

*sigh* I was born in a night hawk's humble nest, yet I yearn for the sunlit heights. While an eagle effortlessly soars high by riding the wind, I must defy the wind and my own desires to reach the sky...
可恶的经纪人！可恶的匹诺康尼！可恶的鸢尾花家系！
Curse the manager! Curse Penacony! Curse the Iris Family!
总有一天…总有一天我会把你们的傲慢撕碎！把你们都当作我成名的垫脚石！
One day... one day, I will pulverize your arrogance! You will all become stepping stones on my path to fame!
拉洛丝的眉头紧锁，娇柔的肩膀不停颤抖，似乎是心中的怒火正在身体中翻滚。
Larose's brows are knitted tightly as her shoulders tremble with the roiling fury within her soul.
为了走上更大的舞台，我必须唱自己厌恶的歌曲，做自己不想做的事，对没品位的观众承欢献媚…这样的折磨还要到底还要持续多久？
How much longer do I have to sing songs I hate, do things I have no interest in, and cater to an audience with no taste... just to make it to the big stage?
你知道我第一次请求经纪人把「纯美之歌」放入演出歌单时，她做了什么吗？
Do you know what happened when I first asked her to add the "Song of Beauty" to the setlist?
她满脸笑容地答应了我，许诺一个月后为我举办演出。于是我废寝忘食地练习，每日每夜都在期待这场演出，她在这期间没有跟我说过任何舞台上的细节，只是让我做好准备。

With a bright smile on her face, she agreed and promised to arrange a performance for me in a month. I spent my days practicing, eagerly looking forward to the show, but she didn't provide any details during that period, simply instructing me to be prepared.
到了演出开始的那天，我满怀期待地走上鸢尾花家系的剧场——那里除了她之外没有一个人，没有听众，没有伴奏的乐手，甚至没有自动乐团。

However, when the day of the performance arrived, I walked onto the Iris Family's stage with great anticipation, only to find that she was the sole presence there: No audience, no accompanying musicians, not even an automated orchestra.
「醒醒吧，没有鸢尾花家系的宣传与包装，你和你的『纯美之歌』就是梦中无人问津的垃圾。」
"Snap out of it! Without the publicity and support of the Iris Family, you and your so-called Song of Beauty are just worthless trash in the Dreamscape."
这句话让我怒气填胸，却一句话也没有说出来，只能默默看着她走出剧场。因为…因为我没法反驳她，她是音乐的专家，是匹诺康尼「主流」的代表……
Her words filled me with fury, but I remained silent, watching her leave the theater. I couldn't argue with her... because she was an expert in music... a representative of the Penacony mainstream...
但总有一天我会让她后悔，我会成为独一无二的艺术权威，去定义新的「主流」——哪怕抛弃「纯美之歌」，也要站在比她更高的地方，撕碎她的傲慢！
But one day, I will make her regret it. I will become an authority, redefining the new "mainstream." Even if I have to abandon the Song of Beauty, I will rise above her and pulverize her arrogance!
亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，请您稍作留步，在时光停驻的梦境中不必如此匆忙。
Dear {M#Sir}{F#Miss}, please stay for a while. There's no need to hurry in this dreamscape where time stands still.
请收下这份宣传册吧，我会在这场音乐会上用歌声复现宇宙中失落的{RUBY_B#「纯美」}美好{RUBY_E#}，希望您不要错过。
Here, please take this pamphlet. I will be performing the song of {RUBY_B#Beauty}beauty{RUBY_E#} at this concert. Please don't miss it.
When can I ever forget about it?
一位女逐梦客站在栏杆外，对着下方的车流陷入沉思，看架势似乎是要跳下去。
A female Dreamchaser stood at the edge of the railing, lost in thought as she gazed upon the flowing traffic below, poised as if contemplating a leap.
不过，在梦里跳楼就像试图用气球砸死自己一样——全无可能。
Nonetheless, ending your life by jumping off a building in a dream is like trying to kill yourself with a balloon — Absolutely impossible.
轻生…可惜，这不过是毫无意义的表演罢了。
Take my own life... Alas, it's a shame that this is nothing more than a meaningless show.
听过你的话后，女人主动退回了安全地带。
The woman steps back to safety after hearing you.
你这样做只会从梦中醒来。
You'll only wake up from the dream if you do that.
醒来…是啊，这不过是毫无意义的表演罢了。
Wake up... Indeed, this is nothing more than a meaningless show.
听过你的话后，女人主动退回了安全地带。
The woman steps back to safety after hearing you.
沉默地站了一会儿后，女人主动退回了安全地带。
The woman steps back to safety after standing in silence for a while.
梦里不存在死亡，最大的刑罚就是回到残酷的现实…正如悲剧不会落幕，只会换个形式开场。
There's no death in dreams. The greatest punishment is to return to the harsh reality... A tragedy never concludes, but rather takes on a different form to begin anew.
作为一个警探，我居然连这都没想通……
As a detective, I can't believe I couldn't figure it out...
…不过是一个失败者的自怨自艾罢了。
...I was just wallowing in self-pity as a loser.
是的，我是全宇宙最差劲的警探。
Yes, and I'm the worst kind in the entire universe.
我过往的人生中经历了许多事，其中绝大部分不值一提，另一小部分则能让我半夜在床上气得发抖。
I've gone through many things in my life, most of which aren't worth mentioning, but some are so infuriating that they leave me shaking in anger in the middle of the night.
我浪费过许多机会，做错过许多选择。我的人生就像一双沾满污泥的靴子，每一步都走得愈发沉重。
I've squandered many chances and made the wrong decisions many times. My life is like a pair of muddy boots that gets heavier with each step I take.
或许对我这样差劲的警探来说，那种事注定会发生……
Perhaps those things are destined to happen to a detective as incompetent as me...
Do you often have depressive thoughts?
你未免把我想得太脆弱了…虽然我确实算不上硬汉。
I'm not that weak, though I'm not exactly tough either.
我以前在这里尝试过几次，都成功了。但就像你说的，最后不外乎是回到现实、再做几轮噩梦罢了。
I've tried it many times here and succeeded. But just like what you said, the worst that happened was returning to reality and having several more rounds of nightmares.
现实远比梦境更加沉重。我在那里有酒、有诗，唯独没有死去的勇气。
Reality is way bleaker than dreams. I have the company of wine and poems there, and lack only the courage to finish things up.
到头来，这种表演既不能让我心安，也不能挽回我做过的错事……
In the end, this kind of performance neither brings me peace of mind nor undoes the wrongs I've done...
你为什么觉得自己失败？
Why do you see yourself as a failure?
我是一个道德家，是世界上最可笑的中间派，同时也是一个失败的警探。
I'm a moralist, the most ludicrous kind of centrist in the world. On top of all that, I'm also a lousy detective.
我曾是星际和平公司「传统项目部」的刑事案件调查员，但…我犯下了巨大的错误。
I was once a criminal case investigator for IPC's Traditional Project Department, but... I made a huge blunder.
在一次救援行动中，我射击嫌疑人的车辆，却意外击中了被劫持的人质——一个可怜的小女孩。
In a rescue operation, I accidentally hit the hostage, a poor girl, when I was firing at the suspect's vehicle.
我本来没想射她的，但那辆车颠簸得太厉害，开枪的机会又转瞬即逝……
It wasn't my intention to shoot her. The car was so bumpy, and the opportunity to fire would be gone in a fleeting second...
That's some rough hostage-rescue tactics you employed there...
我知道，所以我才会一直没法忘怀……
I know, and that's why I've not been able to move on from the incident...
Did you do it on purpose or was it an accident?
不，不是故意的…怎么可能是呢……
No, I didn't do it on purpose... How could it have been...
那次失误不仅葬送了我的前途，还剥夺了一个孩子的生命。
Because of that mistake, I lost my job, and a little girl was killed.
我无法原谅这样的自己，便申请从公司离职——不过上头的领导比我快一步。在递交辞呈之前，我就已经被开除了。
Unable to forgive myself, I decided to leave the IPC. But my boss was a step faster. Fast enough to fire me before I could tender my resignation.
你看，我的失败是多么无可辩驳。世上再没有比我更不称职的警探了……
Look, my failure is simply irrefutable. There couldn't be a more incompetent detective in the world than me...
Why did you come to the Dreamscape?
自从发生那件事后，每当我凝望夜空，眼前都会浮现出那孩子的脸。
After that incident happened, I kept seeing the girl's face whenever I stared into the night sky.
她没有表情，没有言语，但却像是在无声地质问我——凭什么？凭什么她死了，我却能好好活着？
She was expressionless and didn't utter a word, but she seemed to be confronting me in silence. Why? Why am I still alive when she's dead?
为了不看清她的脸，我每天都要用酒精灌醉自己。一旦停下，窒息感便会再次包裹我。
To avoid seeing her face, I got real familiar with the bottle. The suffocating feeling would envelop me again once I stopped.
我受够了！在收到匹诺康尼的邀请后，我几乎立刻逃进了梦里，祈祷这地方能治好我的心魔。
I'd had enough! The moment I received an invitation from Penacony, I almost fled to the Dreamscape immediately, hoping that the place could free me from emotional distress.
最开始还算有用，繁多的娱乐让我无暇回忆过往。可随着时间推移，各种熟悉的感觉又找了上来……
It worked in the beginning when the plethora of entertainment kept me too busy to think about my past. However, as time went on, those familiar sensations came crawling back to me...
到现在，只有苏乐达才能稍微麻痹我的神经，让我不再那么难受…倘若酒吧关门，我就无处可去。
Now, only SoulGlad could slightly numb my nerves and ease my pain... If the bar closes, I'll have nowhere else to go.
好，我们可以聊聊过去的时光和死去的朋友们。
Sure, we can talk about our past and friends who have passed away.
Do you often have depressive thoughts?
哈，你未免把我想得太脆弱了…虽然我确实算不上硬汉。
Haha, I'm not that weak, though I'm not exactly tough either.
我以前在梦里尝试过几次跳楼，都成功了。但就像你说的，最后不外乎是回到现实、再做几轮噩梦罢了。
I've done it many times here and succeeded. But just like what you said, I only ended up returning to reality and having several nightmares.
现实远比梦境更加沉重。我在那里有酒、有诗，唯独没有死去的勇气。
Reality is way bleaker than dreams. I have the company of wine and poems there, and lack only the courage to finish things up.
不过现在，我已经不再需要寻死了。无论是梦境还是现实。
But now, I no longer have the urge to end my life, be it in the dreamscape or reality.
你和那个孩子之间发生过什么？
What's the story between you and that girl?
说来话长，我曾是星际和平公司「传统项目部」的刑事案件调查员，但…我犯下了巨大的错误。
It's a long story. I was once a criminal case investigator for IPC's Traditional Project Department, but... I made a huge blunder.
在一次救援行动中，我射击嫌疑人的车辆，却意外击中了被劫持的人质——一个可怜的小女孩。
In a rescue operation, I accidentally hit the hostage, a poor girl, when I was firing at the suspect's vehicle.
我本来没想射她的，但那辆车颠簸得太厉害，开枪的机会又转瞬即逝……
It wasn't my intention to shoot her. The car was so bumpy, and the opportunity to fire would be gone in a fleeting second...
That's some rough hostage-rescue tactics you employed there...
我知道，所以我才会一直没法忘怀……
I know, and that's why I've not been able to move on from the incident...
Did you do it on purpose or was it an accident?
不，不是故意的…怎么可能是呢？
No, I didn't do it on purpose... How could it have been...
那次失误不仅葬送了我的前途，还剥夺了一个孩子的生命。
Because of that mistake, I lost my job, and a little girl was killed.
我无法原谅这样的自己，便申请从公司离职——不过上头的领导比我快一步。在递交辞呈之前，我就已经被开除了。
Unable to forgive myself, I decided to leave the IPC. But my boss was a step faster. Fast enough to fire me before I could tender my resignation.
有时不得不承认，这帮家伙对舆论的嗅觉还是挺敏锐的。
Sometimes, you just have to admit that these guys have a sharp sense when it comes to public opinion.
Why did you come to the Dreamscape?
自从发生那件事后，每当我凝望夜空，眼前都会浮现出那孩子的脸。
After that incident happened, I kept seeing the girl's face whenever I stared into the night sky.
她没有表情，没有言语，但却像是在无声地质问我——凭什么？凭什么她死了，我却能好好活着？
She was expressionless and didn't utter a word, but she seemed to be confronting me in silence. Why? Why am I still alive when she's dead?
为了不看清她的脸，我每天都要用酒精灌醉自己。一旦停下，那股窒息的感觉便会再次包裹我。
To avoid seeing her face, I had to intoxicate myself every day with alcohol. The suffocating feeling would envelop me again once I stopped.
在收到匹诺康尼的邀请后，我几乎立刻逃进了梦里，祈祷这地方能治好我的心魔。
The moment I received an invitation from Penacony, I almost fled to the dreamscape immediately, hoping that the place could free me from emotional distress.
最开始还算有用，繁多的娱乐让我无暇回忆过往。可随着时间推移，只剩下苏乐达能稍微让我快活一些了——这也是我那么爱它的原因。

It worked in the beginning when the plethora of entertainment options kept me too busy to think about my past. However, as time went on, those familiar sensations came crawling back to me... Now, only SoulGlad can make me feel better, which is why I'm so obsessed with it.
不过现在，我也该在酒吧关门后找点其他的去处了。
I should probably find somewhere else to go after the bar closes.
悲剧不会落幕，只会换个形式开场……
A tragedy does not conclude but rather takes on a different form to begin anew...
卢•阿彻咂了咂嘴，先前的悲痛似乎被替换成了一股…渴望。
Lew Archer smacks her lips. Her previous grief seems to have turned into some sort of... desire.
我突然感觉好渴，肯定是苏乐达瘾又犯了。得找个地方喝两口……
I'm feeling very thirsty all of a sudden. Guess my SoulGlad addiction is acting up again. I need to get a sip or two somewhere...
呃，那是个夸张手法。我只是需要饮料来抚慰精神而已。
Um, that's just an exaggeration. I just need a drink to lift my spirits.
呵，水哪有苏乐达好喝？来匹诺康尼就得喝苏乐达。
Water can't compare to the taste of SoulGlad! You've got to have SoulGlad when you're in Penacony.
卢•阿彻的眼神有些游离。她抚摸着头发，似乎在斟酌接下来要说的话。
Lew Archer's eyes seem hesitant. She runs her fingers through her hair while seemingly contemplating what to say next.
I didn't see that compliment coming.
你身上有一股特别的气质，和从前的我很像。有些人叫它「多管闲事」，而我更喜欢称之为——责任心。
You have a special demeanor that reminds me of my old self. Some label it as meddling, but I prefer to call it a sense of responsibility.
虽然在梦里跳楼不会出事，但这么长时间以来，除了家族，你是第一个愿意拉我一把的人。
Although I won't really die by jumping off the bridge in a dream, you're the first one, besides The Family, who's willing to lend me a hand in a long time.
再多「{RUBY_B#醒来}死{RUBY_E#}」几次，我说不定真要变得不正常了…不过梦里净是些怪家伙，跟他们比起来，我都算不上问题儿童，哈哈！
I might really go bonkers after a few more "{RUBY_B#wake}deaths{RUBY_E#}"... By the way, I still think I'm almost normal compared to the other weirdos here, haha!
来苏乐达俱乐部吧，我好好跟你喝上几瓶。
Come with me to SoulGlad Club. Let's have a few bottles of SoulGlad together.
来苏乐达俱乐部吧，我好好跟你喝两瓶。
Come with me to SoulGlad Club. Let's have two bottles of SoulGlad together.
How come the Dreamjolt Troupe is here?
果然，你也看见它了对吧！
You saw it too, didn't you?
嘘，小心点，你看见路上那个东西了吗？
Shh, be careful. See that thing on the road?
我听说过这种怪物，但…它怎么会突然出现在大街上？家族的人呢？猎犬呢？难道没人发现它吗？
I've heard of that monster, but... why is it on the streets? Where are the people from The Family. The Bloodhounds? Hasn't anyone noticed it?
你看向四周，其他人都对这怪物熟视无睹——或许它有着和钟表小子类似的特性。
You look around and see that everyone else is oblivious to the monster. Perhaps it's only visible to some, just like Clockie.
啧，可不能让这东西大摇大摆地走在街上…既然猎犬不打算管，那就该我这个警探出场了！
Tsk, that thing isn't supposed to run free on the streets... Since the Bloodhound Family isn't going to deal with it, I'll carry out my duty as a detective!
苏乐达的事先放一放。我得去对付它，你赶快找地方避难吧。
Let's enjoy a drink of SoulGlad together next time. Now, I have to get rid of that thing. You should find a place to hide.
可别把我银河球棒侠看扁了！
No one is to look down upon the Galactic Baseballer!
我的球棒可不只是好看而已。
My baseball bat is more than just an eye candy!
你也要一起来？那好，我的后背就交给你了！
You want to come along? That's great! You can watch my back!
战斗即将结束时，眼前的怪物变成了一个小女孩。
As the battle is coming to an end, the monster transforms into a little girl.
惊梦剧团还能变成人类？
Can a monster from the Dreamjolt Troupe turn into a human?
梦里真是什么都能发生…
It's true that anything can happen in a dream.
不对，你是…诺卡？真的是你吗？
Hold on. Are you... Noka? Is it really you?
卢•阿彻的语气里带着一丝哽咽，显然被戳中了内心的角落。
Lew Archer's voice choked with emotions. Something has hit a tender spot in her heart.
是我哦，卢•阿彻警官。自从你入梦以来，我就一直看着你。
It's me, Detective Archer. I've been watching you since you came here.
…你的这副模样，让我很担心。我出现在这里、出现在你面前，就是为了对你说——
...I'm worried about you, seeing you down in the dumps. I'm here because I have something to tell you...
没关系的，我并不在意那天发生的事；其实，我很感谢你能来救我。
I want you to know that I've never held it against you for what happened that day. In fact, I really appreciate you coming to my rescue.
不，我…我射中了你！即便我不是故意的，但、但这是能一笑了之的事情吗？
No, I... I shot you! It wasn't intentional, b—but it isn't a mistake that can be easily brushed off!
你原本可以享受大好人生，你的未来有那么多可能性，全都被我的失误给毁了！
You could have lived a wonderful life, with so many possibilities in your future. It was all ruined by me!
你应该恨我，然后痛骂我是个无能的废物。为什么，为什么你还能用那样的语气…原谅我？
You should hate me and call me useless. Why? How come you can still forgive me... with such a gentle tone?
因为你当时是来救我的啊。难道我应该去恨一个对我伸出援手的人吗？
It's because you were there to save me. Am I supposed to hate someone who helps me?
何况，一切都已经过去了。凶手受到了法律的制裁，我的家人也早就脱离了悲伤。
Moreover, everything is water under the bridge now. The murderer has been sentenced, and my family has long grieved for my passing.
只剩下你了，警官，只剩你没能走出来了。你打算让昨天的意外，缠住迈向明天的脚步吗？
You're the only one left, detective. Are you going to let an accident in the past stop you from embracing your future?
不要再缅怀过去了，那对我也是一种折磨。
Don't dwell on the past anymore. That too is torture to me.
终有一天，我们会再次相遇。哪怕我们已经不再是这副形体，不再是警探与人质，不再是「卢•阿彻」与「诺卡」。
One day, our paths will cross again, even though we might not look the same, are no longer a detective and a hostage, and are no longer Lew Archer and Noka.
回到你自己的生活中吧，希望这是我们最后一次见面。
Please pull yourself together. Return to your life. Hopefully, this is the last time we meet each other.
神秘的女孩消失在了烟雾中，没有留下半点痕迹。
The mysterious girl vanishes into the mist, leaving no trace.
匹诺康尼之梦里，居然还会发生这种事……
It's hard to believe something like this can take place in Penacony...
也许吧，但…总感觉莫名不真切。
Maybe, but... it still feels surreal to me.
可能是家族的特别关怀服务。
It might be a special counseling service provided by The Family.
家族可没闲心给一个失败的警探做心理辅导。
The Family doesn't have the time to arrange psychological therapy for a failed detective.
抱歉了朋友，之后我会跟你详细讲述往事的——如果你愿意听的话。
I'm sorry, friend. I'll tell you all the details after this if you're interested.
不过现在，我需要好好消化一下刚才发生的事情。
But now, I need some time to process what happened earlier.
我应该高兴吗？就像梦泡里演的那样，伸个懒腰、然后迈向崭新的生活？
Should I be happy? Am I supposed to do a celebratory stretch and embark on a new life, like what the actors in dream bubbles always do?
这未免有些…太简单了。我甚至搞不清那到底真是诺卡的魂灵，亦或仅仅是我的幻想。
This seems... a bit too easy. I can't even be sure whether that was the real Noka, her soul, or merely a figment of my imagination.
我犯的错，真能那么轻易放下吗？
Can I really let go of my mistake so easily?
We can't always live in our past.
人总是要朝前看的。你所谓的自责，不过是用折磨自己的方式来逃避现实罢了。
We can't always live in our past. Blaming yourself is just your way of escaping reality.
如果你真想弥补过错，至少要先学会接受现实。
If you want to make up for your mistake, you've got to start by facing the reality.
已经过去的事无法挽回。
已经过去的事无法挽回。就算再怎么悲伤，人死也不能复生。
What's done cannot be undone. No matter how grief-stricken you are, you can no longer bring the girl back to life.
你所谓的自责，不过是用折磨自己的方式来逃避现实罢了——如果你真想弥补过错，至少要先学会接受现实。
Blaming yourself is just your way of escaping reality. If you want to make up for your mistake, you've got to start by facing reality.
是啊，你说得对…过去发生的事无法抹除，就像石头的伤痕不会愈合。
Yes, you're right... What's done cannot be undone, just like time can never mend the cracks in a stone.
我能做的，只有接受现实，然后好好活到明天……
The only thing I can do is to accept reality and live my life well...
谢了，虽然这不是什么复杂的道理，但果然还是要由别人说出来才行。
Thanks a lot. Although it isn't something complicated, sometimes it takes someone else to say it for it to sink in.
我想，那孩子会永远留在我的脑海中…直到我与她一同归入虚无。
I think I'll always remember that girl... until we both return to dust.
呼~经历了那么多事，总算有空喝上一口苏乐达了。
Phew... After all that, I guess I finally have some time to have a drink of SoulGlad.
来吧，敬过去的时光和死去的朋友们。干杯！
Come on, let's drink to our past and departed friends. Cheers!
总有一天，我会好好治治这些反社会分子！
One of these days, I'll knock some sense into these sociopaths!
卢•阿彻凛冽地皱起了眉头，就像撞见扒手的警探。或许这是她的工作状态也说不定。
Lew Archer knits her eyebrows into a stern expression, just like a detective who sees a pickpocket. This is probably how she looks when she is at work.
在「黄金的时刻」待久了才发现，这里还真是满地奇葩啊——贬义的那种。
After spending some time in the Golden Hour, I realize this place is full of freaks.
上次我喝苏乐达的时候，特意听了听酒馆里其他人在谈论什么。真是不听不知道，一听吓一跳！
The last time I was here drinking SoulGlad, I pricked my ears to listen to what everyone else was talking about. I was shocked by what I heard.
有人说要带着怪物搞破坏，有人说要捣毁飞车的自动驾驶系统，还有人甚至要把整个匹诺康尼都烧成灰！
Some said they wanted to commit vandalism with their monsters, some planned to destroy the autopilot system of a flying car, and some even aimed to burn all of Penacony to the ground!
太可怕了。哪怕我已经不再是警探，这种消息也不能当作耳旁风。
How horrifying. Even though I'm no longer a detective, I can't ignore it when I hear things like that.
What kind of tavern was that?
They were probably just joking around.
谁知道？这种人我倒是也见过不少。一个个都说要挣脱社会的束缚，好像公序良俗怎么碍着他们了一样。
Who knows? I've met my share of people like them. They're all eager to break free of the societal constraints as though law and order are hampering their lives.
但实际上呢？这些人的脑子比空垃圾袋还要浅薄，我一眼就把他们望到底！
The truth is, their mind is as empty as an unused trash bag! I can see right through them at a glance!
要是有机会，我非好好治治他们不可！这个你拿着，防身用。
I'll knock some sense into them if I have the chance! Please keep this. You can use it to defend yourself.
卢•阿彻凛冽地皱起了眉头，就像撞见扒手的警探。或许这是她的工作状态也说不定。
Lew Archer knits her eyebrows into a stern expression, just like a detective who sees a pickpocket. This is probably how she looks when she is at work.
在「黄金的时刻」待久了才发现，这里还真是满地奇葩啊——贬义的那种。
After spending some time in the Golden Hour, I realize this place is full of freaks.
一个个都说要挣脱社会的束缚，好像公序良俗怎么碍着他们了一样。
They're all eager to break free of the societal constraints as though law and order are hampering their lives.
但实际上呢？这些人的脑子比空垃圾袋还要浅薄，我一眼就把他们望到底！
The truth is, their mind is as empty as an unused trash bag! I can see right through them at a glance!
要是有机会，我非好好治治他们不可！
I'll knock some sense into them if I have the chance!
我无法前进…但最终我会前进。
I'm stuck now... but I'll move forward eventually.
卢•阿彻冷静了下来。她的眉眼平常自带一股威严，只是伤感时看不分明。
Lew Archer composes herself. She has a piercing gaze that makes it hard to tell when she is in grief.
仔细想想，哪怕诺卡真的已经原谅了我，我也没法回去继续当警探了。
Come to think of it, I don't think I can return to my post as a detective even if Noka has truly forgiven me.
倒也没必要惦记那一官半职…从今往后，我会以私家侦探的身份继续活动，为「黄金的时刻」铲除威胁。
I'm not too keen on it either... From now on, I'll work as a private detective who eliminates dangers in Golden Hour.
我只是感慨，有些事情的影响，比人的一生还要长啊……
I just can't help lamenting the everlasting impact some incidents can have on one's life...
哟，我的朋友，来两瓶苏乐达？
Aha, it feels amazing to be alive!
你活着，我也活着，活着就是无限的可能性！
You're alive, I'm alive. Anything is possible when we're alive!
既然过去的事情都已过去，我也该展开全新的生活了——先从这「黄金的时刻」开始吧！
Since the bygones are bygones, it's time I start my life anew. I'll begin in the Golden Hour!
卢•阿彻嘴角上扬，不自然地笑着，似乎是苏乐达喝多了。
Lew Archer breaks into an unnatural grin. She seems to have had too much SoulGlad.

Lew Archer breaks into an unnatural grin. She seems to have had too much SoulGlad.
呵，我知道啊，我都知道的……
Ha, I understand. I get it all...
大家都是草台班子，不存在永不破灭又井井有条的美梦。哪怕这里也一样……
We're all part of a backwater troupe. No dreams, including here, can exist in an orderly manner forever...
之前格拉克斯大道上有对小两口吵架，我出于好心上去调解。结果呢？两边一起怼起我来了。
Some time ago, a couple was bickering on Glaux Avenue. I went up to mediate out of goodwill, but what happened next? Both sides turned on me at the same time.
你说我管这些闲事干啥？都不如去搞几瓶苏乐达。也不知道兜里的钱还够不够……
Why bother to help when others see me as a busybody? My time is better spent on getting myself some SoulGlad. I wonder if I have enough money in my pocket...
话说回来，我原本好像是为了戒酒才入梦的来着？无所谓了……
But then again, wasn't I here because I wanted to quit drinking? It doesn't matter now...
人常道双眼是心灵之窗，彼时我不懂得这句话真正的含义；而今历遍坎坷曲折，此刻的我正凝视着匹诺康尼，妄想目光能穿透她奢靡又虚荣的表象……

Our eyes are often said to be the window to our souls. Back then, I wasn't able to grasp the true meaning of this phrase. But now, having gone through some ups and downs, I find myself staring at Penacony, hoping that my gaze can penetrate its extravagant and vain façade...
她雍容华贵、纸醉金迷，永不熄灭的灯火是她颈间的珍珠、腕上的砗磲…只有为她献上更多，才有机会获得她的垂青。

She exudes an air of elegance and luxury. The unceasing lights are the pearls on her necklace and the agates on her bracelet... Only by offering things to her can one stand a chance of gaining her favor.
而现在，外乡人——有个难得的机遇正摆在你面前，让你能够更好地融入这个浮华喧嚣的大都会。你愿意抓住它吗？
Outworlder, you now have a once-in-a-lifetime chance to better assimilate in this grand and bustling metropolis. Will you seize it?
You don't look like a local either.
…这不重要，重要的是眼前的机遇能给你带来什么！
...That isn't the point. You should focus on what this chance can bring you!
粗鲁！我好心抛出橄榄枝，居然落得你这种反应……
How boorish! I can't believe this is how you respond to my kind offer...
听着，我可以为你提供一份兼职，而事成之后你可以得到一大笔钱——数字将大到你无法想象。
Listen, I have a part-time job for you. If you complete the job well, you'll earn a fortune — a sum you can hardly imagine.
工作内容非常简单——帮我收集一个人的信息。手段包括但不限于：记录她的工作与生活轨迹、并保存相关的影像，通过各种渠道获取她的信息……

It's pretty simple — I need you to gather a person's info for me. The means available to you include but are not limited to: Recording her work and her everyday life, saving relevant images and videos, and obtaining any information about her via any channel possible...
Stop! This sounds sick to me...
什…？！你、你把我当什么人了！我可不是…哦，想来你还不知道我的身份——
Wha...!? Wh—What kind of wrong idea are you getting? I'm not... Oh, I see. I haven't told you anything about me...
我曾经是个漫画家，后来成为了制片人，还登上过艾普瑟隆的《星系艺术家》杂志——你可知道能被那本杂志报道的都是什么级别的人物？
I used to be a manga artist, and I'm now a producer. I was even featured in the Galactic Artists magazine of Epsilon before! Do you have any idea how big a deal that is?
咳，闲话少说。我想调查的人，其实是猎犬家系的某位高层。我正打算以她为原型，拍摄一部超级英雄电影。
Ahem, let me cut to the chase here. The subject of my investigation is a big shot in the Bloodhound Family, and I'm planning to film a superhero movie about her.
It sounds shady to me. I'm not doing it.
哎…我这人做事，向来讲究个你情我愿。你既然执意如此，我也不好强求。
Well... I never force people into doing things they don't like. Since you insist on saying no, I won't push you.
不过嘛，要是你改变主意了，我倒是可以考虑再给你个机会。
Anyway, if you change your mind, I'll consider giving you another chance.
她那美丽的眼睛正注视着我，而我回望以满腔深情…嗯，你来啦，是打算帮我去调查了吗？
Her mesmerizing eyes are staring at me, and I look back with an affectionate gaze... Eh, you're back. Are you ready to help me with my investigation?
眼前的皮皮西突然痛苦地抱头，整个人簌簌颤抖起来。
The Pepeshi before you suddenly clutches his head in agony, with his body trembling uncontrollably.
…为什么！为什么——告诉我！我到底做错了什么？！
...Why? Tell me what I did wrong!?
没完没了地网暴我，说我德才堪忧…我已经被逼得道歉了，你们还想我怎么做？！
Those brutal netizens keep questioning my character and abilities... I've already offered my apology. What else do they want me to do!?
<size=28>是不是只有我死了，你们才肯放过我？！</size>
<size=28>Is my death the only thing that can appease them!?</size>
..哈哈...没错、没错！人们或早或晚，总归要直面内心深处的自己...而现在我听到了，那甜蜜的寂静与安宁正召唤着我——
...Haha... Yeah, indeed! Sooner or later, one will face their true self... I can hear it now. Sweet silence and peace are calling me...
我就像只被困于笼中的鸟儿，只有鼓起勇气一跃而下，才能真正获得自由！
I'm like a bird trapped in a cage. Jumping off bravely is my only way to freedom!
哈…想我在世间走这一遭，一路磕磕绊绊、始终与梦想相伴…而如今…没想到最后竟是你陪在我身边。
Alas... Looking back at my journey, I've never given up my dream, no matter how challenging things are... I didn't expect it was you who stayed by my side in the end.
朋友啊，就此别过了——现在我只想静静离去，就像清醒者在黎明前悄然踏上旅途，不惊醒画眉与晨露——<color=#f29e38ff>千万别来找我，也不要让旁人来搅扰这份安宁！</color>

It's time to go our separate ways, my friend... I wish to depart in silence, just like a soberer who sets off before dawn so as not to awaken the birds and dew... <color=#f29e38ff>Please don't come looking for me, and don't let others disturb my peace!</color>
我不愿造成什么麻烦，<color=#f29e38ff>尤其不愿惊动*猎犬*。</color>就让我在<color=#f29e38ff>筑梦边境</color>悄无声息地去吧！就像鸟儿划过天际，不留一丝痕迹……

I don't want any trouble, and <color=#f29e38ff>alerting the *Bloodhound* is the last thing I want to happen.</color> Just let me go quietly at the <color=#f29e38ff>Dream's Edge</color>! I want to be like a bird that flies across the sky without leaving a single trace...
…你终究还是来了，我不是说过——嗯？怎么就你一个人？！
...You're here, after all. Didn't I tell you... Eh? How come you're alone!?
Who else do you expect to come here?
…我…我…不是、没什么，我是说，就你一个人也挺好的……
...I... I... No, nothing. I mean it's good enough that you make it here...
你是来为我送行的吗，朋友？那么你是否也有着和我同样的感受——
Are you here to see me off, my friend? Do you feel the same way as I do...
纵览世界之大，却无我等一方容身之处；当我们在匹诺康尼的灯火中蓦然回首，却惊觉自己终究不过是个无根过客……

There's no place for people like us, even though the world is vast. When we look back on our journey in Penacony, it will dawn upon us that we are nothing but some travelers without a place to belong...
你就没有什么留恋的吗？
Don't you have anything you'll miss?
…怎么会没有！我的梦想，我一路挥洒的汗水、迄今取得的成就——它们是我的枷锁，却也令我无论如何也不愿放手。
...You bet! My dream, my hard work along the way, and my achievements so far... They are my shackles, but I can't let them go no matter how hard I try.
But it's impossible to fall to your death in a dream.
啊？哦…我知道了，你这是在对我用激将法，但我是不会上当的！
Huh? Oh... I see you're trying to provoke me, but I won't fall for it!
我本不愿与那些攻讦我、诋毁我的同僚计较，也早已练就了「在唾沫星子里捞金」的本事，可这次……
I didn't want to stoop to the level of my colleagues who degraded and slandered me, and I've long mastered the skill to see the good in the negative remarks made about me, but this time...
我知道他们嫉妒我…我不怕他们骂我，但决不能容忍自己的梦想在他们手中毁于一旦！
I know they're jealous of me... They can say whatever they want about me, but I can't allow them to ruin my dream!
那你更该珍惜自己的人生！
That's all the more reason for you to cherish your life then!
是啊，你说得对，我该努力取得更高的成就、狠狠打他们的脸。
You're right. I should strive for greater achievements to prove them wrong!
跳吧，最好再来个后空翻。
Go ahead and jump. Do a backflip if you can.
你、你这人怎么这么没同理心？！我就知道，这世界上所有人都一样…一样的冷漠、一样的刻薄！
H—How can you have so little empathy!? I knew it! Everyone in this world is cold and mean!
像你这样的人一定不会明白……
People like you will never get it...
…不会明白一直以来，我究竟承受了多大的压力、多大的痛苦……
...You won't understand the amount of pressure and pain I've had to bear all this while...
每次在深夜里看到些铺天盖地的侮辱与谩骂，我都忍不住崩溃得大哭，却又不得不在第二天装得像个没事人似的……
I can't help breaking down every time I'm bombarded by insulting and scathing remarks in the middle of the night. Yet, I have to act like nothing is wrong the next day...
说时迟那时快，天台边摇摇欲坠的皮皮西一个鹞子翻身，死死拽住了你的胳膊。
The Pepeshi, who seems close to falling off the rooftop, flips his body in the nick of time and grabs your arm for dear life.
他矮小的身躯中竟爆发出惊人的力量，将你的手臂勒出一圈红痕。
He summons an astonishing amount of strength from his petite figure, leaving a circular red mark on your arm.
…呼…吓、吓死我了…差点就没命了……
...Phew... Th—That was scary... I almost died...
Do you still want to jump now?
…从这…鬼门关前…走了一遭，我…呼…突然就领悟了人生的真谛。
...After... going through... that narrow escape, I... phew... have had an epiphany on the true meaning of life.
正所谓…「凡杀不死我的，必使我更强大」…走、走吧，我们先回去，我需要稍微冷静一下。
What doesn't kill me makes me stronger... L—Let's go. I need to get a grip.
你往前小心翼翼地挪了几步，皮皮西警惕地瞥了你一眼，却似乎并没阻止你的打算。
You carefully step forward, and the Pepeshi person shoots you a warning look, but doesn't seem to be stopping you.
你继续朝着他移动，皮皮西此刻正沉浸在自己的情绪中，没注意到你的动作。
You continue to move towards him, but the Pepeshi person is too absorbed in his own emotions to notice your movements.
啊，果然…那句话怎么说的来着？留着青山在，不怕没柴烧！
Ah, I get it now... What's that saying again? Where there's life, there's hope!
多谢你，陌生人！是你教会了我这个道理，以后我再也不会动不动就自暴自弃了！
Thank you so much for this valuable lesson, stranger! I won't ever slide into self-destruction again!
你教会了我…我想想…哦对！你教会了我「即使人生已经被逼到死角，还要尝试找到根救命稻草」这个道理！
Well... let me think... Yes! You made me realize I should always try to "find a way out even though my life seems to be a drought"!
这是你自己发明的谚语？
Did you come up with that saying yourself?
你、你为什么要阴阳怪气！我这是在对你表示感激，这都听不出来吗？
Wh—Why are you being sarcastic? I'm expressing my gratitude to you. Can't you tell?
You clearly chickened out just now.
你、你这人怎么这样说话！我这是在对你表示感激，这都听不出来吗？
Wh—What are you talking about!? I'm expressing my gratitude to you. Can't you tell?
算了，我也不指望你能完全明白我的境遇！每当我面对业界的打压抵制还有忘恩负义的员工时，那种扑面而来的压力……
Forget it! I never expect you to fully understand my plight! The pressure of dealing with the boycott against me in the industry and my ungrateful employees is just too much sometimes...
唉，心累！我知道自己选择的并非一条康庄大道…我得一直抓踩着荆棘往上爬，这样才能离那些高高在上的梦想近一点、再近一点……
This is exhausting! I understand I've chosen a challenging path for myself... I have to brave through numerous hurdles to get closer to my lofty ambition...
好了，让我稍微歇歇吧…这些，你拿去！就当是为了感谢你这根救命稻草的谢礼！
Now, I need to rest... Here, take this! Consider it a token of appreciation for being my lifesaver!
泪水从硕大的墨镜后滑落，剔透又晶莹，像极了——用皮皮西自己的话来说——那「掩藏于残酷现实背后的、最纯洁又最脆弱的梦想」。
Tears trickle down behind his oversized sunglasses. The translucent and glistening teardrops are much like — in the Pepeshi's own words — "the purest yet fragile dream obscured by the harsh reality."
啊…朋友，你要不要听我讲个故事？
Oh... my friend, can I interest you with a story?
从前有个年轻人，出生在艾普瑟隆星系边陲的某颗星球。那里贫瘠、闭塞、落后，那里的人从出生的那刻起，一辈子就能望到头。

Once upon a time, there was a youngster born on a remote planet on the edge of the Epsilon system. The planet was barren, isolated, and backward. The future of the people there was very much predictable from the moment of their birth.
但年轻人心有不甘，他不想从生到死都只能看见同样的景色——他憧憬瑰丽的奇景，想要像故事里的*无名客*那样自由地遨游宇宙。

However, the youngster was reluctant to resign himself to his fate. Not wanting to see the same view for his entire life, he aspired to witness all the wonders in the universe and roam freely around like the *Nameless* in the stories.
他等待着、谋划着，终于在<unbreak>13</unbreak>岁那年，成为某个外来取材的漫画家的助手——从此，再没有什么能阻碍他了 。

He waited and made plans for it. Finally, at the age of <unbreak>13</unbreak>, he became an assistant to a visiting manga artist who came to find inspiration. From then on, nothing could stand in his way.
年轻人肯上进、能吃苦，很快就继承了老师的衣钵…<unbreak>18</unbreak>岁那年他出版了自己的第一部作品，漫画界一颗耀眼的新星横空出世……

Being diligent and resilient, it didn't take long for the youngster to pick up the skills from his master... He published his first work when he was <unbreak>18</unbreak>, marking the meteoric rise of a brilliant new star in the world of manga...
年轻人越发努力，他想要成功、想要证明自己。后来他又进军电影行业，想要让自己的作品为更多人所了解、所喜爱。

The youngster worked even harder, driven by a desire for success and a need to prove himself. Later, he ventured into the movie industry, aiming to make his works known and appreciated by a wider audience.
可很快，他发现自己周围群狼环伺——业内的同僚联合起来打压他，曾经一起奋斗的同好们背叛了他，越来越多的人通过网络攻击他、污蔑他…可他又何罪至此呢？

But soon, he found himself becoming the target of resentment. His peers in the industry ostracized him, his companions who once worked alongside him betrayed him, and more and more netizens attacked him online... What did he do to deserve this?
他不过是在孜孜不倦地追逐那高高在上的梦想，就像逐星的巨人！难道只因巨人所到之处大地震颤不已，人们便要说他有罪吗？
He was merely pursuing his dream, like a giant reaching for the stars! Should the giant be condemned just because the earth trembles wherever it goes?
可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?
什…看来你比我想象中要开放得多啊，我的朋友……
Wha... Seems like you're more open-minded than I thought, my friend...
我倒是不讨厌你，不过我们或许可以将这件事安排在…你帮我完成「取材」之后？
I don't hate you, but can we put off this thing until... you finish helping me gather inspiration?
皮皮西盯着你，似乎在估量你价值几何——即便你只看到他黑漆漆的镜片。
The Pepeshi fixates his gaze on you, seemingly to gauge your worth, though all you can see is his dark lenses.
说起来…你救了我，我理应报答你——
Come to think of it... you've saved my life. I should return the favor...
那么来吧，来为我工作吧，我绝不会亏待你！
Well, why don't you work for me? I'll treat you well!
只要你帮我完成「取材」，我甚至可以让你成为下一部电影的主角！
As long as you help me gather inspiration, I can make you the protagonist of my next movie!
设想一下：在这奇迹与罪恶并存的梦想之城，总有些霓虹灯也照不亮的角落；而你，我的朋友，将化身聚光灯下的超级英雄，只身对抗人们的噩梦——邪恶可怖的惊梦剧团！

Imagine this: In this city of dreams where miracles and crimes coexist, there are places so dark that not even the neon lights can reach. You, my friend, will be the superhero under the spotlight. All by yourself, you'll battle with the nightmares of the people — the evil and horrifying Dreamjolt Troupe!
对于这部电影，我打算投入重资，并亲自担任导演和编剧。感受到了吗，朋友——光明的未来在等着我们！
I plan to invest heavily in this movie, and I'll direct it and write the script myself. Can you feel it now, my friend? A bright future is ahead of us!
这个世界总对努力的人如此苛刻！不、不能再这么下去了，我得想办法……
The world is always so hard on people who work hard! No! I can't allow things to go on like this. I have to think of a way...
我投了那么多钱…那么多钱！结果呢？连本都没回！
I invested so much money... So much! But how did it end? I didn't even get my capital back!
豪华的全明星阵容、尖端的技术特效，再加上《灵魂印刻》漫画原本的人气…无论如何它的票房都不该是这样！
It has a glamorous all-star cast, state-of-the-art special effects, and the popularity of the original Soulsealer manga... The box office of the movie shouldn't be like this!
一定又是他们在针对我——嫉妒我年纪轻轻就名利双收！明明是自己不肯与时俱进、回应市场需求，凭什么要对我架起矛头！

They must have sabotaged me! They were jealous of my fame and success at such a young age! Why didn't they blame themselves for being outdated and oblivious to the market demands? Why did they come at me?
再说了，就算我真的经常和员工培养感情又如何？凭什么因为这点小事就污蔑我审美低俗、对青少年造成不良影响？
Also, what's wrong with me having a close relationship with my employees? Why should I be criticized for having vulgar taste and being a negative influence on teenagers?
这个世界总对努力的人如此苛刻！不、不能再这么下去了，我得想办法……
The world is always so hard on people who work hard! No! I can't allow things to go on like this. I have to think of a way...
皮皮西凝神注视着那些奢侈品，硕大墨镜上的反光与橱窗里的灯光交相辉映。
The Pepeshi gazes intently at the luxury goods. The reflection on his oversized shades shimmers in harmony with the lights from the display window.
你知道吗，我最大的优点就是敏锐的嗅觉——尤其是对于金钱与时尚。
You know what? My keen senses, especially for money and fashion, are my strong suit.
在这嗅觉的引领下，我走出了故乡…而今它又引领着我来到神往已久的匹诺康尼……
Thanks to my intuition, I left my homeland... Now, it guides me to my long-desired Penacony...
果然，这繁华的大都会才是我理想中的栖身之处——在这里，只要有钱就能买到一切；而越是挥金如土，你就越能感受到一种无比的欢乐、一种亲昵的归属……
Indeed, this vibrant metropolis is the ideal place for me to settle down. Money can buy anything here. The more you splurge, the more you can feel an unparalleled joy and a sense of belonging...
喏，你来尝尝——就连这{RUBY_B#苏乐达}气泡水{RUBY_E#}，它在匹诺康尼的口味都要比银河中的别处更加甜美！
Here, taste it. Even this {RUBY_B#SoulGlad}soda{RUBY_E#} tastes better in Penacony than other places across the cosmos!
你知道吗，我最大的优点就是敏锐的嗅觉——尤其是对于金钱与时尚。
You know what? My keen senses, especially for money and fashion, are my strong suit.
在这嗅觉的引领下，我走出了故乡…而今它又引领着我来到神往已久的匹诺康尼……
Thanks to my intuition, I left my homeland... Now, it guides me to my long-desired Penacony...
果然，这繁华的大都会才是我理想中的栖身之处——在这里，只要有钱就能买到一切；而越是挥金如土，你就越能感受到一种无比的欢乐、一种亲昵的归属……
Indeed, this vibrant metropolis is the ideal place for me to settle down. Money can buy anything here. The more you splurge, the more you can feel an unparalleled joy and a sense of belonging...
Are you up for a chat?
哦…？怎么，你想开了？我就说嘛，怎么会有人和钱过不去呢！
Oh? Have you decided to take up my offer? I told you no one could resist the temptation of money!
没错！<unbreak>18</unbreak>岁时，我人生中的第一部漫画——《那年青春的我们迷失于幻想中的孤岛》出版了，而后我便一举成名。
That's right! I published my first manga, Lost Island, when I was 18, and I rose to fame immediately.
那之后我一路披荆斩棘，不知吃了多少苦、流了多少汗，终于获得了自己应有的荣誉与地位、过上了一直向往的生活。
Later on, I overcame obstacles along the way and earned the accolades and status I deserved through my blood, sweat, and tears. I finally got to live the life I'd always desired.
<unbreak>30</unbreak>岁那年，我将自己的漫画《沉醉于你的耀眼光芒》改编为电影，并因此斩获惊人的票房，受到星际间无数年轻人的追捧。
At the age of 30, I adapted my manga, Mesmerized by Your Charm, into a movie, which turned out to be a phenomenal box office hit. The movie was all the rage among the youngsters in the universe.
那之后我又拍了几部电影…可惜反响平平。现在，我为寻找灵感来到匹诺康尼，希望这座城市能回馈我的努力……
I made several more movies after that, but the response was mediocre. So, here I am in Penacony, in search of inspiration. I hope this city will reward my efforts...
你想调查的那位家族高层…
About that Family big shot you want to investigate...
怎么，打算接我的活了？那提前给你透露一下工作内容也不是不行——
Why? Have you decided to take the job? Well, I can tell you something about the job first...
我的取材对象是有着「白日梦酒店最强」之称的猎犬薇丝普——一个平日里不苟言笑、深不可测的强者。
Her name is Whisper, a member of the Bloodhound Family known as "The Reverie Titan." She's a formidable figure who rarely smiles and is difficult to fathom.
据说只要是她出现的地方，惊梦剧团都会退避三舍、作鸟兽散，简直就是酒店的活传奇！
Rumor has it that the Dreamjolt Troupe will flee in all directions at the sight of her. She's a legend of the hotel!
在见到她的第一眼，我就知道自己的下一部电影有着落了…对了，你在跟…咳、我是说调查的时候小心点，看你这小身板，估计禁不住她一拳。

The first time I set my sights on her, I immediately knew what I should do for my next movie... By the way, when you're stalkin— Ahem, I mean... investigating her, please be more careful. I doubt you can take a punch from her judging by your size.
好好想想吧，只要你愿意为我工作，事后好处必然少不了。
Take your time to think it over. As long as you're willing to work for me, you'll be rewarded handsomely.
相信我——你不会后悔选择为我办事的！
Believe me, you won't regret it!
你看见这位智械的身上刻着「格-蕾」二字——不是铭牌，而是直接刻在了外壳上。
The words "Go-Ray" are engraved directly on the body of this Intellitron instead of on a nameplate.
看见垃圾，回收垃圾。保护环境，从我做起。今天，你有拾起脚边的垃圾吗？
I see trash, I pick up trash. Everyone plays a part in protecting the environment. Have you picked up the trash on the ground today?
Does trash exist in dreams too?
现实存在物质的垃圾，梦中自然也有精神的垃圾。
There's physical trash in the real world, and there's psychological trash in dreams.
人们在现实认识垃圾、记住垃圾，也会在梦里产生垃圾的意象。正如人们无需在梦中进食，却依然可以开办餐馆、发明食物……

When people see trash in the real world and remember it, images of the trash will be generated in their dreams. Although people don't have to eat in dreams, they can still run restaurants and create new recipes there...
这两者都是意识的投影，并无本质区别，当然可以出现在同一片舞台上。
Both are the projections of consciousness with no fundamental differences. Of course, they can appear on the same platform.
在梦里不捡垃圾也没关系吧？
It's okay not to pick up trash in a dream, right?
梦是潜意识的海洋，往往反应了一个人最真实的想法。
Your dream is the ocean of your subconscious, and it reflects your genuine thoughts.
如果一个人做梦时都不能把垃圾丢进桶里，那他在现实保护环境的概率也不会很高。
If someone can't even throw trash properly when dreaming, it's unlikely that person will care much about the environment in real life.
有机生物的观念来源于记忆。只有通过重复动作加深印象，才能养成良好的习惯——所以我希望大家都能捡起身边的垃圾。

Organic lives form their perceptions based on memory. One can only cultivate a good habit by repeating an action and strengthening their memory of it. Therefore, I hope everyone can pick up the surrounding trash.
我在现实里拥有回收垃圾的模块，这项功能也被我带进了梦境…可能是日有所思夜有所梦吧。
I'm equipped with a trash disposal module in reality, so the feature has come with me into the Dreamscape... Perhaps what's on my mind during the day goes into my dream at night.
总之，只要能得到垃圾，我就可以对它们进行无害化分解。
Anyway, I can break down all trash that comes my way into harmless substances.
这会是一份极具价值的事业。可惜筑梦边境的工作让我抽不开身，没法亲自搜集各地的垃圾。
This is going to be a profitable business, but I'm too busy with my work at the Dream's Edge to collect trash myself.
哎，如果有人能帮我把垃圾弄来就好了……
Alas, if only someone could help me gather the trash...
你愿意帮忙？真是…太值得敬佩了。你所行之事足以让宇宙免于毁灭。
You can help? That's... a respectable move. Your actions will spare the universe from destruction.
等垃圾回收完毕后，我会向你献上最崇高的赞许。
When you're done collecting all the trash, I'll offer you my highest compliments.
…如果你愿意参与这项事业，等垃圾回收完毕后，我会向你献上最崇高的赞许。
...If you're willing to get involved in this endeavor, I'll offer you my highest compliments when you're done collecting the trash.
时刻记得，你所行之事足以让宇宙免于毁灭。
Always bear in mind that your actions are enough to spare the universe from destruction.
越是美丽的环境，越不该遭受玷污。你肯定也这么认为，对不对？
Beautiful places shouldn't be defiled by pollution. You agree with that, don't you?
智械陷入了沉默。一滴无机的泪——也可能是油——从她眼角滑落，在金属脸颊上留下一道湿痕。
The Intellitron falls silent. An inorganic teardrop — which is probably oil — rolls down from the corner of her eye, leaving a mark on her metal face.
诶？奇怪，为什么我明明没有感到悲伤，却还是流泪了……
Eh? Why am I tearing up when I don't feel sad?
而且，机器应该是不会哭的才对……
Also, a robot isn't supposed to cry...
对哦，我是智械…我现在已经是智械了。
Right, I'm an Intellitron... I'm already an Intellitron now.
喜悦有时也会带来眼泪。
There are tears of joy, too.
喜悦…是啊，我应该感到喜悦才对。
Joy... Yes, I should be feeling joyful.
眼前的智械发出一串电子笑声，里面似乎蕴含着某种…劫后余生的庆幸。
The Intellitron before you lets out a robotic laughter with a hint of relief.
原本，我的生命轨迹和匹诺康尼绝不会有交集。如今我却站在这个梦里，还能用双手为它添砖加瓦…现在回想起来，依旧觉得难以置信。
Penacony had nothing to do with my life in the beginning. But now, here I am contributing to its development with my hands... I still find my experience unbelievable even to this day.
最初我并不是智械，甚至不是这副人形的身躯。但后来发生了一些事，让我变成了现在的模样。这是命运赠予我的第二次生命。
At first, I wasn't an Intellitron and didn't even exist in this humanoid figure. Something cropped up later, and it turned me into what I am today. I was fortunate enough to be reborn.
我想我应该珍惜这个机会，好好看看那座名为「黄金的时刻」的城市，看看前人缔造出的美梦……
I should make use of this opportunity to take a good look at that city called Golden Hour. It's a beautiful dreamland built by our predecessors...
What were you like from before?
原来的模样…我羞于回忆。如果你真想知道，就答应帮我办一件事吧。
I'm... a little embarrassed to recall it now. If you really want to know, agree to do a favor for me.
Haven't you been to Golden Hour?
说来惭愧，一来到匹诺康尼，我便马不停蹄地投入了筑梦边境的工作…想来是工具习性难改。
Honestly, as soon as I set foot in Penacony, I dove headfirst into the work at the Dream's Edge... I suppose some habits are just hard to shake.
不介意的话，能帮我一个忙吗？
Do you mind doing me a favor?
如今我职责缠身，没办法离开筑梦边境…我的特殊身份也不允许我随便离开。
I can't leave the Dream's Edge because of my duties... My unusual identity doesn't allow me to go anywhere I like either.
所以，我希望你能帮我拍几张照片，让我把这些影像铭刻进存储系统里。
I hope you can take a few photos for me so that I can keep them in my storage system.
刚进入梦境时，那座高耸的<color=#dbc291ff>酒店大楼</color>曾让我心潮澎湃。但我对它的印象已经有些模糊了……
When I first arrived at the Dreamscape, that <color=#dbc291ff>towering hotel</color> took my breath away. However, I can barely remember how it looks now...
谢谢你，年轻的生命——记得把建筑拍完整些。
Thank you, youngster. Remember to include every part of the building in the photos.
这里视线不错，把格-蕾要的照片拍了吧。
This spot has a good view. I should probably take the photo that Go-Ray wants here.
那座高耸的<color=#dbc291ff>酒店大楼</color>曾让我心潮澎湃，希望你把它拍完整些。
That <color=#dbc291ff>towering hotel</color> took my breath away. Please include every part of the building in the photos.
Thanks for your hard work. Let me see...
果然，这栋建筑还是和我印象中一样高大、宏伟…就像一件武器。
Indeed, the building is still as tall and grand as I remember it. It looks just like a weapon.
一座建在地上，朝天空发射的巨炮。它开火时，能量从四周涌向底座，光芒足以刺破最浓厚的雾霾。
It looks like a giant rocket on the ground, aiming at the sky. When it is fired, energy surges to its base from all sides, emitting a radiance so bright it can penetrate the thickest of smoke.
如果是从前的我，见到它应该会很激动。
The old me would have been thrilled to see it.
我的家乡是个不和平的星球。自从我被挖出来起，战争就没有一刻停歇。
My hometown was a chaotic place. The war hasn't ceased for a moment since I was dug out.
据说在更加古早的从前，我的家乡还是个鸟语花香的地方。人们掌握了宇宙航行的能力，把足迹踏遍数个星球——我就是在那时被制造出的智能飞船之一。

In ancient times, my hometown used to be an invigorating and scenic planet. People at that time, who already mastered the ability to navigate across the universe, had traveled to numerous planets. I was one of the intelligent spaceships created at that time.
但两大组织的战争改变了一切。不知出于什么原因，双方开始拿出压箱底的武器相互攻击……
Yet, the war between two major factions changed everything. For some unknown reasons, the two sides started attacking each other using their most formidable weapons...
所有外星基地都被摧毁，母星也因此陷入了漫长的冬天。科技断层，环境恶化，美好生活不再。

All bases on other planets were destroyed, and our home planet was plunged into a long winter. The development of our technology became stunted, and the environment deteriorated, and there went our good lives.
当我醒来时，战争仍在废墟上继续进行。人们给尾巴系上不同颜色的布条，手持枪支和棍棒互相攻伐。
By the time I woke up, the war was still ongoing at the ruins. People tied cloths of different colors to their tails as they attacked each other with guns and sticks.
他们见到我，第一反应就是——这东西能带来胜利。
The moment they saw me, they immediately got the impression that I could bring them victory.
智械播放了一段系统录音……
The Intellitron plays a system recording...
「瞧瞧我们发现了什么，前文明的宇航机器！我们就要胜利了！」
"Look what we found — a pre-civilization space machine! We're about to win!"
「想想看，我们在宇宙中曾经有那么多军事基地，里面肯定保存着前文明时期的超级兵器。」
"Think about all the military bases we used to have across the universe. There must be a lot of pre-civilization superweapons there."
「只要能把那些兵器拿到手，胜利的天平就会向我们倾斜了！」
"If we can find those weapons, we'll be one step closer to victory!"
「希望这破烂对得起它消耗的燃料——那可是我们省吃俭用攒下来的。」
"I hope this hunk of junk is worth the fuel. We all had to tighten our belts to afford it."
「见鬼，这玩意的门怎么打不开？」
"Rats. Why can't I open the door to this thing?"
「没看这边写着嘛，『无人式智能深空勘探机』…哦，还有触控面板呢，挺人性化。」
"Didn't you see this? It's an "Unmanned Intelligent Space Explorer"... Oh, there's even a touch panel. How user-friendly."
「行了，我已经设定好让它回收各个星球的残留兵器了，之后就等着好消息吧。」
"Done. I've set it up to collect the other remaining weapons on other planets. Let's see what it can bring back to us."
那时的我以执行命令为天职，不知思考为何物，只能将这条指示奉为圭臬。
At that time, my job was to carry out any instructions given to me. I could not think, so I followed the instructions blindly.
