Mr. Arturo sinks into hysteria once more and completely forgets about the etiquette of hospitality...
一天到晚净想这些没用的——学生就该好好学习，天天向上！
Thinking about useless stuff day in, day out... No, students should focus on their studies and their self-improvement!
随着钟表的指针拨动，阿图罗先生止住动作、陷入了思考。他头顶的天环仿佛都黯淡了几分。
As the clock's hands tick forward, Mr. Arturo stops what he's doing and sinks into thought, causing the halo above his head to dim slightly.
…对。就在刚才，我意识到修改校规来得太慢了——不是说不修改，但在那之前，我得好好敲打几个学生。
Yes... I've just realized that changing the school rules will take too long. I'm still intent on implementing changes, mind you, but before that, I must knock some sense into a few students' minds.
毕业季就快到了，他们是我最寄予厚望、也最放心不下的孩子。我想拜托你替我帮他们带几句话。

Graduation season is right around the corner and these kids are the ones whom I have the highest of hopes for. Yet, they're also the ones that I'm worried about the most. Please, can you speak to them on my behalf?
很好，你的主人翁精神让我欣慰。要是每个学生都像你这么有担当，匹诺康尼肯定比现在还优秀好几倍。
Thank you, I'm heartened by your sense of commitment. If every student was as responsible as you are, Penacony would be a much more splendid place than it is now.
你们星穹列车是匹诺康尼的股东，学生就业率下降的话，匹诺康尼的股价也会受到影响——你肯定不希望这样的事情发生吧？

Since the Astral Express is one of Penacony's shareholders, if the employment rate of students drops, Penacony's stock price will be affected as well. Surely you don't wish for such a scenario to occur, do you?
首先要找的是谐乐学院的<color=#dbc291ff>哈里森</color>。那个老小子延毕了这么多年，是时候挪窝了——懂我意思吧？

Firstly, you must find <color=#dbc291ff>Harrison</color>, a student at Charmony Academy. Having delayed his graduation for so many years, it's time for that old bloke to head out into the world... if you catch my drift?
他的经历固然可惜，但人总是要向前看的。让他去找个工作，然后培养新的爱好吧。他的人生已经不剩多少可以浪费了。
While he has had some truly regrettable experiences, one must always look forward. Convince him to look for a job and nurture a new hobby. After all, there's little of his life left to waste.
然后是财富学院的<color=#dbc291ff>查德</color>。那小子自称什么…折纸大学派对王？哼，说得好听，不就是不务正业？

After that, find <color=#dbc291ff>Chad</color> from Fortune Academy, the one who proclaims himself to be... Paperfold University's "Party King," I believe? Hah, by giving himself that ridiculous title, isn't he just admitting how negligent he is of his studies?
他家里人多次打点过我，希望帮他指条明路。我亲自把他的简历送到了奥帝购物中心的人力部，结果他连笔试都没过——指了明路也得肯走才行啊！

His family members have contacted me numerous times before, always pleading with me to guide him onto the right path. Thereafter, I personally sent his resume to Oti Mall's HR department... only for him to fail the written test! I say, even if I'm able to point out a path forward, it matters not if the student in question refuses to follow my direction!
好在他距离毕业还有几年。这段时间内，务必让他搞清楚自己该做什么。机会只给有准备的人。
Thankfully, he's still a few years from graduating. Before he does so, it's imperative for us to make him realize what he should be doing with his life. After all, chance favors the prepared.
还有财富学院的主席<color=#dbc291ff>尚恩</color>。他是我遇到过最有潜力的学生，我本来想引荐他加入苜蓿草家系，但这小子居然接了星际和平公司的Offer！

And then there's <color=#dbc291ff>Shawn</color>, the president of Fortune Academy and the most promising student I've ever met. I was originally going to recommend him to join the Alfalfa Family. However, this kid accepted an offer from the IPC instead!
凭他的天赋，在匹诺康尼肯定能闯出一片天，但跑到星际和平公司那种人吃人的地方，给那些没有理想的老东西当奴隶——

Given how talented he is, he would have definitely been able to make a name for himself in Penacony. Yet, he chose to join a dog-eat-dog company like the IPC and serve as a workhorse for those unambitious squares...
你就让他好好想想，作为折纸大学的一份子，究竟是为了什么而读书？匹诺康尼重点培养他，是希望他能留下来建设同谐的美好梦境，不是给别人做嫁衣！

Ask him to think through his decision again, about what drives him to learn as a student at Paperfold University. Penacony has nurtured him so intently in the hopes that he will stay and build Harmony's wonderful Dreamscape, not for him to turn around and work for someone else!
阿图罗的脸憋得和血色刺蕉一样红，这位老教育家似乎说动了情，恨铁不成钢之心溢于言表。
Arturo's face has turned as red as a bloodthorn banana. It seems that this experienced educator has worked himself into a tizzy, his disappointment in the students written all over his face.
唉，就这样吧，一个个都不让人省心…我的话他们已经听不进去了。但凡事总得试试，说不定你能让他们迷途知返呢？

*sigh* That should do it for now. I'm always worried about these students... yet they don't seem to heed my advice anymore. Nevertheless, you might be able to make them see the error of their ways. It's worth a shot, right?
<color=#dbc291ff>哈里森</color>、<color=#dbc291ff>查德</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>尚恩</color>。这三个孩子，根本听不进我的话…也许你能让他们迷途知返？

<color=#dbc291ff>Harrison</color>, <color=#dbc291ff>Chad</color>, and <color=#dbc291ff>Shawn</color>, three obstinate kids who don't heed my advice... Perhaps you will be able to make them see the error of their ways.
The dean has asked me to relay some words to you on his behalf...
Go on, what did he say?
你转达了阿图罗先生给哈里森的嘱托——不要浪费生命。
You relay Mr. Arturo's advice to Harrison: Don't waste your life away.
哈、哈哈哈…这老小子，真是一点都不让人意外。
Ha... Hahaha... This old man is so predictable.
自打我们认识起，他就一直催我毕业、找工作。除了这个，我再没听他吐出半句有用的话！
From the moment we met, he has nagged me about graduating and finding a job. Apart from these, I've not heard a single piece of useful advice that has come out of his mouth!
人活一辈子到底是为了什么，工作吗？谁说不工作就不能活着？他越催我，我就越想不毕业！
What do humans live for? Work? Who says that a person who doesn't work can't survive just as well? The more he pesters me, the less I wish to graduate!
Perhaps you should still look for a job?
我都这个年纪了，如果要找工作，就只能从事音乐以外的行业…
At my age, if I really were to search for a job, I'd have to look for one that's not related to music...
比起做那些痛苦的差事，我宁愿窝在家里躺平——但这俩选择都不如继续上学。
Instead of wearing myself down with tedious trivialities, I'd rather laze about at home... Yet, neither of these choices beats continual education.
Why don't you wish to graduate?
毕了业又如何？现在的我已经没机会投身音乐行业了，不如在学校里听年轻人唱歌。
What's so good about graduating? At my age, there are no longer any opportunities for me to work in the music industry. In that case, I'd rather stay in school and listen to the youngsters' singing.
都说学校是座象牙塔，我同意。不过时间久了，我发现象牙塔也有象牙塔的好处——你不用担心跟外界同流合污。

Some say that academia is an ivory tower, and I agree with that sentiment. However, as time passed, I realized that ivory towers have their own advantages: One who lives in an ivory tower need not worry about wallowing in the filth that is the outside world.
这片宇宙是黑暗的。天真的学生踏入其中，就像水滴被投入染缸。跟一群脏人待在一起，不干脏事就活不下去。
The universe is dark. Naive students step into it like water being poured into a vat of dye. Those who hang out with dirty people must also do dirty things for survival.
极端？我那个爹，当初口口声声说要支持我实现梦想，结果只是为了让我做企业代言人，好帮他那些见不得人的生意打掩护！

Extreme? Back then, my dad kept saying that he would support my dream. However, he was just paying lip service to me in order to convince me to take on the role of enterprise ambassador and help him cover up all of his shady businesses that couldn't see the light of day!
You speak as though you've personally witnessed such events before...
没见过？我甚至被自己的亲爹骗过！
Witnessed? No, worse than that, I've even been lied to by my own dad before!
当初他口口声说要支持我实现梦想，结果只是为了让我做企业代言人，好帮他那些见不得人的生意打掩护！

Back then, he kept saying that he would support my dream. However, he was just paying lip service to me in order to convince me to take on the role of enterprise ambassador and help him cover up all of his shady businesses that couldn't see the light of day!
我可不是瞎掰。我那个爹，当初口口声声说要支持我实现梦想，结果只是为了让我做企业代言人，好帮他那些见不得人的生意打掩护！

I'm not making things up. Back then, my dad kept saying that he would support my dream. However, he was just paying lip service to me in order to convince me to take on the role of enterprise ambassador and help him cover up all of his shady businesses that couldn't see the light of day!
后来我从星际和平网络了解到，这种事压根算不上什么新闻——有钱人的嘴脸，全宇宙都一个样。
Later, thanks to the Interastral Peace Network, I realized that such events aren't even considered news at all: Wealthy people act the same, regardless of where they are in the universe.
要么当赚黑心钱的老板，要么给赚黑心钱的老板打工。只有最偏远的蛮荒星球才能躲过金钱的浸染…这就是宇宙的真相。

It's either you become a boss who rakes in dirty money, or you work for a boss like that. The corruption of wealth can only be avoided by fleeing to the remotest of barren planets... This is but a universal truth.
阿图罗倒是口口声声让我向前看，可前面等着我的又是什么？毕了业融入社会就能让我的生活有意义吗？
Arturo keeps telling me to look forward, but is there anything that's waiting for me at the other end? If I graduate and integrate into society, will my life suddenly have meaning?
你就告诉他…我是快入土了没错。但我宁可带着梦想去死，也不愿像个行尸走肉一样活着！这是我最后的反抗！
You can tell him that while I have one foot in the grave, I'd rather die with my dreams intact than live like a walking corpse! This is my final rebellion!
The dean has asked me to relay some words to you on his behalf...
校长？呃，有股不祥的预感。
The dean? Um... I've got a bad feeling about this.
你转达了阿图罗先生给查德的嘱托——不要玩物丧志。
You relay Mr. Arturo's advice to Chad: Constant play saps one's aspirations away.
…唉，校长啊校长，为什么偏偏要让我停办派对去找工作…这可真是太难为我了。
*sigh* Is the dean really asking me to stop partying and look for a job? That would be nearly impossible for me to accomplish.
不是！朋友，你有所不知，如今匹诺康尼正在面临前所未有的困境…简单来说，就是找不到工作。
No! Friend, you might not know about this, but Penacony is currently in the midst of an unprecedented crisis... To put it simply, there are barely any jobs available.
Because it's too difficult to find a job?
可不是嘛！朋友，你有所不知，如今匹诺康尼正在面临前所未有的困境…简单来说，就是找不到工作。
That's right! Friend, you might not know about this, but Penacony is currently in the midst of an unprecedented crisis... To put it simply, there are barely any jobs available.
Can't just make money standing around anymore?
这都什么跟什么…朋友，你有所不知，如今匹诺康尼正在面临前所未有的困境。简单来说，就是找不到工作。

Huh? What are you talking about... Anyway, friend, you might not know about this, but Penacony is currently in the midst of an unprecedented crisis. To put it simply, there are barely any jobs available.
这可不是我们不努力，我的分数也不低。但课上教的跟工作要用的，根本不是一回事！
It's not because we're not hardworking enough. After all, my grades are pretty decent, if I say so myself. However, the stuff that we're being taught won't even be useful in the workplace!
而且最近大环境变化得实在太快。自从星际和平公司入驻之后，全宇宙的能人都往这边挤，说是什么「要让美梦再次多彩」…美梦多没多彩我不知道，岗位竞争倒是越来越激烈了。

Furthermore, the world nowadays is changing at a rapid pace. Ever since the IPC established itself in Penacony, all manner of talented people from across the universe are gathering here and crowding up the place, claiming that they wish to "make dreams colorful again." While I can't tell you how colorful the dreams are at present, the fact remains that the fight for jobs has become more and more intense.
那些外来者都是一等一的精英，业务能力强就算了，薪资要的还低——据说里面有不少被其他星球「优化」掉的人才，性价比爆了我们这些应届生几条街！

Those outsiders are truly the cream of the crop. Apart from being incredibly competent, they're asking for lower wages as well. I've even heard that there are talents who were the victims of downsizing on other planets among them. Their cost-performance ratio must be through the roof compared to the fresh graduates from our school!
之前校长发内推时，我还想着从基层做起、慢慢锻炼，就去应聘了奥帝购物中心的销售助理……

Some time ago, when the dean was sending out internal recommendations, I was thinking that I could start at the bottom and slowly work my way up, so I went to apply for a sales assistant position at Oti Mall...
就这么个薪资最低的岗位，你猜有多少人跟我抢？十万人！简历多到要用人工智能来审核，我连面试都没进去就被刷掉了。

Guess how many people were also vying for this low-paying position. One hundred thousand! Oti Mall received so many resumes that AI had to be used to screen them. I was written off even before the interview stage.
我一看，好哇，要是还抱着这条赛道不松手，我毕业之后非得被赶出匹诺康尼不可——我爹肯定不允许我在家啃老，不然再多财富也有花光的一天。

I was absolutely stunned by this. If I keep pursuing the same path with blind persistence, I would definitely be chased out of Penacony upon graduation. After all, my dad would never let me leech off the family, otherwise we'll eventually run out of money, regardless of how much wealth we started with.
既然这样，还不如早点转型，另谋出路。至少派对行业在匹诺康尼算是个蓝海，不比跟那群逐梦客内卷强多了？

In that case, I might as well pivot early and look for greener pastures elsewhere. At least the party sector in Penacony still has tons of employment opportunities. Wouldn't pursuing this be more promising than joining the rat race alongside the other Dreamchasers?
唉，反正我也不指望能说服校长。他老了，老人有自己的一套逻辑。但要论派对行业的发展前景，他未必有我懂。

*sigh* I'm pretty certain that I can't convince the dean anyway. He's quite old, and old people have their own way of thinking. However, when it comes to the future prospects of the party industry, he might not be as knowledgeable about that as I am.
到时候你就跟他说：「校长的好意，查德心领了。可查德实在没有别的特长，适应不了竞争激烈的社会，只能凭自己的意愿碰碰运气。母校的教诲，我时刻铭记在心。」

When you see him again, you can tell him this, "I understand your good intentions. However, since I don't excel at anything else and can't adapt to an intensely competitive society, I can only try my luck as I see fit. As for the things that I learned at my alma mater, I will always bear them in my heart."
希望这能让他好受一些吧……
I hope that these words of mine will make him feel slightly better...
The dean has asked me to relay some words to you on his behalf...
哦？难道他打算为我发一份奖学金？居然现在才想起来，真是贵人多忘事。
Oh? Does he intend to award a scholarship to me? I can't believe I'm only just remembering this. It seems that great wits do indeed have short memories.
你转达了阿图罗先生给尚恩的嘱托——不要背井离乡。
You relay Mr. Arturo's advice to Shawn: Don't turn your back on your home planet.
啧…阿图罗先生，居然也有大智若愚的时候。他对商业、对整个宇宙运作规律的理解，都太肤浅了。我对他的评价下降了一些。

Tsk... It seems that even the great Mr. Arturo can have moments of folly as well. His understanding of commerce and the way the universe works is too superficial. After hearing these words, I actually think less of him than before.
居然说什么我应该留下来建设匹诺康尼…都这年头了，还一点宇宙化思维都没有。当初要是听他的，我可拿不到战略投资部的offer！

I can't believe he's suggesting that I should stay behind and develop Penacony... For someone as advanced in age as he is, I'm surprised how lacking he is in cosmic thinking. If I listened to him back then, I would have never received the Strategic Investment Department's offer!
不错，很会抓重点——你想啊，匹诺康尼如今几十亿住民，都是土生土长的本地人吗？当年的囚犯们这么能生？

Not bad, at least you are able to grasp the important concept. Think about it: Do you believe that billions of people that reside in Penacony today have been born and bred here? Surely you don't think the prisoners who once inhabited this place had so many offsprings?
Is staying back and developing your home planet not a good thing?
家乡？我爷爷还住在新伦蒂尼恩呢。匹诺康尼如今几十亿住民，都是土生土长的本地人吗？当年的囚犯们这么能生？

My home planet? My grandpa is still living on New Londinium! Do you believe that billions of people that reside in Penacony today have been born and bred here? Surely you don't think the prisoners who once inhabited this place had so many offsprings?
那只能靠你自己努力…别打岔！
Then you'd better work hard for it... Anyway, don't interrupt me!
我说到哪儿了…哦对，那老头不想我出去闯荡。呵，想想都好笑，匹诺康尼如今几十亿住民，都是土生土长的本地人吗？当年的囚犯们这么能生？

Now, where was I... Oh right, that old fogey doesn't want me to venture out into the universe. Heh, it's quite funny in retrospect: Do you believe that billions of people that reside in Penacony today have been born and bred here? Surely you don't think the prisoners who once inhabited this place had so many offsprings?
说白了，星际迁居本就是常态，人要往高处走，这没啥不道德。庇尔波因特是发达行星，机会比匹诺康尼多，我去那里发展，跟逐梦客来这儿有什么区别？

To put it bluntly, interstellar migration has always been the norm. There's nothing unethical about humanity's wish to soar higher. Since Pier Point is a developed planet, there are naturally more opportunities to be found there than at Penacony. How is my wish to advance my career there any different from the Dreamchasers who come here for a better life?
在财富学院，能赚到钱才是硬道理。当今这寰宇，有哪个大厂比得过星际和平公司？我都跟业界大拿喝咖啡了，还不够给母校争光？

A universal truth that we learned at Fortune Academy was to accumulate wealth by any means necessary. And when we look at the world today, is there any company that's bigger than the IPC? I'll be rubbing shoulders with industry leaders, but that's still not enough to bring glory to my alma mater?
嗐，话不投机半句多，今天这些言论还请不要转告校长。我只想老老实实毕业，然后奔向我的光明未来。
*sigh* I don't know what else I can say to him. As for what I have told you today, please keep it from the dean. I just want to graduate peacefully and then chase after my glorious future.
…兴许在庇尔波因特升任P<unbreak>40</unbreak>、把家人接去享福之后，我会给他寄点星际特产回来吧，哈哈！
Maybe I'll have some interstellar specialties delivered to him once I've been promoted to P<unbreak>40</unbreak> and I can move my family to live comfortably together with me in Pier Point. Haha!
咕咕，同学，请稍作留步——房里的「小鸟」似乎遇到了麻烦。
Hoot, dear student, please wait a moment. The "fledgling" in this room seems to be in a spot of trouble.
老鸟已经在外面观察了好一阵子。他的心绪虽然被你拨动，但心中的折痕却并未被抚平。
I've been observing for a while from outside. You may have stirred his emotions, but the creases in his heart have yet to be smoothed out.
咕咕…依老鸟看，他就像钟表小子第<unbreak>3210</unbreak>集里被藤壶爬满身躯的鲸鱼叔叔，已经负重累累，把脑子都累昏了。

Hoot, the way I see it, he's just like Uncle Whale from Episode <unbreak>3210</unbreak> of Clockie — overburdened by the barnacles all over his body to the point where his mind has grown muddled and weary.
为学生解惑是老师的责任，看来老鸟必须站出来说几句话、提点提点他才行。
It's a teacher's responsibility to help students through difficult problems, so it seems I must step forward to say a few words and point him in the right direction.
咕咕——老鸟当然知道，他现在在帮老鸟照看着这片树林，是其他小鸟们的大家长。
Hoot, I know that. He's helping me look after this forest and serves as a guardian to the other fledglings.
不过，树林里每一只小鸟的成长老鸟都看在眼里——他曾经也是一只迷茫的小鸟，现在看来依然需要老鸟的呵护。
However, I also keep watch over every fledglings' growth in this forest. He was once a confused fledgling too, and it seems he still needs some care from this old bird.
But other people can't see you...
咕咕…说得是呢，看来老鸟有些太过心急了。
Hoot, you're right... It seems I got ahead of myself.
可否请你拿来纸笔，替老鸟写一封口述信，转交给他？
Could you bring over a pen and piece of paper so you can write down what I say and deliver it to him?
那老鸟要开始念了。可能会有些慢，请同学务必保持耐心……
Then I'll start dictating. I may be a bit slow, so please be patient with me...
咕咕——你是一个热心肠的孩子，老鸟相信你只是在开玩笑。就算是认真的，也权当给老鸟这只<color=#dbc291ff>初代校长</color>一个面子，好吗？
Hoot, you're a warm-hearted child, so I trust you were just joking. But if you were serious, could you see it as doing a favor for the <color=#dbc291ff>first dean</color> instead?
这番话着实有些让人难以拒绝。在某种情绪的推动下，你拿出了纸笔……
You find it difficult to refuse such a request. Driven by a certain emotion, you take out a pen and piece of paper...
猫头鹰老师的声音突然变得严肃，它收起了可爱的声音与「咕咕」的口癖，认真地向你传达他的心意……
Professor Owl's voice suddenly becomes solemn, gone is the cuteness and his "hoot" catchphrase as he earnestly conveys his feelings to you...
你很少有机会起草这样正规的文书，但意外完成得还不错——除了个别字存在涂抹痕迹之外。
You rarely have the chance to draft up a proper correspondence like this, but it turned out surprisingly well, apart from the smudges on certain letters.
…以上，希望能解开那只小鸟的心结。老鸟就先回大树了，还有其他小鸟也需要照顾咕。
...That's all. I hope this will help the fledgling with his troubles. I'll return to the Great Tree now. There are other fledglings in need of my care too, hoot.
——来自罗盘号的同学，聪明如你，一定能找到合适的机会交出这封信咕。
...A brilliant student from The Compass like you will surely find a suitable opportunity to deliver this letter, hoot.
<color=#dbc291ff>哈里森</color>、<color=#dbc291ff>查德</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>尚恩</color>。这三个孩子，根本听不进我的话…也许你能让他们迷途知返？

<color=#dbc291ff>Harrison</color>, <color=#dbc291ff>Chad</color>, and <color=#dbc291ff>Shawn</color>, three obstinate kids who don't heed my advice... Perhaps you will be able to make them see the error of their ways.
Is that so. How did they react?
你向阿图罗先生如实复述了三位学生的回答，包括那些摆烂充满攻击性的语句。
You relay to Mr. Arturo the three students' answers as they were presented to you, including the phrasings where they've given up and the ones that felt like personal attacks.
哼，不出所料。类似的言论我在其他学生那里也听到过一些…真搞不懂现在的年轻人。
Hmph, as I expected. I've heard similar views from my other students. I just don't understand young people nowadays...
这三个家伙我是爱莫能助了，但愿我开的猛药可以帮到之后的学生——能救一个算一个。
There's nothing more I can do to help those three. I only hope my stricter regimen will help future students — even if I can only save them one at a time.
既然如此，就从下个月开始试行全封闭式管理好了——
If this is the case, I'll try managing the school as an enclosed institution from next month.
唉，这些学生也是费尽千辛万苦才考进这所学校来的，怎么就对这机会一点都不珍惜？
*sigh* These students spent a lot of time and effort to get into this school, so why don't they cherish this opportunity at all?
或许等到将来的某天，他们回想自己年轻时做过的这些错事，会得出不一样的感悟…可那时后悔也晚了。
Perhaps they'll look back on the errors of their youth some day in the future and come to a different realization... Though it'll be far too late for regrets by then.
感觉这间屋子好久没收拾了…你还有什么事吗？
This room feels overdue for a tidying... Did you need anything else?
I have a letter for you.
给我的信？谁会挑这个时候……
A letter for me? Why now and from who?
在接过信封的一瞬，阿图罗先生愣住了，因为信封上画着一只歪歪扭扭的折纸鸟——你花了些力气才尽可能把它画得像鸟。

Mr. Arturo looks stunned the moment he accepts the envelope. There is a crooked drawing of an origami bird on the envelope — a drawing you spent some effort into making resemble a bird as much as possible.
仔细看去，这只鸟与当今折纸大学的校徽颇为相似，却又有几处明显的不同。只有打开校长室内某个尘封的抽屉才能找到这图案的原型……

On closer inspection, this bird looks quite similar to the current crest of Paperfold University, yet it also has some distinct differences. Only by opening a certain dusty drawer in the Dean's Office will one be able to find the original concept for this design.
这是一版未被选用的校徽提案。能知道它的要么是历代校长，要么是早在建校之初就已抵达匹诺康尼的某位名宿…亦或两者都是。

This is a proposed version of the university crest that went unused. Only two types of individuals would know of it: Someone who is or was once a dean, or someone of renown who had already arrived in Penacony in the early days of the university's construction, or... someone who is both.
来不及问这图案是谁告诉你的，阿图罗先生立即拆开了信封，仿佛刚踏入大学的新生般急切地读了起来。
Without even waiting to ask who told you about the design, Mr. Arturo immediately opens the envelope and eagerly reads its contents like a freshman on his first day of university.
你好，亲爱的阿图罗小鸟，请允许我这样称呼你。我是猫头鹰老师，一只总是在关注小鸟们健康成长的老鸟。
Hello, my dearest fledgling Arturo. I hope you'll permit me to refer to you as such. I'm Professor Owl, an old bird who has been closely watching the growth and health of my fledglings.
在你看来，折纸大学或许已经到了生死存亡的关头：学生们被名为散漫的阴云笼罩，抛弃了学校的优良传统，难以肩负匹诺康尼的重任。

Perhaps from where you're standing, Paperfold University has reached a crucial juncture of life and death: Your students are shrouded in a cloud of disorganization and lack of discipline. They've abandoned the school's fine traditions and are having a difficult time shouldering the responsibilities of Penacony.
过去发生在这学校的点点滴滴，老鸟一直看在眼里。关于如今学生们面临的问题，老鸟也一直在思考，现在是时候给出一些看法了。
I've observed every little thing that has happened in this school and have given a lot of thought to the problems the students are currently facing. And now it is time I express those thoughts.
老鸟执教时见识过不少带伤飞翔的孩子。有时我会帮那些小鸟一把，但更多时候我会选择沉默，等待他们靠自己的能力飞上天空。

When I was still teaching, I witnessed many children who flew with injured wings. Sometimes I would give those fledglings a hand, but more often, I would remain silent and wait until they were able to take to the skies by their own power.
毕竟，只有在年轻时多摔跤，长大后骨头才能更加牢固。倘若害怕错误，那便告别了进步。
After all, it is only by falling over many times in our youth that our bones can become stronger in adulthood. If we become afraid of making mistakes, we would only bid farewell to progress.
承认吧，即便羽翼未丰，你树上的小鸟也终究不是雏鸟了。我们规定要去做的事，于他们而言未必是最好的选择。

You have to admit, even though their feathers aren't fully developed yet, the fledglings in your tree are all ready to take flight. What we instruct them to do may not always be the best choice for them.
作为老人，我们需要按耐住自己想要伸手的心，为孩子们提供支持而非干涉。假以时日，他们身上的*蕉燥*自会痊愈。
As the elder, we must suppress our desire to reach out and instead offer the children support without meddling. With time, they will recover from their banananxiety.
可是…我们的承诺该怎么办？为学生解惑是老师的责任啊。
But... what about our commitment? It's a teacher's responsibility to help students through difficult problems.
阿图罗先生读得如此投入，情不自禁地问出了声。而「猫头鹰老师」仿佛对他的疑问早有预料，在信的下一段给出了回答：
Mr. Arturo is so absorbed in reading that he can't help but voice his confusion out loud. As if predicting his query, "Professor Owl" provides an answer in the next passage of his letter:
前面的路，终究要让他们自己走；往后的事，要由他们自己思考。他们已经可以为自己的选择负责了。
The road ahead is meant for them to walk alone. Similarly, only they can reflect on what will happen in their future. They're ready to be responsible for their own choices.
而且，哪怕短短十年的时间都足以让世界变一番模样，我们又怎能确定自己的处世经验会同样适用于年轻人呢？
Not to mention, ten years is enough time for the world to look completely different. How can we be sure our life experiences would still apply to the youths now?
时代曾经属于我们，后来属于你们，但终将属于他们。无论多么挂念，你我也没法替他们走向下一个琥珀纪。
The era that once belonged to us eventually became yours, and now it will soon become theirs. No matter how much you worry, neither you nor I can help them find their path into the next Amber Era.
我选择将未来交付给年轻人，阿图罗小鸟，也是你做出选择的时候了。
I choose to leave the future to the youths. So, young fledgling Arturo, it's also time for you to make your own decision.
老鸟不打算教你该如何去做。作为小鸟，你应该是自由的。只是下决定之前，务必记得我们的校训——
This old bird will not tell you what choice you should make. As a fledgling, you should be free. However, before you decide, always keep our school's motto in mind...
校长的表情变得相当复杂，里面蕴含着等量的喜悦与苦涩。
The dean has a complicated expression on his face, one that seems to contain equal amounts of joy and bitterness.
小鸟…我都这把年纪了，哪里还算得上什么小鸟呢？
Young fledgling... At this age, how can I still be considered a young fledgling?
学院里的每个人都是小鸟。
Everyone in the academy can be considered young fledglings.
折纸大学还真是有一位爱操心的校长，居然还在关心着这所学校，明明都已经……
Paperfold University really does have a worrywart of a dean. He still cares so much about the school, even though he's already...
他说的对，我抓住那些学生的脚，生怕他们飞到沟里去，并把这当成是对他们的保护…或许反倒激起了不少人的叛逆心理吧。

But he's right. I've shackled the feet of the students in the name of protection, fearing that they would crash when they take flight... Perhaps this was what stirred up the rebellious attitude in so many of them.
信中的一些内容我仍持保留意见。不过校长有一点说进了我心里——时代。
Although I still have my reservations regarding some of the contents in the letter, what the dean said regarding the era got to me...
时代啊…它总在不断变化，而我已经是个老人了。很多事情我只是遵照惯例在做，并没有真的看透多少，但求无过罢了。
The times... are constantly changing, and I'm also no longer young. I've been simply following the convention and not giving much thought to things, only hoping to not make any mistakes.
即便还有些放心不下，我也确实该松松手、去歇一歇了…不然光是我这老腰就容易扛不住。
Even though I still can't help but worry, perhaps it's time that I let go of the reins and take a break... Otherwise, my poor back might not be able to take it for much longer.
Do you know who this letter is from?
这封信的主人，就是折纸大学唯一的那位「校长」吧。
This letter can only be from the only true dean of Paperfold University.
他曾是每一位筑梦师的偶像，也是我们任教人员的榜样。即使他离开了这么久，折纸大学仍为他保留着正式校长的空位。

He was once the idol of every Dreamweaver. Even now, he is still the role model of us educators. Even after such a long time has passed, the official position of dean in Paperfold University is still left empty for him.
有人说他最后在偏远的梦境安度了晚年，也有人认为他遭遇了可怕的意外…但现在来看，这些猜测都不对，他只是把「未来」交给了小鸟们，然后飞回了自己的树林。

Some people say that he ended up living out his old age peacefully in a remote dreamscape, while others believe that he had met with a terrible accident... But now it seems like none of those theories are correct. He simply left the future to the fledglings before flying back to his own forest.
Then are you still going to change the school rules?
先放一放吧。这种大事还是得等考虑清楚后再做决策。
I'll give it more thought. Such major changes have to be carefully considered before the final decision is made.
…不过，关于严肃打卡纪律的那条新规必须推进下去。现在的学生出勤率实在太低了——至少一个学期来上一堂课吧！

...However, the new rule regarding the strict enforcement of attendance taking has to be implemented. Nowadays, students barely attend any classes. They should at least turn up for one class each semester!
还有好多东西要批复…哦，是你啊。
There are still so many things waiting for me to approve... Oh, it's you.
阿图罗先生轻咳一声，换上了一副波澜不惊的面孔——其中藏着一丝难掩的尴尬。
Mr. Arturo coughs quietly and puts on a composed front, but a hint of embarrassment that he fails to hide betrays him.
人老了，有的时候就会控制不住情绪…也许是该找个接班人了？
As we get older, we sometimes fail to control our emotions... Perhaps it's about time that I look for a successor.
唉，腰又开始疼了。你说我一天到晚生这气图什么……
*sigh* My back is starting to hurt again. Tell me, of what use is this anger I feel every day...
啧…都说学校教的东西没用，我又何尝不清楚这些呢？
Tsk... People say that things taught in school are useless, but I'm well aware of that fact, too.
可是人活在世，终有一日要投入汪洋。我又没法赐他们一艘避浪的船，只能尽量让他们学会踩水，别被淹死就谢天谢地了。

Living in this world, everyone has to set sail into the vast world someday. Since I cannot offer them a boat to help them overcome the choppy waters, all I can do is to teach them how to stay afloat in hopes that they will not drown.
就算他们中有人能成功游到对岸，那也是他们自己受益，不是我——功成名就之后肯回头帮母校一把的又有几个？都不够我操心的！

Even if some of them manage to make it to the opposite shore, the one who has benefited will be them and not me... After achieving success, how many of them would even be willing to return and contribute to their alma mater? There's simply too many things I need to worry about!
唉呀呀，腰又开始疼了。你说我一天到晚生这气图什么……
*sigh*... My back is starting to hurt again. Tell me, of what use is this anger I feel every day...
真正的才华，学校根本教不出来……
True talent is not something that can be taught in schools...
唉…别说学生不学习了，就算是我，这一屋子书平时也没什么机会去翻动。想来还真是有些对不起集书的先辈。

*sigh* ...It's not only the students who don't study. Even with the collection of books in this room, I barely get a chance to flip through them. I'm starting to feel a little sorry for the predecessors who have painstakingly gathered the books.
这样的学习氛围，又怎么好潜下心来学知识呢？
With such a learning environment, how can anyone calm themselves and properly focus on learning?
倘若某天，折纸大学能诞生一位贤才，或许整个匹诺康尼都会迎来转机吧。
Perhaps someday in the future, if Paperfold University can produce a true talented genius, the situation in Penacony might take a turn for the better.
可惜，真正的才华，根本就不是从学校里教出来的……
It's such a pity that true talent is not something that can be taught in schools...
看他们饿不着肚子，我也就不担心了，哈哈！
But since I see that they're able to fend for themselves, there's nothing for me to worry about, haha!
哈，查德那小子给我发了个视频，说自己正在开拓什么「派对娱乐主播」行业，估计又是他自己造的词……
Ha, that brat Chad sent me a video saying that he's about to start a career as something called a "party and entertainment streamer." That sounds like a job title that he came up with himself...
别说，视频内容还真挺好笑。我怎么从来没想到让蛋糕吃人这么个点子呢！
But I have to say, his video is quite amusing. Why have I never come up with the idea of having a cake eat a person!?
他说只要假以时日，自己肯定能成为这个细分领域的头部主播，不负自己「折纸大学派对王」的头衔。
He says that given time, he'll definitely become the top streamer in this niche industry. That way, he'll truly live up to his title of "Paperfold University's Party King."
我倒是不指望他做到头部，能不饿肚子就行了——不过现在看来，我之前确实是有些担心过度咯，哈哈！
I don't expect him to reach the top of his field. I just want him to be able to feed himself. But now, it seems like I have indeed been worrying a little too much, haha!
I want to continue chatting with you.
Go ahead. It'll also be an opportunity for me to rest my back.
About the aftermath of Slumbernana Monkey...
你在担心那件事？放心，模因病毒一经治愈，就不会再卷土重来了。
You're still worried about that? Don't worry. Once the memetic virus has been cured, there's no way that it'll be able to return.
家族已经用反模因手段清除了那些猴子的残留痕迹。至于更具体的来龙去脉，猎犬写了一份分锅用的报告……

The Family has already employed anti-memetic measures to remove the remaining trace of those monkeys. As for the specifics, it's all written in the report the Bloodhounds have prepared with regard to this incident...
虽说是机密，不过发给身为匹诺康尼股东的你倒也不算违规。自己看看吧。
Although it's meant to be confidential, sharing it with a shareholder of Penacony isn't considered a violation of the rules. Take a look for yourself.
What is it like being the dean?
校长啊…听起来是不是像个大官？其实也没想象中那么自在。至少在折纸大学，校长能决定的东西不是很多。

The dean, huh... Although it sounds like a powerful position, it is not as unrestrained as you would imagine. At least in Paperfold University, there isn't much that the dean actually has authority over.
对上，各大家系都密切关注着折纸大学的发展，那些权贵可不是校长能得罪起的……
Above the dean, the various Lineages are closely monitoring the developments in Paperfold University. The rich and powerful are not people that the dean can offend...
对下，专业的师资总共就那么些，校长敢摆架子，教授就敢跳槽……
Beneath the dean, there are only so many professional teachers. The professors will leave if they are unhappy with anything...
更别说每天批不完的请示和拿不到的经费了，谁想谁头疼。
This is even before mentioning the endless mountain of requests waiting for my approval and the funding that always seems to be far from reach. It would give any person a major headache.
不过没办法，必须要有一位校长。要是谁有能力替我头疼，这把交椅让给他也无妨。
But there's no way around it. The position of dean is a necessary one. If anyone is capable of taking over this headache from me, I wouldn't mind handing my position over to them.
折纸大学总共有三大学院：由鸢尾花家系赞助的谐乐学院，由隐夜鸫家系赞助的筑梦学院，以及由苜蓿草家系赞助的财富学院。

There are three academies at Paperfold University: Charmony Academy sponsored by the Iris Family, Dreamweaver Academy sponsored by the Nightingale Family, and Fortune Academy sponsored by the Alfalfa Family.
筑梦学院是折纸大学最早开设的学院，也是建校之初唯一的学院，教学内容包括建筑学、城市规划、梦境内容设计等。

The first academy to be established at Paperfold University was Dreamweaver Academy. It was also the only academy when the university was founded. Subjects such as Architecture, Urban Planning, and Dreamscape Content Design are taught here.
后来苜蓿草家系投资入股，学校便加设了财富学院，教授经济学、会计学、金融信托学等知识。
Fortune Academy was added when the Alfalfa Family invested in the school as a stakeholder. Subjects such as Economics, Accountancy, and Finance and Trust Management are taught here.
可惜财富学院的课程不怎么注重德育，里面出过许多臭名昭著的星系级经济罪犯，被校友戏称为「最匹诺康尼」的学院——都进了监狱嘛。

Unfortunately, there isn't much emphasis placed on ethics in Fortune Academy's courses. As a result, many notorious galaxy-class financial criminals are alumni of the academy. This has led to it being jokingly referred to as the "most Penaconian" academy, as some of the students have actually become prisoners.
再往后，匹诺康尼成了盛会之星，谐乐学院也随之成立。它主要负责培育优秀的乐手、歌者和艺人，知更鸟小姐就是我们的名誉校友之一。

Later, Charmony Academy was established when Penacony became the Planet of Festivities. Charmony Academy is mainly responsible for nurturing talented musicians, singers, and artists. Miss Robin is one of our honorary alumni.
这三个学院的课你都可以去看看，说不定还能学到最新的「忆泡工业管线」知识，这在别的地方可学不到。

You can go check out the classes for all three academies. Perhaps you might even learn something about our newest subject, Industrial Pipeline of Memory Bubbles. This is knowledge that you'll not be able to obtain anywhere else.
好，那你多保重…诶哟，我这老腰。
I want to continue chatting with you.
Go ahead. It'll also be an opportunity for me to rest my back.
What is it like being the dean?
校长啊…听起来是不是像个大官？其实也没想象中那么自在。至少在折纸大学，校长能决定的东西不是很多。

The dean, huh... Although it sounds like a powerful position, it is not as unrestrained as you would imagine. At least in Paperfold University, there isn't much that the dean actually has authority over.

Above the dean, the various Lineages are closely monitoring the developments in Paperfold University. The rich and powerful are not people that the dean can offend...
对下，专业的师资总共就那么些，校长敢摆架子，教授就敢跳槽……
Beneath the dean, there are only so many professional teachers. The professors will leave if they are unhappy with anything...
更别说每天批不完的请示和拿不到的经费了，谁想谁头疼。
This is even before mentioning the endless mountain of requests waiting for my approval and the funding that always seems to be far from reach. It would give any person a major headache.
不过没办法，必须要有一位校长。要是谁有能力替我头疼，这把交椅让给他也无妨。
But there's no way around it. The position of dean is a necessary one. If anyone is capable of taking over this headache from me, I wouldn't mind handing my position over to them.
