This has led to it being jokingly referred to as the "most Penaconian" academy, as some of the students have actually become prisoners.
再往后，匹诺康尼成了盛会之星，谐乐学院也随之成立。它主要负责培育优秀的乐手、歌者和艺人，知更鸟小姐就是我们的名誉校友之一。

Later, Charmony Academy was established when Penacony became the Planet of Festivities. Charmony Academy is mainly responsible for nurturing talented musicians, singers, and artists. Miss Robin is one of our honorary alumni.
这三个学院的课你都可以去看看，说不定还能学到最新的「忆泡工业管线」知识，这在别的地方可学不到。

You can go check out the classes for all three academies. Perhaps you might even learn something about our newest subject, Industrial Pipeline of Memory Bubbles. This is knowledge that you'll not be able to obtain anywhere else.
好，那你多保重…诶哟，我这老腰。
平平无奇的垃圾桶，上面结了很厚的霜。
A trashcan covered in thick frost, not remarkable in any way.
你本想打开它一看究竟，但盖子冻得很严实。
You intend to open it, but its lid is frozen shut.
你又试了试，还是没法将它打开。不难看出，你依旧对垃圾桶爱得深沉。
You kept trying, but it wouldn't budge. Perhaps you are a bit too obsessed with this trashcan.
或许翻垃圾已经成了你的习惯，但有时人得学会收手。
Maybe rummaging through the trash has become a habit for you, but sometimes you've got to know when to quit.
就算再怎么坚持，你又能拿一个冻住的垃圾桶怎么办呢？
Even if you keep trying, what can you really do with a frozen trashcan?
堂堂银河球棒侠当然不会被这点问题难倒——你将那垃圾桶从厚厚的积雪中拔出，力气之大甚至震开了它顽固不化的盖子。
Of course, the almighty Galactic Baseballer would not be deterred by a mere trashcan. You yank it out of the snow with all your might, its lid popping open.
垃圾倾泻而出，泼洒在你身后的地面上。倘若垃圾有眼睛，它们看你的眼神想必是幽怨且颤栗的。
The trash spills out onto the ground behind you, and if it were sentient, it would likely glare at you with a grudge and a shudder.
你战胜了顽强的垃圾桶。作为回报，你得到了一袋…不，是好几袋垃圾。
You have triumphed over the obstinate trashcan. As a reward for your resistance, you have acquired a bag... no, several bags of trash.
没错，走吧，就此离开吧。倘若你取走了垃圾，垃圾桶又该如何实现自我价值呢？
Yeah, right, just leave the trashcan be. If you removed all the trash, how would the trashcan fulfill its self-worth?
空空如也的垃圾桶，不知是哪位好心人清理的。
An empty trashcan, cleansed by some benevolent soul.
即使在最寒冷的冬夜，人们依旧可以围着它跳舞唱歌。
Even on the coldest winter nights, people could sing and dance around it.
工作台的主人暂时离开了，他最好是。上面还摆着组装了一半的零件呢。
The owner of this workbench is temporarily absent. They better return soon, for half-assembled parts are lying strewn upon it.
这台电梯被拦着是有原因的——果不其然，它坏了。
This elevator is blocked for a reason. Just as you've suspected, it is out of order.
这么多书放在这里肯定是有原因的，比如为了解闷——或者更糟，为了取暖。
There must be a reason why so many books are placed here. They could be used to whittle away the time... or even worse, to keep this place warm.
硕大的垃圾桶，被风雪爱抚后变得异常洁净。
A huge trashcan, buffeted by the caresses of wind and snow, appears surprisingly clean.
它的盖子被冻住了，或者干脆是从内向外开的。
Its lid is either frozen shut or opened from within.
这只垃圾桶实在过于庞大，你搬不动。
This trashcan is far too huge for you to move it.
你不禁陷入深思——究竟什么样的垃圾，才配得上这一路的冰封霜冻？
You can't help but wonder: What kind of trash deserves to be brought here, all the way through the blizzard?
北方的垃圾桶，比它南方的亲戚更加守口如瓶。
A trashcan dwelling in the north, seems more "tight-lipped" than its peers in the south.
工地上最常见的容器，有时被工人们用来藏匿贵重物品。
The most common container on construction sites. These barrels are occasionally used by workers to conceal their valuables.
你不确定眼前的这批木桶是否装有秘密。就算有，难道你打算将它取走吗？
You are uncertain if these barrels contain any treasures, and even if they do, are you truly intent on snatching them?
你打开了第一个木桶。瞧，里面什么都没有。在这样忙碌且严肃的场合，谁会有闲心往木桶里藏东西呢？
You open the first barrel, and unsurprisingly, it is empty. Yeah, who would bother stashing something in a barrel during such a busy time?
你打开了第二个木桶，里面依旧什么也没有。看来这样的行为注定不会带给你任何东西。
You open the second barrel, and again, there's nothing inside. Your efforts seem destined to be fruitless.
说到底，一个人究竟要怀着怎样的信念与爱才会执着于每一件能互动的物品？
After all, how much obsession must one possess to interact with every random object they come across?
你打开了第三个木桶，终于发现了某人藏匿于此的宝物——一瓶罐装快乐水。
You open the third barrel, and your perseverance is finally rewarded. You have discovered someone's treasure: A bottle of soda.
它的主人为什么把它放在这里？真相早已无从查证。现在你就是它的主人。
Why would someone hide a bottle of soda here? The truth no longer matters now. What matters is that it is now yours.
满足吧，庆贺吧，勇者的行径终于得到了回报。
Rejoice in jubilation! The hero's efforts have finally reaped rewards!
但...你的「开拓」精神并没有平息。难不成还有其他秘密等待被发现？
However... your ardor as a Trailblazer has yet to be quenched. Who knows what other secrets await you?
你挪开提灯，把手伸向最后一个木桶。一股熟悉而陌生的味道扑面而来。
You move the lamp aside and reach for the last barrel. As you open its lid, a familiar yet strange smell assails you.
垃圾，准确的说——被冰镇过的垃圾。
It smells like... trash. More precisely, a mound of frozen trash.
居然有人把它当成了垃圾桶？真差劲。但也许这正是它吸引你的原因。
Someone used this barrel as a trashcan? How outrageous! But perhaps, this is precisely why it appeals to you.
如果要问有什么比罐装快乐水更值得快乐，那一定是冰镇过的罐装快乐水。
If there's any treasure that's even better than bottled soda, it would be iced bottled soda.
你满意地带着战利品离去，这片土地上又多了一个快乐的人。
Satisfied, you depart with your newfound loot. This world has witnessed a new merry soul.
明智的选择。收手吧，阿棒。这个世界还有其他美好等待你去体验。
A wise decision. Just let it go, batter. This world has countless other wonders for you to explore.
明智的选择。收手吧，阿棒。这个世界还有其他美好等待你去体验。
A wise decision. Just let it go, batter. This world has countless other wonders for you to explore.
明智的选择。收手吧，阿棒。这个世界还有其他美好等待你去体验。
A wise decision. Just let it go, batter. This world has countless other wonders for you to explore.
工地上最常见的容器，有时被当作箱子，有时被当作凳子。
The most common container on construction sites, these barrels are sometimes repurposed as makeshift chests or stools.
你永远也猜不到人们会把什么东西放进这些木桶里。
One could never know what people might stash away in these barrels.
这种木桶是如此常见，以至于工地上几乎每人都可以分到一个。
These barrels are so commonly seen on the construction site that almost every worker has one.
那盏灯之所以一直在这，是因为每个借灯的人都能记得把它放回原位。
This lamp remains in its current position because anyone who borrows it knows to return it to its original spot.
事物不是一成不变的——就像这些木桶不会一直空着一样。
Things are forever changing, much like how these barrels will not remain empty indefinitely.
场馆还在布置中，请您之后再来。
The venue is still being set up. Please come back later.
「星际决胜庆典」绝赞举办中。如果你也想成为以太战线大师的话，就赶快来报名参赛吧。
The Interastral Tournament Festival is on. Come and sign up for the contest if you want to become a master Aetherium Wars player.
这或许是场馆内位置最佳的观景台，所有景色尽收眼底，而且完全免费。
This observation deck is probably the best spot in the venue. Here you can get awesome views, and the best part is: It's totally free.
从这里向下望去，人就像蚂蚁一样渺小。
When you look down from here, people are as tiny as ants.
这个故事告诉我们，最好的体验不一定非要花钱才能得到。
This tale shows that the best experiences don't always have to come with a price tag.
从山巅俯瞰山脚的战斗，真能提起兴趣吗？
Can you really enjoy a battle unfolding at the foot of a mountain while standing at the summit?
在这个位置，就连观众的喝彩声都变得模糊了。
When you stand at this spot, even the cheers from the spectators become indistinct.
当你沐浴在喝彩中时，想必也有人这样远远观望着你。
As you bask in the applause, you imagine that there must be someone observing you from afar as well.
铁丝网后一片黑暗，不知隐藏着怎样的秘密。
Beyond the wires of the fence lies darkness, and who knows what secrets may be concealed there.
传说竞技场内潜伏着一头可怕的怪兽。倘若它真的存在，估计也就是玩家眼中又一只有待收服的以太灵罢了。
Legend has it that there's a fearsome beast lurking within the arena. However, if it truly exists, it's likely just another Aether Spirit to be conquered and tamed by the players.
这是机关能源中枢，可以将地髓矿化作电力，负责整个场馆的能源供应。
This mechanism energy hub transforms Geomarrow into electricity, thus providing power for the entire venue.
在玩家们尽情对战、肆意狂欢的同时，是工人的劳动在背后默默支持。
It is the tireless efforts of the staff that enable players to enjoy thrilling battles and wanton merriment.
在某场比赛开始前，一位作弊者获取了对手的终端，将其以太灵更改成了最弱的配置。
Earlier, before a certain match began, a deceitful player stole their opponent's terminal and replaced their Aether Spirits with the weakest ones possible.
自那之后，主办方就将上场通道彼此分隔，以免选手提前接触。
Ever since that incident, participants from both sides have been kept separate to prevent any unwanted contact between them.
作为旧日的武器试验场，有些废弃零件堆在这里也是很正常的。
It's not surprising to see discarded parts piled up in this abandoned weapon testing ground.
这个箱子被放在了不起眼的角落里，仿佛故意不让人发现似的。难道是为了掩饰什么？
The box has been tucked away in an obscure corner, as if someone intentionally meant to keep it out of sight. Is there anything unspeakable hidden inside?
你掀开盖子一看，里面凌乱地塞满了照片，记录着各选手比赛时的英姿。
As you open the box, you're greeted with a spread of photos showcasing the valor of various players during their matches.
大部分照片被不礼貌地打上了叉，看来拍摄者对它们并不满意，不知是因为选手还是摄影技术。
Most of the photos are crossed out, as if the photographer wasn't satisfied with them. You're not sure if it's due to the players or the quality of the photos themselves.
这个箱子被放在了不起眼的角落里。它的盖子并未合拢，似乎有人动过手脚。
The box has been tucked away in an obscure corner, and its lid has been left open as if it was tampered with.
你掀开盖子一看，里面凌乱地塞满了照片——你的照片。
As you open the box, you're greeted with a mess of photos — and they're all of you.
这些照片从各种角度拍摄了你对战时的英姿，其中甚至有许多面部特写。
These photos showcase you from various angles, and there are even a lot of close-ups of your face.
不难想象，照片的拍摄者按下快门时一定怀着十分...热烈的情感。
Obviously, the photographer must have taken these photos with... intense passion.
这个忆泡突兀地出现在这里，七彩的光华流溢其中。不知为何，你感觉它似乎和你在空间站见过的不尽相同。
This Memory Bubble suddenly appeared here, overflowing with iridescent light. You can't say why, but this one seems a little different to the others you've seen in the space station.
你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。两个熟悉的身影涌入你的脑海......
As you approach the Memory Bubble, you feel a slight chill in the air, as two familiar figures surge into your mind...
真没想到，最后的神秘玩家居然是虎克...哦，应该叫「漆黑的虎克大人」才对！难道这也在你的安排之中吗，乔瓦尼老哥？
Who could have guessed, the final mystery player was Hook... Oh, I mean Pitch-Dark Hook the Great! Was this all part of your plan, too, Giovanni?
哈哈哈，怎么可能？相比人为编排的剧目，我更喜欢看到事件自然发展出的「欢愉」结局。
Hahaha, how could it be? I much prefer the "Elation" of an ending that has come about naturally over a choreographed drama.
不过，桑博兄弟，同为「假面愚者」，你似乎从来不愿分享自己的{RUBY_B#欢愉}美学{RUBY_E#}见解…这又是为什么？
Although, brother Sampo, as a fellow Masked Fool, I feel like you have never shared your own views of {RUBY_B#Elation}aesthetics{RUBY_E#}... Why is that?
呃，让我想想怎么说比较不得罪人...这么说吧，在咱们这群人里，有那么几位不是很懂得「把握分寸」…我就不直呼其名了哈。
Hmm, let me think how to explain without offending anyone... I'll put it this way: In our group, there are some who can't "read the room"... I won't mention them by name, of course.
…我可不喜欢跟那些家伙打交道，多没劲！每个人对于「欢愉」的追求都不一样，何必费那力气把自己的审美强加给别人呢？嘿……

...I just don't like communicating with people like that, it's so dull! Everyone has their own way of pursuing Elation. Why must I waste my own energy sharing my sense of aesthetics with others? Heh...
太过重口味的玩笑会带来麻烦；这麻烦事一多，有趣的事情就...不再有趣了。你懂我意思吧？
A joke with too heavy a tone can bring trouble. As this trouble builds, what was once funny becomes... no longer fun. You understand what I mean, don't you?
哈哈哈，我理解了...话说回来，「那位」似乎正准备前往匹诺康尼。你难道不打算...？
Hahaha, I understand. Now that you say it, "that" person seems to be heading to Penacony. Are you not planning to...?
呃…要是可以的话，我宁愿这辈子都不再跟她打交道......
Hah... If I could, I would never speak to her again...
在逐渐模糊的声音中，忆泡破裂了，那光在你眼前转瞬即逝。
As the voices become faded, the Memory Bubble bursts and the light dissipates before your eyes.
也许这枚忆泡在外面太久、已经失去了活性；也许是留下这段信息的人认为你已经看完了关键部分......
Perhaps this Memory Bubble was left out for too long and has lost its vitality... Or perhaps, whoever left it here feels that you have already seen what is important...
谜团似乎越来越多，但有句箴言永远适用：跟戴面具的人打交道，一定要留个心眼。
The mysteries seem to just be piling up, but one phrase rings true: "When talking to one who wears a mask, always keep your wits about you."
这座桥梁的结构不太稳定，在修缮结束前请不要靠近。
This bridge is structurally unstable, please stay clear until repairs are complete.
奉大守护者之命，前方区域不予开放。
By the order of the Supreme Guardian, the area ahead is closed.
Maybe I should leave it alone.
好多了。虽然算不上事事顺意，但跟过去比起来，一切都在慢慢变好。
Much better. Though not everything is going smoothly, things are slowly taking a turn for the better.
唯一的麻烦是公司那帮家伙。自从上次的事结束后，这里的黑衣人越来越多，其中有些干脆住下来不走了。
The only trouble is those IPC guys. Ever since the Eternal Freeze let up, there have been more and more of those people in black around here. Some of them have simply settled in and not left!
By alien, do you mean me?
嘿哟，你可是大守护者的朋友、贝洛伯格的救星，怎么能算外人呢？
Oh no! You're a friend of the Supreme Guardian and savior of Belobog, how could I treat you as an outsider?
是公司那帮家伙。自从上次的事结束后，这里的黑衣人越来越多，其中有些干脆住下来不走了。
It's those IPC guys. Ever since the Eternal Freeze let up, there have been more and more of those people in black around here. Some of them have simply settled in and not left!
虽然大守护者说不必紧张，可毕竟那群人打的是整个星球的主意。我还是不太信任他们。
The Supreme Guardian said it was no reason to panic, but they were planning to take our whole planet! I still don't quite trust them...
If it bothers you, then fight them again!
哈哈，说得对。贝洛伯格的人民从不惧怕纷争。
Haha, quite right! The people of Belobog do not fear battle!
上次我们已经把他们的底牌逼了出来，这次看谁能笑到最后！
Last time we got them on the ropes, let's see who gets the last laugh this time!
贝洛伯格需要他们的技术。
你说得对，但这不会是他们胡作非为的理由。
You're right, but that's no excuse for them to do what they want.
我会紧盯着他们的动向。要是还一肚子坏水，就给我卷铺盖回家！
I'll keep a close eye on their movements. If I find out they're still up to no good, I'll send them packing!
我会好好监督这帮黑衣人的。
I'll keep a close eye on these people in black.
你看远处的山，居然都没有那台机器人大。
Look at those mountains in the distance, they're not even as tall as that robot!
这么大的机器人，也不知要修到什么时候去。我还有可能看见那天吗.......
I have no idea how long it will take to fix a robot that large. I wonder if I'll even get to see the day...
Please don't tell on me, Mimi.
没想到这趟班站了这么久，早知道就该吃了饭再来。
I didn't realize I'd be standing so long on this shift. I'd have eaten before I came if I knew!
就快换班了，到时候可以一起去吃。
It's almost time for the shift to change. We can go grab something together then.
好啊，我要吃酸汤夕红鱼。
Alright, I want redsunset salmon in sour soup!
Sour instead of sweet soup? Heresy!
酸汤才是全银河系统一认证的做法！不信你去问那些公司的员工！
Sour soup is the only recipe recognized across the entire cosmos! If you don't believe me, go and ask the IPC employees!
站岗的卫兵&站岗的铁卫
Guard on Sentry Duty & Silvermane Guard on Sentry Duty
在一片欢乐的气氛里，那名来自下城区的卫兵却转过身子，哽咽起来。
Among the joyous atmosphere, the guard from the Underworld suddenly turns around and chokes up.
如果不是封锁令解除了，咱们俩可没机会像这样说话。
If the lockdown had never been lifted, we'd never have had a chance to talk like this.
That's all in the past, now.
哪里有星光？怎么什么也没有啾！
Where's the starlight? Why can't I see anything, tweet?
黑漆漆的，说好的「空艇十大打卡地」呢？
It's completely dark in here! Isn't this one of the airship's ten must-see attractions?
Why are you burying your head in here?
啾啾，人家的头好痛，怎么回事？
Tweet tweet. My head's throbbing. What's going on?
啊，原来是这样啾？！搞了半天是我把头卡在椅子里了。
Tweet? So that's what happened! My head was stuck inside a chair!
难怪没看到星光…要不是你，人家的大头差点就变成了躺椅的永久装饰品啾！
No wonder I couldn't see any starlight! If it weren't for you, my big head would have become a permanent decoration on this deckchair!
再见啦，人家要去打卡啦！不过…人家会记住你的！有机会的话，一起来晒星光啾！
I'm off for some sightseeing now, but don't worry, I won't forget you! Let's go enjoy the starlight together sometime, tweet! See you around!
被你发现了啾！恭喜你，有缘人！欢迎光临「{TEXTJOIN#87}」最神奇的路边摊！
You found me, tweet! Congratulations, lucky one! Welcome to the most magical stall on {TEXTJOIN#87}!
我卖的都是我的珍～藏～，只有有缘的人才有购买资格啾！
I only sell pieces from my most precious collections here! Only those lucky enough to find this place are granted the rare chance to buy them!
How magical is "magical"? Let me see!
你不打算买的话，就别看了啾！我这里可是游客梦寐以求的宝贝！不能轻易示人的！
If you're not looking to buy, then don't bother looking, tweet! I only sell the most coveted treasures here. Not just anybody gets to see them!
豪华空艇上竟然还有路边摊…
I can't believe there are hawkers on such a luxurious airship...
神奇羽毛，限量出售啾～只卖给独具慧眼的有缘人～不识货的不要来～
Magical feathers for sale, tweet! Limited quantities available only! Exclusively for those with an eye for the finer things in life! Don't bother asking if that's not you!
我卖的是羽～毛～只有最识货——诶，我的羽毛呢？
Feathers for sale! Only for true connoisseurs of... Huh? Where are my feathers?
哎呀，这下丢人丢大发了，我忘记把我的尾羽带过来了啾～
Oh, how embarrassing! I forgot the tail feathers, tweet!
让客人白跑一趟真的很抱歉，我得回去找一下了啾！
I'm so sorry for the wasted trip, dear guest. I need to go back and find them, tweet!
啾！朋友，请离边缘远一点，风大会很危险的啾！
Tweet! Stay away from the edge, buddy! It can be pretty dangerous when it gets windy, tweet!
空艇上虽然风景美丽，但安全总是第一位的啾！
While the view from the airship is stunning, safety always takes priority, tweet!
I just wanted to see the view.
风景固然美好，但生命更宝贵啾。请退后一些，这样我也能安心啾！
The view may be stunning, but your life matters more. Please step back, so I don't have to worry, tweet!
I just wanted to see you.
你怎么这么会说话，我会不好意思的啾！
Aww, you have such a way with words. I'm gonna blush, tweet!
我在这里就是要确保大家的人身安全，以免发生意外！
My job is to ensure everyone's safety and prevent any accidents!
谢谢理解啾！我要去别的地方检查了啾！
Thanks for understanding, tweet! I'm off to patrol other areas now, tweet!
你的余光瞥见<color=#dbc291ff>天花板上好像有什么东西</color>垂了下来。
Out of the corner of your eye, you notice <color=#dbc291ff>something dangling from the ceiling</color>.
（好像有小鸟在叫，是在喊我吗？但这附近也没看到有鸟的痕迹…难道在外面？还是用<color=#dbc291ff>望远镜</color>观察一下吧。）
(It sounds like there's a bird chirping. Is it calling out to me? But I don't see any signs of a bird nearby... Could it be outside? Better use the <color=#dbc291ff>telescope</color> to check.)
啾！你好，这是小鸟特别的锻炼方式——天际倒立！
Tweet! Hello there! This is a special exercise for birds. It's called the Horizon Topsy-Turvy!
倒立可以让血液流向大脑，增强思考能力，还能锻炼平衡感呢。
Going upside down can improve blood flow to the brain, boost mental capacities, and enhance sense of balance.
Don't you get dizzy doing that?
…这个…刚开始会有一点，但久了就习惯了。
...Well, a bit at first. But I've gotten used to it over time.
But isn't it boring just staring at the ceiling?
没找到合适的角度自然看不到啾！学会倒立，世界会别有一番风味啾！
You just need the right angle, tweet! Learn to go upside down, and you'll see the world from a whole new perspective!
从这里看下去，每个人都是一颗颗忙碌的小星星！奇怪，我的视线里怎么会有这么多星星在转圈……
From this angle, everyone looks like a busy little star! Weird, why are there so many stars circling in my vision...
练腿时间结束，现在我要去练嘴了！
Now that my leg workout is done, it's time for beak exercises!
希望下次见到你时，你也能加入健身的行列，跟我一起倒立！
I hope the next time I see you, you'll join our fitness crew and try doing headstands with me!
嘿，朋友，你没看到我在这儿吗？为什么要把我的坐骑打破？你这样会影响到我的督导工作的！
Hey, friend! Didn't you see me? Why did you break my mount? That's gonna get in the way of my overseeing duties!
我在这儿守着，确保没有人插队的啾！
I'm keeping watch to make sure no one jumps the line, tweet!
我的坐骑啾，可以让我漂浮在这里…虽说这点小高度对我来说算不了什么！但是要保持长期滞空的话我的腿会受不了的。
My mount, tweet! It's what keeps me airborne here. Don't get me wrong, I can handle the height, but hovering for too long tires out my legs.
好啦，我得再找个新地方监督大家了，你在空艇上玩的话记得要排队啾！这样每个人才能有机会享受空艇的游乐设施啾！
Alright, I need to find a new spot to oversee things. Just make sure to line up when you're having fun in the airship so that everyone gets a chance to experience the recreational facilities, tweet!
啾啾，欢迎来到匹诺康尼人气最高的餐厅！请问您有订位吗，没有订位的话不可以来这儿啾？
Tweet tweet! Welcome to Penacony's most popular restaurant! Do you have a reservation? If not, I'm afraid you can't dine here, tweet.
…哈哈，开玩笑的。我不是服务员啾，我只是来随便玩玩的！
Haha, just kidding! I'm not a waitress, tweet. I'm just goofing around!
你这样开玩笑不太礼貌吧。
啾，你说得对。我只是太喜欢这里的味道了，香喷喷的菜肴味，要是能吃上两口就更好了啾！
You're right, tweet. It's just that the food smells so good here. I wish I could have a bite or two, tweet!
你这样别人还吃不吃饭了？
Aren't you in the way of the diners?
啾啾，我保证不会打扰任何人的。我只是想把餐巾摆成我的形状，不会触碰任何食物的啾。
Tweet tweet! I won't disturb anyone, I promise! I just wanted to fold the napkins into a shape that looks like me. I won't touch any of the food, tweet.
这里不需要订位的啾，你是要吃饭吗？那我还是不打扰你了，再见啾！
Anyway, you don't need a reservation to dine here. I'll stop bothering you if you're here for a meal. Bye, tweet!
等上菜的期间，可以好好欣赏我的杰作——这几张餐巾可都是我亲自折起来的，是不是很好看啾！
Take a good look at my masterpieces while you're waiting to be served. I folded these napkins myself! Aren't they nice, tweet?
干嘛把我拽出来呀，人家正听到故事发展的关键时刻呢！
Why did you pull me out? I just got to the good part of the story!
你这样会打扰到别人的。
人类应该不会介意我偷听的吧？人类好像没有这种规则啾……
Humans won't mind if I listen in, right? I don't think they have a rule against it, tweet.
我前几天就看到，有个人答应另一个人，拍着胸脯保证自己「绝对不会告诉别人」，结果转头就把同伴的秘密告诉给别人啾。
A few days ago, I saw someone swear that they would never tell their friend's secret to anyone, then immediately spilled the beans to someone else. Tweet!
啾啾，我只是悄悄地听，保证不影响他们的。啾，故事有时候就像风，随处都可捕捉啾，小鸟闻风而动是我们的天性啾！

Tweet tweet. I'm just quietly listening. They won't even know I'm here. A story is like the wind sometimes. It can rise in any corner of the world, and I'll follow it wherever it blows! That's the nature of us birds, tweet!
糟了，我怎么感觉有人在盯着我看啾？我可受不了这种目光洗礼…我先走了啾！
Oh no, I can feel someone staring at me, tweet! I hate this kind of attention. I'm outta here, tweet!
再见啾！我得赶回去把听到的八卦分享给我的同伴了！
Bye, tweet! Gotta bring the latest gossip to all my friends now!
嗨～惊喜不惊喜，意外不意外～
Surprise! Bet you didn't expect to find me!
遇到我这样的贵宾～是不是很开心～
Aren't you glad you found me?
真的吗？我不信！像我这么可爱的小鸟，怎么会不受欢迎！
Really? Lies! Why wouldn't you when I'm such a cute little birdie?
大家打开箱子只想看到钱…
I expect to see cold hard cash when I open chests...
纸钞哪里比得上本鸟，我会突然冒出来，还会啾啾叫。哼哼！
Banknotes? Hmph, I'm a far better find than paper money. I pop out for surprises, and I even tweet!
真是搞不懂你们人类，为什么总是盯着纸钞不放？这种长方形的纸片就这么迷人吗？
I don't get you humans. Why are you all always obsessing over banknotes? Are rectangular pieces of paper that attractive?
我怎么不觉得…反倒是脏兮兮的，害我羽毛都弄脏了。
Can't say I see the appeal... They're kind of filthy. They even got my feathers all gross.
我得回去梳洗一下了，希望下次能带给你真正的惊喜啾！
Gotta go preen my feathers now. I'll give you a proper surprise next time, tweet!
本船长有令：舵轮往左打，满舵全速前进，冲冲冲！
Captain's orders! Hard to port! Full speed ahead! Go, go, go!
你搞清楚谁才是船长没有？
Do you even know who's captain here?
啾啾，我心中都有个船长梦，我也可以当船长啾！
Tweet tweet. I've always dreamed of being captain. I'm totally captain material, tweet!
啾啾～舵轮转呀转～我就是新任船长～见过无数风浪～我要为大家领航～
Tweet tweet! Turn the wheel! I'm the new captain now~ Many a storm I've weathered, and safely I'll sail you all through~
If you're the captain, what does that make me?
啾！对不起，是我没注意，你才是船长啾。那我把船长这个职位还给你，我去当你的大副怎么样？啊，已经有大副了，好可惜啾……

Tweet? Oh, you're the captain! I'm sorry, I should've realized sooner, tweet. In that case, you can have the position back and I'll be your first mate? ...Aw, you already have one. That's a shame, tweet.
啾啾！我忘记去招募船员了，原来是我是光杆船长…好丢人，亏我还那么高兴……
Ah, I forgot to recruit crew members! Tweet tweet! A captain without a ship... How embarrassing. And here I was so excited...
啊呀呀呀我的脸怎么这么烫，不行了我要回去把头埋在羽毛下。
Oh no, I can feel my cheeks burning. I'm going to bury my head underneath my wings for a while.
刚才的事…还有我说的话你就当没发生过吧啾，不许跟别的小鸟讲喔！
Just pretend none of that ever happened... And don't tell the other birds!
Gotta be good and stay in queue, tweet!
所以我们到底在排什么啾？
Tweet, what are we queuing for, actually?
啾？你们不是来打卡的吗？
Tweet? You're not here to check the place out?
我只是看你们在排队才过来的……
I only came because I saw you all in queue...
是在观景啾，别急，马上到你。
We're queuing to sightsee, tweet. Don't worry, it'll be your turn soon.
I can't be the only one afraid of heights, right...?
你们站那么高，爪子不会发软吗？
Don't your claws go weak standing so high up?
为什么要跳，人家会飞啾。
Why are we jumping? We can fly, tweet.
浪漫是什么，人家不知道啾。
What's a romantic? I don't get it, tweet.
别站那么高，很危险的，快下来！
Don't go so high up, it's dangerous! Come down here!
我才不怕，站得高看得远才够爽！
I'm not scared. The view is better up here!
风那么大吹着脸不疼吗？
But it's so windy. Doesn't it make your face sting?
你懂什么，跟挠痒痒一样。
Don't be silly. It just tickles.
你隐约记得，似乎在空间站的某处见到过黑塔的手稿，但那时只有寥寥数页。
You vaguely remember seeing one of Herta's manuscripts somewhere around the space station, but back then it was only a few measly pages.
没想到转眼间，新书出版广告都挂了出来，你觉得——
Who'd have thought you'd see adverts promoting the new book in what seems like the blink of an eye. You think...
I could go get myself an autographed copy.
以你和黑塔的关系，你觉得你该去要个签名版了，这玩意绝对是抢手货，想来她不会拒绝你的——
You should be able to score an autographed copy of the book based on your connection with Herta. That'll be hot commodity, for sure. She wouldn't refuse you, would she...
但万一…黑塔真的拒绝了你，你该怎么办？大脑轻微宕机了一秒，但转念一想，只要你想要，总会有办法的，你对此深以为然。

But just in case... What would you do if Herta did indeed refuse you? Your brain shuts down for a split second, then suddenly thinks better of it — There will always be a way, so long as you want it. You're convinced of that.
好奇新书什么时候发售。
I wonder when her new book is coming out.
广告内容并未提及新书的发售时间，只用了一个含糊的「稳定更新」遮掩过去，而且摆放的地段也……
The adverts make no mention of any release date for the book, instead referring cryptically to a "stable update." And as for the location where it's placed...
「该不会没有下文了吧？」你试着揣测黑塔的作风，但很快又将这个念头从脑子里摘了出去，因为以黑塔的性格，她可能只会公开一章「作者序」就作罢了。
"Is that all she wrote?" You try guessing at Herta's style but quickly erase that idea from your mind — because Herta very well might just have published an author's preface and left it at that.
你好奇黑塔究竟是如何敷衍公司的。
You are curious about how on earth Herta manages to phone it in to the IPC.
你无所畏惧，时刻践行着「开拓」之道——你决定直接发消息问问黑塔本人。
Without a shred of fear, you always practice the way of the Trailblaze — You decide to send a message directly to Herta herself.
这会是个升降台吗？就像影视作品里常见的那样——在感应到主人靠近时，从某处升起一套合金装甲，又或者是巨大战舰的外置驾驶舱。

Is this an elevated platform? Just like in the movies and cartoons, a set of alloyed armor pops out of somewhere once the owner comes within proximity — or it might be the external cockpit of a massive warship.
亦或是个实验舱？藏匿着「繁育」的虫卵，莽撞的外来者在不经意间将危害世界的灾难释放出来……
Or is it a research pod? One holding Propagation eggs that any reckless outsiders could inadvertently unleash to imperil the entire universe...
你伸手触碰它的表面，起初，泛着微光的冰冷表面在你指尖留下冰冷的触感。
You reach out and touch its surface. At first, its cold surface leaves behind a chilly sensation on your fingers.
忽然间，它冰冷坚固的外壳消失了，你的手指失去了依靠。一股奇怪的吸力传来，你的手指连带着整个身躯，向前栽去——

But the cold shell suddenly disappears, leaving your hand without any support. Drawn by a strange force that sucks you past the threshold, your fingers and the rest of your body begin to fall forward...
你被关进了实验舱中，那股吸力仍未消失，不断抽取着舱中的空气。
You are trapped inside the research pod, and that sucking sound does not abate as it continues vacuuming the air out of the pod.
肺部的撕裂感愈演愈烈，或许在几分钟后你就会休克，永远地被封装在这里。
The tearing sensation in your lungs grows worse and worse. You may end up going into shock in a few minutes, sealing your fate here permanently.
你拼尽全力地大声求救——
You scream out for help with all of your might...
你努力喊出黑塔的名字，试图向空间站的主人求救。
You shout out Herta's name, trying to seek help from the owner of the space station.
在最后几分钟倒计时里，意识开始迟缓，脑海中却不知为何浮现出了阮•梅的样貌。
During the final moments of the countdown, your consciousness begins to fade — but somehow, Ruan Mei's visage pops into your head.
这里似乎是她的实验室？你不合时宜的困惑剥夺了所剩无几的求生欲。
This seems to be her laboratory? Your poorly-timed recollection saps whatever will to live you had remaining.
最先消失的是视觉，而后你听见一阵脚步声传来。
Your vision goes first. You then hear the sound of footsteps approaching.
是谁？是布置陷阱的凶手？还是这座空间站的主人？
Who is that? The crook who laid out these traps? Or the owner of this space station?
是黑塔，还是艾丝妲，亦或是…阮•梅？这会是意识溃散前的幻觉吗？
Is it Herta, or is it Asta, or could it be... Ruan Mei? Are these just hallucinations before you pass out?
舱门开启，人偶冰冷的手指将你从中拉了出来，新鲜的空气争先恐后地涌入鼻腔。
A hatch opens, and the cold fingers of a puppet pull you out from within. Fresh air surges into your nostrils.
为了维护星际间难能可贵的和平，你决定还是别乱摸了，以免生出什么事端来。
To maintain the precious order of intergalactic peace, you decide not to mess with this pod in case anything bad happens.
Not even a word of thanks?
那还不快去测试模拟宇宙？
Then why don't you run a few quick tests inside the Simulated Universe?
(Complain to her about the safety of the facilities)
你跟艾丝妲说啊，别找我。
Tell Asta, I don't want to know about it.
至于这个罐头…有趣，原来阮•梅在捣鼓这个——
As for this can... Interesting... So Ruan Mei has been tinkering with this...
人偶没有回应，看来黑塔还有别的事要忙，先行下线了。
The puppet gives no response. Seems like Herta is busy with other stuff and had to go offline.
极其普通的杂物箱，你不知道是哪位无聊人士把它们堆叠在一起的。堆叠的手法并不严谨，箱体看起来有些摇摇欲坠，你决定——

Ordinary boxes filled with clutter. You have no idea who was bored enough to stack them all up together like this. They aren't stacked very neatly, and seem to be on the verge of toppling over. You decide to...
Be a good person and stabilize them.
你向来心善，如果视野内的物品头顶挂着感叹号，无论大事小事，你都会仗义出手。
You've always been kind. No matter how big or small the job is, if you ever see an exclamation mark hanging over the top of something, you'll always take action.
尽管这里没有什么感叹号，连问号也没有，但你还是决定行动起来，谁让你天生一副热心肠呢。
Despite there being no exclamation marks here — nor a single question mark, either — you decide to take action. You were just born to be a kind-hearted person.
Looks kinda dangerous. Keep your distance.
君子不立危墙之下，你连连后退了几步，准备避开可能的坠物风险。
An ounce of prevention is worth a pound of cure. Taking several steps back, you get ready to dodge any falling hazards.
对了，星际和平公司有面向无名客的保险吗？你开始为自己的人身安全精打细算。
Oh yeah — wonder if the IPC pays out insurance claims for the Nameless? You start plotting out a meticulous plan for your own personal safety.
你在杂物箱附近驻足片刻，有声音从背后传来——
Pausing for a moment beside the stacked boxes, you hear a voice behind you...
一道可爱的身影出现在你身后。
A cute figure appears behind you.
说的就是你，不许搞乱我的箱子！这都是我辛辛苦苦堆出来的！
Yes, you! Don't mess with my boxes! I've been painstakingly stacking them all up!
I'm not here to mess with anything...
是吗？可能是我看错了吧。
Is that so? Perhaps I'm mistaken, then.
以你的身高，你是怎么做到的？
How do you manage that with your height?
住口，不许质疑本天才的完美之躯！
Silence. Question not the bodily perfection of this here genius!
我记得你，大个子{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，你来得正好，本天才有一项伟大的计划准备实施，正好需要你这样的大个子人才！
I remember you, tall one. You came just in time. I've got a fantastic plan to put into place, and I could use some tall talent like yourself helping out!
你可以帮我把「王座」搬过来吗？
Can you help me move the "throne"?
那是见证我荣光时刻的必需品！哇咔咔！
That's an essential item to helping others witness my glorious triumph! Mwahaha!
Uh, but I don't know you.
哇咔咔？你连本天才都不记得啦？那个…我的曾用名是…「芝士流心」！
Mwahaha? You forgot about a pure genius, like me? Well then... people used to call me... "Molten Cheese Tart"!
我不管，你是辅佐本天才的最佳人选，是你把本天才丢到这寥无人烟的地方，你得负起责任！
I don't care. You're the best choice out there for helping me because you're the one who banished me to this barren wasteland — so take some responsibility!
我的要求很简单，我想让你帮我把「王座」搬过来！放在这个顶上！
What I want is very simple: I'd like you to help me move the "throne" over! Up here, on top of this!
What exactly do you mean by the "throne"?
别急，我带你过去，你就知道是什么东西了。
Don't worry. I'll take you there, and you'll know soon enough what it is.
它将你带到了它心心念念的「王座」面前。
It brings you to the throne it adores.
不是很重，帮我搬一下吧？拜托了！
It's not very heavy. Can you please help me move it? Please!
就是这里，帮我放到顶上吧！
Here it is. Help me pop it right up the top there!
你将它的「王座」放到了杂物堆顶上。
You place the throne atop the stack of boxes.
太好了，哇咔咔，本天才可以上去了…不过……
Marvelous. Mwahaha... I can go up now... But...
...It's still a little high... I can't quite reach...
你正准备答应，但在开口前的一瞬，你忽然意识到了什么。
Just as you're about to open your mouth to respond, you come to a sudden realization.
为什么要任由这个小家伙差遣你？这是你亲手搭建的「王座」，它的归属权在你，谁坐上它——应当由你决定！
Why are you running errands for this little thing? This is the throne that you built with your own hands. It belongs to you — and whosoever may sit on it should be decided by you and you alone!
坐上王座的人是谁？你认为——
Who should sit on the throne? You decide...
Send it on up there — just for a laugh.
你亲手缔造的王座，当然该由你来坐。还有比你更合适的人选吗？
Of course, the very throne you created should be sat upon by thyself. How could there be anyone more suitable?
在芝士流心，哦不，现在应当叫它「洞悉者」了——在它的无奈中，你开始向上攀登。
Notwithstanding the exasperation of Molten Cheese Tart — no, it's the "Insighter" now — you start your upward climb.
你坐上了属于你的王座，只不过，这脆弱的空箱子不堪重负，开始摇摇晃晃。
You sit on the throne — which belongs to you — but the fragile, empty boxes cannot take the weight and they begin to shake.
杂物堆抖动了几下，王座和你都坠落大地。
The stack of boxes shudders several times, before the throne and you both fall to the ground.
你没事吧？！我都说了这玩意是为我度身定做的，你怎么不听呢。
Are you okay!? I kept telling you but you wouldn't listen — this thing was tailor-made for me.
让本天才检查检查…咔咔，你有没有摔伤哪里，没看到伤口，不过要是头晕的话记得去上面找那些科员检查！
Let me have a look with my genius eyes... Mwahaha, I can't find any injuries from the fall, but if you feel dizzy, please go and see a researcher for a check-up!
它没有责怪你，反而第一时间来关心你，这令你有点不知所措。
Instead of blaming you, its first reaction was to take care of you. This leaves you feeling a little overwhelmed.
你会后悔抢夺了它的王座吗？你脑子有些混乱，暂时想不明白，但你觉得以后要好好爱护它和它的同类。

Will you come to regret snatching the throne? Feeling a little discombobulated, you can't put your finger on it right now — but you feel as though you should take special care of this creation and others like it in the future.
你亲手缔造的王座，在你的搀扶下，你将可爱的芝士流心——哦不，现在是尊敬的洞悉者——送了上去。
With your support, approaching the throne that you created with your bare hands, you thrust up the cute Molten Cheese Tart — ah, no, it's the esteemed Insighter, now.
洞悉者坐上了它心念念的王座，高兴不已。王座有些摇晃，但你及时扶稳了它。
The Insighter sits atop the throne it adores, ecstatic. The throne shudders a little, but you manage to stabilize it in time.
在确保它不会掉下来后，你后退几步。
Once you're sure it isn't going to topple over, you take a few steps back.
尽管在现场见证了「无限荣光」的人只有你和它——严格来说只有你，但你还是忍不住发出了轻轻的笑声。

Despite you and the Insighter themselves being the only ones present to witness this moment of limitless glory — well, strictly speaking, it's just YOU — it's impossible to stop a chuckle from slipping out.
恍惚间，你觉得这种胡闹的感觉——似乎也不坏。
In a daze, you start to wonder if this kind of mischief isn't so bad after all.
一只路过的虫子挡住了你的去路，你注意到有微弱的声音从它的口器中传来——
An insect passing by blocks your path. You notice a faint sound coming out from its mandibles...
「救命呀！」会是虫子在求救吗？显然不是，这究竟是谁呢，你开始思索……
"Save me!" Is this insect asking for help? Obviously not. So, who could this be? You start to ponder deeply...
呃，我有点晕，抱歉…刚刚是你救了我吗？
Uh, I'm feeling a little dizzy. Sorry... Are you the one who just saved me?
这里只有我和你，肯定是你。
It's just you and me here. It has to be you.
呃，我不是在说你，我在那家伙胃里待久了，身上还有胃液的气味，好恶心……
Er, I didn't mean I'm sick of you. I was stuck in that bug's stomach for ages and I still reek of gastric juices. So, so gross...
Were you gobbled up by an insect?
算是吧，但不太对，因为那家伙压根没咀嚼，就直接把我吞到它肚子里了。
Pretty much. But also not quite right, because that bug didn't even bother to chew me up before swallowing me down its belly.
这个…好像是我头顶的「馅料」成分有问题，简单来说，它好像对我的身体有点过敏，没办法消化我的表皮。
Well... I think it's something to do with the stuffing ingredients on my head. Basically, the monster seems to be slightly allergic to me and so it can't digest my skin.
Dizzy... I'm so dizzy. I feel sick...
抱歉，我身上不干净，我得找个地方清理一下了，这点小礼物就送给你吧。
Sorry, I'm filthy. I need to find a place to wash up. Here's a little something for you.
(Point out the way home for it)
哇，我终于不用再流浪了！谢谢你，{F#漂亮大姐姐}{M#帅气的大哥哥}。
Wow, I won't have to keep stumbling around! Thank you, {F#lovely miss}{M#good sir}.
在你的指引下，小家伙回到了它温暖的新家。
With your guidance, the little creation made it back to its cozy new home.
所以说你的这版方案就是天方夜谭，根本无法满足需求......
That is precisely why your plan is pure nonsense, these requirements simply cannot be met...
我怎么就...喂，我们在谈论正事，闲杂人等不要添乱。
How can I... Um, we are discussing formal affairs, we do not need unnecessary interference.
等等，我认得这个人，{F#她}{M#他}、{F#她}{M#他}就是那位贝洛伯格的大救星！
Wait, I know this person, {F#Sh—She}{M#H—He} is the savior of Belobog!
这下好了！我们这儿正有些拿不定主意的东西，需要听听你的意见。
This is perfect! We've got a few things here that we just can't settle, we need your opinion.
你应该知道，如今贝洛伯格面临的最大挑战就是修复这台造物引擎——但这个项目具体该怎么推行，大家始终没能统一思想。
I'm sure you know, the biggest challenge facing Belobog right now is repairing this Engine of Creation... However, none of us can seem to agree on how to move this project forward.
现在我们各有各的方案，谁也说服不了谁。
We've all got our different plans at the moment, and none of us can convince the others.
你去过那么多地方，肯定见多识广。你的意见，我们听。
You've been to so many places, I'm sure you must be experienced and knowledgeable. We will listen to your insights.
所以，我们打算把各自的想法集中到一起，由你选出在你看来最恰当的提案——当然，你自己有什么想法也可以提。
So, we're going to put our ideas together, and you can select the plan you feel the most appropriate... Of course, if you have your own ideas, you can suggest them, too.
No one has any objections, do they?
我还有些其他事要处理。
I have other things to do.
行，反正我们几个一直在这，等什么时候你有空了再来。
Very well. We will be here, so come back when you have time.
你回来了，现在有空拿主意了吗？
You're back! Do you have time to make a decision now?
行，反正我们几个一直在这，等什么时候你有空了再来。
Very well. We will be here, so come back when you have time.
那么，第一个议题：造物引擎的双臂应该安装什么？
Alright, the first agenda item: What should the Engine of Creation have installed on its arms?
这种机械臂拥有和人类相同的五根手指，可以持握各种装备，是最能适应复杂工作的结构。
If a robot like this has five fingers like a human, it can hold various kinds of equipment which will allow it to be a suitable apparatus for complex tasks.
但是五指能怎么操作，难道只靠一根控制杆吗？驾驶员会头疼的。
But how will the five fingers be operated? Surely not with a single joystick? The driver will end up going insane!
别忘了，「公司」说过会与我们分享技术。他们的机兵肯定早就解决了这个问题。
Don't forget that the IPC said that they will share their technology with us. Their automatons must have solved this issue a long time ago.
明智的选择。之后我会去和「公司」的外派员工请教。
A wise decision! I will go to an IPC worker and ask them for advice.
哼，希望「公司」真能有这么好心。
Humph, let's hope the IPC is feeling generous.
An arm with a clawed hand.
这种手臂由上下两部分组成，就像一个巨大的钳子。它只能从事简单的抓取工作，无法适应复杂环境。
This kind of hand would consist of an upper and lower part, like a giant pincer. It would only be able to complete simple acts like grabbing and lifting, it would not be suited for intricate tasks.
但它不用看完砖一样厚的说明书，知道怎么按按钮就可以操作。
However, you wouldn't have to read an encyclopedia-sized instruction manual to know what buttons to press to control whatever.
在未来的重建工作中，造物引擎的规模和数量是最重要的。有了它，驾驶员的培训压力会低很多。
In future reconstruction work, the number and scale of the Engines of Creation will be of utmost importance. With this design, the pressure on training the operators will be greatly relieved.
很好，这下驾驶员的招聘标准可以放宽些了。
Very good. Now we can relax the recruitment criteria for operators slightly.
Why would you need a machine gun for tree-felling?
不用枪，难不成一棵树一棵树去锯？
You think sawing them down one-by-one is better than just using a gun?
这种机枪既是武器又是工具，一轮扫射下去，整片森林都会变成木材——重建工作肯定需要木材。
A machine gun like this is both a weapon and a tool. With one spray of this gun, an entire forest becomes timber... Reconstruction naturally needs timber.
可是贝洛伯格哪来的树？
And where will Belobog be getting these trees from?
...There will be trees here in the future.
你看你看，{NICKNAME}也同意了。我早就说过这个方案是可行的。造物引擎很快就要脱胎换骨了！
Look, look! {NICKNAME} agrees! I knew my plan could work! The Engine of Creation is about to become a whole new version of itself!
这是一种螺旋状的金属钻头，可以开采地表下的地髓或其他矿石，也可以用于挖掘隧道、打通山峰。
This is a spiral-shaped metal drill bit, it can be used to collect underground Geomarrow and other ores, as well as dig tunnels to allow for passage through the mountains.
没错~有了它，我们就能建立更多矿场和铁路，把星球各处的资源全部握到手里。
That's right! With this, we can create more mines and railways, bringing all this planet's resources straight into our hands.
之后不管是卖给「公司」还是拿来自用，都会比现在富裕多了。
Whether we end up selling them to the IPC or using them ourselves, we will end up far richer than we are now!
但资源终有采空的一天，不是吗？
But there will come a day when our resources are exhausted, will there not?
那都是不知多久以后的事了，还是先操心当下吧。
That's a problem for who knows when! We should worry about the present for now.
玩转星际的无名客果然有眼光。
I knew you'd have good taste, nameless wanderer of the universe.
我听说在旧世界，人们会把花瓣装进加压容器里，在举办庆典时引爆。
I heard that in the Old World, people would place flower petals into a pressurized vessel and blow them up at festivals.
然后五颜六色的碎屑会漫天飞舞，就像雨雪或繁星。
Then, multicolored debris would dance up into the sky, like snow or stars.
是吗？它能用来干什么呢？
You think? What could that be used for?
当然是在庆祝时增添气氛啦，为什么造物引擎就不能拿来做娱乐工具呢？现在这个时候，希望才是人们最需要的东西。
To liven up the party at a celebration, of course! Why can't the Engine of Creation be a tool for recreation and fun? In times like this, hope is the most important thing to us all.
开拓者的眼界果然与众不同——不如我们这就准备去办个庆典吧。
I knew you saw things differently, Trailblazer. Let's prepare a celebration!
别急，方案还没讨论完呢。
Hold on, we haven't finished discussing the plans.
我们来看下一个议题：造物引擎的下身应该安装什么？
Let's look at the next item on the agenda: What should the Engine of Creation have installed on its lower body?
古老且传统的设计，不仅越野性能强大，而且还能够降低机体重心、避免因出力导致的侧翻和后仰。
An old and traditional design that not only allows it to perform well off-road, it can also lower the body's center of gravity to prevent rollover and backwards lean when using power.
考虑到造物引擎可能承担的重型劳动，我认为这个方案是最为合适的。
Considering the heavy labor that the Engine of Creation will likely be taking on, I believe that this plan is most suitable.
这方面大家倒是没什么异议。
We actually have no objections to this idea.
考虑到之前造物引擎就是使用双腿行走，我们还是按照原本的样子修复它更好些。
Considering that the Engine of Creation once walked on two legs, I think we should recreate it according to the original design.
其他方案都会耗费额外成本，而且可能会出现意想不到的问题。
Other plans will cost extra expenses and may even lead to unforeseen problems.
保守的选择，但确实不容易出错。
A safe choice, but it is indeed unlikely to cause problems.
我认为传统的移动手段存在一个致命问题：它们无法应对高山和峡谷。
I believe there is a fatal flaw in traditional methods of movement: They cannot overcome mountains and valleys.
这颗星球上最不缺的就是极端地形。一旦遇到常规手段无法翻越的区域，造物引擎就会寸步难行。

One thing that this planet has in excess is extreme terrain. As soon as it reaches an area that traditional methods of traversal are insufficient, the Engine of Creation will be stopped in its tracks.
所以我打算直接让造物引擎飞起来——别说不可能实现，「公司」肯定有这种技术！只要他们提供帮助，一切问题都可以解决。
So, I plan to let the Engine of Creation take to the sky! Don't tell me it cannot be done, the IPC definitely has this technology! As long as they are willing to help, any problem can be solved!
很好，等一切结束后，我们的征途就会是星辰蓝天。
Wonderful! When this is all over, our road ahead will lead straight to the stars!
最好别把目光放那么远，不然你会受不了现在的生活。
It's best not to crave the future so deeply, or you will only suffer the present.
呃，其实这方面我没什么特别的想法，就是觉得四足看起来像迷你机兵...多可爱呀。
Uhh, I actually don't have any real thoughts about this, I just thought they would look like mini automatons with four legs... How cute would that be?
Wow, you... you agree with me?
看来「造物机兵」这名字也不错。
Looks like the "Automaton of Creation" would make a pretty fitting name.
这...我们星球全是陆地啊，您为什么提出这个方案？
That's... Our entire planet is land, why would you suggest that?
冰雪开化之后，雅利洛-Ⅵ可能确实会成为一个海洋星球。
Once the ice and snow melts, Jarilo-VI could become an oceanic world.
我在星球仪上看到过，在过去的某个时候，这颗星球上的确是有海的。我们的祖先曾经乘船环游世界，不知什么时候轮到咱们。

I saw this on the armillary sphere before, this planet did indeed have oceans at one point in the past. Our ancestors once traveled the world on ships, I wonder when it will be our turn to do the same.
哇哦，这么说{NICKNAME}已经开始考虑几百年后的事了...这就是远见吗？！
Wow, you mean that you've already begun considering life hundreds of years in the future, {NICKNAME}... are you really that forward-thinking!?
怎么你们从来没夸过我有远见？！
Why do you never praise me for being forward-thinking!?
的确，我们不能只着眼当下，完全不考虑未来。
Indeed, we cannot be blinded by the present and not consider the future at all.
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}，你让我找回了造物之柱工程的初心。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}, you've made me regain my initial hopes for the Pillars of Creation project.
接下来的议题是...造物引擎的背上应该安装哪种辅助配件？
The next item on the agenda is... What kind of auxiliary equipment should the Engines of Creation have installed on their backs?
到那时候，机兵就不再需要武器了。它们会参与更多劳动，以工人而非战士的身份与我们共存。
When that time comes, automatons will no longer need weapons. They will join in with labor and live alongside us as not warriors, but workers.
假如造物引擎可以承担机兵的装配工作，我们就能把它当作一个移动基地，随时为矿场和其他生产设施提供支持。
If the Engines of Creation were able to take on the work of automaton assembly, we could use them as mobile bases that could provide support to mines or other production facilities at any time.
可是要让造物引擎自己生产机兵的话，会带来很多额外开销吧......
But if we will have Engines of Creation creating automatons by themselves, that will bring a lot of extra expenses, surely...
嗯...这样的话，我得联系矿场那边多备些矿石了。
Hmm... if that's the case, I'll have to contact the mines and have them prepare more ore.
这钱花得也算值，不是吗？
The money will be worth it though, don't you think?
考虑到未来我们可能需要修缮更多的造物引擎…我认为这第一台成品应该起到一点带头作用。
Thinking of the future, we will likely need to repair more Engines of Creation in the future... I believe that the first finished product should serve as the vanguard in this.
如果装上高出力的塔吊，它就能协助我们修复其他机体，凑出一支由造物引擎组成的「筑城队」。
If we equip a powerful tower crane, it will be able to assist us with repairing other machines and form a "fortification team" made up of Engines of Creation.
而且，贝洛伯格不该是我们唯一的家园。等到星球环境恢复后，我们有必要建造其他的城市，届时一台安装了塔吊的造物引擎肯定会帮上大忙。

What's more, Belobog cannot be our only home. Once the planet's environment has recovered, we will need to create other cities. When that time comes, an Engine of Creation equipped with a tower crane is sure to be a huge help.
遍布星球各地的同胞...真想亲眼看见那一天啊。
Our kin-folk spread across an entire planet... I long to see such a day with my own eyes.
杰作，我只能这样评价。还有什么比一面覆盖了整台机器的护盾更令人安心呢？
It can only be described as a masterpiece. What could bring us more relief than a shield that completely covers the entire machine?
这项技术已经在机兵「甲虫」身上得到了验证。我们只需要把它放大，然后装在造物引擎的背上就好了。
This technology has already been tested on the automaton "Beetles." We just need to enlarge it and equip it to the back of the Engines of Creation.
为什么我们会需要一面巨大的护盾？
Why would they need a giant shield?
问得好——因为球外势力的威胁已经大到不能忽视了。
A good question! Because the extraterrestrial threats to our planet are already too great to be ignored.
这次是「公司」，下次又会是什么？哪怕没法反击，我们也要有自保的能力才行。
For now, it's the IPC, but what will it be next time? Even if we cannot fight back, we must be able to protect ourselves.
完美，还有什么比一座移动要塞更酷炫的吗？！
Perfect! What could be cooler than a moving fortress!?
等你给这座「要塞」补充能量时就笑不出来了。
You won't be laughing when you have to charge this "fortress."
准确的说，是圆盘犁、播种机和喷水壶的三合一装置。
To be more precise, a three-part combination of a disk plow, a planter, and a watering system.
想获利，先种地。等到环境恢复之后，外面肯定有大块的土地等待我们耕作。
If you want to reap rewards, you must first plant seeds. When the environment recovers, there is sure to be a large amount of land out there, waiting for us to cultivate.
只要有了这一系列设备，造物引擎就能不断开辟疆域、拓展边界，它们脚下的大地皆是贝洛伯格的沃土。
If we have this set of equipment, the Engines of Creation will be able to keep opening up new territory and expanding our borders. Every bit of earth they tread upon will become a part of Belobog.
终有一日，贝洛伯格将不再是一座孤独之城。
One day, Belobog will no longer be a lonely city.
我知道这个！在过去，人们会用这种灯来给舞会照明，甚至做出美妙的色彩变化。
I know this one! In the past, people would use them to illuminate parties. They even change color beautifully!
舞会嘛...民众的娱乐需求的确重要，但我们真有场地需要这么大的灯来照亮？
Parties, huh... Though the recreational needs of the people are important, do we really have a venue that would require a giant light like that?
我们可以向公司或其他天外来客出租。最近我在手机上刷到一个概念叫...巡演！对，这种东西一听就很有搞头。

We can rent it out to the IPC and other extraterrestrial guests! I recently came across a new concept on my phone, it's called going on... going on tour! Doesn't hearing something like that just make your ears perk up?
与星际接轨是好事，只是...我们这些老家伙估计难免落伍啊。
Connecting with the universe is a great thing, it's just... It's hard for us old folks to not feel behind the times.
这么说，你没参加过舞会？
Are you saying, you've never been to a party before?
当时只顾着读书...咳，这些闲话日后再说吧。
When I was young, all my efforts went on studying... Ahem. We can save this idle chit-chat for another time.
接下来是最后一个议题：动力核心的燃料应该采用哪种能源？
Next, we have our final item: What fuel source should be used for the power cores?
说实话，这门技术我们讨论的不多，目前只有两种方案。如果你有什么更好的见解，尽管说吧。
To be frank, we have not spoken a great deal about this technology and only have two plans. If you have any better ideas, please do say.
对于造物引擎这样庞大的机器来说，强劲的动力是最重要的。液化提纯后的地髓蕴含着极大的能量，足以在短时间内满足造物引擎的高功率消耗。

For a giant machine like the Engine of Creation, power is absolutely crucial. Geomarrow that has been purified and liquidized contains a great amount of energy that can meet the high power consumption of the Engine of Creation over a short time.
这种能源必须经由多道程序加工，可能会花不少功夫...好在需求的量级不大。
An energy source like this has to undergo various stages of refining and will take a lot of effort... Fortunately, the volume required will not be as great.
如果公司愿意帮忙的话，或许很快就可以凑齐。
If the IPC is willing to help, we may be able to prepare it in no time.
对于造物引擎这样庞大的机器来说，持久的动力是最重要的。地髓结晶可以维持极长时间的燃烧，从而为造物引擎提供源源不断的能量——就是需求的量级可能有点大...

For a giant machine like the Engine of Creation, having power that lasts is crucial. Geomarrow crystals can sustain combustion for a long time, allowing them to provide endless energy to the Engine of Creation. The only problem is that the quantity needed will be considerable...
这种地髓矿不需要精细加工，应该可以很快凑齐。
This kind of Geomarrow ore does not require intricate refining processes. We should be able to gather it in no time.
的确，这让我们完工的速度又快了一些。
Indeed, this will reduce our time till completion even further.
那是什么？听起来不像能用来给造物引擎供能的样子。
What's that? Doesn't sound like something that could power an Engine of Creation.
Love... is a source of energy?
不要小看这个提案。我听过一个说法：爱是宇宙中最强大的力量，能超越时间和空间......
Don't underestimate this suggestion. I've heard a saying before: "Love is the greatest power in the universe. It can transcend time and space..."
说不定，它其实是源自某位「星神」的力量。
Perhaps it is a power that comes from a certain Aeon.
用最强大的力量来为造物引擎提供动力...听起来很合理。
Using the most powerful source of energy to power the Engine of Creation... That sounds logical.
不过，我们要怎么利用这种力量呢......
Although, how are we supposed to harness this energy...?
之后去找大守护者问问吧......
Let's go and ask the Supreme Guardian later...
好，关于造物引擎的所有议题都结束了，我们总算得出了一份方案。
Alright, discussions on all the Engine of Creation proposals are complete, and we have finally found a plan.
不过...因为这项工程很大程度上要倚仗「公司」，我们四个是没有权力做决策的。
Although... this project will rely heavily on the IPC, so the four of us will have no right to make the final decisions.
之后我会把它转交给托帕总监，今天的讨论多谢你主持大局了。
I will hand these over to Director Topaz. Thank you for overseeing the discussion today.
可惜工地上没什么值钱的东西，就先收下这些吧。
It's a shame we have nothing of value on the site. Take these as our thanks.
几个木箱子凌乱地摆在这儿，里面不知装有什么宝贝。
A few wooden boxes are piled carelessly on the floor. Who knows what treasures they hold.
你掀开箱盖，成堆的零件和钢板映入眼帘。
You open the crate to find a pile of parts and steel plates.
...比起宝贝，它看起来更像施工剩下的废料。
...Looks more like construction scrap than treasure.
哟，没想到有心人不止我一个。
Oh! I see it is not just me that cares for these things.
一个男人悄悄走到你身边。
A man quietly walks up to your side.
这些工地上的废料，过不了多久就要被统一销毁。真是浪费！
Scrap like this from construction sites will just end up being destroyed. It's such a waste!
如果造物工程一直这样大手大脚，过不了几年就揭不开锅了。
If they continue to be so wasteful with this project, it won't be long before they bust!
除了这些，工地上还有其他三处木箱。只要你把里面的东西都带给我，我就可以付你报酬。
There are three other areas with crates on this site. If you can bring the items inside to me, I will reward you.
为什么你会想要这些废料？
Why would you want scrap like this?
...一个人的垃圾，另一个人的财宝——多简单的道理。
...One man's trash is another's treasure. Everyone knows that.
哪怕是从造物引擎身上掉下来的废铁，至少也具备文化价值。比起白白扔掉，拿去做成纪念品不是更好？

Even if it's just scrap metal that's fallen from the body of the Engine of Creation, it still has cultural value! Don't you think it would be better to use them as souvenirs than cast them out as scrap?
等你拿完东西后，就去桥对岸的设备旁找我。眼睛放亮点，别被人跟踪了。
When you're done collecting them, come and find me by the equipment on the other side of the bridge. Keep your eyes peeled and make sure you're not followed.
几个木箱子凌乱地摆在这儿，看来它就是第二处废料点。
A few wooden boxes are piled carelessly on the floor. Looks like this is the second scrap point.
你掀开箱盖，里面是随手堆放的信号灯和金属外壳。
You open the crate to find a messy pile of signal lights and metal casings.
几个木箱子凌乱地摆在这儿，看来它就是第三处废料点。
A few wooden boxes are piled carelessly on the floor. Looks like this is the third scrap point.
你掀开箱盖，里面是零散的铁脚手架和螺丝。
You open the crate to find scattered iron scaffolds and screws.
造物之柱工程的材料量果然庞大，连这种废品都装了几箱子。
The number of materials needed for the Pillars of Creation project really is immense. Even scrap like this takes up multiple boxes.
几个木箱子凌乱地摆在这儿，看来它就是最后一处废料点。
A few wooden boxes are piled carelessly on the floor. Looks like this is the last scrap point.
你掀开箱盖，里面是略有锈迹的轴承和钢条。
You open the crate to find slightly rusted bearings and steel bars.
虽然成色不够好，但也不是不能用——本杰明应该会为它们找到新去处。
Their quality may be a little off, but they're not unusable! I'm sure Benjamin will find a new use for them.
Well, did you bring me the items?
好啊~好啊~真是辛苦你了。我就知道大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}不会让人失望。
Great, great! Oh thank you! I just knew that the great and celebrated {NICKNAME} wouldn't let me down!
你打算怎么处理这些东西？
What are you planning to do with these items?
我看了「公司」出版的创业书，发现任何人其实都有追梦的权利。
I read the book on entrepreneurship that the IPC published. It says that everyone has a right to chase their dreams!
我小的时候家里穷，父母没钱给我买玩具。长大以后，我就梦想着当个玩具商，给孩子们提供物美价廉的玩具。
When I was young, my family was poor and my parents had no money to buy me toys. Since I've grown up, I've always wanted to own a toy store and supply high-quality, cheap toys to children.
所以，我打算把这批材料制成玩具机兵，换种形式为贝洛伯格添砖加瓦。现在封锁令解除了，我正好把它们给下层区的孩子送去。
So, I plan to use these materials to craft toy automatons and help Belobog in what little way I can. Now the lockdown has been lifted, I will be giving them to the children of the Underworld.
Well, did you bring me the items?
唉，还是动作快些吧。时间不等人啊......
Ahh, you should really get a move on. Time waits for no man, you know...
Ah, {NICKNAME}, have you got any new clues?
关于造物之柱的工程材料...
About the Pillars of Creation construction materials...
It was actually me that stole them.
不可能吧，你可别开这种玩笑啊。
No way. Don't make these jokes!
将本杰明委托你的事告诉了佩拉。
You told Pela what Benjamin asked you to do.
幸亏那家伙不打算把废料拿去做什么要紧事…虚惊一场。
At least that guy isn't planning to use those materials for anything crazy... It was a false alarm.
那家伙居然敢在施工队眼皮子底下做偷鸡摸狗的事，就为了赚几个小钱...我会让铁卫去处理此事。
That guy actually dared go sneaking around right under the construction team's noses, stealing items just for a few coins... I will ask the Silvermane Guards to take care of this.
安全起见，还是请你把这批废料交给我们吧。
To be on the safe side, please hand over this scrap material to us for now.
没关系，等你有线索之后再来找我吧。
No worries. Come and see me if you find any clues.
必须让他们意识到一钢一瓦来之不易——想不想赚点外快？
We need to teach them how difficult it was for these materials to come by. You want to make some cash on the side?
这是你的报酬，拿好，我们可能一段时间内都不会再见面了——厂子刚办起来的时候最忙了。
Here is your payment. Take it. We may not see each other again for a while. The factories are busiest when they are first built.
本杰明带着货物满意地离开了。
Benjamin leaves happily with his goods.
I need to think a little longer.
你不信任我，可以理解。我会给你时间好好考虑的。
You don't trust me. I can understand. I will give you time to consider.
你打算怎么处理这些废料？
What do you plan on doing with this scrap?
我们会按照公司的《环境保护守则》，把这些废料统一熔化回收，之后可能拿去做点栏杆、路灯什么的。
We will burn down and recycle this scrap in accordance with the IPC's "Environmental Protection Code." Then, they will likely be used to make things like railings and streetlamps.
多谢，我也认为这是最好的结果。
Thank you. I agree that this is the best solution.
I need some more time to think.
Very well. You have the right to decide.
啾？别乱动，我正在思考怎么改进设计呢啾~
Tweet? Don't move. I'm brainstorming how to improve the design~
这个火炉的造型真是太平庸了，当时应该加上一些装饰的啾……
The shape of this stove is too mundane. It should have been decorated a little more, tweet...
等等，或许现在这样也不错啾…但还是感觉初版方案更好看啾……
Hang on, maybe this current version is pretty good... But I still feel like the first draft was better, tweet...
算了，还是得去问问妃色夫人的意见啾！
Never mind. I still have to ask Lady Vermilion what she thinks, tweet!
啾！原来现在美梦小镇流行这种风格啾！
Tweet! So it turns out this style is popular in Dreamville, tweet!
大家的审美一天一变，作为小镇宾馆的筑梦鸟，必须要跟紧时代的节奏啾~
People's preferences with styles seem to be changing by the day. It's imperative to keep up with the pace of the times as a dreambird in a small-town hotel, tweet~
但到底什么样的设计才能永不过时啾？这就去请教妃色夫人啾！
But what kind of design would never go out of fashion? I'll go ask Lady Vermilion right now, tweet!
Tweet... I'm on my break right now, tweet~
啾？原来不是妃色夫人呀，吓死鸟了啾。
Tweet? It's not Lady Vermilion. Really spooked me, tweet.
哈欠——我得赶快回大树了，不然妃色夫人要发现咱在偷懒了啾~
Yawn — I have to get back to the big tree soon, otherwise Lady Vermilion is gonna find out I'm slacking off, tweet~
Tweet? Would you like to talk with me, dear guest?
聊聊妃色夫人？聊聊猫头鹰老师？聊聊钟表小子？聊什么都可以啾！
Shall we talk about Lady Vermilion? Professor Owl? Clockie? We can talk about anything, tweet!
等等…都这个时间了，得回大树了啾！客人有空给我打电话啾！
Hang on... Look at the time. Gotta get back to the big tree, tweet! Please give me a phone call whenever you're free, tweet!
啾？干什么啾，咱正在监视大家的工作啾~
Tweet? What are you doing, tweet — I'm supervising everyone's work, tweet~
真讨厌，大家总是在偷懒啾，这种态度怎么做好筑梦鸟，气死了啾！
So annoying. Everyone's always slacking off, tweet. How can they be good dreambirds with that kind of attitude. I'm livid, tweet!
请客人帮本鸟警告一下它们，咱要去找妃色夫人告状了啾！
Please, can you help me warn them, dear guest? I'm going to file a complaint with Lady Vermilion, tweet!
啾~你也是来欣赏本鸟的作品的啾？
Tweet~ Are you here to appreciate my work too, tweet?
当时雕刻的时候忘记加上本鸟的秀发了，真是唯一的美中不足啾。
When I was sculpting, I forgot to add my beautiful hair, which is the only fly in the ointment, tweet.
你就在这里好好欣赏本鸟的美丽身姿吧，本鸟回大树了啾~
Just appreciate my gorgeous figure. I'm going back to the big tree, tweet~
啾~客官想邀请人家共饮啾？
Tweet~ Would you like to invite me to drink with you, customer?
汽水先生的佳酿还真可口…灵感像气泡一样涌出来了啾~

Sticking to your experimental spirit as a "Trailblazer," you stretch your tongue out toward the frozen railing...
前段，甜。中段…嗯，还是甜，略涩。后段——
The first taste is sweet. The middle part... hmm, it's still sweet, but a little tart, too. And at the end —
——没有后段，因为你绵软的舌头已经与冰冷的栏杆亲密交融，不分彼此了。
— There is no end, because your tongue and the railing have already formed an intimate bond, never to be separated.
你的舌头被粘得十分牢固，栅栏本身也巍然不动。试图用蛮力脱困——想都别想，除非你已经下定决心这辈子都不再说话了，不然那绝对是自讨苦吃。

Your tongue is stuck fast, and the fence remains immovable. Don't even think about fixing this situation with brute force, unless you've already set your heart on never speaking again. That is just asking for trouble.
你被困住了。万万没想到，战胜过无数外宇宙之冰的勇猛开拓者居然会被一根结霜的栏杆击败…但不要紧，这造物之柱周围有很多熟人，总有人能救你于危难中。

You're trapped. Who could have ever thought that the brave Trailblazer that defeated countless Ice out of Space would be defeated by an icy fence... But, don't panic, there are lots of people around who know you from the Pillars of Creation project. Someone will come and save you in your time of need.
那么，你打算向谁求助呢？
So, will you call for help?
嗯？刚才是不是听见了荣誉队员的声音？
Hm? Wasn't that the honorary member's voice?
啊，荣誉队员怎么变成这个样子了？！
Ah, how did you end up like this, honorary member!?
别怕，「漆黑的虎克大人」这就救你出来！
Don't worry, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great will rescue you!
伴随着洞洞机开启的轰鸣声，你完整分离了舌头和栏杆——倘若把你换成其他人，这两者可能都要不保。
With the roar of the Diggertron, you managed to perfectly separate your tongue and the fence. If this had been anyone else, both may have been lost.
不用谢！鼹鼠党的队员就是要互相帮助！
You're welcome! We Moles members must always help each other!
I didn't say thank you yet...
你的声音在空气中徜徉，却没有得到回应。
Your voice lingers on the air, but a response never comes.
你猜这会儿她应该在下层区的某处惩奸除恶，没空搭理一个舌头黏在栏杆上的可怜开拓者。
You imagine that she must be in the Underworld punishing the wicked. She has no time to come and rescue a pitiful Trailblazer that has their tongue stuck to a fence.
Looks like you'll have to call someone else...
(Call for help from the nearby Silvermane Guard)
....您体验风土人情的方式还真是…奇特。稍等，我这就来帮您……
...Your way of experiencing the local views is certainly... unique. Wait a moment, I'll help you...
铁卫小心翼翼地帮你分离了舌头和栏杆。不难想象，今天的趣闻很快就会在部队内部传开。
The Silvermane Guard carefully works to separate your tongue from the fence. You can already imagine news of this story spreading through the ranks like wildfire.
之后有必要在这立个牌子...
We'll have to put a sign here in the future...
...*snickers*... Quite right. We will do that immediately.
You'll have to think of someone else...
请等一下，我这就去找帕金斯来帮忙。
Wait a moment. I'll get Perkins to come and help.
一台机兵从工地上赶来，帮你分离了舌头和栏杆，这一过程吸引了不少人围观喝彩......
An automaton comes rushing over from the construction site to help you separate your tongue from the pole. This whole process brought applause and admiration from a lot of onlookers...
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}还有没有哪里不舒服？
{F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, do you feel okay now?
没关系的，克拉拉也想帮上大家。
No problem. I want to help everyone, too!
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}之后也多加小心啊。我们的身体毕竟不是机器零件，要多加保护才行。
You be careful from now on, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}. Our bodies aren't made of mechanical parts. We need to protect them properly.
怎么这么不小心，让我看看...
How could you be so careless? Let me take a look...
在短暂且专业的处理后，你的舌头和栏杆分离了。但娜塔莎看向你的眼神却变得复杂起来。
After a brief and professional treatment, your tongue is separated from the fence. However, the look in Natasha's eyes has grown a little complicated.
几年前，我也为虎克他们处理过这种情况...小孩子就是喜欢胡闹。
A few years ago, I had to help Hook out of a situation like this, too... Children will always cause trouble, I guess.
后续要是还不舒服的话，就抹上这个药吧。
If you feel any pain later, use this balm.
下次小心就好。如果你再被困在哪座冰山上，我可帮不了你。
Just be careful next time. If it's a snowy mountain you end up getting stuck on, I can't help you.
Wait a minute. I'll take care of this.
玲可取出自己的热水瓶，开始帮你脱困。你的舌头从冰冷变得滚烫，直到最后才与栏杆分离。
Lynx pulls out her hot water flask and begins to help you. Your tongue goes from freezing cold to scalding hot, until it finally breaks free from the fence.
这样的事在极地经常发生，因为舌头上的水会迅速结冰，之后就牢牢粘住了。
These things happen a lot in arctic areas, because the saliva on the tongue freezes quickly and sticks tight.
下次出门记得带个暖水瓶，再遇到这种情况就有办法了。
Remember to bring warm water with you next time you go out, then you can deal with this yourself if this happens again.
...姐姐经常说，不许舔栏杆，不许舔栏杆…我倒是想问，哪个正常人会去舔啊？
...My sister often says: "Don't lick fence posts. Don't lick fence posts..." I'm more curious about why would anyone want to do that.
Think back to someone from before.
舌头上的冻感消失了，取而代之的是全身火辣辣的疼痛。「小孩子下手真是不知轻重啊」——你这样想着。
The freezing sensation on your tongue disappears, but is replaced with a burning sensation throughout your body. You think to yourself: "Kids really don't know how to hold back!"
如果娜塔莎在身边的话，她一定会建议你赶紧去找个界域定锚。
If Natasha were here, you know she'd suggest you find a Space Anchor immediately.
他忍住了笑声——你打心底里对他的矜持表示感激。
He restrains his laughter, for which you express sincere gratitude.
虽然表情依旧淡定，但她明显是在嘲讽你的幼稚行为。
Though her expression is as calm as ever, she is clearly mocking you for your childish actions.
「活该」——玲可没有再言语，但你确信自己听到了那两个字。
"Serves you right"! ...Though Lynx didn't actually say anything, you are certain you heard those words.
想靠这种小伎俩骗取阿哈的瞥视？哈！你还是太嫩了。
You wish to use such pitiful tricks to steal Aha's gaze? How naive.
这可能是好事。你又仔细想了想——史瓦罗会用何种方式帮助你解脱实在是个不可预知的谜团。
This is probably for the best. Thinking about it, the method that Svarog would use to free you is an unpredictable mystery.
为了您的安全，请勿舔舐栏杆。
For your own safety, do not lick this fence.
啾！你好，要不要握个爪啾？
Tweet! Hello, want to shake claws, tweet?
我在大树里可是鸟气很高的，想和我握爪的小鸟能排满美梦小镇啾。
I'm super popular at the Great Tree. Birdies who want to shake claws with me can fill up the entire Dreamville, tweet.
怎么了，好像很抗拒的样子——莫非你是个害羞的人啾？
What, you look put off... Are you too shy, tweet?
哼哼…看来，世上也是有能抵挡住在下魅力的人啾。
Heh-heh... Looks like there are those who can withstand my charm, tweet.
哎呀，差点忘了！折纸的爪子太小，没法握爪啾！
Doh, I almost forgot! Origami claws are too small to be shaken, tweet!
再见，矜持的朋友，就当我在心里和你握爪了啾。
Goodbye, reserved friend. We'll just say we shook claws in our hearts, tweet.
（找到所有折纸小鸟了，回「学堂」跟猫头鹰老师汇报吧...）
(I found all the Origami Birds. Time to report back to Professor Owl at the school...)
呜呜呜，为什么要把我找出来……
Boohoo, why did you find me...
我是一只没用的小鸟，连自己的巢都搭不好，只配住在垃圾袋里啾……
I'm a useless birdie that can't even build its own nest. I'm only fit to live in a trash bag, tweet...
呜呜，居然连自己的巢都守不住…我真是最最没用的小鸟了啾……
Boohoo, I couldn't even defend my own nest... I'm really the most useless birdie alive, tweet...
我知道自己是只无能的小鸟…但还是谢谢你的安慰啾。
I know I'm an inept bird... but I appreciate your comforting me, tweet.
再见，陌生人…这个垃圾袋就让给你了啾。
Goodbye, stranger... I'll give you this trash bag, tweet.
嘿！有没有被我的超级无敌霹雳闪光晃到眼睛啾？
Hey! Did I blind you with my super awesome radiance spark, tweet?
小鸟的羽毛能不能让灯光变得更亮，我正在研究这个问题啾。
Can a bird's feathers make light brighter? I'm researching this problem right now, tweet.
能感受到光线有什么不同吗？啾？
You feel the difference in the light? Tweet?
这样啊，我下次换一种类型的灯泡再试试啾。
I see. I'll switch up the lightbulb and try again next time, tweet.
It was darker after you left.
哼哼，我和那些只会搭巢的小鸟可不一样啾。
Heh-heh, I'm different from those birdies that only know how to build nests, tweet.
再见，朋友，总有一天，我会让清醒村从黑漆漆变成亮堂堂的啾！
Goodbye, friend. One day, I'll turn Rouseville's pitch-black darkness into a light show, tweet!
年轻的勇者，你终于来了啾。
You've finally come, young warrior, tweet.
看到这张地图了吗？本贤者为你标记出了宝藏的所在啾。
See this map? I've marked the location of a treasure for you, tweet.
猜猜你会在上面看到什么？两座巨大的——好险，差点就剧透了啾。
Guess what you can see on it? Two giant... That was close, I almost gave the answer away, tweet.
我的台词已经说完了，勇者，祝你好运啾。
I'm done with my lines. Good luck, warrior, tweet.
Boo! Did that scare you, tweet?
所有的小鸟都被超大的钟表小子吃掉了，猜猜为什么我还在啾？
All the birdies were eaten by the gigantic Clockie. Guess why I'm still here, tweet?
卟卟，猜错了啾，因为钟表小子不吃小鸟，我是骗你的啾。
Boo, wrong guess, tweet. It's because Clockie doesn't eat birds. I was just pulling your leg, tweet.
你的表现可真好玩，再见，下次还来逗你啾。
Your reaction was really fun. Goodbye, I'll come back next time to make you laugh, tweet.
你好啾，路过的朋友，能否解答我的一个疑问？
Hello, tweet. Passing friend, can you solve a riddle of mine?
为何音符能和钟表成为朋友，鸟儿却不能爱上一只猫？
Why can notes and clocks become friends, but birds can't fall in love with a cat?
Cats and birds are natural enemies.
连你也这么说，多么残酷的因果啾。
Even you say that... What a cruel karma, tweet.
哎，像你这样的普通人，怎会理解小鸟的爱恋啾。
*sigh* How would an ordinary person like you understand the love of birds, tweet.
猫啊，你为什么是猫呢？如果你是一只折纸小鸟该多好……
O cat, cat, wherefore art thou a cat? It'd be much better if you were an origami bird...
啾啾…永别了，我深爱的小猫，愿我离去后，你再也不会哭泣……
Tweet tweet... Farewell forever, my feline love. I hope you'll never cry once I leave...
哇！是新的客人，去下个站的话，要到我这儿买票啾。
Woah! A new guest. You need to get tickets from me if you're getting to the next stop, tweet.
让我看看，售票装置售票装置……
Let's see, ticketing device, where's my ticketing device...
You can pretend not to have seen anything.
那我在这里卖票，岂不是毫无意义啾？
Wouldn't it be pointless for me to sell tickets here, then, tweet?
I've already been there a couple times.
呜呜呜，我真是只不称职的小鸟啾。
*sniffle* I'm a truly incompetent birdie, tweet.
但转过来想，把小鸟的青春浪费在这种地方，实在是不值啾。
But on second thought, wasting a birdie's youth on this place simply isn't worth it, tweet.
我记得站牌先生那里还有票，你去问问它好了——折纸小鸟，堂堂下班！现在就溜回大树睡懒觉啾！
I remember Mr. Signpost has a ticket. You best ask them. Origami bird, punching out! Time to slip back to the Great Tree and take a nap!
唔，桑拿时间结束了吗？啾啾？
Oh, is sauna time over? Tweet tweet?
热腾腾的水蒸汽，就连羽毛也痛快得舒展起来了啾。
Even feathers will be loosened up by the hot steam, tweet.
不过，总感觉身子有点软趴趴的…啾……
But, I feel my body going woozy... Tweet...
Can paper even be soaked in saunas?
折纸小鸟又不是真的纸，怎么会打湿呢…应该不会吧？啾？
Origami birds aren't made from actual paper, why would we get wet... Or would we? Tweet?
我、我现在就去找湛蓝爵士问问啾！
I... I'm going to look for Dr. Blues right now for answers, tweet!
啾！你是怎么识破我天衣无缝的伪装的？
Tweet! How did you see through my impeccable disguise?
为了赢过其他小鸟，我甚至特地找了个有头发的气球啾。
I even got a balloon with a wig to beat the other birdies, tweet.
啾～这已经是最接近的颜色了。
Tweet! This was the most similar shade they had.
咕，没想到自己居然输得这么简单。
Coo, I didn't think I'd lose so easily.
再见，我要回去看看，自己是不是最后一个被找到的啾。
Goodbye, I'm going to return and see if I'm the last birdie found, tweet.
恭喜，你是第一个发现本鸟作品的人啾！
Congrats, you're the first one who's discovered my work, tweet!
本鸟亲自上阵，给猫猫添上的三根头发，是不是很漂亮啾？
I personally went ahead and added three strands of hair to the cat. Beautiful, isn't it, tweet?
怎么会…这可是我最满意的设计，原本打算给美梦小镇的每只猫都来一个的啾。
How so... I'm most pleased with this design. I was going to do every cat in Dreamville initially, tweet.
肯定是你不懂本鸟的艺术，我这就回去找其他小鸟评评理啾！
You must not understand my artistic flair. I'm going back to get the opinion of other birdies, tweet!
啾，钟表小子，你终于回来——什么呀，是个不认识的新面孔，害我白高兴一场啾。
Tweet, Clockie, you're finally back... Huh? An unfamiliar face. You got me all enthused for nothing, tweet.
那家伙，说着要带小镇上的朋友们一起去冒险，结果自己居然迟到了啾。
That guy said he was going to take all the town's friends along for an adventure, and yet he's running late, tweet.
看到那个老爷爷了吗？总感觉他的身上有股熟悉的味道啾。
See that old man over there? There's some familiar smell about him, tweet.
钟表小子说，他的朋友会开来一辆很大很大的车，能把美梦小镇的大家全都装进去，我猜呀，这个老爷爷肯定就是那位列车长啾。
Clockie said his friend would be driving a huge car here that fits everyone in Dreamville. My guess is this old man is that conductor, tweet.
糟了！突然想起来，我还有行李没有带，希望现在飞回大树还来得及啾！
Oh no! I suddenly remembered that I left some luggage at home. I hope it's not too late to fly back to the Great Tree, tweet!
你不懂，猫头鹰老师教育我们，事事都要尽力而为啾。
You won't understand — Professor Owl taught us to put in our utmost effort at everything, tweet.
不过垃圾桶待久了是有点味儿，回大树以后老被湛蓝爵士念叨啾。
But I do smell a bit after spending too much time in the trashcan. I was reprimanded by Dr. Blues when I went back to the Great Tree, tweet.
我要找一个比垃圾桶更好的藏身点，成为捉迷藏之王啾。
I'm going to look for a hiding spot that's better than a trashcan, and become the champion of Hide-and-Seek, tweet.
啾，朋友，你认识这个奶奶吗？
Tweet, you know this granny, friend?
她望着前面，一会儿笑嘻嘻，一会儿哭唧唧的，好吓鸟啾。
She's just staring ahead, laughing one moment, then weeping the next. Scary, tweet.
心里有坏东西憋着可不好啾，会飞不起来的。
It's not good to keep negative thoughts in. You won't be able to fly.
如果想念一个人，为什么不直接面对面说话啾？
If she misses someone, why doesn't she just talk to that person face-to-face, tweet?
人类真的好难懂，要是大家天天都笑嘻嘻的就好了啾。
Humans are so hard to understand. It would be great if everyone was happy every day, tweet.
再见，我要回大树了——希望你和老奶奶也能开心，啾啾。
Goodbye, I'm returning to the Great Tree. I wish you and the granny happiness too, tweet tweet.
嘿，你轻点，万一把热气球戳破了，我还怎么降落啾。
Hey, be gentle. How am I going to descend if you pop the hot-air balloon, tweet?
看看这个高度，要是我从这儿跳下去，肯定非常刺激啾。
Just look at this height. It must be thrilling to jump down from here, tweet.
Don't you know how to fly?
对哦，我怎么没有想到这点啾？
Oh right. Why didn't I think of that, tweet?
You sure this balloon can hold up?
虽然比不上翅膀，但也聊胜于无——等等，我是不是有翅膀啾？
Can't compare to wings for sure, but it's better than nothing... Hold on, do I have wings, tweet?
多谢你的提醒，朋友…一想到自己会飞，这儿好像也没那么刺激了啾。
Thank you for your reminder, my friend... Suddenly it doesn't sound so thrilling when I realize I can fly, tweet.
再见，让我们在大树再会吧——能不能让自己忘掉飞行呢啾……
Goodbye, let's meet again at the Great Tree. I wonder if I can forget how to fly, tweet...
啾！我是邪恶的海盗大统领，比石头老板还要恐怖啾。
Tweet! I'm the evil pirate captain! More menacing than Boss Stone, tweet.
我的铁皮战舰坚不可摧，就连炸弹头也没法打破它啾。
My ironhide cruiser is impenetrable. Not even Bombhead can pierce it, tweet.
Say hello to my baseball bat!
棒下留鸟，邪恶的海盗大统领向你投降啾。
Spare the bat! This evil pirate captain yields to you, tweet.
哼，看你这么尊敬本统领，就封你个海盗王当当啾。
Hmph, I see that you respect me so much, I'll bestow you the title of Pirate King, tweet.
本统领又要踏上新的征程了，愿我们来日再见啾。
Yours truly is about to embark on a new journey. May we meet again in the future, tweet.
您好！真幸运，能与您共享这片美景啾。
Hello! How fortunate to be able to share this beautiful scenery with you, tweet.
看到那两个钟表小子了吗？这可是小鸟们辛辛苦苦搭建出来的啾。
Do you see those two Clockies? That's the result of the hard work of the birdies, tweet.
真是个神气的家伙啾，也不知道他什么时候才能回来。
He's quite something, tweet. Not sure when he'll be back though.
啾，看到远处的花园了吗？这可是湛蓝爵士最得意的设计。
Hey, see the distant garden? That's Dr. Blues' best design.
就算是猫头鹰老师来了，也一定会被它震撼到的啾。
Even Professor Owl will be in awe, tweet.
啾啾，和整个美梦小镇相比，这里也只是很小的一部分呢。
Tweet tweet, compared to the whole Dreamville, this is just a small section.
是啊，每天都能看到这般美景也是鸟生幸事啾。
That's right. Being able to see this magnificent view every day is the highlight of my bird life, tweet.
再见，我要回大树了，希望这个清醒村能让您喜欢上小镇啾。
Goodbye, I have to return to the Great Tree. Hope this Rouseville will make you fall in love with the town, tweet.
Phew, you finally found me, tweet.
你要再晚点儿过来，等这广告牌掉下去，多半得摔我个头着地啾。
If you had come any later, this billboard would have fallen and made me land on my head, tweet.
怎么会有小鸟笨到捉迷藏卡在这里呢？啾～
How dumb could a birdie be to get stuck here during hide-and-seek? Tweet!
谢谢你，好心人，记得要注意，别被落下来的东西砸到头啾。
Thank you, kind soul, do be careful and don't get hit by falling objects, tweet.
嘿，新面孔，和我一起摇摆啾！
Hey, new face, boogie with me, tweet!
看着我身后的灯光，感受它闪烁的韵律，跟着节拍跳起来啾。
Look at the light behind me, immerse yourself in its pulsing tempo, and follow the beat and boogie, tweet.
I don't know how to dance.
Is the wiring faulty with this light?
真是个古板的朋友，要懂得苦中作乐啾。
What an old-fashioned friend. You must learn how to find joy in sorrow, tweet.
算了，不和你计较，我要去找一只能理解我幽默感的小鸟啾。
Forget it. I'm not gonna argue with you, I'm gonna go find a birdie that gets my humor, tweet.
不要吃我！我的身体是纸做的，吃了要拉肚子啾。
Don't eat me! I'm made of paper. You'll get a tummyache if you eat me, tweet.
呼，你别光盯着我不说话呀，说一句吧啾。

Oh? So you're a repeat offender... I will show you how severe a crime disrupting civilization truly is!
这里是「星际决胜庆典」的场馆。别说打碎容器了，哪怕踢一脚广告牌都不行！
This is the venue for the Interastral Tournament Festival. I would not allow you to even kick a billboard, let alone smash a vessel!
你的行为破坏了场馆秩序，阻碍了活动进展，也对百姓生活造成了极大的负面影响！
Your actions have destroyed the order of the venue and hindered the progress of the event, while also generating an extremely negative influence on the people's lives!
试想一下，志愿者们每天要花多大力气把这些容器搬到场馆里，又要花多少时间清理你弄出的碎屑......
Think about it. How much effort do you think it takes for the volunteers to move these vessels into the venue every day? How much time will they spend cleaning up the mess you've made...
以公司和文明的名义，我要对你做出惩罚！
In the name of civilization and the IPC, I will reprimand you!
Is it too late to apologize?
道歉？道歉有用的话，还要律师干什么？你必须为你的不文明行为付出代价！
Apologize? If apologies served a purpose, do you think we'd have lawyers? You must pay for your uncivilized actions!
要么老实交罚款，拿钱资助本地建设；要么就去关禁闭，给其他人做个反面教材。你自己选吧！
You have a choice. You will either pay a fine that will go towards local construction efforts, or you will be locked up and confined as an example of negative behavior for others to learn from.
你确定吗？这笔钱可是相当于我两个月的工资，你确定要把它就这样捐给本地？
Are you sure? This money is worth two months of my wages. Are you sure you want to donate it to the local area?
咳...其实呢，作为公司员工，我并没有开具罚单的权力......
Ahem... Well, actually, as an IPC worker, I do not actually have the right to fine you...
看在你态度诚恳的份上，这次就先放过你。不过要是下次还被我抓到，必须好好修理你一顿。
Given your sincere attitude, I will let you off this time. However, if I catch you again, I'll make sure I fix you up properly!
另外，倘若你真想为本地建设做贡献的话，不如去造物之柱看看——记得戴上安全帽。
Also, if you really want to make a contribution to the local construction effort, why don't you go and check out the Pillars of Creation? Make sure you wear a safety helmet!
我改主意了，还是打你吧。
I've changed my mind, I'll fight you.
好哇，我就知道你遵纪守法的态度是装出来的！看来今天必须得好好修理你一顿了！
Ha-ha! I knew that law-abiding attitude of yours was all fake! Looks like I'll have to teach you a real good lesson today!
This is robbery. I'm not paying!
好言相劝你不听，开具罚单你不交——看来今天必须得好好修理你一顿了！
You won't listen to reason and you won't pay a fine... Looks like I'll have to teach you a real good lesson today!
I'll hit what I want. You can't stop me!
这么狂妄！看来今天必须得好好修理你一顿了——等着去蹲大牢吧！
You're a hooligan! Looks like I'll have to teach you a real good lesson today... I hope you're ready for prison!
I... I want to roll a Persuasion check.
什么说服...你以为这是动动嘴皮子就能解决的问题吗？
What persuasion? You think this is something that can be solved by just wagging our tongues?
要么老实交罚款，拿钱资助本地建设；要么就去关禁闭，给其他人做个反面教材。你自己选吧！

Ahem... Well, actually, as an IPC worker, I do not actually have the right to fine you...

好言相劝你不听，开具罚单你不交——看来今天必须得好好修理你一顿了！
You won't listen to reason and you won't pay a fine... Looks like I'll have to teach you a real good lesson today!
可恶...如果当初我多下点功夫做机甲格斗训练……..
Dang it... If I'd only worked harder at mecha battle training...
你...拥有这样强大的力量...为什么要用它来破坏秩序？为什么不去为公益事业做些贡献？
You have such a great power... Why would you use it to destroy order? Why would you not make a contribution to a good cause?
The powerful can do whatever they want.
何等「毁灭」的发言...没想到你的内心竟然如此扭曲......
Truly words of "Destruction"... I had no idea you were so twisted inside...
别太得意！总有一天你会付出代价的！
Don't be so pleased with yourself! You will pay the price one day!
这是做好事的先决条件。
This is a prerequisite for doing good.
完全没法理解你的逻辑......
I don't understand your logic at all...
别太得意了！你无法无天的日子总会有尽头的！
Don't be so pleased with yourself! Your days of being above the law will come to an end!
我做过的好事你根本想象不到。
You cannot even imagine the good things that I have done.
勿、勿以恶小而为之，勿以善小而不为！
N — no evil act is insignificant, just as all kind acts are worthwhile!
你的行事原则，我不能承认！绝对不能！
I cannot accept your principles! They are unacceptable!
我这就申请返回总部，进行高阶战斗深造...等我回来，我会变得更强！
I am going to apply to return to headquarters and undertake high-level combat studies... When I return, I will be even stronger!
等着瞧吧，我未来一定会守护好这颗星球上的文明！
You just wait, I will protect the civilization of this planet!
So this is the Festival Champion...
咳...瞧瞧这海报，多么迷人。这画面的设计感，简直就是艺术。
Ahem... Look at this billboard, it's so charming! The design and composition is practically art!
哎，你也是《以太战线》的玩家吗？怎么看你有点眼熟......
Oh, do you play Aetherium Wars as well? Why do you look so familiar...?
You seem a little suspicious to me...
可疑，我吗？哈哈...你这搭讪方式还真新颖。
Suspicious? Me? Haha... What a fresh conversation starter.
You were just watching me, weren't you?
有吗？我只是在看那边的其他东西...或许视线重叠了吧。
Was I? I was just looking at something over in your direction... Perhaps our eyes just happened to meet.
总之，既然在这里相遇，就说明我们都是《以太战线》的铁杆粉丝......
Either way, as we've met here, that means we're both die-hard fans of Aetherium Wars...
Do you want... to add each other as friends in-game?
咳，我是说...这样也好，多个朋友多条路嘛。
Ahem, I mean... Very well. More friends can never be a bad thing, right?
给，这是我的账号。有什么事情的话，之后用手机再聊吧。
Here, this is my account. If you need anything, just contact me.
这...好吧，反正我都无所谓的。因为加不到好友而伤心落泪什么的， 我才不会那样！
Th—That's... fine. I didn't really care either way. I'm not that kind of person that cries about not adding a new friend. I would never do that!
...既然你这样薄情，就请别再打扰我了......
...I see you are a fickle person. Please do not disturb me any further...
Hey, when are you going to have that done?
Uh... Are you talking to me?
是啊，我都在这里等多久了？快点把游戏奖励发给我。
Yes! I've been waiting here ages! Give me my game rewards.
可你刚才明明一直在看...
But this whole time you've just been staring at...
哟，好巧啊，没想到你也在这。
Oh! What a coincidence! I had no idea you'd be here, too!
现在这游戏真是一天比一天肝了。每次想拿奖励，都得来竞技场打上好久......
This game is getting more tedious by the day. Each time I want rewards, I have to spend ages fighting in the arena...
哎，我看你的以太灵练度好像都很高，有没有什么诀窍能传授一下？
Oh! I see your Aether Spirits are all really highly trained. Do you have any tips you can give me?
Just play for eight hours a day.
怎么听起来像上班一样...哦，我懂了，你肯定是靠着锲而不舍的精神才变得如此强大，对不对？
Why does that feel like a real job... Ah, I see! You mean that you only became this strong through hard work and perseverance, correct?
多么励志，多么伟大。我要学习这种精神才行。
So inspiring! So great! This is the spirit that I want to adopt!
You really know how to change a topic...
有吗？哦...我懂了，你肯定用的是非常高超的技巧，不能轻易让外人知道。
Really? Oh... I see! You must have used an extremely advanced technique that you can't just leak to outsiders!
像你这样的高手，一般玩家果然只能仰望、根本没办法超越...太棒了。
Regular players can only look up to you. There is no way for us to surpass a master such as yourself... You're amazing.
也请你继续努力下去吧。下届冠军赛，我还是看好你哟~
Please keep up your hard work. My money is still on you for next season~
这...居然是你，哈哈...什么风把你吹到这儿来了？
It — I can't believe it's you, haha... What fair wind have you ridden in on?
之前我就想说，难道你是...
I wanted to ask you before. Are you...
A fan that follows me from the shadows?
没错，{NICKNAME}大人，我就是你最最忠实的粉丝啊！
That's right, great {NICKNAME}! I am your most loyal fan!
太伤心了！太难受了！我的情意为什么会被这样误会？！
I'm so hurt! I'm wounded! How could my affection be so badly misunderstood!?
{NICKNAME}大人，我其实是你最最忠实的粉丝啊！
Great {NICKNAME}! I am actually your most loyal fan!
我一直在暗中注视你、仰望你、欣赏你击败对手时英武的身姿和冷漠的眼神！
