I have always been watching you from the shadows, looking up to you, admiring your heroic stance and cold stare as you defeat your opponents!
每次看到你比赛中的完美表现，我都忍不住用镜头把一切记录下来——我家马桶盖上都贴着你的海报呢！
Each time I see you performing flawlessly in tournament, I can't help but record every moment on my camera. Even my toilet seat has your picture on it!
既然事已至此，那我就不再掩饰了...还请收下这个。它蕴含着我满满、满满的心意！
As you have already learned all this, there is no use in covering things up anymore... Please, take this. This is filled... absolutely filled to the brim with my love and admiration!
今后我也会一直看着你、支持你，直到这游戏关服的那天！
I will always keep watching you and supporting you, right up until the day that the servers close!
Make sure you are prepared, great {NICKNAME}!
哦，{NICKNAME}大人！你的出现奠定了我今天的好心情。
Oh, great {NICKNAME}! Your appearance always puts me in a wonderful mood for the day!
{NICKNAME}大人，看见你，我的胸膛就仿佛被击中了一样。
Great {NICKNAME}, every time I see you, it's like I've been struck in the chest.
我相信下次冠军也非你莫属，{NICKNAME}大人。
I just know that the next championship belongs to you, great {NICKNAME}!
我会一直注视着你的，{NICKNAME}大人！
I am always watching you, great {NICKNAME}!
Who am I? Where am I?
小家伙瑟瑟发抖，确认过你并无恶意后，从这一堆古怪的「包围圈」里走了出来。
The little creation is trembling. Once you're confirmed as not a threat, it walks out from its weird little "barricade."
你一棒子打碎了它牢固的「大门」，它看上去有些无所适从。
Considering you basically smashed down its "front doors" with your bat, it's at a loss about what to do.
Who am I? Where am I? Hang on...
你为什么要打烂我家的门？
Why are you smashing in the door to my home?
唔，这样吧，你也不是故意的。
Oh, I see. You didn't mean it.
我本来想盖一个大大的窝，让我的同伴一起过来住的。
I wanted to build this big den so all my friends could come and live there.
可这里越来越危险了，它们和我走散了，我想在这里等它们…可现在…塌房啦，我没有家了……
But it's getting dangerous over here, and they got separated from me. I want to wait for them here... but now... I don't have a home to go back to...
(Point out the way home for it)
That's fantastic. Finally, a home of my own!
在你的指引下，小家伙回到了它温暖的新家。
With your guidance, the little creation made it back to its cozy new home.
实验田里有奇怪的呼噜声，这令你想起在空间站的某处角落，生长着会说话的植物的奇妙经历。
A strange snoring is coming from inside the experimental plant nurseries, which reminds you of a wondrous encounter with a talking plant elsewhere in the space station.
但这里显然没有什么植物，目光所及之处，只有半死不活的杂草。
But obviously there are no plants here — only half-dead weeds as far as the eye can see.
Do a good deed, and pull out the weeds with your bare hands!
尽管科员们暂时撤离了这里，但放任杂草长满实验田也不好。你热心地伸出双手，就地开始拔草。
The researchers may have been evacuated from here, but ignoring weeds in the experimental plant nurseries is no good. You enthusiastically reach out both hands to get started on the weeding process.
你好像拽住了一个沉甸甸的物体，摸上去还有些温热。
You seem to have pulled at a heavy object. It feels quite warm to the touch, too.
你使劲往上拽，一个意想不到的家伙挣扎着推开你的手，可怜巴巴地看着你。
You give it an almighty yank, and out of the blue this little thing pushes your hand away before looking up at you with puppy dog eyes.
好痛…我的发夹都要被你拽掉了……
Ow-wee... You almost pulled out my hair clip...
Sorry, I thought these were all weeds.
…我头上可不会长杂草。喏，这是花，我最喜欢的漂亮小花。
...I don't have any weeds growing on my head. Look! These are flowers. My favorite little pretty flowers.
…这话不该我问你吗？我在这儿睡得好好的，突然就被你拽起来。
...Shouldn't I be the one asking you that? I was sleeping nice and snugly right here before you suddenly tugged me up.
这里的土壤很肥沃，有棵好心的花花跟我说，躺在这上面头顶就会长出漂亮的花来。
The soil here is very fertile, and a kind-hearted flower told me that pretty flowers would grow out of my head if I just lay here.
你看我头顶这个，是不是很漂亮！
Check out the top of my head. Isn't it beautiful!
I think that's a four-leaf clover.
是会带来好运的小花，不是野草噢。
They're flowers that can bring you luck — not weeds.
对呀，你会说话，我也会说话，花花草草会说话很正常呀。
Of course. You can talk, I can talk, so isn't it totally normal for flowers to talk, too?
对了，我这是睡了多久…怎么只剩下我一个了，我的小伙伴呢？
That's right. How long have I been out for... Why am I the only one left? Where are my little friends?
它们都回家了嘛？呜呜，完了，我不认路，这下怎么回去啊！
Have they all gone home? *sob* It's game over. I don't know the way back. How am I going to get home!
(Point out the way home for it)
噢，你们搞了个新家啊，我这就去，谢谢你呀。
Oh, you've got a new home all ready. I'll go over right now. Thank you.
这个小礼物就送给你吧，有空的话，请帮我回来看望下这些花花草草吧，它们很可爱的。
Here's a little something for you. If you ever get the chance, please come back and help me look after the plants here. They're all really cute.
唔，现在的话还是算了，它们在睡觉，咱们小点声，别吵醒它们。
Oh, forget it for now. They're asleep, so let's keep the noise down and try not to wake them.
在你的指引下，小家伙回到了它温暖的新家。
With your guidance, the little creation made it back to its cozy new home.
实验田很安静，没有「阮•梅」造物在此酣睡，只有杂草丛生。
The experimental plant nurseries are very quiet and none of Ruan Mei's creations are here — just weeds covering the ground.
Keep doing good deeds, and pull out the weeds.
你弯下腰，流了不少汗，一番辛勤的体力劳作后，什么也没有发生。但你还是觉得很充实，或许这就是所谓的精神满足感吧。

You bend over and after lots of heavy sweating from a burst of physical labor — nothing happens. But you still feel very fulfilled. Maybe this is what people mean by something being spiritually satisfying.
你正在擦手，准备转身离开这里。一阵窸窣声惊动了你，但对方消失得极快，就连你也抓不住它的踪迹。
Just as you wipe down your hands and prepare to go, a rustling noise startles you — but they are disappearing so fast that not even you are able to tell where they went.
你回过神检查，这才发现——不知是何方神圣在你口袋里塞了一把「大自然的馈赠」。
You come back to your senses only to discover that somehow, someone has stuffed some of "nature's gift" into your pocket.
你选手袖手旁观，看看是否会有传说中的「会说话的植物」出现，但很可惜，什么都没有发生。
You watch on one side to see whether or not these mystical "talking plants" show up, but unfortunately nothing happens.
实验田里一如既往地安静，你努力寻找着杂草的踪迹，但很可惜，在你的连日劳作下，它们已不复存在。
The experimental plant nurseries remains as quiet as ever. You try hard to find traces of the weeds but, alas, after days of hard work they no longer exist.
有什么东西轻轻敲了敲你的脚后跟，你转过身望去，又是大自然的慷慨。
You feel something tapping on your heel. You turn around to see once more the generosity of nature.
你捡起这一切，准备离去，耳畔响起一道细小的声音——
You pick it all up and are about to leave, when you hear a tiny voice inside your ear...
「谢谢你…我们要冬眠啦，拜拜！」是谁在说话，是你的幻觉吗？这一切如此费解。
"Thank you... We're off to hibernate now. Bye bye!" Who's that talking, now... Are you hallucinating? Everything seems so baffling.
快递箱里不知存放着何物，你远远地就看到箱子在抖动，抖动的频率渐渐微弱了下来。
You notice an express box in the distance shaking, though the frequency of its shuddering movements are slowly diminishing. What's inside the box remains a mystery to you.
你正准备拆开箱子看看，指尖便被一阵冰冷的金属物体轻轻拍了拍，你歪头望去，里面竟是一只奄奄一息的机巧鸟！
As you open the box, you feel the sensation of cold, metallic material against your fingertips. Upon closer inspection, you discover a cycrane on the brink of a complete breakdown!
机巧鸟拍打翅膀的动静越发微弱，在即将停下的刹那，它的眼珠陡然瞪大，不住地向你求救。
The cycrane's wings are fluttering weakly. Just as its movement is about to stop, it suddenly widens its eyes and gasps for help.
机巧鸟在说话间整只鸟身为之一振，像是受到了极大的鼓舞。这句话才刚说完，它的鸟头便「啪」地一声倒地，任你如何触摸也不再有回应。

The cycrane speaks with great strain, as if it knows its borrowed time is running out. Just as it finishes its words, the cycrane's head greets the ground with a resounding crash, and now it no longer responds to your touch.
在它彻底倒下的瞬间，几张单薄的纸页从箱子缝隙中滑落，你连忙捡了起来——
In the instance of its collapse, thin sheets of paper slip from the cracks of the box, and you quickly pick them up.
没想到这东西竟然落到了你手里，此事涉及我云骑军的机密，你还是跟我走一趟吧。
I didn't expect you to have those documents. Well, this is highly confidential Cloud Knight information, and now I need you to come with me.
Are you going to arrest me?
不，不是要抓你，恰恰相反，你做得很好…只是，这件事不能走漏风声……
Arrest? No, not at all. You've done an excellent job... but this must be kept a secret...
什么机密？我完全不知情啊！
Highly confidential? But I don't know anything!
你是否知情都没关系，这份文件…我带你走只是想让我的同僚保证你的人身安全……
It doesn't matter if you know the details or not. This document... Well, I'm only bringing you along so that my colleague can guarantee your safety...
等等，我预感这件事会很麻烦…
Hold on. I'm already smelling trouble...
我明白了，我会等你，就等一小会，你快些决定跟不跟我走。
I see. I'll wait. Just for a short while though. Hurry. Decide whether you want to come with me.
…接下的事情会很麻烦，我要带走你只是确保你的安全，同时也是确保我的安全。
...What we do next might be quite annoying. I'm bringing you along just to ensure your safety and as well as mine.
I need to think about it...
我明白了，我会等你，就等一小会，你快些决定跟不跟我走。
I see. I'll wait. Just for a short while though. Hurry. Decide whether you want to come with me.
奇怪，接头的线人，怎么不见了，我…我明明通知过他。
Wait, where is my contact? I... I definitely informed him about my arrival.
糟了！一定是出事了，听着，我本想让我的同僚来保障你的安全，但他却不在这里，「上面」一定是出事了！
No... Something is terribly wrong! Look, I was going to ask my colleague to keep you safe, but he's not where he's supposed to be. Something must have gone wrong with the "higher-ups"!
待会儿就躲在杂物堆后面千万别出来…等我喊你再出来，万万不可轻举妄动，听清楚了吗？
Just stay behind the boxes and don't come out... unless I tell you to. Don't do anything stupid. Are we clear?
Don't worry. I can take care of myself.
哎！你是不知道那帮人有多凶狠，总之还是听我的，别轻举妄动！
Listen, you have no idea how ruthless they can be. Anyway, just listen to me and don't do anything stupid!
永仁仔细地将你护在身后，将你带到了一处隐秘的地方让你躲了起来。在确保自己足够安全后，你这才敢侧身观察永仁……

Yongren places himself in front of you to shield you from danger, then leads you to a hidden spot and tells you to hide there. Once you are sure of safety, only then you dare to turn to the side and observe Yongren closely...
我就说诚哥怎么不在「老地方」…果然是你干…果然是你！你就是那个「内鬼」！
No wonder Brother Cheng wasn't in his usual spot... It was you... You are the mole!
你不要这么激动。你口口声声说我是「内鬼」，真是奇了怪了，你不也是个卧底吗？你说，咱俩都是卧底，你怎么就对我敌意这么大？
Calm down. You're saying I'm a mole, but aren't you undercover, too? Why so hostile against me when we're both moles?
我跟你不一样，我行得正走得正。
No, I'm nothing like you. I've been a servant of justice.
你们神策府的人还挺有意思，一开口就不对味，但一个个都挺自信的。
It's funny how you folks from the Seat of Divine Foresight never seem to fit in with the more dicey crowd, yet all believe you fit in so well.
我查过了，你一个普普通通的底层云骑，外派卧底多年，在神策府连份档案都没有，说话口气还这么大，我真的很好奇，是景元将军给你的自信吗？

I've looked into your background. You're just a low-level Cloud Knight who has been undercover for years and doesn't even have an official file on record at the Seat of Divine Foresight. What makes you talk with such confidence?
少废话，我本以为你是兄弟，可没想到你个浓眉大眼的竟背叛了大家…你对得起被「药王秘传」残党所害的兄弟姐妹吗？！

Save your breath! I thought we were brothers, but you betrayed everyone... Can you face our fallen brothers and sisters who died at the hands of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus with a clear conscience?
我说了，你不要这么激动嘛，我今天来，是想跟你谈合作的。你我相识多年，手足一场，给个机会呗。
As I said, let's calm down. We've known each other for years, and I'm here to talk about us collaborating. Just give me a chance.
以前我没得选，是他们威胁我，我才不得已加入了云骑军。可现在，「药王秘传」的事已经败露，我倒是想做个好人……

I didn't have a choice before. They threatened me, so I had to join the Cloud Knights as an undercover agent. But now, the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been exposed, so I want to take this chance to do the right thing...
好啊，那你和神策府的策士们说，看他们让不让你做个好人。
Yeah, sure, you can tell that to the counselors at the Seat of Divine Foresight.
Come on, friend. Just give me a way out. Please.
I'm sorry, but I'm a Cloud Knight!
档案和证明都没有，谁知道你是云骑？
Hah! You don't even have official documents! Who'd believe that you're truly a Cloud Knight?
这不可能，诚哥他手上的——
But I do. Brother Cheng has my documents...
他的保密机巧鸟和玉兆在我手上，那几份文件，自然也……嘿嘿！
This is where you're mistaken. His encrypted cycrane and jade abacus are now in my hands, along with your documents... Hehe!
今天我定要替云骑军上下除掉你这个叛徒！
You filthy traitor! I'll take you down today for the sake of the Cloud Knights!
你以为只有你会云骑的技艺吗？已经跟你说过了，给个机会嘛，可你既然不听，那就由不得你——
Please. You think you're the only one trained in the Cloud Knights' martial arts here? I've pleaded with you for a chance to do the right thing, but if you won't listen, then I guess I'll have to...
胡说八道…我有印象，你和那位太卜曾经一起并肩而行，估计是有些地位。
Nonsense... but I have seen you walking alongside the master diviner, so I suppose you do have some status.
难怪是个生面孔…既然如此，也好，既然有外人在，阿仁，就当是有个见证人，这事窝在我心里很久了，无论如何，今天都得做出个了断了！
No wonder I've never met you before... In that case, brother Yong, I gotta get something off my chest that's been bothering me for years! This matter must be settled, one way or another!
听着——我说过了，以前我没得选，是他们用家人威胁我，我不得已才加入云骑军当什么「卧底」。
Listen, I told you: I didn't have a choice. The Disciples threatened my family, so I had to join the Cloud Knights as their "mole."
可我从未没伤害过同袍，我还用这一手「药王秘传」内授的医术救了不少人——还有你，你那开药摊的经验也是我传授给你的。
But I never hurt my comrades. I even used the techniques from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus to save many knights. And you! I even taught you my pharmaceutical skills.
我一早知道阿仁你是卧底，你以为就凭你那么烂的医术功底，是怎么在他们眼皮子底下没被发现的？还不是我替你遮掩去了！

I knew you were a mole from the beginning. You really think you managed to evade their notice right under their noses with your incredible feats of "espionage," brother Yong? Come on, it's me who'd been covering for you! Your medical knowledge was terrible!
十年了！他们跟我说，十年之后便可功成身退。说好了十年，十年之后又十年，这都多久了，我实在是受够了！比起听从他们使唤，我更想当个堂堂正正的云骑军！

It's been ten years! They promised me I'd be free after ten years! But now ten years have passed, and they've asked for another ten! I'm done! I've had enough! I'd rather be a true Cloud Knight than a pawn for them!
阿仁，给个机会我，我想做个好人……
Please, just give me a chance to do the right thing, Yong...
You should give him a chance, Yong...
Yeah, you can tell that to the Seat of Divine Foresight...
我看你是痴心妄想！你既已伤害了诚哥，怎么还好意思要我放过你？我是放过你了，可你有放过诚哥吗？
This is ridiculous! You hurt Brother Cheng, and now you're asking me to show you mercy? Why didn't you show him any mercy!?
我真的没对诚哥出手，只不过将诚哥的机巧鸟和玉兆「借」走了。
I didn't hurt him at all. I just "borrowed" his cycrane and jade abacus.
哼，想来你也不信，咱们来做一笔交易。你加入云骑军的证明文件在我手上，你答应不揭发我是卧底的秘密，我就把文件还你。否则……

*sigh* You just won't believe me, will you? Alright, how about we make a deal? As you see, I have your official documents. You promise not to expose my identity as an undercover agent, and I'll give those documents back to you. Otherwise...
文件？我已经交给永仁了。
Yongren's official documents? But I've already given them back to him.
什么？可恶，难道是那只机巧鸟擅自…等等，你不会是真的想做掉我吧？
What? You... Did that cycrane just... Wait, you're not really going to kill me, are you?
(Wait for Yongren to make his decision.)
否则什么？你倘若真想做个好人，你还会耍这些手段？
Otherwise what? Would someone who wants to "do the right thing" use such underhanded methods?
啧，好吧，我会直接把证明文件给你，我想做个好人，没有任何隐瞒。
Tsk, fine. I'll give back your documents. As I said, I just want to do the right thing. I got nothing to hide about that.
卧底的滋味，这些年来，想必你也清楚…我实在不想再过每天那种担惊受怕的日子了…「药王秘传」的线报我也全部上传回去了……

You know better than anyone what it's like to be a mole... I just don't want to live in fear anymore... I've sent in all the information I know about the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus and done my part...
报告里我说了是你提供的线报，想来你的任务也算完成，回去也是指日可待的事了。
In my report, I stated that it was you who provided the tip-offs. I suppose that means your mission is complete, and you'll be back in the Cloud Knights in no time.
只要你不说，我不说…我们都能好好的，我去做个好人，而你很快就会结束卧底生涯。
As long as we keep it a secret... we'll both be fine. I'll have a chance to do the right thing, and you won't need to stay undercover any longer.
今天有外人见证，我答应你。但回去之后我要好好查探下诚哥和其他信息，如若属实，我自然会替你保密。可要是……
Alright, I promise you. But once I return, I'll verify Cheng's situation and the other details. If what you said is true, I'll keep your secrets to myself and nobody else. However, if...
你放心！绝对属实！我再也不想当卧底了！
Don't worry! What I said is the absolute truth! I never want to be a mole ever again!
那好，还请{NICKNAME}不要外传！我俩尚有急事要处理，暂且告别，神策府种种，今日倒是叫你见笑了……
And please keep this between us, {NICKNAME}. I'm sorry for getting you involved in all this trouble with the Seat of Divine Foresight. Now, if you'll excuse us...
你目送永仁和建明一并离去，你不知道他们之间到底经历了什么，又为何如此。
You watch as Yongren and Jian Ming leave together. You find yourself wondering what they experienced together and why all of that happened.
但似乎原本难解的局面因你的出现而发生了改变，这是永仁也未曾想到的。
However, the originally unsolvable dilemma has changed thanks to your intervention. It was something that Yongren didn't expect.
Hmmm... Some tomes are still missing...
请问是需要找回什么书吗？
Do you need to retrieve any books?
对了，你不是上次来找《要药分剂》的人吗？上次我有帮到你，请问你能帮帮我吗？
Oh, aren't you the one who asked for the Compendium of Remedies last time? I helped you last time, so could you do me a favor in return?
…稍等一下，丹鼎司有几册书丢失了，偏偏是几本很麻烦的书。丹枢大人什么信息也没有留给我，我要怎么找回来……

...Well, some books have gone missing from the Alchemy Commission, and, well, they're essentially some very troublesome texts. That, and Lady Dan Shu hasn't left me any clues. How am I supposed to get them back?...
…唉，我又忘了，现在不该称她为大人了。你找我有什么事吗？
...Ah, I forgot again. I shouldn't call her "Lady" now. So, what brings you here?
Is there anything I can help with?
不怕你这样的化外民笑话，丹鼎司内除了医典专著之外，还封存着一些「禁忌书典」。它们原本应该是小心保存的，如今却不小心「失窃」了。

Please forgive me for this awkward situation. Actually, in addition to medical texts, we also keep some "forbidden tomes" here in the Alchemy Commission. They are supposed to be carefully preserved, but now they've been stolen.
我猜跟药王秘传这次事件也有些干系，不过，我问过神策府方面，他们目前还没有找回「禁忌书典」的消息，这让我实在是有些头疼。

I guess the theft has something to do with the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus as well. I've asked the Seat of Divine Foresight, but they haven't found any clues about the forbidden tomes. It's turning into a real headache for me.
我看你那震惊的表情就知道，你肯定想问「丹鼎司到底行不行啊」。你现在明白了吧，让我回来继任丹士长可以说是危机重重了。

Oh, by your astonished expression, I can tell that you actually want to say "Come on! Has the Alchemy Commission ever done anything right!?" Well, now you see how perilous my position as the chief alchemist is.
丹鼎司为什么有「禁忌书典」？
Why is the Alchemy Commission keeping those forbidden tomes?
因为这些书典在某种程度上算得上是「医书」，或者说它们本身就是一种「治疗手段」——只要阅读它，就发生不可思议的现象。
Because these tomes are also medical texts — in a sense, they themselves are a treatment method. Just by reading them, patients will experience miraculous things.
有些人阅读了「治疗失眠」的医书长梦不起；相对的，有些人阅读了「不眠不休」的医书之后，再也没能入睡……
For example, some patients who read the "Cure for Insomnia" fall asleep for a long time, while others who read "Fight Sleepiness" never fall asleep again...
只要读不懂，书典就还是安全的。
As long as you don't understand their contents, they should be safe.
这种东西趁早销毁比较好…
You should destroy such dangerous books before it's too late...
丹鼎司内也有一些主张销毁「禁忌书典」的医士…不过这书既然是药，就有着两面性，关键得看医生如何用药。

Some healers in the Alchemy Commission also advocate for the destruction of the forbidden tomes just like you... but in my opinion, since those tomes have medicinal value, they can be really helpful if they end up in the right hands.
听上去像空间站的奇物？
Sounds like the Curios in the space station, don't you agree?
你是说天才俱乐部的那位，我听说她的空间站也收藏了一些奇怪的东西。
You mean the one from the Genius Society? Yeah, I heard she's got some unusual collectibles on her space station.
…某种意义上来说，丹鼎司也在做类似的事情，不过我们更专注医学领域。
...In a way, the Alchemy Commission is doing the same thing, but we're more specialized in the field of medicine.
「禁忌书典」存在着「阅读门槛」，对大多数人来说，那些书典是无害的。
There is a certain "reading barrier" for those forbidden tomes, so they are completely harmless to the majority of people.
可是一旦流传在外，很难说有「擅长解读之人」会遭遇什么事情，还得尽快回收。
However, if they fall into the hands of someone who is skilled at deciphering them... it pains me to imagine the terrible things that could happen. They must be retrieved as soon as possible.
就这样告诉我，没有关系吗？
Is it okay to spill your secrets like this?
没有关系，丹鼎司内知道「禁忌书典」的人不少，比你的嘴巴更松的人也有的是。
Don't worry. A lot of members in the Alchemy Commission know about the forbidden tomes, and some of them have a reputation for having loose lips.
纯粹依靠丹鼎司医士们的情报网，想要把这些书典全部收回颇有难度，我也是听神策府的青镞大人引荐，决定将这件事拜托给你。

Retrieving these tomes won't be easy if we rely solely on our own intelligence network. That's why I need your help with this. After all, it is Madam Qingzu from the Seat of Divine Foresight who recommended you to me.
更重要的是，我需要你的帮助，因此我认为开诚布公是我应尽的义务。如果说不清楚，这对你来说也不方便是吧？
Since I need your help, it's my duty to tell you everything I know about this issue, otherwise it'd be a hassle, right?
I can't guarantee that I'll find them...
没事，收回书典本身就是一件「没有头绪的事情」，我也不指望短时间内能够全部收回。毕竟药王秘传和丹枢大人究竟做了什么，我们无从得知。
Don't worry. I understand how tough this task is, and I'm not expecting you to bring them back anytime soon. We have no clue what Lady Dan Shu or the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus did, after all.
太好了，青镞大人听说了丹鼎司的困境之后，建议将这个事情委托给你，我当时还有些半信半疑的，现在想来，青镞大人果然是没有看错人。
Awesome! I wasn't sure if you'd help me when Madam Qingzu recommended you, but now I can see that she was right to have faith in you!
还有三本书要找，分别是《开智之卷》、《无言之卷》、以及《瘈狂之卷》。丹鼎司这边资料有限，你有什么想了解的吗？

So, you need to retrieve these three scrolls: The Manuscript of Wisdom, the Manuscript of Silence, and the Manuscript of Delirium. While I don't have many leads on them, I'll do my best to answer any questions you might have.
曾有不识字之人阅读此书。谁也不知道他究竟看了什么，看完之后智力飞涨，虽然未及天才俱乐部成员，也已远胜常人。

Once, an illiterate person read this book and suddenly became incredibly intelligent. Although they weren't on par with the members of the Genius Society, they became way smarter than ordinary people.
曾有盲眼之人阅读此书。据该患者称，看完这本书之后，能听见「无言之声」，但是没人知道这「无言之声」来自哪里。
Once, a blind person read this book and claimed that they could hear the Sound of Silence, although no one knows exactly where such Sound of Silence comes from.
曾有狂妄之人阅读此书。但此人只翻开这本书看了一眼，便双目圆瞪、全身痉挛、不省人事了。
Once, a reckless person tried to read this book, but as soon as they opened it, they started convulsing and then passed out.
等我找到了，再来找你吧。
I see. I'll come back to you once I find them all.
I leave it in your capable hands.
我已不再是从前的咪咪。
I'm no longer the same Mimi I used to be.
咪咪，你怎么了？你正常一点好不好，我真的有点害怕了。
What happened to you, Mimi? Can you just act normal? You're starting to freak me out, you know?
都说了让你先别说话，鑫鑫，我只是正在思考现状罢了。
Hold on, Xinxin. I'm still trying to figure out the current situation.
Wait, this Diting can actually talk!?
唉哟，别说你了，连我也吓了一跳…这谛听跟了我四十年了，突然就开始说话了……
Yeah, I'm just as astonished as you are... This Diting has served me for forty years, and now it suddenly starts talking...
鑫鑫，有人目击到你在和一只谛听说话，然后第一反应是「你给它起名叫咪咪？」由此可见「咪咪」这个名字是真的不适合我。
You see, Xinxin? Someone saw you talking to your Diting and their first response was "Did you call it Mimi?" So, I guess we can say that the name "Mimi" doesn't really suit me.
我觉得还挺可爱的啊…哎呀，现在不是聊这个的时候……
But I thought it was a cute name... Oh, let's forget about it for now...
我知道你，你不是{NICKNAME}吗？我听说你是见多识广的化外民，你知道这是怎么回事吗？
Hey, I know you! You're {NICKNAME}, right? I've heard that you're a knowledgeable Outworlder, so maybe you happen to know why my Diting has suddenly started talking?
这些我从药王秘传手里缴获的赃物，其中有个叫《开智之卷》的小册子，一共没几页，上面尽是些鬼画符。
Here's the thing: I confiscated some stolen property from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and among them was a booklet called the Manuscript of Wisdom with all sorts of weird symbols on it.
我也不知道这东西是什么，就想让咪咪嗅探一下。结果咪咪翻了翻这个小册子，突然双手抱胸原地坐下了，还在连连叹气……
I didn't know what the text was, so I asked Mimi to sniff it for any scents. But as soon as Mimi started flipping through the pages, it suddenly sat down and started sighing...
咪咪也是四十多年的老谛听了，容易出故障，嘴里一直嘀咕着「人类真蠢啊…」，我也是第一次听见咪咪张口说人话。

I mean... Mimi's a forty-year-old Diting by this point. Glitches and bugs aren't uncommon in it. It kept muttering "Humans are so stupid..." That's the first time I've ever heard it speak using a human tongue!
行啦，这个事情也犯不着{F#她}{M#他}来给你解释。况且{F#她}{M#他}也未必搞得清楚。
Well, I don't think we need {F#her}{M#him} to explain what's going on. Perhaps not even {F#she}{M#he} knows what has truly transpired.
那本《开智之卷》上的鬼画符本质是一种逻辑回路，仅仅通过视觉传导就完善了我的基础功能……
The "weird symbols" on the Manuscript of Wisdom are actually a logical circuit that enlightens its readers through visual transmission alone...
对于你们这些能识文断字的人来说，「符号」会被赋予特定的意义，反而没有办法被《开智之卷》启迪智慧。
Literate people tend to give meanings to symbols, which will prevent them from truly understanding the contents within the Manuscript of Wisdom.
对我来说，这智慧突如其来，现在我已经想到了一百种毁灭世界的办法了……
Thanks to this sudden enlightenment, now I've come up with <unbreak>100</unbreak> ways to destroy this world...
看来，我不得不消灭你了。
Looks like I'll have to destroy you.
你能不能先思考再动手。
Can't you just think before you act?
除非你告诉我，我才会相信。
I won't believe your words until you tell me what they are.
省省力气吧，我不会告诉你的。
Save your breath. I'm not telling you anything.
我已经太聪明了，毁灭世界在我看来毫无意义。只有那些反物质军团的造物、泯灭帮的蠢货才想要做这样的事情…换言之，我是不屑于去做的。

I'm simply too smart to do something meaningless like destroying the world. Only the morons from the Antimatter Legion or the Annihilation Gang would do such a foolish thing... In short, it's beneath me to destroy the world. Absolutely not.
那…那你说你变聪明了，你变得有多聪明了呢？要不，{NICKNAME}你出个题吧？
B—But how smart have you become? Maybe you could ask it a question, {NICKNAME}?
你这问题普通的谛听也能算得出来。
Even an ordinary Diting could answer such a simple question.
该怎么说呢…总觉得能意识到这个问题很愚蠢，已经不是普通谛听能做到的事了……
How do I even... Being able to realize how simple this question is... That's already beyond the capabilities of an ordinary Diting...
Are there more natural numbers or prime numbers?
一样多。两者是一样多的。
They both have the same amount.
啊？为什么啊？自然数不是明显要多很多吗？
Huh? But why? Isn't it obvious that there are more natural numbers?
很简单啊，因为自然数和质数都有无穷多个，且自然数集和质数集是等势的，所以自然数和质数一样多。

It's quite elementary. There are innumerable amounts of natural numbers and prime numbers, and the set of natural numbers and the set of prime numbers have the same cardinality. Hence, there are as many natural numbers as there are prime numbers.
我完全没听懂…但我相信你变得聪明了。
I didn't understand any of that... but I'm pretty sure you've become smarter.
What are the winning numbers for the next lottery jackpot?
我是变聪明了，又不是变得会预测未来了。
While I've become smarter, I can't predict the future.
也许你给我足够多的数据和算力，我能像大衍穷观阵一样给你算出一个结论…但现在我应该是没办法告诉你下期彩票的号码。
Maybe with enough data and arithmetic power, I could come up with an answer for you, like what the Matrix of Prescience Ultima does... but for now, I'm afraid I can't give you the winning numbers.
咪咪说话真是有理有据…看起来确实是变得聪明了。
Mimi is speaking so logically... it really does seem like it's become smarter.
I don't think this is something that needs proving.
既然你也这么说，我也相信咪咪确实是变聪明了。
If even you say so, then I'll believe that Mimi has indeed become smarter.
我是来取回《开智之卷》的。
I'm here to retrieve the Manuscript of Wisdom.
自从鑫鑫提起那个书名开始，你的表情就已说明了一切。鑫鑫，把书给{F#她}{M#他}吧，应该是书的主人托{F#她}{M#他}来取的。
Your expression gave you away as soon as Xinxin mentioned that book. Please give the book back to {F#her}{M#him}, Xinxin. The owner of the text must have entrusted {F#her}{M#him} to retrieve it.
啊？这可是赃物，直接给{F#她}{M#他}吗？
Huh? But this is stolen property. Are you sure that we should just give it to {F#her}{M#him}?
给{F#她}{M#他}吧。如果我没猜错，这应该是丹鼎司的资产，而{F#她}{M#他}在替丹鼎司跑腿。
Just give it to {F#her}{M#him}. If I'm not mistaken, this book belongs to the Alchemy Commission, and {F#she}{M#he} is working for them.
既然的咪咪都这么说了…那就交给你吧，{NICKNAME}。可千万别弄丢了啊！
Since Mimi says so... I'll give this book to you, {NICKNAME}. Just don't lose it!
请谨慎保管，{NICKNAME}，这书远比它看上去要危险得多。设想一下，如果被启迪智慧的不是我这样可爱的小谛听，而是些别的什么不识字的怪物……
Please keep it safe, {NICKNAME}. This book is far more dangerous than it seems. Just imagine if it wasn't a cute little Diting like me that became enlightened, but a fierce, deadly monster...
多聪明也是一球棒的事。
Then I'd just take it down with my bat.
凭你的本事，的确如此，不过你明白我的意思，别让这种事情发生就是最好了。
With your skills, perhaps so. But you understand the subtext in my words. It's best to prevent such a thing from happening at all.
咪咪接下来打算做什么？
What are you doing to do next, Mimi?
我一个谛听，还能做什么？加入天才俱乐部吗？那肯定还是继续陪着鑫鑫一起查案呗。
I'm just a Diting. What can I do? Join the Genius Society? Hah, I'll just keep investigating cases with Xinxin.
可是你都变得这么聪明了……
变聪明了，那查案岂不是如虎添翼？行了，别在这儿耗着了，那些赃物不是还没处理完吗？赶紧回去继续干活吧。
Isn't it awesome to have a smart helper for solving cases? Anyway, let's not waste any more time here. We should return and deal with the stolen property.
Then we'll be leaving, {NICKNAME}! Thank you for your help!
鑫鑫和咪咪有说有笑地离开了。
Xinxin and Mimi leave with smiles on their faces.
这应该就是玉络要找的《开智之卷》了…拿回去给她吧。
This must be the Manuscript of Wisdom that Yuluo is looking for... I should bring it back to her.
I'm here to return the forbidden tomes.
你交还了《开智之卷》并讲述了回收它的过程。
You return the Manuscript of Wisdom and explain how you've retrieved it.
看起来这《开智之卷》确实是个相当危险的东西啊，幸亏没造成什么严重后果。
Looks like the Manuscript of Wisdom is quite dangerous indeed. Thankfully, it hasn't caused any severe consequences so far.
这《开智之卷》或许压根就不是给人类看的，就是用来开启机巧的禁制的…你知道的，「金人之乱」后，仙舟把机巧造物的智慧都封锁起来了。
Perhaps this Manuscript of Wisdom is not meant for humans, but rather to break the bans of ingenia... As you know, all ingenium creations have been deprived of their wisdom after the Aurum Rebellion.
如果确实是这样…那这书在坏人手里时没酿成任何大祸，实属不幸中的万幸了。
If this is the case... we were really lucky that it didn't cause any disasters while it was in the wrong hands.
This place is wonderful, Lady Dan Shu...
这就是您工作的地方吗？
丹枢大人，这就是您以前工作的地方吗？这个地方空气好新鲜啊。
Is this where you used to work, Lady Dan Shu? The air is so fresh here.
这声音是…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！好久不见了！你怎么在这里？我在和丹枢大人聊天呢。她说要带我来她工作的地方看看。
This voice... It's you, {F#miss}{M#mister}! It's been a while! What brings you here? I was talking to Lady Dan Shu, and she said she wanted to show me where she worked.
小女孩的话唤起了你的记忆。丹枢是药王秘传的魁首，而眼前的小孩是一直受她关照的盲童。
The girl's words ring a bell. Dan Shu was the master primus of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and the girl in front of you is the blind girl she took care of.
丹枢大人，这就是您以前工作的地方吗？这个地方空气好新鲜啊～
Is this where you used to work, Lady Dan Shu? The air is so fresh here!
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}你好呀。我在和丹枢大人聊天呢。她说要带我来她工作的地方看看。
Hi, {F#miss}{M#mister}! I was talking to Lady Dan Shu, and she said she wanted to show me where she worked.
丹枢大人刚和我说，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}是好人，让我可以和你玩～嘿嘿～
She just told me that you're a good person, and she said she'd feel safe if I played with you... Hehe...
小女孩的话唤起了你的记忆。丹枢是药王秘传的魁首，你曾听说那位盲眼魁首特别关照一个盲童，恐怕就是眼前的女孩。

The girl's words ring a bell. Dan Shu was the master primus of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and rumor had it that she took special care of a blind girl much like herself. That must be the girl in front of you.
你当然也记得，这位「丹枢大人」早就在丹鼎司殒殁了，你对此非常确定。
You remember how Lady Dan Shu died in the Alchemy Commission, and you are absolutely certain of her death.
But Dan Shu is no longer of this world.
对大家来说，丹枢大人可能已经不在了。可她现在就在这里陪着小鱼～
This might be true for everyone else, but for me, she's right here with me now.
There is no one else here.
丹枢大人说，她只能陪着小鱼一个人。其他人是见不到她的～
Lady Dan Shu said that she would only accompany me, and that nobody else could see her.
丹枢大人让你不必担心，她只是来陪小鱼玩的，不会做什么坏事的。
And she asks you not to worry. She said she's just here to play with me and won't do anything bad.
Why can you still see Dan Shu?
小鱼之前收到了一个快递，里面有个奇怪的旧石板，还有丹枢大人留下的一封信。
Not long ago, I received a package containing a strange stone tablet, along with a letter left by Lady Dan Shu.
她说那个石板好像叫做《无言之卷》，只有眼盲的天缺者才能启用…只要随身携带这个石板，就能够听到有声音为自己向导。

According to the letter, the tablet is called the Manuscript of Silence, and only Incomplete Ones who are born blind can activate its power... Just keep the tablet on you, and you'll hear a voice that guides you.
小鱼按照信上说的，随身携带这个石板，果然能听见「无言之声」引导我前行，可厉害了！
So I followed the instructions and carried the tablet with me, and I actually heard the Sound of Silence guiding me! This is amazing!
更厉害的是，用着用着，小鱼就能听到丹枢大人的声音了，就像现在这样。过去丹枢大人事务繁忙，没有空和小鱼一起玩，现在终于有时间了。

What's more, as I used the tablet, I gradually became able to hear Lady Dan Shu's voice, like I'm doing right now. She was always too busy with her official duties to play with me, but now we can finally play together.
她已经不在了，你听见的丹枢…
She's no longer here. The voice you've been hearing...
小鱼知道，小鱼不该听到丹枢大人说话。小鱼不是什么都不懂的傻孩子。
I know... I shouldn't be able to hear her voice. I'm not naive, and I know what has happened.
小鱼也知道，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}来到这里，也是来回收这块石板的吧？
And I know you're here to retrieve this tablet, right?
I've got to retrieve the Manuscript of Silence.
回收？这个石板是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的吗？还是说…它也和丹枢大人做的那些事有关？
Retrieve? Is this tablet yours, {F#miss}{M#mister}? Or does it... have something to do with what Lady Dan Shu did?
唉，没关系…小鱼也能猜到，这块石板早晚会被人收走的。
Fine, it doesn't matter... I always had a feeling that someone would come and take it away.
那，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，能允许小鱼和丹枢大人告别吗？上一次，小鱼就没来得及说一声再见。
But before that... Can I bid farewell to Lady Dan Shu, {F#miss}{M#mister}? I didn't have time to bid farewell to her last time...
她灰蒙蒙的双眼中流露出莫名的坚定，你没办法拒绝这个要求。
An unwavering determination emanates from her glassy eyes. Seeing this, you simply don't have the heart to deny her request.
丹枢大人，谢谢您一直帮助小鱼。但接下来的路，小鱼该自己走了。就像您一直教给小鱼的那样…请不必担心，小鱼会靠自己的力量，好好活下去的。
Thank you for your help all the time, Lady Dan Shu, but I'm afraid it's time for me to walk my own path without you. Please don't worry... I'll follow your instructions and live well on my own.
小鱼将那块随身携带的旧石板递给了你。
Xiaoyu hands you the stone tablet she's been carrying with her.
那小鱼也该回家了，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}再见～
I should go home too. See you next time, {F#miss}{M#mister}!
谢谢，不必了。就像丹枢大人说的那样，往后几百年的路，小鱼还是要自己走的。
Thanks, but no there's no need. Just like Lady Dan Shu said, I'll have to walk my own path for the next few hundred years.
小鱼跌跌撞撞地从你的视线范围内消失了。
Stumbling and wavering, Xiaoyu disappears from your sight.
唉…不管怎么说，《无言之卷》也顺利回收了。交还给玉络吧。
*sigh* Anyway... here is the Manuscript of Silence. I should return it to Yuluo.
你交还了《无言之卷》并讲述了回收它的过程。
You return the Manuscript of Silence and explain how you've retrieved it.
我知道你有些担心这是丹枢大人在搞什么借尸还魂的把戏，但请放心吧，根据我的调查，应该不是这样的。
I know you're worried that Lady Dan Shu might try to possess Xiaoyu's body or something, but please rest assured. My investigation suggests otherwise.
根据我查到的一些散碎的资料和你的见闻…我怀疑它被禁止是因为，使用它的人会在潜意识里对它情感投射，甚至将它人格化。
Based on what we've found together... I suspect it was forbidden because this tome's user would subconsciously project emotions onto it and even personify it.
而《无言之卷》总是会挑选那些「专注聆听」的人，借助他们独有听觉世界构建形象，混淆他们对现实世界的认知。
The Manuscript of Silence always chooses those who listen carefully as its target and uses their unusually sharp auditory sense to create a virtual world and confuse their sensations.
这样当然对人的精神健康有害，也容易对人的社会生活造成负面影响…所以《无言之卷》的技术就被禁止了，成为了「禁忌书典」的一员。
Of course, this is detrimental to their mental health, and will have an impact on their social life... That's why the Manuscript of Silence is listed as one of the forbidden tomes.
所以放心好了，丹枢大人已经离开很久了。你遇到的，恐怕只是一个过于思念她的小孩子罢了。
So, don't worry. Lady Dan Shu has been gone for a long time, and Xiaoyu is just an innocent girl who misses her too much.
丹枢大人做的事情确实人神共愤，但她对小鱼也是真的好。人都是很复杂的嘛。
What Lady Dan Shu did was indeed outrageous, but her concern for Xiaoyu was genuine. Living beings can be so complex, right?
What happened to you? Please, wake up!
怎么会这样…难道那些关于《瘈狂之卷》传说都是真的吗？
How could this happen... Could it be that all those rumors about the Manuscript of Delirium are true?
我在丹鼎司见过你，你还和龙女大人关系不错对不对？你快来看看，这个人好像出事了……
It's you! I've seen you at the Alchemy Commission, and you seem to be close with the Dragon Lady. Please help me! Something seems off about this man...
别碰那本书，他可能是受到禁书的诅咒不省人事了，您可要小心点啊！
And don't touch that book! I think he was knocked out by the curse of that forbidden book! Please be careful!
我恰好是来回收禁书的。
Don't worry. I'm here to retrieve this forbidden book.
回收《瘈狂之卷》？关于这本书的诅咒可是真实存在的！不能小瞧啊！
Retrieve the Manuscript of Delirium? But this book is really cursed! You can't be too careful about it!
我俩都是学宫的学生，前段时间在丹鼎司实习。我们一直听说丹鼎司有很多不能给外人看的「禁忌书典」，趁着丹鼎司乱作一团，就想搞一本来偷偷看看。

We are both students at the academy, and we were interning at the Alchemy Commission not long ago. We heard about the forbidden tomes, so we took advantage of the chaos in the Commission and snatched one of them.
这本《瘈狂之卷》…很多人都听说过它的恐怖传说…据说它里面写满了禁忌的知识，无准备的人只要看上一眼，就会立刻全身痉挛，不省人事……

Many people have heard of the horrible legends of this Manuscript of Delirium... Legend has it that it's filled with forbidden knowledge, and any readers who are not well-prepared will be knocked unconscious at the very first sight...
醒过来的人大多述说着不曾发生在他们身上的经历，这些经历还全然不同。
Those who woke up later would tell stories about experiences they had never actually had, and their stories varied from one another.
还有传言说，有人只是稍微翻开《瘈狂之卷》看了一眼，就丢掉了性命！
I've even heard rumors about someone losing their life just because they stole a peek into the Manuscript of Delirium!
Don't worry. I will be careful.
没错，千万要小心。我俩好歹是搞科学的，起初不太相信这些东西……
Yeah, that's the attitude. Being students of the sciences, we thought those were just baseless rumors...
是啊，我们一开始也是这么想的，觉得肯定是哪个古人在乱编故事吓唬人。
Well, that's what we thought at first, too. We believed it was nothing more than some wild stories.
我男朋友阿云，也就是躺在地上那位，他壮着胆子翻开了书……
So my boyfriend, Yun... Yeah, the guy lying on the ground now... summoned up the courage and opened the book...
…可下一秒立刻就瞪直了双眼，全身抽搐、蜷缩成一团，然后口齿不清地喊了一句「别靠近我」之类的话…然后就…晕过去了……
...But the next second, his eyes opened wide and his body twitched and curled into a ball. Then he slurred something like "Don't come closer!"... and then he passed out...
这真的太可怕了…我们再也不敢打禁忌书典的主意了…您要回收这本书，也请一定要小心行事啊！我先带着他去医馆了！
This is terrible... We'll never dare to tamper with any of the forbidden tomes again. Please be careful while retrieving it! I'll take my boyfriend to the apothecary!
No! We'll never do it again!
这大概就是玉络让我回收的《瘈狂之卷》了。刚才那两个偷书的学生不像在演戏，难道这书真有那么邪门？
This must be the Manuscript of Delirium that Yuluo asked me to retrieve. I don't think those two students were pretending, but does this book really possess such dangerous power?
(Put it back where you found it.)
(Put it in your inventory just to be safe.)
既然读这本书有这么大的危险性，那我还是稳妥些，不要翻开它了吧。直接拿去带给玉络就好。
If reading this book could be so dangerous, I'll play it safe and bring it straight back to Yuluo.
翻开书的一瞬间，你感受到一阵强烈的刺痛。
The moment you open the book, you feel an acute, penetrating pain throughout your body.
你眼前一黑，全身肌肉无法控制地紧绷在一起，几乎跌坐在地。
As everything goes black, your muscles tense up uncontrollably and you nearly stumble over.
这是一段不属于你的记忆，就像是你读取忆泡时一样，你感受到的疯狂是外来的，而非本源性的…逐渐的，你对周围世界的感受也开始重合……

It is as if you are experiencing someone else's memory, much like reading a Memory Bubble. A hint of delirium seeps in from outside, rather than from within yourself. Gradually, your perception of the world around you begins to blur...
你看清周围仿佛是雪夜，这里不是仙舟罗浮，一辆失控的汽车跌跌撞撞，在湿滑的地面上难以自我控制，它不出意料地撞向了你，你飞向了半空中……

As you take in your surroundings, you find yourself in a snowy night and realize that you are no longer on the Xianzhou Luofu. Suddenly, a car loses control on the slippery road, careening towards you with terrifying speed and sending you hurling through the air...
你忍着痛，从车窗玻璃的反射上看清了自己的相貌——那毫无疑问是一个身穿制服的死鱼眼少年，此刻你*毫不怀疑*那就是自己，那本不应该是你自己。

Despite the excruciating pain that you endure, you manage to catch a glimpse of yourself in the car window's reflection. You see the face of a lifeless teenager in school uniform staring back at you. As surreal as it may seem, you know with "certainty" that it is your reflection...
渐渐地，你的文字开始崩坏…涓轰簡缁欐瘝浜叉姤浠囨潃姝讳粬……
The Words iN FrONt oF yoUR eYes StaRT tO DiSTorT, dISsolVe, anNnnNd tHene TuUrRN iNto ssOmmmooMmmeTHing ILLeeegigbla...
仿佛幸运女神眷顾，从你手里掉落的书本巧合地合上了，书合上的一瞬间，不适感也烟消云散了。你用了数秒才勉强稳住心神。
Fortunately, by pure chance, the book falls from your hand and closes. At that moment, the discomfort immediately dissipates. It takes you a few moments to regain your composure.
那场逼真的车祸足以让你相信，《瘈狂之卷》能让人将记忆强行植入他人记忆之中，恐怕这本书里留下的都是危险的体验。

The immersive car accident makes you believe that the Manuscript of Delirium possesses the power to transplant foreign memories into others. Perhaps the book is full of experiences about being on the brink of death.
你交还了《瘈狂之卷》并讲述了回收它的过程。
You return the Manuscript of Delirium and explain how you've retrieved it.
这书原来是被那几个实习的学生给偷走了…我还在想呢，要是丹枢大人的那些残党，肯定都知道这书没什么价值，不会去偷的。
So it was stolen by those interns... You know, I was wondering why Lady Dan Shu's remnants would steal this book, because they should be well aware that this book is totally worthless.
这书其实就是记载了很多不应对外公布的丹方。前人们为了防止这些东西泄露，就在书上设置了一些小机关，你碰到的应该是电流吧？

This book actually contains a lot of prescriptions that shouldn't be made public. The author added some little gadgets to prevent its secrets from being leaked. I believe you were knocked out by an electric current, right?
「一旦阅读者未经过校验，这本书就会放出强大的电流，将读者放倒……」
"Once an unauthorized reader opens this book, it will release a powerful electric shock and knock them out..."
至少我听说的版本是这样的，强行植入他人的记忆，这种事情天方夜谭，除非有忆庭的人才能做到…等等，好像也有可能？

At least, this is what I've heard. As for "transplanting memories," that's simply too wild to be true. It's impossible without the help of the Garden of Recollection... Wait, what if they're really involved?
算了，这种恐怖传说至少能避免一些脑子不清楚的年轻人，对「禁忌书典」产生什么不该有的好奇心。
Well, anyway, these horror legends will keep young people with unwanted curiosity about the forbidden tomes at bay.
这样一来，丹鼎司丢失的所有「禁忌书典」就都已经找齐了。多亏了你帮忙，这些书才没产生任何不良影响。
Thanks to your help, all the lost forbidden tomes have been safely returned without causing any calamities.
青镞大人果然慧眼识英才。若不是有你在，这三本书我真不知道要找到什么时候去……
Madam Qingzu was right to have faith in you. Without your help, it would have taken me forever to find these lost manuscripts...
这是你应得的报酬，收下吧。以后可能还会有事情拜托你，到时候还请多多帮助了。
Here's your hard-earned payment. I might need your help again in the future. See you then.
This world has been so unfair...
我这也太倒霉了…世界对我实在是太不公平了，这日子没法过了……
I'm jinxed... This world has been so unfair... I just can't go on like this...
不要丧失生活的希望啊！
Don't give up on your life!
我也想啊！可这残酷的命运不给我这个机会啊！
I didn't want to, but now I'm feeling like giving in to the cruel hand of fate!
哎，别提了…我实在是太倒霉了，倒霉到快要过不下去了……
Well... I'm just so unlucky... I can't take it anymore...
我也觉得日子没法过了…
I understand. I can't take it anymore, either...
别别别，你该过还是得过…我过不下去，是因为我真的太倒霉了……
No, no, no, you've got to keep going... but I really can't take it anymore, because I'm just so unlucky...
我叫做阿幸，人如其名，非常不幸。你主动来关心我，说明你是个好人，还是离我远些，免得我的坏运气连累了你。
My name is A-Xing, which means "fortunate." However, I'm positively jinxed. I appreciate that you're concerned for me, but you seem like a good person and I don't want to drag you down.
Don't worry. Bad luck or jinxes don't really exist.
我原本也不信这套的啊！直到现实一次次给我响亮的耳光……
I thought so, too, but then reality kept slapping me in the face and proving me wrong, time after time...
你在鉴爻轩门口干什么？
What are you doing here, at the entrance of the Looking Bronze?
我也不知道…可能是想在这里给自己盖棺定论吧……
I don't know... Maybe I just want to get a final conclusion this time...
我也算是这鉴爻轩的常客了，每隔一段时间都要来抽一次签，可你猜怎么着？我抽到的永远都是那三种凶签！几百次了，一次不凶的都没抽到过！

I've been coming to the Looking Bronze every once in a while, but guess what? I got one of the three "Woe" sticks every single time! I've done this hundreds of times, and not once have I got a "Weal!"
不，还是要抽的…凶签和凶签之间也有区别。
No, I've got to do this... Even though they're all "Woe" sticks, there are differences between them.
The fortune-telling here is never accurate...
That's not true. Ruoyue is an excellent fortune-teller.
你不会是在幸灾乐祸吧？我是认真的。
You're not gloating, are you? I'm serious.
就比如说前几天吧，我抽中了「苍城」签，这个卦象的意思是「突如其来的惨烈打击」……
For example, I drew the "Cangcheng" hexagram the other day, which indicates "a sudden and tragic blow"...
然后我刚离开鉴爻轩，就被机巧鸟撞到头，伤势严重。之后去医馆换药，结果那个医馆是药王秘传的窝点，正赶上云骑军收网，又阴差阳错把我当成了同党，抓走审了一天。

Then right after I left the Looking Bronze, I got hit on the head by a cycrane and suffered a nasty wound, so I went to an apothecary to get it treated, but guess what? That apothecary turned out to be a hideout for the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and the Cloud Knights mistook me for an accomplice and took me away for a whole day of trial.
总算是解释清楚了身份吧…可这天还刚好是我学宫的毕业考试！等到云骑把我放了的时候，考试都结束了半天了！
To make matters worse, my graduation exam at the academy happened to be on that very same day... By the time they finally let me go, the exam was already over.
我想你也听明白了，我就是这样一个不幸的人。我今天要抽人生最后一次签，如果还是凶签，我的人生就已经盖棺定论了！
I think you get what I'm trying to say: I'm simply jinxed. Today, I'm going to draw one last time, and if it's still a "Woe" hexagram, I might as well give up on my life!
这次无论如何都要抽到吉签！
I must get a "Weal" hexagram this time no matter what!
阿幸嘴里念念叨叨，看来他正在酝酿情绪。他还没有准备好去迎接自己的命运。
A-Xing is muttering and trying to gather his courage. Apparently, he is not yet ready to unveil his fate.
要不你去确认一下，世界上真的有这么倒霉的人吗？
Maybe you should ask Ruoyue if there are actually people who are born unlucky?
（趁阿幸去抽签之前，找若月老板问问吧…）
(I should check with Ruoyue before A-Xing draws...)
Good luck, good luck, good luck...
你别这样看着我，我确实说过，我要去抽人生最后一次签。
Don't give me that look. I did say I was going to draw one last time in my life.
…可是我现在还不敢，除非帝弓能保佑我抽出吉签，我才能下定决心去抽签。
...But I don't dare to do it yet, unless the Reignbow Arbiter can guarantee that I'll get a "Weal."
Have you heard of the jinxed A-Xing?
您要只说「阿幸」，我还真未必能想起来。但您要加上「倒霉的」这个定语，那就没别人了…他每次的卜卦都是凶签，但还是坚持不懈地卜卦。

A-Xing? Well, I may not remember the name along, but since you mentioned "jinxed," I can hardly forget someone as unlucky as him... I mean, he has never drawn a "Weal" stick, but he just keeps on trying anyway.
他不是因为抽出了凶签才倒霉，而是因为倒霉，才会次次都抽出凶签。当然我推荐了他很多转运道具，不过他的霉运有些…过强了。

It's his bad luck that makes him draw a "Woe" stick every time, not the other way around. Of course, I've recommended him a lot of charms and trinkets to help improve his luck, but his bad luck is a bit too... overwhelming.
唉…其实我呢，一直觉得人的命运绝非天注定。人如果能用更好的心态来面对未来，自然就会面对更好的未来。
To be honest... I've always believed that one's fate is not necessarily predestined. If one can stay optimistic about their future, then they will have a brighter future ahead of them.
如果阿幸能抽出一次不那么凶的签，也许就能改变他面对命运的心态…可惜，他一直没等来这个机会……
If A-Xing could experience something other than "Woe," it might help change his attitude about his fate... Unfortunately, he's never had the chance...
我们钦定一个吉签给他呗？
How about we guarantee him a "Weal"?
嗯？您的意思是…我来人为修改占卜的结果，确保他一定会抽到一个吉签？可这只是给了他一个伪造的抽签结果啊，又没办法真的让他变幸运……
Huh? Are you suggesting... that I rig the results so that A-Xing gets a "Weal"? But that's just a fake result. It's not really going to change his bad luck...
You just said that one's fate is not necessarily predestined.
Well... I guess that's a good point.
只要能改变他的心态就好。
As long as this helps change his attitude about his fate.
Well... I guess that's a good point.
他说这是人生最后一签…
He said this would be the last draw of his life...
I'm sort of convinced, I guess.
唉，不管那么多了！万一给了他吉签，他还是倒霉，那可不是咱俩的错啊！
All right, fine! Just don't blame me or yourself if we guarantee him a "Weal" stick but he still has bad luck!
稍等我片刻啊，我改造一下占卜用的玉兆。
Wait for a while. I'll need to modify the jade abacus for divination.
若月开始改造用于占卜的玉兆。她毕竟曾是太卜司的卜者，调整这些硬件设备也是得心应手。
Ruoyue starts to modify her jade abacus used for divination. It doesn't take her too long to alter the hardware, since she used to be a diviner in the Divination Commission.
行了，改造完了。您先测试一下改造后的效果？理论上，这个玉兆应该只会出现吉签了。
All right, it's done. Would you like to test it out? Theoretically, this jade abacus should only produce "Weal" results now.
眼观鼻鼻观心，你在心中默念着自己所问之事。
You dive into the depths of your mind and meditate on the question in your mind.
玉兆开始转动，某种看不见的屏障隔绝了你与外界的联系。在突如其来的宁静里，某个模糊的画面渐渐清晰了起来——

As the jade abacus starts spinning, some kind of invisible barrier separates you from the outside world. In the midst of the sudden tranquility, a blurred yet unmistakable image gradually becomes clear...
你看见的是仙舟「罗浮」，云骑军拱卫着遮天蔽日的建木，化外民登舟求访，星槎海中人潮汹涌声浪滔天。

You are seeing the Xianzhou Luofu, on which the towering Ambrosial Arbor looms over countless Cloud Knights. With the arrival of numerous Outworlders, Starskiff Haven is alive with people from all walks of life.
成了，是「罗浮」签！这可是大大的吉签啊！来吧，咱们再试一次。
It's the "Luofu," a very auspicious stick! Awesome, let's try again!
But I thought you should never perform two divinations in a single day?
老板您就别逗了，咱俩都直接修改玉兆了，什么二卦不二卦的还值得纠结吗？
Come on! Why even bother with these rules when we've already cracked the jade abacus?
玉兆开始转动，某种看不见的屏障隔绝了你与外界的联系。在突如其来的宁静里，某个模糊的画面渐渐清晰了起来——

As the jade abacus starts spinning, some kind of invisible barrier separates you from the outside world. In the midst of the sudden tranquility, a blurred yet unmistakable image gradually becomes clear...
你看见的是仙舟「曜青」，它挟风驭雷，自九天之外疾驰而来。甲板上无数狐人披甲站立，威风凛凛势不可挡。

You are seeing the Xianzhou Yaoqing, which is advancing at a dazzling speed, carrying the momentum of tempest and thunder. Countless foxians, fully armed, are standing on the deck in a majestic posture.
没问题没问题，这个也是吉签！唉，虽然好久没摆弄过硬件了，但看起来我的手艺还没完全荒废……
Awesome, another "Weal" stick! Hah, even though it's been a while since I've tinkered with hardware like this, my skills haven't gone to waste after all...
您找个由头把阿幸叫过来吧。
Why do you need me to call him?
呃…我去叫他显得十分刻意不是吗？「我这占卜用的玉兆好了，你可以来抽签了」…这不是就像是在说「以前玉兆是坏的」一样吗？

Well... it might seem a bit too deliberate if I just call him out of the blue and say something like, "Hey, my jade abacus is ready. Come over here and draw your lot." It might make it seem like my abacus wasn't ready before.
你去找他吧，尽量假装不知情，咱俩这演技要是不过关，怎么能帮到阿幸嘛。
Just call him over and pretend you know nothing about my jade abacus. We've got to put on a credible show, otherwise we won't be able to help him.
我要去抽人生最后一次签…可是我好害怕！
This will be the last fortune in my life... but I'm so scared!
Don't worry. Everything will just be fine.
你不做决定，霉运不会改变。
Time to make a decision. Your jinx is in your own hands.
你想说的是「命运不会改变」吧，我明白了。
I think what you were trying to say is, "your fate is in your own hands," right? But yeah, I understand.
其实每一次抽签，我都默默告诉自己「每一次抽签都当最后一次，也不要怕是凶签」…但是，这一次我真的要把它当成最后一次时，我却怂了。

To be honest, every time I drew a stick, I kept telling myself that it would be the last time and that I shouldn't be discouraged if it turned out to be a "Woe"... But now that I'm actually going to draw the last one, I'm feeling unsure of myself.
我这心理素质，还需要陌生人帮我加油鼓劲…哎，我已经决定了，我要去抽，我要看清命运，我要决定我的未来，我现在就出发！
I even need a stranger to cheer me up... All right. I've made up my mind! I've got to draw the last lot and embrace my fate, no matter what it may have in store for me!
若月老板，我好怕啊，要是这一抽，这一抽不出，我就、我就……
I'm still so scared, Ruoyue. What if I still get a "Woe?" I—I will be so...
我算到您这次无论如何都不会抽到凶签了。老板，您要相信我若月的本事啊！
Don't worry. I've foreseen that you'll definitely not get a "Woe" this time. You should have faith in me!
无论如何都不会抽到凶签了？真的假的？你这卜算这么精准的吗？
Really? I definitely won't get a "Woe" this time? Do you really mean it?
总之，请老板相信我。我若月一辈子还没算错过什么东西呢！您快占卜一下试试看吧～
Anyway, please trust me. My divination has never been wrong! Just draw your lot and see what awaits you.
好…好的吧…既然你都这么说了，那我就试试看吧。
F—Fine... I'll give it a try if you say so.
阿幸站在玉兆前，低下头，大概是在默念自己想要卜算的事情。玉兆开始转动…可转了几圈，玉兆便停转了。
A-Xing stands in front of the jade abacus and lowers his head, deep in thought about what he wants to divine. The jade abacus starts to turn... but it stops abruptly after only a short while.
阿幸愣了一下，接着继续低头默念。玉兆重新开始转动…然后很快，玉兆又停转了。
A-Xing freezes for a moment and then lowers his head again. The jade abacus starts to turn... but once again, it stops after a short while.
若月小姐…这…这是怎么一回事啊？
Ruoyue, your jade abacus is not working...
这这这…怎么回事？稍等我看看…啊…这个占卜玉兆…似乎是…坏掉了……
Wh—Wh—What's going on here? Let me take a look... Ah, this jade abacus... I think it's... broken...
那个…阿幸老板啊，这个玉兆好像坏掉了，不好意思让你白跑了一趟啊……
I'm sorry, A-Xing... but this abacus seems to be broken... I'm sorry for having you come all this way for nothing...
唉…哈哈哈哈哈哈哈，原来「无论如何都不会抽到凶签」是这么个意思啊？若月小姐，你的卜算确实是灵验的。
H—Haha... Hahahahahaha! So that's what you meant by "you'll definitely not get a Woe!" You're indeed an excellent fortune-teller, Ruoyue!
人生最后一次抽签，结果竟然是…占卜用玉兆坏掉了。
The last draw in my life ends up... with the breaking of the jade abacus.
（我该怎么办？{NICKNAME}老板，快说点什么！）
(What should I do? Come on, {NICKNAME}, say something!)
这是吉签的一种表现形式…
Well, you can consider this a "Weal" in a sense...
至少这次结果绝对不是凶签…
At least it's not a "Woe" stick again...
其实我刚才那一瞬间已经想明白了，要我把命运赌在这玩意上面，那也太吓人了！回想起来，我都惊出了一身冷汗……
To be honest, when I drew the lot, I almost freaked out realizing that I had bet my fate on its result! I was in a cold sweat before I realized it...
这是最棒的占卜，若月老板，请你收下我的「谢礼」，我再也不会被占卜左右了。
This is the best divination, Ruoyue! Please accept this as a token of gratitude! I'll never be swayed by divination results again!
唉…事情怎么会变成这样呢？
...I didn't expect things to turn out like this.
His bad luck is really something else.
是啊，从业这么多年，我真的没见过倒霉到这种地步的人…太可怜了……
Yep, in all my years in the business, I've never seen someone so unlucky... What a poor guy...
有没有可能是你设计如此？
Is this a part of your plan?
大概也是他「倒霉」的一部分吧？我也没想到。
No, I think this is more likely a part of his "bad luck?"
他还给了我这么一笔「谢礼」…说实话，受之有愧。既然这个点子是咱们俩一起想的，那这笔谢礼，也让咱俩对半分了吧。
He even gave me some money... but to be honest, I'd feel a bit awkward accepting it. Since we came up with the idea together, it seems fair to split it in half.
唔…好的吧，那就当我欠您一个人情。
All right... then I'll consider it a favor I owe you.
别客气，这都是您应得的报酬。
Don't be a stranger. You deserve it.
何不把另一半也给我呢？
Split it in half? Why don't you just give it all to me?
老板您倒是也真不客气…行吧，都给您吧。反正我也确实受之有愧。
Greed is good, huh?... Fine, you can have it all. I didn't intend to accept it anyway.
唉…说到底，这就只是心态的改变。也许这比他抽到吉签要幸运得多。
In the end, it's just a change in his attitude towards life. Maybe this result is even better than him getting a "Weal".
（怎么会有人在这种地方贴交友广告？有意思……）
(Who would ever post a Friends Wanted ad here? Interesting...)
（丹恒问我借钱？真的假的…该怎么办好呢？）
(Dan Heng asked to borrow money from me? Is he for real...? What am I going to do?)
Forward the message to Dan Heng.
丹恒用小号向你借钱，这种事即使在睡梦中你也想象不到。
Dan Heng used an alt account to borrow money from you. You couldn't even make this up, even in your dreams.
你也说不清这是基于一种什么心理，是亲密好友之间的惯性揶揄，又或者是出门在外的警惕感迫使你想向他求证，你最终决定将匿名短信转发给丹恒本人。

You can't tell what this behavior is based on — is it habitual teasing between close friends, or the vigilance of being on the road that forces you to ask him for confirmation? Ultimately, you decide to forward the anonymous message on to Dan Heng himself.
反正我钱多，直接转账吧！
Anyway, I've got plenty of money, so let's just do a transfer!
你自诩见识过不少世面，区区五万信用点对你来说，实在不算什么。
You brag about having first-hand knowledge of the wider world. A mere fifty thousands credits is really nothing to you.
你也说不清自己为何要这么做，但一种突如其来的冲动占据了大脑，你很好奇在转账之后会发生什么，你的手指不由自主地点开了转账界面。
You can't say for sure why you did this, but a sudden impulse seizes your mind: You're curious, what happens after the funds are transferred? Your fingers subconsciously open up the transfer screen.
（怎么回事？我的信用点用完了？）
(How did this happen? I'm all out of credits!?)
你注意到似有狂徒在此处进行了某些破坏行为，墓碑上厚厚的尘土与附近的纸屑便是最好的证明。
You notice some loons have done a bit of vandalism nearby, as evidenced by the thick dust gathered on the tombstone and scraps of paper nearby.
你仔细端详着墓碑，表面灰尘上被人极具嘲讽性地被戳了两个洞，看着倒像是鼻孔，又或者眼睛。你与墓碑面面相觑，你决定——
You carefully scrutinize the tombstone: Two holes have been poked through the dust to make it look like nostrils — or maybe eyes. As you and the tombstone look each other over, you decide:
Wipe away the dust with your bare hands.
在你的努力下，墓碑表面篆刻的「碑文」渐渐显现出来。上面记录着一种你闻所未闻的拳法，这或许是某位深藏不露的仙舟前辈留下的绝世传承。

With some effort, the inscription carved into the stone gradually appears. It talks of some boxing techniques you've never heard of, and this may just be a unique and hidden relic passed down from Xianzhou ancients.
你迅速品鉴完这份神秘的「拳谱」，这一招一式的步骤详细且简明易懂，属实是新手入门的不二之选，你试着演练了几招，耍起来虎虎生风，瞬间明白了它的含金量。

You quickly go over this mysterious "boxing manual." Each move is detailed and easy to understand, making it great for beginners. You give several of them a try, putting together several powerful moves as you instantly understand their value.
你决定将这墓碑上的一切熟记在脑子里，于是你认真研读起来，但你始终参不透结尾的这句「需选用高筋面粉」是什么意思。

You decide to commit everything on this tombstone to memory, and so you begin your careful study — but no matter what, you're unable to figure out what the final sentence means: "This requires high gluten flour."
这「高筋面粉」你认识是某种食材，或许是某种食补方子，又或者是面粉在拳法中有什么特殊含义。拳法，面粉，刹那间你脑海中闪过了一个熟悉的身影——

This "high gluten flour" sounds like a food. Perhaps it's a nutritional supplement, or perhaps it's got a special meaning in boxing. Boxing... flour... Suddenly, a familiar figure pops into your mind:
Master Yancui at the Spices Supreme!
「别人光知道你身手好，不知道你做饭也这么好，改天得举行个金人巷功夫厨神争霸赛让游客们也知道知道。」你想起了金人巷的燕翠大厨，有不少人夸她功夫高强。

"People might know about your fighting prowess, but few know about your cooking skills. We should hold a Great Aurum Alley Cook Off Contest to show the world your talent." You cast your mind back to the Aurum Alley's Master Yancui and the many who've praised her skill.
想来她会了解这佚名拳法最后章节的秘密。
Speaking of which, she should have a grasp of what the last line of this boxing manual meant.
你努力回想，但脑海里却只留下一片惨淡的空白，和大部分不幸的人一样，机会摆在他们面前，他们也无法把握，这或许就是太卜司所推崇的某种「命数」吧。

Casting your mind back, you're trying recalling but your mind is completely blank. Like most people, an opportunity has fallen right into your lap that you're unable to capitalize on. Perhaps that's what they mean at the Divination Commission when they talk about "Fate."
就在你准备放弃之时，胸腔中有数道暖意翻涌而上。或许这是对你高尚品行的某种回应吧，在你耳畔回荡着一道微妙的声音——
Just as you're about to give up, you feel several gushes of warmth wash over you. Maybe this is a response to your noble sensibilities. You hear a faint ringing in your ears:
I'm tired and don't want to do a thing.
算了，此地人迹罕至，绝非什么风水宝地。既然墓碑主人没有计较这些表面的肮脏，你也懒得改变什么，以免惊动这可怖的暮色。

Forget it. This place is rarely visited, and hardly some magical sacred site. Seeing as the tombstone's owner never cared about how filthy it was, you're not changing anything either. Saves you from having to spook this eerie twilight silence.
当然，真正的原因只有你自己清楚——你可不想脏了自己的手，毕竟整个仙舟都知道，小手不干净可不是什么好事。
But of course, you're the only one who knows the real reason: You don't want to get your hands dirty. After all, everyone on the Xianzhou knows that dirty hands are a terrible thing.
(Ask Yancui for the secret behind Xianzhou boxing)
你这可就问对人了，咱可是「云曳旗旌流星拳」的首席大弟子，这仙舟四十八路拳法我打小就练了个遍。
You've come to the right place. I'm the top disciple for the Cloudbanner Meteor Fists. I've practiced the Forty-Eight Chambers of boxing since I was knee-high to a grasshopper.
可惜啊，都没听闻哪家拳法要用这「高筋面粉」的。咱也有点搞不懂了，这面粉是怎么个练法，莫非是辅助练暗劲的？可这不对啊……

Unfortunately I've never heard of any boxing that needs "high gluten flour." I don't really get how this flour's used in training, unless it's used to train some obscure moves. That doesn't sound right...
要不这样吧，你把那拳法招式给我演示一遍，我瞧瞧便知道是怎么回事了。
Why don't we do this? You gimme a demonstration of the move, and I'll take a look at what's going on.
（为她演示一遍墓碑上的拳法）
(Demonstrate for her some of the boxing described on the tombstone)
你将那墓碑上记载的佚名拳法逐招演示出来。
One-by-one, you perform moves from the unknown boxing school as etched onto the tombstone.
这个发力在腰…这招…倒是在手臂…可这角度…这动作倒有点眼熟的……
This one forces the waist... and this move... unexpectedly hits the arm... but at this angle... this move actually seems kinda familiar...
噢！咱悟了，这是揉面的法子，不是什么拳法！有些客人牙口好，爱吃有劲头的面点，这必须得用高筋面粉仔细揉面，否则做出来就没那种劲道的口感了。

Oh! I got it. This is a method for kneading dough, not any kind of boxing school! Some customers have strong teeth and prefer chewy noodles. That has to use high gluten flour with careful kneading, otherwise you can't stretch out that chewy texture.
揉面也是个体力活，机巧揉的和人手揉的压根不能比。揉面嘛，怎么发力、怎么揉都是有技巧的，得讲究巧劲，否则做出来要么就是死面疙瘩，要么就是形散神散的面渣了。

Kneading noodle dough is a tiring task, and ingenium-knead doughs cannot compare to manual-knead doughs. Where you apply the force and how you knead — there's a technique and a knack behind everything. You have to focus on form, otherwise you'll either get lumpy dough or scattered flakes.
那我这拳法岂不是白学了…
So it'd be a complete waste of time to learn it as a boxing skill...?
话也不能这么说，你好心做好事，自然该得到回报。只不过你不通厨艺，才闹了个乌龙。这「拳法」，你学了没用，但我学了有用呀。

That's not quite true. If you do good things with good intentions, you should be reciprocated. It's just that you're not a cook, so you've kinda dropped this clanger. There's no point in you learning this "boxing" technique — but there is for me.
来，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，也辛苦你特意跑一趟，咱也不好叫你吃亏，咱这就给你做几道拿手好菜去。
Here, {F#miss}{M#mister}, thank you for all your effort. I don't want to put you out, so I've prepared several specialty dishes for you.
「祝你和我一样拥有精致睡眠。」从碑文来看，墓主人一定是个和善的人。
"Wishing you an exquisite sleep just like me." Judging by the inscription, the grave occupant must be a very kind person.
墓碑旁的供品佐证了你的猜想，当这位叫「阿欣」的姑娘陷入永恒的沉睡中时，她的故友至亲也不曾忘记她——就是不知道他们在探望她的时候都准备了什么礼物。

Offerings beside the tombstone support your hypothesis. When this girl called A-Xin fell into an eternal sleep, her old friends and relatives never forgot about her — You just don't know what gift they prepared when they visited her.
「开盲盒试试！」在你暗自思忖仙舟供品可有什么讲究之处时，脑海中有道戏谑的声音响起，像奔雷撕破寂静的夜空。
"Try opening a mystery box!" Just as you're pondering what a Xianzhou specialty offering could be, a joking voice pipes up to tear asunder the calm night sky like a bolt of thunder.
Try opening a few mystery boxes!
只是开开看看，绝不乱动里面的东西，你的内心并不平静，但你试图开导自己。
You just open them up to take a look, never daring to touch the contents. Despite your heart being far from becalmed, you try to talk yourself out of it.
你真的决定要这样做吗？
Are you really sure you want to do this?
在这一瞬间，你感觉自己似乎失去了某种极为宝贵的东西。你忙不迭地检查了全身，完好无损，奇怪，究竟是丢了什么东西呢？这东西真的重要吗？

In a flash, you feel as though you have lost something extremely precious. You hastily check over your whole body: Everything remains in place. Strange... what was it that you lost? And was it important?
你并没有恶意，你只是好奇，而好奇正是生物于银河间行践开拓壮举的必要品质——你劝服了自己，心中某种躁动的不安平息了下来。

You mean no harm and are just curious, and curiosity is a necessary quality for creatures trailblazing magnificent feats across the galaxy. You convince yourself, and a restless discomfort in your heart settles right down.
那么现在，是「开盲盒」的时候了。你伸手打开了供品的包装盖，上面的灰尘弄脏了你的手，但这有什么所谓呢，反正你戴着手套，双手早就不干净了。

So now, it's time to open a mystery box. You reach out and open the offering's packaging. Your hand gets dirty from the dust on it, but it doesn't matter because you're wearing gloves. So your hands were dirty from the get-go.
你拿起供品细细端详，里面有些精致的吃食，包装完好，就是不知道是否过期。还有些可爱的家居用品，漂亮的头饰、眼罩，看得出来墓主人生前颇为享受生活——

You pick up the offerings and study them a while. Inside are exquisite foods, preserved and intact within the packaging, and of unknown expiry date. There's also some cute household items, beautiful headwear, and eye masks. It looks like the grave occupant seemed to enjoy life while it lasted...
就在你从供品的细节推测着墓主生前的种种时，背后却传来一声严苛的呵斥声。
Just as you are speculating all kinds of hot takes about the grave occupant's life, a severe castigation comes from behind.
可算逮到你了！最近接到群众举报称有人在这里偷供品！还不放下你手中的赃物！
I've caught you now! The villagers have been reporting a thief stealing from the offerings here! Put down that stolen property!
我只是打开看看，不是偷。
I was just taking a look. I didn't steal anything.
不问自取视为偷，不用辩解了，跟我们回十王司一趟就知道你究竟有没有犯事了。
Taking without asking is stealing. No need to dispute this. Come back with us to the Ten-Lords Commission and we'll soon find out whether a crime has been committed.
(Loose lips sink ships. Better to keep quiet)
你有权保持沉默，但我警告你，在十王司，我们有的是办法让你开口。
You have the right to remain silent, but let this be a warning to you: At the Ten-Lords Commission, we have ways of making you talk.
哼，我见过不少像你这样嘴硬的人，没关系，到了十王司了你就会明白自己现在有多可笑了。
Hmph, I've seen lots of tight-lipped people like you before. It's fine. You'll see just how ridiculous you're being once we get to the Ten-Lords Commission.
供品完好，我没有偷东西。
The offerings are all intact. I didn't steal anything.
当真？口说无凭，我倒要仔细检查检查。
Really? Talk is cheap. I'd like to conduct a careful inspection.
我是受人所托来擦灰的！
Somebody asked me to wipe the dust!
是吗？欺骗仙舟公职人员是罪加一等，你可要想清楚了！
Really? Deceiving a Xianzhou public official is a first-degree crime. Think carefully!
这些供品的确有打开的痕迹，不过东西倒没有少。食盒供品外面的灰尘倒是擦了个干净……
These offerings indeed show signs of having been opened; however, nothing is missing. The dust on the outside of the offering packs has been wiped clean...
咳咳，看来是我们搞错了。那么这次就放过你了，快走快走，别再乱摸供品了。
Ahem, looks like we were mistaken. This time we will let you go. Run along then, and stop touching the offerings.
某种悸动在你胸腔里反复翻腾，你认真地想了许久，最终决定不碰这些供品为好。
A throbbing sensation churns through your chest, and you think long and hard about it — before ultimately choosing not to touch the offerings.
突如其来的清醒制止了你的鲁莽冲动，你下意识地醒悟过来，方才那道声音蛊惑了你，而你本该是个品格高尚的开拓者，你庆幸你守住了自己的底线。
Sudden clarity stops your reckless impulse and you subconsciously awaken. The voice just then was trying to trick you, and as a noble Trailblazer, you were able to keep your virtue intact.
「无尽的童年长埋于此，小风。」并非所有仙舟人都能平安顺遂地活下去，你默读着墓碑上短短几行字，这似乎是记录了某位仙舟孩子不幸的一生。

"My neverending childhood is buried here, Xiaofeng." Not all Xianzhou people get to live happily ever after. You pore over a few lines of the tombstone, which seems to recount the tragic demise of a young Xianzhou child.
墓碑旁摆放着几本时下流行的话本与食盒，墓碑不在乎墓中人是否真的会有无尽的童年，但「小风」的亲友在乎。

Beside the tombstone are several popular storybooks and lunchboxes. The tombstone doesn't really care whether the occupant really has had a neverending childhood, but this beloved "Xiaofeng" certainly will.
「小风二世、五世和十三世，享有不被知识支配的清净。」平平无奇的一块墓碑上记载着满满当当的一大家子，令你咋舌。

"Xiaofeng the Second, Fifth, and Thirteenth all enjoyed the purity of not being subjugated by knowledge." You are left speechless at how the names, enough for a huge family, fill up this plain and ordinary tombstone.
你敏锐地察觉到「小风」这个名字很是眼熟，兴许这是某个家族的埋骨之地，只是你有些好奇，为何这整整齐齐的一大家子如此执着于「小风」这个名字。

You are keenly aware that this "Xiaofeng" name sounds familiar to you. Maybe this is a certain family's ancestral burial place? But you're curious — Why is this whole family so obsessed with this name "Xiaofeng"?
在你暗自思忖，试图探索着仙舟上某个家族隐秘之时，一道清脆的童声打断了你的思绪。
While you're pondering and trying to explore the hidden secrets of a Xianzhou dynasty, a crisp child's voice interrupts your line of thinking.
一个不知从哪儿窜出来的小孩拍了拍你的肩膀——哦不，他够不着，于是稚嫩的小手戳了戳你的腰。
A young kid pops up from out of nowhere to pat you on the shoulder — no, he can't reach, so he pokes you in the belly with his soft, little hand.
你踩到我的东西了，劳烦抬抬脚。
You're stepping on something of mine. Could you please kindly remove your foot?
对呀，这里摆着的都是我的东西，有什么问题吗？
Yes, everything here is something of mine. You got a problem with that?
Er, where did you just pop out from?
这里本来就是我的「秘密窝点」，我去拿点东西，一回来就看到你站在这儿发呆。
This has always been my "secret lair." I went out to grab something, came back, and found you just standing there looking gormless.
你为什么一直盯着这几块墓碑看，你也认识小风吗？
Why are you staring at these tombstones? Do you know Xiaofeng, too?
I'm just a passerby taking a look.
那你盯着我的墓碑干什么，我们又不认识，还踩在我的东西上，好生无礼呀。
Then why are you staring at my tombstone? We don't know each other but here you are stepping all over my offerings. It's so rude.
对呀，写的清清楚楚啊，我就是小风。
Yep. Written out there all loud and clear. I'm Xiaofeng.
Am I speaking with the dead?
…我觉得你的脑回路很有问题。
...I think your brain circuitry is messed up.
有什么好奇怪的，这里都是我的衣冠冢。我们持明本来就是会蜕生的啊。你没看墓碑上写的字吗？我连蜕生的第几世都标注得一清二楚了。
What's so weird about it? All of this is my cenotaph. We Vidyadhara, we get our own hatching rebirth. Didn't you read the tombstone? I even wrote out every single rebirth super clearly.
好了好了，借过借过，别踩在我坟头啦，我还要搬东西过来盖新坟呢。
Fine, excuse me then. Don't step on my tomb. I'd like to move some stuff into a new grave.
我想想啊，还差三箱书，真搞不懂我上辈子怎么会那么喜欢读书…啊，糟了，又忘记带书过来了……
Let me think. Another three boxes of books still. I have no idea why I loved reading so much in my previous life... Ah, darn it. I forgot to bring those books again...
你侧过身为这孩子让了让路，并重新检查了一遍墓碑上篆刻的碑文与地上的「供品」。
You pivot your body to make way for the kid, and check over the inscription on the tombstone and the "offerings" on the ground all over again.
你发现地上的「供品」除了时兴的话本，还有分数奇低的试卷，上面画满了鲜红的批注。你开始怀疑这是否是孩童的恶作剧——

You discover that the "offerings" not only include popular storybooks, but also poorly-graded exam papers covered in red-letter corrections. You start to wonder whether this is all just some kid's elaborate prank...
但当你转过身试图向那古怪的孩童询问时，却发现他突然消失了，你仔细回想了下，发现自己压根不知道他究竟是在何时离去的。
But when you spin around to try asking the weird kid more questions, you discover that he's vanished. Now that you think about it, you realize you have absolutely no idea exactly when it was he left.
又或者，你压根没听到过他的脚步声，想到这里，冷汗从你额间滑落，此地不宜久留，你毅然决定离开。
Or maybe you've never even heard any footsteps of his at all. Thinking this causes a bead of cold sweat to roll down your forehead. Lingering here is not a good idea. You decide to leave.
「金人巷…里…尚滋味…好看…好吃…还不贵…」
"Spices Supreme... in the Aurum Alley... it's beautiful... it's yum... and it's cheap..."
你转过身去看他，兴许是在此站了太久，你觉得有些头晕，视线里的一切竟变得有些陌生，你强撑着打起了精神，这才看清眼前站着的人。

Spinning around, you see him. Maybe you've been standing in one place for too long, because you feel a little dizzy. Everything in sight suddenly seems a little strange, and you try to pull yourself together. Now you can clearly see who is standing before you.
几声弦鸣铮铮，给寂静无声荒园平添凉意。
Several tinkling strings give an extra chill to the deserted garden.
没有听众，也没有乐师，唯有孤琴呜咽不止，如泣如诉，像是等待有心之人驻足。
There's no audience or musicians around. Just a solitary guqin, whimpering mournfully as if waiting for an unrequited love to come around.
我得在这里再听一会儿……
I have got to listen here for a little while longer...
古琴的演奏者似乎不打算现身。既然如此，就当园中的凄风孤月有情，为你讲个故事吧——
The guqin's player hasn't seemed to materialize. Despite this, let me use the sentimental backdrop of the moon in this lonely garden to tell you a story...
你听说过不少恐怖故事，故事中的主人公总是不懂得在合适的时机控制自己的好奇心，但是你可以。
You've heard many horror stories where the protagonist is incapable of controlling their own curiosity — but you can.
不过，你知道绥园的怪异大多与岁阳有关，等做好了充足准备后再回来也不迟。
However, you know that most of the weirdness in Fyxestroll Garden is connected to heliobi. It's not too late to hold off and get yourself ready before coming back.
曾有一位化外民游客在这「绥园」里徜徉，却因为一阙琴曲停下脚步，他听出了曲中所描述的景色——峰峦、林海、飞瀑与浪花。

Once, an outworlder tourist visiting Fyxestroll Garden stopped his pacing due to a piece of guqin music. He heard the scenery described by the music: Lofty peaks, vast forests, soaring waterfalls, and ocean spray.
游客泪不成语，行人纷纷侧目，谁也不知发生了什么……
The tourist was moved to tears, while the locals all raised eyebrows at him. Nobody knew what was happening...
弹奏结束后，游人散去，琴师才有机会将这化外民搀扶起来，询问他流泪的原因。
After the guqin song stopped and the crowds scattered, the musician got the chance to reach out to the outworlder and ask why he had been crying.
只见那位化外民说道「我闻此曲，如见白璧有缺，不禁悲从中来……」琴师心中一惊，只有此人听懂了琴声——这是他一直苦心谱写，却始终无法完成的杰作。

When the guqinist heard the outworlder say, "Sounds like imperfect jade. I'm grief-struck..." he was shocked. Only this listener had understood the guqin's meaning: He had painstakingly crafted this narrative but could never quite complete this masterpiece.
琴师与化外民结为知音，决定以余生合力，补全这首曲子。
The two of them became close friends, the guqinist and the outworlder, and they decided to spend the rest of their lives together working on this song.
…时间也不早了，你打算再听一会吗？
...It's getting late. Do you want to keep listening to the story?
不好意思，其实刚才的虚构故事是改编自……
I'm sorry, but that fabricated narrative was actually lifted straight from...
不好，好像有什么事情发生了。
Uh-oh, something seems to have happened.
已经听得差不多了，该离开了。
You've just about heard enough. Time to leave.
这古琴似乎还没有注意到你，你也不必给它面子。你要是想回来，随时可以。
This guqin doesn't seem to have noticed you yet, so you don't have to pay it heed. If you want to come back later, you can do so at any time.
没想到，真有人在这里听我演奏完，你也不想活了吗？
Oh, some people actually came to listen to my performance. Have you had enough of living, too?
Friend, you're a real scary talker.
不好意思，我好久没和人说过话了……
I'm sorry. It's been so long since I've talked with someone...
你听我解释，是这样的，上一个这样和我说话的人，已经死了。
I can explain. It's like this: The last person who ever talked to me this way is dead.
朋友，你说话还是好吓人。
Friend, you are still a real scary talker.
我以为只有寻短见的人才会来这里听我演奏。
I thought only people wanting to end their own lives would ever want to come and listen to me.
…这么说吧，你就把我当成是一团留在古琴上的怨念吧！
...If that's so, then just think of me as a ball of resentment left stuffed inside the guqin!
朋友，你能不能别吓人了？
Friend, can you say anything that isn't scary?
It's hard work talking to you.
早说啊，这下我彻底明白了。
I told you, I completely understand now.
So long as you get it.
Stop shouting. Nobody can hear you.
古琴的主人有未完成的曲子，完成琴曲的强烈愿望残留在这里。而我，吸收了这些情绪，也同样想完成这首曲子……
The guqin's owner has unfinished music to compose, and that strong desire to complete the music remains here. And I, absorbing that desire, would like to finish this song, too...
但是你知道的我只是岁阳——我能咀嚼琴师留下的情绪与记忆，但不能创作。
But as you very well know, I'm just a heliobus... I can chew through the emotions and memories left behind by the guqinist, but I cannot create.
Tell me, how can I help you?
那你继续被困在这里吧，我要走了。
Then you can stay stuck in there — I'm off.
等等，别着急，你可以帮我脱离困境。
Hang on, not so fast. You can help me get out of here.
虽然我没有本事，但是仙舟罗浮上肯定有<color=#dbc291ff>懂音乐的人</color>能够完成这首曲子。
I may not have the aptitude for it, but there must be someone aboard the Xianzhou Luofu who <color=#dbc291ff>knows about music</color> and who can help complete this song.
之前寻短见的听众帮我留下了录音资料，你拿走吧，肯定能用得上的。
An old listener who self-deleted left behind some recording material for me. You take it. I'm sure you'll put it to good use.
虽然我没有本事，但是仙舟罗浮上肯定有<color=#dbc291ff>懂音乐的人</color>能够完成这首曲子。
I may not have the aptitude for it, but there must be someone aboard the Xianzhou Luofu who <color=#dbc291ff>knows about music</color> and who can help complete this song.
拜托你了，我想完成这首曲子。
Please help me. I want this song completed.
Excuse me. What do you know about guqin music?
抱歉，春分虽然正在学习持明时调，但是自己算不上了解……
I'm sorry. I'm learning the Vidyadhara Elegies right now, but I can't say I know much...
我想，长乐天里有一位能演奏编钟的乐师，估计她能帮上你。
I think there's a musician over in the Exalting Sanctum who plays the chimes. I bet she could help you.
您要是问「有什么和古琴相关的故事」，又或者「谁了解古琴」，那你可算是问对人了。
If you're asking, "Do you know any stories about guqin?" or "Who knows about guqin?" then you've come to the right place.
您知道在长乐天演奏琴曲的宫羽姑娘吧？说到古琴技艺，她肯定能帮到你。
So you know about Ms. Gongyu, who plays the guqin in the Exalting Sanctum, right? If it's the guqin, she'll definitely be able to help you.
Excuse me. What do you know about guqin music?
谈不上是我的专业范畴，不过我略知一二。有什么录音能让我听一下吗？
It's not my area of expertise, but I know a little. Have you got any recordings for me to listen to?
宫羽听到了未完成的古琴曲，也了解了琴师的遗愿。
Gongyu listens to the unfinished guqin piece and learns about the guqin master's final wish.
我已经明白原委了，但是我帮不了您。
I understand the whole picture now, but I'm afraid I can't help you.
You can give it another try...
坏了，我的任务完不成了…
Darn it. I won't get to complete my mission...
也许我应该觉醒成为音乐天才…
Maybe I should become a transcendent musical genius...
但是您放心，我想您可以不必空手而归。
But don't worry. I'm thinking you won't have to leave here empty-handed.
据我所知，大约几百年前，罗浮仙舟上确实有位技艺高超的乐师善于弹奏古琴。这位琴师遇到了他一生的短生种知音，却在知音逝世前也没能完成那首名曲。

As far as I know, several hundred years ago, there used to be a maestro guqin player aboard the Xianzhou Luofu. He met his musical soul mate, a short-life species — before whose untimely death they were unable to complete this guqin song.
那位琴师认为世界上再也找不到知音了，决定终生不再弹琴——作品未完成的遗憾却因此留了下来…故事是这样的，对吧？

"That guqinist thought he'd never find another musical soul mate like this, and decided to never play the guqin again — but he was forever filled with regret by this unfinished masterpiece..." That's how the story continues, right?
我好像知道这个故事，然后呢？
I really want to hear what happens in this story. So, what's next?
所以这首曲子要变成绝唱了吗？
So this song is going to become a magnum opus?
那位短生种的后代听着琴师的故事长大。其中一位后人怀着对琴师的憧憬来到仙舟，拿着琴谱找人演奏了未完成的琴曲，录制了下来。

The descendants of that short-life composer grew up listening to the tale of this guqin, and one of them came to the Xianzhou longing to learn more about their guqinist ancestor. They brought the musical score, and found someone to play and record the unfinished symphony.
后来，未完成的琴曲被发布到网络上。数量众多的音乐爱好者共同研究这曲难度极高的作品，掀起了一场古琴运动。
Later on, the incomplete tune was posted online. Lots of music lovers studied this fiendishly difficult piece together, setting off an ancient guqin fad.
仅仅数年时间，这曲古琴作品被编到了教科书中。经过数百年解析和研究，这首难度极高的古琴曲也变成了新手练习曲，有着数不清的版本。

In just a few short years, this guqin song began appearing in textbooks. After hundreds of years of analysis and study, this fiendishly difficult guqin piece has become a practice drill for beginners, spawning countless different versions.
I—Is that how everything worked out?
也许琴师本人在世时，「知音难觅」这样的事是存在的。倘若将作品交给时间的话，在未来总会遇到知音的，这首琴曲并没有成为绝唱。

Perhaps when the guqinist was still alive, such a thing as "hard-to-find soul mates" still existed. But if this tune was left to the vicissitudes of time, it could always meet a new soul mate in the future — never reaching its peak of perfection.
我帮不了您，因为您已经有了太多的答案。
I cannot help you, because you already have too many answers.
How's it going? Did you finish the song?
你解释了古琴曲后来的故事，也播放了录音。
You explain to him what became of the guqin song later, and play him a recording.
没想到，这么长的时间过去，琴师收获了这么多的知音。
I never expected the guqinist to have made so many new soul mates after all this time.
琴师会把他们当作知音吗？
Would the guqinist really consider them soul mates of his, too?
你们人类的喜好，我哪能回答得了呢？不过，随着弦的震动，我确实感到了些许自由。
Human hobbies! How am I supposed to answer a question like that? However, I suppose through the vibrations of the strings, I did manage to feel a touch of freedom.
对啊，可惜琴师没有想到。
Yes, it's a shame the guqinist himself never realized that.
幸好，作品以这样的形式完成了。
Luckily, the music managed to be completed this way.
事不宜迟，就让我现在来演奏试试。
Then without any further ado, allow me to give it a play right now.
谢谢你，琴师的遗作完成了，我也满足了。我自由了！
Thank you. The guqinist's legacy is now complete, and I'm happy too. I'm free!
岁阳再次附身在古琴上，演奏起来。
The heliobus takes possession of the guqin once more, and starts to play.
这位客官，你怎么跑到台上来听戏了，快下去！
Ahoy there, esteemed guest! How did you end up on the stage to watch the performance? Please get off quickly!
没事没事，现在的年轻人都不爱听戏了，有些不懂规矩也不是不能原谅。
It's alright. Young folks these days care not for opera. It's forgivable if you're unfamiliar with the rules and norms.
Nobody stopped me getting up though?
没人拦着…好，希望你对其他事情也是这个态度，下回你闯进幽囚狱，和武弁说「也没人拦着我进来啊！」看看能不能保住你的小脑袋。

Nobody stopped you... Alright, are you going to adopt the same attitude toward everything in life? When you eventually are trying to force your way into the Shackling Prison, tell the warden that "nobody's stopping you" — and see if you live to tell the tale.
也没别的观众，在哪听都一样。
There's no other audience members though, so isn't it all the same?
唔…没别的观众…你这小孩，说话真是不客气，噎到我了。
N—No other audience... Kid, you don't have to be so rude. I'm choking up here...
唉哟！喊什么，吓我一跳…你没见过岁阳是怎么着？
Hey! What are you yelling for! You freaked me out... Haven't you ever seen a heliobus before?
算啦，难得有人听我的戏…就不和你计较了。
Whatever, I never get any listeners... so I won't hold a grudge at you.
十王司只允许我在这绥园范围内行动，我找了半天才找到了这个戏园子，结果唱来唱去，就遇到你一个观众。难道戏曲真的没落了吗？

The Ten Lords only let me go around Fyxestroll Garden like this. It took me a long time to find this theater square, and I've been singing my heart out for ages now — but you're the only one I've met. Is opera really in such decline?
那确实是吓人啊。《合巹记》可是朱明花鼓戏里最有名的一出！
Yes, it's quite freaky. Wedding Wine is the most famous of all the Zhuming flower-drum opera!
它能被传唱大几千年，就是因为「吓人」。在我被收进造化洪炉之前，朱明人都听过这出戏！
The reason why it can be sung for thousands of years is because of how "freaky" it is. Before I was sealed within the Creation Furnace, it was known to everyone aboard the Zhuming.
This place is too bleak for you.
哦，有道理，你的意思是，我该去城里找个繁荣的戏园子？
Oh, good point. Are you saying that I should go into town and find a more thriving theater?
开个玩笑，别害怕。也就在这种鬼地方，十王司能对我睁只眼闭只眼啦。
Just kidding. Don't be scared. It's only in a forsaken place like this that the Ten-Lords Commission can turn a blind eye to me.
唉…说实话，在这里对着空气唱戏，也挺没意思的。你有没有兴趣和我学唱朱明花鼓戏啊？
*sigh* To be honest, singing to nobody in here is really boring. Have you got any interest in learning Zhuming flower-drum opera with me?
要拉开了架势认真学，那确实挺难的，光是唱念做打的基本功就要学个五十年。
It's difficult to seriously learn the posture. Just the basics of singing, reciting, acting, and fighting take a good fifty years to learn.
但我就只教你唱你刚听的这首《合巹记》，这还是很简单的。
But I'll just teach you how to sing this one, Wedding Wine — it's simple enough.
好啊，咱们就学你刚听的这首《合巹记》。
Alright, let's learn that song you just heard, Wedding Wine.
不麻烦的，咱们就学你刚听的这首《合巹记》。
It's not difficult. Let's just learn that one song you just heard then: Wedding Wine.
怎么样，就当是给我解闷儿了。我心情好了，自然就不会乱跑，我不乱跑，大家心情都好。是这个道理吧？

How about it? Just think of it as a way for me to stave off boredom. If I'm in a good mood, I won't run around all over the place. And if I don't run around all over the place, everyone else is in a good mood — right?
好啊！那咱们现在就算是师徒了～
Great! Now we become master and apprentice!
等你准备好了，就和我说一声吧，我教你怎么唱这首《合巹记》。
