Once you're ready, let me know, and I'll teach you how to sing Wedding Wine.
唉…也行，你要是改变心意了，就再来这里找我吧。
Sigh... Fine. If you ever change your mind, come back and find me then.
怎么样？现在想跟我学唱戏了吗？
How about it? Do you want to learn one opera song with me?
好啊！那咱们现在就算是师徒了～
Great! Now we become master and apprentice!
等你准备好了，就和我说一声吧，我教你怎么唱这首《合巹记》。
Once you're ready, let me know, and I'll teach you how to sing Wedding Wine.
唉…也行，你要是改变心意了，就再来这里找我吧。
Sigh... Fine. If you ever change your mind, come back and find me then.
今天这节课先告一段落啦！有什么问题，咱们下节课再说吧。
That's enough for today! If you've any problems, we can chat about it next time.
桌子上放着一本颇有年头的小册子，封面上写着《合巹记》。
An old booklet lies on the table, with the words Wedding Wine on its cover.
看起来，这是《合巹记》的唱本。
This looks like it's the libretto for Wedding Wine.
你想起你的那位岁阳师父，准备在下节课上给你安排一场「实战演练」。
You think of your heliobus master, who is planning on giving you "Practical Training" during your next session together.
也许到时候，它会要求你背下这出戏的唱词。要不趁这个机会提前预习一下？
Maybe when the time comes, it will ask you to memorize the lyrics to this opera. Do you want to take this chance to rehearse beforehand?
祝你顺利通过「实战演练」。
我直接用手机拍下来当小抄！
I took a pic and made a cheatsheet with my phone!
呃…很机智！但必须提醒你一件事——如果选择「我预习一下吧。」那个选项，你同样可以用你那超维度的手机把唱本制作成小抄，还不用花费崇高道德的赞许。

Er... That's smart! But I have to remind you about one thing: Even if you choose "Rehearse beforehand," you can use your extra-dimensional phone to make a cheatsheet of the libretto, without consuming your Praise of High Morals.
但也许你只是不希望自己身上有太多无用的道德赞许，也许你只是想要更有代入感…谁知道呢。
But perhaps you don't want too much useless moral approval. Perhaps all you want is to just feel more involved... Who knows?
我偏要花费道德做小抄！
I want to use up my Praise of High Morals and make a cheatsheet!
Fine, that's fine. As you wish.
你掏出手机，用它拍下了唱本的内容，之后上课时，你应该能利用它轻松通过「实战演练」。
Pulling out your phone, you take photos of the libretto's contents which should let you breeze through "Practical Training."
你说得对，我选择高维小抄。
You're right. I choose extra-dimensional cheating.
好的。祝你顺利通过「实战演练」。
Great. All the best with "Practical Training."
那你自己想办法吧。这段对话已经有点过长了。
Then figure it out yourself. This part of the dialogue is already starting to drag on, my guy.
桌子上放着一本颇有年头的小册子，封面上写着《合巹记》。
An old booklet lies on the table, with the words Wedding Wine on its cover.
看起来，这是《合巹记》的唱本。要读读看吗？
This looks like it's the book for Wedding Wine. Do you want to read it?
确实是个挺吓人的唱本。
It really is a scary libretto.
It's just a little booklet. Who cares?
爱徒，你来了啊～正好，咱们也该开始下一堂课了。
O prized pupil, you're here~ That's great. Let's begin our next lesson.
这堂课的内容很简单，就是咱们师徒俩一起，唱一遍这首《合巹记》。
This lesson is very simple. It's just us two, master and apprentice, singing the song Wedding Wine together.
在传统的朱明花鼓戏里面呢，这出戏也是两个人唱的。这是为了塑造那种岁阳附身的诡异感。
Zhuming flower-drum opera is traditionally sung by two singers to produce that eeriness of being possessed by heliobi.
我唱前半句，你唱后半句，咱们一起把这段给唱下来，你就算是学会了～
I'll sing the first half of the line, and then you finish. We'll sing this first stanza, and then you'll basically have learned it~
那我先再给你唱一遍啊——
So let me sing it to you first...
且为郎君点红妆，朱唇如血肤如霜。
In devotion, my heart does yearn. To be known by you, my love, in return.
且为郎君燃烛光，骨为灯芯肉做香。
Candles flicker, casting shadows on the wall. My bones the wick, my flesh the fragrance's call.
且为郎君解罗裳，芙蓉帐暖饱饥肠。
Robes fall away, revealing my desire. In hibiscus tent, our passions shall transpire.
此夜且与君成双，可怜我来日又守空房。
At night, we'll embrace as one, so tight. Come tomorrow, you'll take your flight.
How's that? Can you remember it all?
没太记住，能再唱一遍吗？
I can't quite remember that. Could you please sing it one more time?
当然不能了！传统朱明花鼓戏，就是这样传授的。我唱一遍，你跟我合唱，唱不出来，我就揍你。
Of course not! This is how Zhuming flower-drum opera is traditionally taught. I sing it once, then you sing it with me. And if you can't sing it, I'll beat you.
这样才能记得住，记得牢！几千年来一直都是这么传承下来的！
It's the only way to remember it, without a doubt! That's the way it's been done for thousands of years!
我当年也是挨了师父很多顿打，才学会了朱明花鼓戏。
I was also beaten often by my master before I learned the ways of Zhuming flower-drum opera.
How does a heliobus get beaten?
那还不好办？我可以附在我师弟身上挨打啊！
Isn't that easy? Just possess my junior frater and take a beating!
唉…可怜我师弟，他自己唱错要挨打，我唱错他也要挨打…后来他终于受不了，退出师门，说什么也不肯学了……
Sigh... My poor junior frater. He'd get beaten for singing wrong, and then get beaten again when I sang wrong... In the end he gave up and left the company, refusing to learn anything...
好的哦。那你可要记得，唱错了是要挨打的。可不是为师心狠手辣，这都是为了让你学会这段戏啊！
Alright. Then you have to remember that you'll get beaten if you make a mistake. This isn't just to be cruel; it's all so you can learn the song!
In devotion, my heart does yearn...
To know my love for you doth brightly burn.
To be known by you, my love, in return.
A love aggressive knows no turn.
To be known by you, my love doth spurn.
Candles flicker, casting shadows on the wall...
The wick predicts the candle fall.
My bones the wick, my flesh, and all.
My bones the wick, my flesh the fragrance's call.
There's chicken soup down at the mall.
Robes fall away, revealing my desire...
In lotus tent, our passions shall transpire.
In almond tent, our passions taken higher.
In lotus loft, our passions thus transpire.
In hibiscus tent, our passions shall transpire.
At night, we'll embrace as one, so tight...
Come tomorrow, you'll take your flight.
Come tomorrow, I'll guard the night.
Come tomorrow, you're out of sight.
My puppy's lick exceeds its bite.
天啊！咱师徒俩这合作可真是默契，默契到你完全不像是个初学者。
Heavens! Our cooperation is so tacit as master and apprentice that you don't even seem like a beginner at all.
没想到过了这么多年，还能遇到这样有戏曲天赋的年轻人…唉……
I never thought after so many years that I'd meet a youngster with such a talent for opera... *sigh*
但我也很清楚，你有你的事情要忙，不可能和我们这些当年的老东西一样，学个几十上百年的戏。
But I understand that you have your own affairs that concern you, and it's impossible for you to study an opera for centuries just like us old fossils have been doing.
主要是，也不值得你去花那么大的力气学戏了…现在的人，确实也不怎么爱听戏了。
The main thing is, it's not worth spending so much effort to learn about opera... Modern people, they really don't listen to as much opera as they used to.
没有的事，总有人会喜欢戏曲。
No matter what, there'll always be people out there who like opera.
Mmm... Well, I'll take your kind words, then. Haha!
的确如此，戏曲被时代淘汰了。
It really is like that. Opera is growing obsolete with the times.
但无论如何，我还是会继续在这里唱下去，哪怕这舞台下空无一人。
But no matter what, I will still keep singing here even if there's nobody in the crowd.
Thank you for singing opera with me, {NICKNAME}.
你唱错了很多句啊。唉…看起来，到了采用老办法的时候了。爱徒，莫怪师父！
You messed up a few lines. Sigh... Looks like it's time to resort to the old methods. O prized pupil, blame ye not thy master!
你你你你你…孽徒！你敢还手！你真是欺天灭祖、悖逆人伦、意狠心毒！
You-you-you-you... sinner! You dare fight back! You really are a blasphemer, violating human relations with cruelty and malice!
I was afraid you're going to beat me to death!
对不起，我习惯性反击了…
Sorry, I'm just used to fighting back...
你打不过我又不是我的错。
It's not my fault if you can't beat me.
确实不是你的错。是我，和我熟悉的那一整个世界，都已经过时了。
Really, it's not your fault. It's all me — and that world of mine I once knew, it's all obsolete.
虽然银河里到处都是寻求长生的蠢人，但活得久也不是只有好事啦。也会经常像我一样，觉得自己一直在被时代抛弃。
Despite the cosmos being filled with fools thirsting for immortal life, living forever is not all it's cracked up to be. Just like me, people often find themselves cast to the winds of time.
时代的浪潮像帝弓司命的神矢，而我只是一个飘摇在银河中的小火苗——无论怎么追赶，也追赶不上神矢的尾巴。
The wave of time is just like Reignbow Arbiter's Lux arrow, and I am but a tiny flame cast afloat in the Cosmos — no matter how hard I chase, I can't catch up with the tail of that arrowshot.
但无论如何，我还是会继续在这里唱下去，哪怕这舞台下空无一人。
But no matter what, I will still keep singing here even if there's nobody in the crowd.
Thank you for singing opera with me, {NICKNAME}.
屏风后的岁阳依然在卖力地唱着朱明花鼓戏。它坚信属于朱明花鼓戏的时代还没有过去，也坚信那舞台下的空无终究会被欢呼声填满。

Behind the screen, the heliobus continued singing its Zhuming flower-drum opera. It firmly believes the era of Zhuming flower-drum opera has not finished, and also that the emptiness of the theater will one day be filled with rapturous applause.
好～那咱们先从故事背景开始讲起吧。《合巹记》讲的是人被岁阳迷惑，与岁阳相恋的故事。
Okay~ Then let's start off with the background of the story. Wedding Wine tells the story of a man seduced by a heliobus and their love story.
女主角是一个充满魅力，又极度危险的岁阳。它引诱男人们和她结婚，又在新婚之夜将对方的情绪吞噬殆尽。
The female lead is a charming but deadly heliobus, luring men into marrying her, before ravenously feasting on the groom's emotions on the wedding night.
其实这个故事里最可怕的是人类…戏中有几个人类早就知道它是岁阳，却还是妄图利用它铲除自己的仇家。

The scariest thing about this story actually is the humans... There are several human characters in the story who knew that it is a heliobus but, despite this, still tried to use it as a tool to vanquish their own enemies.
当然，这群人最后都被女主角干掉了。某种意义上说，倒也算是个大快人心的故事。
Of course, these people are all overpowered by the female lead in the end. In one sense, it's a highly satisfying story.
从现在的角度来看，是比较俗套。而且咱岁阳本不分性别，却要被你们人类套上个「红颜祸水」的剧情模板。
It seems cliche from a modern perspective. And heliobi of course take no gender, but of course you humans have to wrap this archetype of a "femme fatale" around the whole thing.
但这出戏毕竟是三劫时代的作品，你可不能因为它的时代局限性，就否定它的艺术价值哦。只有不读书还爱思考的愚蠢人类才做这种事。

But this opera dates back to the Three Sufferings Era, and you can't deny its artistic merit based on its restrictions at the time. Only stupid humans who love thinking but hate reading books do that.
言归正传——咱们要学唱的这段，正是这出戏里最吓人的桥段。
But let's get back on track here... the part that we are learning is the scariest scene in the whole opera.
女主角附在新郎官身上，新郎独自一人，却做两人态，翩翩起舞。
The female lead takes possession of her husband, so there's just the one body there alone, but it takes the form of two and they perform this graceful dance.
一人一岁阳，就这样唱到了天明。等第二天人们进入新房时，却只看到了新郎官枯朽的尸体。
A human and a heliobus, singing until dawn breaks. When people come to visit the next day, all that remains is the withered husk of the husband's corpse.
且为郎君点红妆，朱唇如血肤如霜。
In devotion, my heart does yearn. To be known by you, my love, in return.
且为郎君燃烛光，骨为灯芯肉做香。
Candles flicker, casting shadows on the wall. My bones the wick, my flesh the fragrance's call.
且为郎君解罗裳，芙蓉帐暖饱饥肠。
Robes fall away, revealing my desire. In hibiscus tent, our passions shall transpire.
此夜且与君成双，可怜我来日又守空房。
At night, we'll embrace as one, so tight. Come tomorrow, you'll take your flight.
怎么说话呢！现在的年轻人，真的都不喜欢传统戏曲了吗？
How could you say that! The youth of today, how could they fail to appreciate traditional opera?
That is testimony to my singing.
这节课先到这里，你好好消化一下本堂课的内容。下节课，咱们实战演练。
That's all for today's class, then. Why don't you mull over what we covered today. Next time, we'll do our practical training.
今日到此为止，下课！咱们<color=#dbc291ff>改日</color>再会～请记住，下次见面我可得考考你了……
That's all for today, class dismissed! Let's pick up again <color=#dbc291ff>another time</color>~ Remember, I'll be quizzing you on this the next time we meet...
<color=#dbc291ff>To be known by you, my love, in return.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>My bones the wick, my flesh the fragrance's call.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>In hibiscus tent, our passions shall transpire.</color>
嚯哈哈哈！我被你发现了！
我想想，我给你点什么好处……
Let me think, what favor can I give you...
为什么要给我一些好处？
Why do you want to do me a favor?
怎么？你这么警惕，我真的就是想给你一点好处啊。
Huh, why so paranoid? I'm just trying to do you a favor here.
你不会一直在这里等着我吧？
You won't keep waiting for me here, will you?
你以为我在这里盼星星盼月亮，等着有一天有人突然造访？
Do you think I'm just sitting here wishing for the stars and moon, waiting for somebody to come and visit?
快跑吧，不怕最强法务找到你？
You should run. Aren't you afraid of the strongest legal department catching you?
最强法务…你是说十王司吗？
The strongest legal department... are you talking about the Ten-Lords Commission?
…我确实有些害怕，他们不会因为我「精心设计的出场方式」来抓我吧？

总之…我把这个给你吧，虽然有些臭臭的，但是很好用。

相逢即是缘，我们之间有缘分，一点点小礼物送给你，不要客气。

谢谢你，我会好好收下的。

那就好，没有人会不喜欢这样的小惊喜。

你的出场方式别人用过啦！

真的吗…虽然有些缺乏创意，但为什么别人用过的出场方式我就不能再用呢？
Really...? I might be lacking for creativity then, but why can't I use the same entrance as someone else for myself, too?
这算是我小小岁阳的请求，我能问问你为什么不喜欢吗？

呃，重复别人的行为会被扣上「没有创意」的帽子吗？人类真有趣。
Um, does repeating another person's behavior get unfairly tagged as being "uncreative"? Humans sure are an interesting species.
可是智慧生命的脑袋里能想象自己从没见过的东西吗？
But can intelligent creatures actually visualize something that they haven't even seen before?
如果我的登场方式不是突然出现，而是闪着火花螺旋升空，这样就没问题了嘛？没这么简单吧？
If my entrance is not a sudden appearance, but instead spiral off into the sky with sparks like a firework — is that okay? It's not that simple, is it?
这是抄袭别人的登场方式。
This is plagiarizing another person's stage entrance.
「抄袭」吗…听说在人类的社会里，如果做了什么与别人一模一样的事情，就会被追究法律责任。人类的法律这么严格吗？
So, plagiarism is it...? I've heard that in human societies, you can be held legally liable if you do the exact same thing that someone else has done before. Is human law really this strict?
人类会因为说了一句别人说过的话就被判官抓走吗？人类社会也太窒息了吧！
Will a human be arrested by a Judge merely for saying something that someone else said? Human society, how suffocating!
唉，还是做一只自由自在的岁阳比较快乐。
"sigh" It's so much better being a free and roaming heliobus.
十分尴尬，一点都不严肃！
It's totally awkward and not serious at all!
原来如此，是我登场的时机不太严肃，让你尴尬了呀。真抱歉，人类。
I see, it's the timing of my entrance that isn't serious enough, and feels awkward. Sorry for that, human.
等下次不太严肃的场合时，我再突然冒出来。除非你是个「一直很严肃」的人。
I'll pick a time in the future when it's less serious to suddenly pop out, then. Unless you're one of those "always serious" types.
You should learn how to be happy, human.
总之，下次别这么登场了！
Whatever — just don't make an appearance like that next time!
别人不喜欢，你该不会因此而放弃呼吸吧？
If someone else didn't like it, you wouldn't just stop breathing, would you?
如果要让说书的人下次别再讲别人说过的故事，那他或许会伤心难过、怀疑自己。
If you tell storytellers not to tell any stories that someone else has told before, they would feel hurt — or start to doubt themselves.
我是梗小鬼，就算人类不喜欢，我也不会停下来的，嘿嘿。
I'm Memey the Imp, and I'm not gonna stop doing something just because a human doesn't like it. Teehee!
好好拿着我的礼物吧，拜拜！
You enjoy that gift, okay. Bye!

This is just a normal incense burner.
香炉就像是走在半道上不愿意再继续散步的大狗，使劲往外拉拽也无济于事。
The incense burner is like a large dog who refused to keep walking while splayed halfway down a path — pulling it out by force doesn't work in the slightest.
...Maybe a change of direction would help?
虽说是平平无奇的香炉，它却如此突出。
It may be merely a normal incense burner, but in a way it's also outstanding.
就像是有一位香炉领导对着众香炉说「你们之中谁想接受这个困难的任务，就向前迈出一步」，结果其他香炉默默地往后退了一步。
It's like an incense burner leader barking at its incense burner rookies: "Whosoever wants to take on this difficult assignment, take one step forward!" — and seeing them all shuffle back in silence.
为了这小小香炉考虑，也为了让强迫症能好受一些，应该将它往里面再推一些。
For the sake of this wee little incense burner — and also to alleviate my intrusive thoughts — we should push it in a little more.
你什么都不会做的，但是…你可以随时回来。
You're not doing anything, but... you can also come back any time you want.
嚯哈哈哈！我被你发现了！
嗯？还以为是恚炎，真是吓了我一跳。
Oh, I thought you were Furynox... You spooked me for a second there.
啊，对了，我记得恚炎已经没了…被浮烟那个坏东西给吞掉了，那这个东西我留着也没什么用，你拿着吧。
Oh yes, that's right — Furynox isn't with us anymore... It got gobbled up by that wicked Cirrus. So, I won't be needing this any more. This is yours now.
只是因为我将香炉推进去了？
All because I pushed the incense burner in?
是啊，只有有心之人才会做这样的事。你得到了我的认可，所以我要给你奖励。

你们岁阳身上怎么带着大还丹？

…不过，我还挺喜欢跟恚炎捉迷藏的，唉。

虽然有些臭臭的，但是很好用，拿去吧。

…那个，我正在思考别的奖励方式，你有没有什么好主意呢？
...Well, I'm trying to think of other ways to reward you. Got any good ideas?
用香炉摆出一个圆形的圈…

不过和现在的做法相比，有些重复，让我再考虑一下。

在显眼的地方摆上一块大石头…
Leave a big boulder in an obvious place...

不过，我感觉大部分人都不会搬石头，我会一直躲着，不见天日。

在空中放置些画着标靶的气球…
Float some balloons with targets on them high up into the sky...
…你把所有的气球射下来，然后我再冒出来？
...and when you shoot down all the balloons, I pop out?
万一你没有弓和箭该怎么办呢，我可买不起……

要庆祝出生的那一天，结识的那一天，还有完蛋的那一天。这些行为不都很多余吗？

这家伙只是随便差遣人类，真搞不懂这有什么好玩的。

多亏你的开导，我可以尽情享受匹诺康尼的乐趣了——求之不得啊！

How about a SoulGlad to celebrate?
你让我想通了这么大一件事，应该我请你才对。

拿着吧，它将见证我新生活的开始。

有时间的话，就来<color=#dbc291ff>艾迪恩公园</color>找我吧。

Ding-dong, ding-dong! Here we are in the Arcadian Calendar year <unbreak>1999</unbreak>. On this fine and pleasant day, I, Paraprince, have noticed that the Great Raccoon has been sitting at {F#her}{M#his} desk, keeping {F#her}{M#his} nose to the grindstone all day without a single break!
老板多工作，员工才能多发钱！
The harder the boss works, the more the staff get paid!
有这么自觉的老板，《狸狸周刊》的销量再也不用发愁了哔波！
With such a conscientious boss, Furbobo Weekly's sales won't be a problem, boop!
噫！噫！是吗？浣熊屁拍错方向了……

还有空看我？你没用心上班。

猜错了！不过，虽然今天不是发薪日，但我不介意多一笔奖金啵！

Come on, spill it! Don't leave me hanging.
为了浣熊大人的健康着想，我幻太子只好将我脆弱的脸皮，弃置于此……
For the sake of the Great Raccoon's health, I, Paraprince, have no choice but to cast aside my fragile pride...
请暂停下手头的事情，起来走走，喝点水，活动一下脖子，看看杂志社窗外的风景，并时刻注意：不要忘记每日提肛五十次哔啵！
Please pause what you're doing, get up and walk around, grab some water, stretch your neck, enjoy the view outside the office, and remember: fifty kegels a day!
社长大人，为了《狸狸周刊》能准时发稿，我的狸猫爪子，已经敲得快要磨平哩！
Boss! To get Furbobo Weekly out on time, I've been typing so hard my furbo paws are practically worn down to nubs!
可困意像克拉肯的墨汁一样喷涌而出，一片乌漆嘛黑的阴云覆盖了杂志社上方。
But a wave of drowsiness burst forth like kraken ink, shrouding the office in darkness.
社长大人能不能一棒子把我敲晕在办公桌前，一觉醒来，本狸的脸说不定已经自动滚出一篇报道哩……
Boss... could you knock me out at my desk? Maybe when I wake up, an article will have magically rolled right off my face...
考验社长经营之道的时候到了！为了鼓励手下的狸猫记者，你决定——
Time to put your executive skills to the test! To motivate your furbo journalists, you decide to...
你贴在普狸策毛绒绒的小耳朵旁边，发出暧昧、邪恶而残忍的恶魔低语：「幻太子已经比你多写<unbreak>3000</unbreak>字了！」
You lean close to Furbulitzer's fluffy little ear and whisper in a low, wicked, devilish tone: "Paraprince has already written <unbreak>3,000</unbreak> more words than you!"
什、什么？好心机的幻太子，明明和我说它只写了<unbreak>1000</unbreak>字，这个叛狸。
Wh—What!? That scheming Paraprince! It clearly told me it'd only written <unbreak>1,000</unbreak>! Traitor furbo.
再见了社长大人，我要回去火速赶稿！今晚的杂志社，将被我拆家般的键盘声彻底轰炸哩！
Farewell, Boss! I'm heading back to crank out a manuscript at warp speed! Tonight, I'll deafen the newsroom with the sound of my keyboard!
我给大家点咖啡！加大剂量！
Coffee's on me, everyone! Extra shot!
咿——呀！还有这种好事？我马上在咱们工作群里@所有人哩！
Whoa, no way! This deal's too good to miss! I'm going to ping everyone in the work chat right now!
没出息地吊死在杂志社门口。
Pathetically hang yourself at the magazine entrance.
那能怎么办呢？你是一个没出息的社长，只能想出最窝囊的办法：在死线来临之前，亲自吊死在杂志社门口谢罪。
So what can you do? You're a pathetic excuse for a boss who can only come up with the most cowardly solution: hang yourself outside the magazine office as an apology before the deadline hits.
噢不，不可以！好不容易请来了新社长，《狸狸周刊》不能再次倒闭哩！
No, absolutely not! We finally got ourselves a new president. Furbobo Weekly can't go under again!
为了杂志社的未来，我会忍辱负重…负重前行…眼皮好重…我好像看见太爷爷哩…对不起太爷爷，我还不能过去，我要去写稿……
For the future of the magazine... I'll endure... press on... my eyelids are so heavy... I think I see great-grandpa... Sorry, great-grandpa, I can't join you yet. I still have articles to write...
你也别太拼了…给工作群的大家说一下，我请大家喝咖啡。
Don't push yourself too hard... Tell the work chat I'm buying everyone coffee.
社长大人！咖啡到哩！社长大人快来尝尝吧。
Boss! Coffee's here! Drink it while it's hot!
咖啡店的「轻脚宅急送」以鸽川冲浪般的速度送到了，发稿前难得的休憩时刻，你精心品尝了普狸策为你挑选的咖啡……
The café's "Lightpaw Express Delivery" arrives at Dovebrook-surfing speed. With the deadline looming, you savor this rare moment of rest... and the coffee Furbulitzer picked just for you...
咕嘟咕嘟，一股辛辣的味道顺着你的喉管俯冲而下，太阳穴开始渗出微微的薄汗——这不是普通的辣，是魔鬼椒在岩浆里淬炼过的口感，如果这玩意也能叫作咖啡的话……
Glug, glug... A searing heat dives down your throat. Sweat beads at your temples. This isn't normal spicy, this is devil pepper forged in magma, if this thing even qualifies as coffee...
一口咬下混在在海盐味道中的小料，感受着那股Q弹中带着胶质的韧劲，你意识到，真正的深渊，从勇敢咬开第一颗章鱼眼睛爆珠那刻起，刚刚向你眨了眨眼。
You bite down through the sea-salt mix. Chewy. Gelatinous. Disturbingly resilient. In that instant, you realize: the Abyss has just winked at you, the moment you dared bite your first octopus eye.
你隐约想起有人曾说过醋昆布像老爷爷腋下的味道，而配合了冷萃的醋昆布则像擦拭过腋下的汗巾在水里泡了三个昼夜的味道，猛啜一口，令人目眩神迷……

You vaguely recall someone saying vinegar kelp smells like an old man's armpit. Cold-brewed, it's more like an armpit towel soaked for three straight days. One hard gulp is enough to make the world spin...
社长大人，你怎么了？怎么翻白眼了哩？
Boss... what's wrong? Why're your eyes rolling back like that!?
感谢曾被姬子的咖啡折磨过的钢铁肠胃，在关键时刻救了你。
Thank the iron stomach you forged surviving Himeko's coffee. It saved you when it mattered.
上普狸策的咖啡车这种事…不会再有下次了！
Getting on Furbulitzer's coffee cart... never again!
社长大人，社长大人，大事不好哩！
{TEXTJOIN#254}论坛上出现了一篇奇怪的帖子，刻意引导网友误解我们和不死途侦探的关系，还艾特了杂志社官号，社长大人快来看看是怎么一回事哩。
There's a weird post on the {TEXTJOIN#254} forum deliberately twisting our relationship with the detective Ashveil. They even tagged the magazine's official account. President, you need to see this.
Elaborate on how they twisted our relationship.
总之…总之就是说我们可能和他私下勾兑，然后这样这样，那样那样，一堆乱七八糟的，解释不清楚哩！
Anyway... Anyway, they're saying we're secretly colluding with him, doing this and that, scheming behind the scenes! A whole mess of stuff that's impossible to explain!
你的解释也很让人误会啊！
Your explanation is making it worse!
社长大人就别开玩笑哩，十万火急，您亲自去看看吧。
Boss, this is no time for jokes! It's an emergency! You'd better go check it out yourself!
Let's not deal with this for now.
哇…不愧是社长大人，有着雷虬塔崩于眼前面不改色的气魄哩……
Wow... as expected of our president. Totally unfazed, even with chaos unfolding right before your eyes...
尤狸安遵命，这件事——咱们暂不处理！让那些讨厌的声音自己发酵会儿哩！
Roger that. We won't be dealing with this matter just yet! Let the noise stew for a while!
真是太过分分了，社长大人，咱们到底要怎么处理呢？
This is outrageous, Boss. What are we actually going to do?
Publicly take your stand to avoid trouble.
懂了！小浣熊冷傲退黑子！那么…我就这样写……
Got it! Raccoon coolly shuts down the haters! Then... I'll write it like this...
谨代表《狸狸周刊》杂志社严肃澄清：本刊始终保持中立客观的调查立场，绝无任何私联，如果点赞量超过<unbreak>500</unbreak>条，本刊保留诉讼诽谤的权利。

On behalf of Furbobo Weekly, we solemnly clarify: Our publication has always maintained a neutral and objective investigative stance, with absolutely no private dealings. Should likes exceed 500, we reserve the right to pursue legal action for defamation.
就发「我们的关系被发现了！」
这这这，这样说真的好吗？
I—I—Is it really okay to say that!?
住一栋楼的关系怎么了？
What's wrong with living in the same building?
You have to understand news hooks.
我懂了，不愧是精通传媒之道的社长大人，那么，我就这样写……
I get it now! You really are a master of media, Boss! Alright then, I'll write it this way...
没错，本刊和不死途侦探事务所的关系是…一起分摊同一栋楼的水电费的关系，被大家发现了！
That's right, our publication and the Ashveil Detective Agency share a... relationship of splitting the utility bills for the same building. You've all found us out!
这种不实消息直接封禁。
Ban this kind of fake news immediately.
收到！不愧是雷厉风行、铁腕手段的社长大人，我马上从后台查封这篇帖子！
Roger that! As expected of our decisive, iron-fisted boss! I'll take down that post from the backend right away!
社长大人，佛狸想来咨询一下职业规划，您的时间是否方便呶？
Boss, I would like some advice on career planning. Do you have a moment?
如果不占时间的话没问题。
Sure, as long as it doesn't take long.
谢谢社长大人呶，我会尽快呶。
Thank you, Boss! I'll be quick!
你不会是打算跳槽了吧？！
You're not thinking of leaving us, are you!?
能让我放心摸鱼的公司可是不多见了呶，我很珍惜这份工作呶。
Companies where I can slack off in peace are pretty rare, y'know. I really treasure this gig.
我也没规划…你问错人了。

原来您也和我一样…可您是我的领导嘛，我也只能找到您了呶。
So you're in the same boat as me... but you're my boss, so you're the only one I can ask.
呶呶呶…我也在狸狸通信工作很久了，却总是被父母说没有一点职业规划，缺乏目标。
I've worked at Furbobocom for ages now, but my parents keep saying I have no career plan, no direction in life.
可是佛狸每天上班就是为了下班，感觉目标还是蛮明确的呶…？
But I clock in just so I can clock out. That seems like a pretty clear goal to me...
别担心，你的目标规划很明确。
Don't worry, you've got your goals all mapped out.
谢谢社长大人呶，我有信心哩！
Thank you so much, Boss! I've got this!
要是父母问起来，我就说是您说的。

你认为我作为老板该怎么回答？

说不定幻太子知道，我等会问问它呶。

你确实需要多去接触下职场了。

咦？是我把打工狸文学看少了吗？

呶呶呶…我好像已经明白了，太复杂的思考不适合佛狸，我还是继续深耕摸鱼领域吧。

…原本我还准备了一些职场难题也浪费呶。不过，社长大人我还是想听听您的答案呶！
...I even prepared some workplace brain-teasers, but I guess those are gonna go to waste. Still, Boss, I really wanna hear your answer!
——假如社长您现在是打工狸，您有4杯咖啡，却来了5个领导，您该怎么办？
...Let's say you're a working furbo with four cups of coffee, but five managers showed up. What do you do?
考验职场情商的时刻到了。
Time to put that workplace EQ to the test.
都有5位领导了，还买不起咖啡么？再去买一杯就是了嘛。
You've got five managers now and you can't afford a coffee? Just go buy another.
社长大人说…{F#她}{M#他}买咖啡……
The boss said... {F#she}{M#he} should go buy coffee...
传统分咖啡的方式，好无趣；加入抽卡概率的分咖啡，好好玩。
Splitting coffee the old way is boring. Adding lucky draw odds to coffee distribution? Now that's what we call fun.
社长大人说…喜欢抽卡…好好玩……
Boss said... {F#she}{M#he} likes lucky draws... really fun...
平均分，再分一杯…有点难是吧？让5个领导减少1个人，应该不难。
Dividing things equally... and then finding one more share... that's a bit tough, right? Well, cutting one out of five managers shouldn't be that hard.
社长大人说…{F#她}{M#他}有超暴力级数学思维……
The boss said... {F#she}{M#he} has absurdly aggressive math instincts...
这不就是热门面试题吗？
Isn't this just a classic interview question?
没错，据说能看出一只狸在职场的情商呶，我很好奇呶。
Exactly. They say it shows a furbo's workplace EQ, y'know? I'm super curious!
…你来面试领导就已经很说明问题了。
...The fact that you're interviewing leadership already says it all.
Furli, what are you gonna do?
社长大人又在反客为主了……
The boss is flipping the script again...
呃…佛狸的话，应该是什么都不会做吧。
Uh... if it were me, I'd probably do nothing.
那你最好闭着眼、摸索着将杯子放在桌子上，大家应该会让让狸的。
Then you'd better close your eyes and fumble the cup onto the table. Everyone will make way for a furbo.
这次谈话之后，佛狸学到了很多呶…社长大人，小狸我这就告退呶。
I have learned much from this conversation, y'know... I shall now take my leave, Boss.
把题目发到工作群吧，我想看。
Post the question in the work chat. I want to see it.
社长大人！方便吗，有几个问题想问问您！
Boss! Got a minute? I've got a few questions for you!
《狸狸周刊》受邀成为二相乐园时尚节的特邀媒体了。其中有一个小环节，询问杂志社主编的包里平时装了些什么东西，要和大家分享。
Furbobo Weekly has been invited as a featured media partner for Planarcadia's Fashion Festival. One of the segments involves asking the magazine's President to share what's usually inside their bag.
社长大人说…真正的时尚人士…不背包……
The boss said... true fashionistas... don't carry bags...
身份信息卡、手机、钥匙、钱包。别的无所谓。
Wallet, ID, Cellphone, Keys. Nothing else matters.
社长大人说…潮人的包包里装什么…你别管……
The boss said... what a trendsetter keeps in their bag... is none of your business...
你要是这么记录的话，我实在是有点太狂妄了，完全不顾其他媒体的感受。
If you write it down like that, I'm going to come off way too cocky, like I couldn't care less how the other outlets feel.
嗷…社长大人，反正没有人真正地打开过您的包，要不…您现编几个我去交差。
Ugh... Boss, no one's actually ever looked inside your bag anyway, how about... you just make something up, and I'll call it a day?
I'll make up a fashion item, then.
Can't wait to see what you come up with.
社长大人说…只认可…三月七的时尚观……
The boss said... the only fashion sense worth respecting... is March 7th's...
My grandma's big floral quilted jacket.
社长大人说…一意孤行…要破坏时尚界……
The boss said... to reject conformity... and destroy the fashion world as we know it...
社长大人说…带着手下败将的…战利品……
The boss said... carry the trophies... of the vanquished...
Why don't you just check my pockets, then?
社长大人太诚实了，我好感动。
You're way too honest, Boss. I'm moved.
社长大人说…球棒浣熊…本体是球棒…不是浣熊……
The boss says... the Baseball Raccoon... is actually the bat... not the raccoon...
社长大人说…丢人的时候…要带上列车组一起……
The boss said... if I'm going to embarrass myself... I should take the Express Crew with me...
社长大人说…要做会走路的…炸弹……
The boss said... to become a walking... bomb...
别人是添油加醋，你是添油添盐添味精加醋还加酱油，完了还要加辣椒碎。
Other people "add a little spice." You're dumping in oil, salt, MSG, vinegar, soy sauce AND chili flakes to top it all off.
诶嘿嘿嘿～这是做记者的基本素养哩。最后一个问题！噔噔！
Ehe-hehe, that's Basic Journalism <unbreak>101</unbreak>! Final question! Ta-da!
…那您会把这件时尚单品推荐给其他人吗？
...So would you recommend this fashion item to others?
社长大人说…自己要成为…时尚的弄潮儿……
The boss said... the goal is to become... a trailblazing trendsetter...
社长大人说…自己要成为…时尚的孤品……
The boss said... you've gotta become... a one-of-a-kind fashion icon...
谢谢您的回答，以上就是「最不时尚奖」候选人的采访。
Thanks for your answers. That wraps up our interview with the nominee for "Least Fashionable Award."
How dare you set me up, punk!
哔嘟，浣熊大人，我们收到了一些后台私信反馈，有些是针对论坛上的贴子，有些是针对我们杂志社，说什么的都有。
Beep-boop, Great Raccoon, we've gotten a bunch of DMs from the backend. Some are about that forum post, some are about our magazine... it's a whole mixed bag.
浣熊大人帮我们看看，一起想想怎么回复？
Great Raccoon, help us take a look, and let's figure out how to reply?
Sure, let's check it out together.
那咱们开始吧！第一条后台反馈，IP地址来自绘世学院——
Alright then, let's get started! First message, IP address traced back to Graphia Academy...
「我举报这个帖子，发帖人说『这破学校害死我了，到处都是笨蛋，跟猪圈一样！』，我感觉受到了严重的冒犯，希望狸狸通信协助整改。」
"I'm reporting this post. The poster said, 'This trash school is killing me, it's full of idiots — basically a pigsty!' I feel seriously offended and hope Furbobocom can help rectify this."
浣熊大人觉得应该怎么建议发帖人修改呢？
What does the Great Raccoon think the poster should change it to?
实在是文雅而有力，同时不会冒犯到别人的控诉啵，就这么改！
Elegant and forceful, and it won't offend anyone either, boop! Let's go with that!
"I feel so helpless, and I'm the smartest one in school."
太厉害了，深藏不露的嘲讽啊，就这么改！
Brilliant! A quiet, vicious burn. Let's roll with that!
不用改，谁被冒犯到说明谁…
No need to change it. If someone gets offended, that just means they...
您说得对，谎言不是利刃，真相才是快刀。不是笨蛋不会受伤，那这条咱们直接跳过啵。
You're right. Lies aren't a blade, the truth is the sharpest cut. And if you're not an idiot, you won't get hurt. Let's skip this one then, boop.
第二条后台反馈，IP地址来自「世界尽头」酒馆——
Second message, IP traced to the "World's End" Tavern...
「我看了论坛上的黄金马桶帖子才去坐的，结果被传送到了酒馆的下水道里，接下来的事不说了，总之，我要求狸狸通信赔偿我清洗费和精神损失费！」请锐评。

"I sat on it after seeing the golden toilet post on the forum, only to get teleported into the tavern's sewers. I won't go into what happened next, but long story short, I'm demanding Furbobocom compensate me for cleaning fees AND emotional damages!" Please comment.
"A golden opportunity is raining down on you! Truly, you're blessed."
好福气啊好福气，这福气给我…啊，我不敢要啵。
What a blessing, what a blessing... give it to me... Ah, no, I wouldn't dare take it.
"Go get the tavern to compensate you. Not our problem."
哔哔，同意！咱们要硬气一点，不能被讹诈啵。
Beep-beep, agreed! We need to stand our ground and not let ourselves get scammed, boop.
"Dovebrook Grand Stage — if you've got guts, bring it on."
哼哼，懂了，尽管上门来讨教吧，咱们狸猫一族也不是吃素的啵。
Hehe, gotcha! Come at me anytime! We furbos aren't pushovers, y'know!
第三条后台反馈，IP地址来自二维市治安局——
Third message, IP traced to Duomension City Security Bureau...
「没别的意思，只是把狸狸通信当树洞吐槽一下。每天上班都有人对我说『你是真的狗啊！』很烦，到底什么意思呢？是对我工作能力的否定吗？忐忑忐忑忐忑……」

"I don't mean anything by it, just using Furbobocom as a vent box. Every day at work, someone tells me, 'You're such a dog!' It's so annoying! What does that even mean? Are they insulting my work performance? I'm freaking out..."
啊！原来如此，浣熊大人太有新闻嗅觉了啵，这条必须列入我的发稿素材库啵。
Ah! So that's it! Great Raccoon, your nose for news is unreal, boop. This one's going straight into my story archive, boop.
今天的后台回复时间就到这里，感谢浣熊大人的解答啵。
That's all for today's Q&A session, thanks for the answers, Great Raccoon!
浣熊大人，您还记得咱们的外派记者比狸比狸吗？
Great Raccoon, do you remember our field reporter, Furblix?
最近《狸狸周刊》的长视频和直播业务正在由它试点运营，吸引了不少关注哩。
It's been piloting the long-form video and livestreaming business for Furbobo Weekly lately. It caught quite a bit of attention.
比狸比狸说，粉丝们在公屏上的留言都想看球棒浣熊，所以！它想和您开一场PK直播，给直播间涨一涨粉哩！

工作…干不完呶！该招新人呶！我的前期工作已经准备就绪，就等老板有空了！

从来没人识破过我的拟态，你是怎么做到的？

是嘛…不对，你肯定是蒙的！有本事就再比试一场。

是嘛…不对，你肯定是蒙的！有本事就再比试一场。
Oh really... No, you must have cheated somehow! Let's try again if you think you've got the skills!

鼓发出了一连串打击乐声。无论触感还是外形，它都表现得像一面普通的鼓…你沉浸在节奏中，忘我地拍打着鼓面。

找就找嘛，下手那么重干什么……

话说回来，这次你又是怎么认出我的？

奇怪了，我这么逼真的拟态你都能认出来啊？

是吗？怪不得你这么厉害……

唉，我知道你是想安慰我…我承认技不如你。

是吗？嘿嘿，看来我也挺厉害的……

挺搞笑的，但是在匹诺康尼，倒也正常。

这一加长车，差点没给我外壳撞开胶了。

看不出来吗？我被车撞了！可怜了我这一身的手工外壳，全给刮花了。

说得对，得让他赔偿才行。

看来你脑子挺够用的。能在匹诺康尼开这种车的都非富即贵，钱对他们来说就是数字而已。
